name: video_0001_0001
chinese: 我不想嫁给李茶
english: I don't want to marry Li Cha.

name: video_0001_0002
chinese: 你这是嫁入豪门啊！
english: You are marrying into a wealthy family!

name: video_0001_0003
chinese: 我不想嫁入什么豪门，我们不就是豪门吗？
english: I don't want to marry into any wealthy family. Aren't we already a wealthy family?

name: video_0001_0004
chinese: 有那么明显吗？
english: Is it that obvious?

name: video_0001_0005
chinese: 我在这消费这么多钱，我低血糖吃块糖还不行了
english: I spent so much money here, I can't even eat a piece of candy for low blood sugar.

name: video_0001_0006
chinese: 够了，每次都是这一套，我不想再听了。
english: Enough, it's always the same thing every time, I don't want to hear it anymore.

name: video_0001_0007
chinese: 我刚才信号不好，现在可以了，怎么样，妈，公司给我安排的海景别墅楼。
english: The signal was bad just now, but it's fine now. How about it, Mom? The company arranged a seaside villa for me.

name: video_0001_0008
chinese: 我刚才是一害怕我就跟王安迪撒了个谎
english: I was scared just now, so I lied to Wang Andy.

name: video_0001_0009
chinese: 说到演讲啊，我不禁想起了我在我的母校。
english: Speaking of speeches, I can't help but think of my alma mater.

name: video_0001_0010
chinese: 经理经理，别忘了我那五十万和副科长。
english: Manager, manager, don't forget my 500,000 and the deputy section chief.

name: video_0001_0011
chinese: 友德读懂了您对我的暗示。
english: Youde understood your hint to me.

name: video_0001_0012
chinese: 这个神经病
english: This crazy person.

name: video_0001_0013
chinese: 有人假扮我，我要把事情弄清楚。
english: Someone impersonated me, I need to clarify the situation.

name: video_0001_0014
chinese: 觉得委屈你就走呗。
english: If you feel wronged, just leave.

name: video_0001_0015
chinese: 我实话跟你说吧，我们家破产了。
english: To be honest with you, our family has gone bankrupt.

name: video_0001_0016
chinese: 我爸想自杀骗保，追求莫妮卡是我爸活下去的唯一希望
english: My dad wants to fake suicide for insurance fraud, pursuing Monica is the only hope for my dad to survive.

name: video_0001_0017
chinese: 到干妈的公司来做CEO啊，对对对，年薪一个亿
english: Come to my godmother's company and become the CEO, yes, yes, with an annual salary of one billion.

name: video_0001_0018
chinese: 哦，对对对，她身份很特别，不想让我张扬出去。
english: Oh, yes, yes, yes, her identity is very special, she doesn't want me to publicize it.

name: video_0001_0019
chinese: 我说就算你给我一个亿我都不乐意，我就想在大渣集团干到断气
english: Even if you give me one billion, I still wouldn't be willing. I just want to work at Da Zha Group until I die.

name: video_0001_0020
chinese: 我的话不好使吗？
english: My words don't work?

name: video_0001_0021
chinese: 巧了，人事科正好缺了一个副科长。
english: It's a coincidence, the Personnel Department happens to be missing a deputy director.

name: video_0001_0022
chinese: 副科长还一步登天，我今天要不混上个正科长，我都对不起自己这顿折腾。
english: The deputy section chief is making rapid progress. If I don't become a regular section chief today, I will feel sorry for all the efforts I have made.

name: video_0001_0023
chinese: 黄先生我都听说了，我的干儿子沧海被你提升为副科长。
english: Mr. Huang, I have heard that you have promoted my godson, Canghai, to the position of deputy section chief.

name: video_0001_0024
chinese: 这样吧，你自己说说，咱们集团什么职位比较轻松啊！
english: So, why don't you tell me, which position in our group is relatively easy?

name: video_0001_0025
chinese: 我们想找你聊聊。
english: We want to talk to you.

name: video_0001_0026
chinese: 你觉得他该怎么办啊
english: What do you think he should do?

name: video_0001_0027
chinese: 但是您现在可以卖身救集团，干还是不干是吧？
english: But now you can sell yourself to save the group, will you do it or not?

name: video_0001_0028
chinese: 尊严丢了，整个人就破产了
english: Dignity is lost, the whole person is bankrupt.

name: video_0001_0029
chinese: 在他们眼里，莫妮卡根本就不是一个人，而是一堆钞票。
english: In their eyes, Monica is not a person at all, but a pile of money.

name: video_0001_0030
chinese: 大渣集团的小职员？
english: Small employee of Da Zha Group?

name: video_0001_0031
chinese: 不是都快破产了吗
english: Isn't it almost bankrupt?

name: video_0001_0032
chinese: 咱俩都得烧死
english: We both have to burn to death.

name: video_0001_0033
chinese: 我只是希望每个明天你都在。
english: I just hope that you are there every tomorrow.

name: video_0001_0034
chinese: 明天我在，后天就不一定了。
english: I will be here tomorrow, but I may not be here the day after tomorrow.

name: video_0001_0035
chinese: 我根本就不想嫁给你。
english: I simply don't want to marry you.

name: video_0002_0001
chinese: 也不知道是贵球队的哪位领导，在茫茫人海中一眼就叨中了我这只老妖精
english: I don't know which leader of your team it is, but they spotted me, an old fairy, in the vast sea of people at a glance.

name: video_0002_0002
chinese: 这菜还没凉，要不吃点？
english: This dish is not cold yet, do you want to eat some?

name: video_0002_0003
chinese: 你说的那些都是我的业余爱好
english: The things you said are all my hobbies.

name: video_0002_0004
chinese: 我认为你没有理由拒绝。
english: I think you have no reason to refuse.

name: video_0002_0005
chinese: 你们就一个球都别想进
english: Don't even think about scoring a single goal.

name: video_0002_0006
chinese: 咱们球队上上下下都是非常信任你，认为你就是能力不行。
english: Our team trusts you from top to bottom, but believes that your abilities are lacking.

name: video_0002_0007
chinese: 好聚好散，有时间回来看一看。
english: Good to gather, good to disperse. Come back and take a look when you have time.

name: video_0002_0008
chinese: 必须留下，他要是走了，我也不干了
english: I have to stay, if he leaves, I won't do it either.

name: video_0002_0009
chinese: 你们不要太嚣张了。
english: Don't be too arrogant.

name: video_0002_0010
chinese: 我没事儿，他们应该也不是故意的。
english: I'm fine, they probably didn't mean it on purpose.

name: video_0002_0011
chinese: 别听他颠倒黑白啊，我们就是故意的
english: Don't listen to him twisting the truth, we did it on purpose.

name: video_0002_0012
chinese: 你要非要感谢，那你把我签了也行。
english: If you really want to thank me, you can sign me up as well.

name: video_0002_0013
chinese: 知不知道你爷爷其实有一个弟弟。
english: Do you know that your grandfather actually has a younger brother?:

name: video_0002_0014
chinese: 哎，先别太激动。
english: Hey, calm down for a moment.

name: video_0002_0015
chinese: 王多鱼，我是你二爷。
english: Wang Duoyu, I am your second uncle.

name: video_0002_0016
chinese: 当我知道你是我唯一继承人的时候，我他妈差不多就直接哏屁了你这个孙子诶
english: When I found out that you are my only heir, I almost couldn't help but curse you, you little grandson.

name: video_0002_0017
chinese: 如果放弃选择的话，那这三百亿怎么处置？
english: If we give up the option, how will we handle the three hundred billion?

name: video_0002_0018
chinese: 那将会由殷先生和赖先生的基金会打理。
english: It will be managed by Mr. Yin and Mr. Lai's foundation.

name: video_0002_0019
chinese: 你那点财务还需要助理
english: You still need an assistant for your finances.

name: video_0002_0020
chinese: 你放心，你的猪脑我另作他用。
english: Don't worry, I will find another use for your pig brain.

name: video_0002_0021
chinese: 我这是自家小球队，我也没有办法。
english: This is my own small team, and I have no way either.

name: video_0002_0022
chinese: 但是要全包进来，一天起码也有十几万。
english: But it has to be all-inclusive, at least hundreds of thousands per day.

name: video_0002_0023
chinese: 非常理解您想请朋友们把酒言欢的心情。
english: I really understand your desire to have a joyful gathering with friends over drinks.

name: video_0002_0024
chinese: 您实在是太精明了，一时间我竟无言以对。
english: You are really clever, for a moment I was speechless.

name: video_0002_0025
chinese: 我看你跟王老板关系那么好，他没赏你个啥挣钱的职位？
english: I see that you have such a good relationship with Boss Wang. Hasn't he rewarded you with a lucrative position to make money?

name: video_0002_0026
chinese: 你说那个，你还是没有一技之长，就是大款身边的狗腿子呗，哈哈哈哈
english: You said that, you still don't have any special skills, just a lackey by the side of a rich person, haha

name: video_0002_0027
chinese: 我工作以来从来没有算错过任何一笔账，我不会因为你而破例
english: Since I started working, I have never made a mistake in any account. I will not make an exception because of you.

name: video_0002_0028
chinese: 王多鱼是我哥们，你们总说我是他身边的一条狗
english: Wang Duoyu is my buddy, you guys always say I am his sidekick.

name: video_0002_0029
chinese: 不太理想，话题太高端。
english: Not ideal, the topic is too high-end.

name: video_0002_0030
chinese: 王先生，你忘了我刚跟你说半年的事。
english: Mr. Wang, you forgot what I just told you half a year ago.

name: video_0002_0031
chinese: 我之前在法国专门选修过庭院设计，纯属爱好。
english: I previously specialized in courtyard design in France, purely out of interest.

name: video_0002_0032
chinese: 为什么算了，这么好的院子哪能就这么算了。
english: Why give up? How can such a good yard be given up just like that?

name: video_0002_0033
chinese: 那你好好做你的园丁，别再来找我了。
english: Then you do your gardening well and don't come to me again.

name: video_0002_0034
chinese: 明天早上我来上班，工具我那儿都齐。
english: Tomorrow morning I will come to work, and I have all the tools with me.

name: video_0002_0035
chinese: 我给你两分钟，你给我好好介绍一下，你怎么得的精神病
english: I'll give you two minutes, and you better give me a good introduction on how you got schizophrenia.

name: video_0002_0036
chinese: 王总您放心，我已经在最高点套现了，这次收益起码一个亿。
english: Mr. Wang, rest assured, I have cashed out at the highest point. This time, the profit is at least one billion.

name: video_0002_0037
chinese: 他可是资本市场良心啊
english: He is the conscience of the capital market.

name: video_0002_0038
chinese: 他变了，他竟然开始嫉妒我的才华。
english: He has changed, he has actually started to envy my talent.

name: video_0003_0001
chinese: 当然，也不能说是百分之百
english: Of course, it can't be said to be 100%.

name: video_0003_0002
chinese: 你看都这个样了，那什么时候才能见好啊！
english: You see, it's already like this. When will it get better?

name: video_0003_0003
chinese: 有你这样教育孩子的吗？
english: Is there anyone who educates children like you?

name: video_0003_0004
chinese: 我真不想看电影了。
english: I really don't want to watch a movie anymore.

name: video_0003_0005
chinese: 我什么都可以不要，我不去欧洲了，我不要LV了，我也不换车了。
english: I don't want anything, I'm not going to Europe anymore, I don't want LV anymore, and I'm not changing cars either.

name: video_0003_0006
chinese: 这事结婚前咱俩不是说好了？
english: Didn't we agree on this before getting married?

name: video_0004_0001
chinese: 不耽误不耽误，这是应该的，您捐钱给我们建新校舍。
english: No problem, this is what should be done. You donate money to us to build a new school building.

name: video_0004_0002
chinese: 这车窗是你砸的吧？
english: Did you break this car window?

name: video_0004_0003
chinese: 那就抱歉了，我也不知道你女儿在哪
english: I'm sorry, I don't know where your daughter is either.

name: video_0005_0001
chinese: 这不有病吗这
english: Isn't this sick?

name: video_0005_0002
chinese: 不是，我是真觉得咱们应该讨论讨论
english: No, I really think we should discuss it.

name: video_0005_0003
chinese: 您怎么会觉得他没错
english: How can you think he is not wrong?

name: video_0005_0004
chinese: 我们是倍儿严肃认真的认为他有罪
english: We are very serious and firmly believe that he is guilty.

name: video_0005_0005
chinese: 如果没有不同意的，我们现在就开始啊
english: If there is no objection, let's start now.

name: video_0005_0006
chinese: 这一般人家的孩子是真干不出来。
english: This child from an ordinary family really can't do it.

name: video_0005_0007
chinese: 心情不好能作为自己不在场的证明吗
english: Can a bad mood serve as evidence of one's absence?

name: video_0005_0008
chinese: 这就是我赞赏你态度的原因。
english: This is the reason why I appreciate your attitude.

name: video_0005_0009
chinese: 这典型一好孩子这是。
english: This is a typical good child.

name: video_0005_0010
chinese: 有你什么事啊？
english: What's the matter with you?

name: video_0005_0011
chinese: 活了74岁了。
english: I have lived for 74 years.

name: video_0005_0012
chinese: 他一穿着破衣服的老头。
english: He is an old man wearing tattered clothes.

name: video_0005_0013
chinese: 人跟你不一样，人家有的是钱
english: People are different from you, they have money.

name: video_0005_0014
chinese: 哎，这个大哥肯定是一清二楚
english: Hey, this big brother definitely knows everything clearly.

name: video_0005_0015
chinese: 所有的证据证人全是对的
english: All the evidence and witnesses are correct.

name: video_0005_0016
chinese: 用脑子想想就应该发现这里边有问题。
english: Use your brain and you should realize that there is a problem here.

name: video_0005_0017
chinese: 我不关心怎么了
english: I don't care what happened.

name: video_0006_0001
chinese: 嗨，大家就叫我小王吧
english: Hi, you can just call me Xiaowang.

name: video_0006_0002
chinese: 就在这咸鱼翻身的日子里边
english: In this day of turning over a new leaf.

name: video_0006_0003
chinese: 在这没人惯着你们。
english: No one spoils you here.

name: video_0006_0004
chinese: 现在是关键时刻，大家要团结嘛,啊！
english: Now is a critical moment, everyone needs to unite, ah!

name: video_0006_0005
chinese: 能力强，责任就大
english: Strong ability comes with great responsibility.

name: video_0006_0006
chinese: 一个人走，我实在是不放心
english: I am really worried when someone walks alone.

name: video_0006_0007
chinese: 你不尝试怎么知道是真的？
english: How do you know it's true if you don't try?

name: video_0006_0008
chinese: 我在你这儿不就一直就是个笑话吗
english: Am I just a joke to you?

name: video_0006_0009
chinese: 以后有哥的肉吃，绝对有你的汤喝
english: In the future, when there is meat for my brother to eat, there will definitely be soup for you to drink.

name: video_0006_0010
chinese: 你哪来那么多鱼呀
english: Where did you get so many fish?

name: video_0006_0011
chinese: 我们发现了一个好地方，那叫要什么有什么。
english: We found a great place, it's called "have whatever you want".

name: video_0006_0012
chinese: 现在想过来了啊，是不太晚了。
english: Now I want to come over, is it too late?

name: video_0006_0013
chinese: 大家觉得我这地方怎么样啊？有点意思吗？
english: What do you guys think of this place? Is it interesting?:

name: video_0006_0014
chinese: 这又向前跨了一大步。
english: This is another big step forward.

name: video_0006_0015
chinese: 这什么乱七八糟，你弄一个扑克牌在这糊弄鬼呢你？
english: What a mess, why are you playing tricks with a playing card here?

name: video_0006_0016
chinese: 你给三十我们都不会
english: You give us thirty, we won't be able to.

name: video_0006_0017
chinese: 燕雀安知鸿鹄之志哉
english: How can sparrows and swallows understand the aspirations of eagles and geese?

name: video_0006_0018
chinese: 你，你这不是放高利贷吗
english: You, aren't you lending money at high interest rates?

name: video_0006_0019
chinese: 就不讲理了呗
english: Just unreasonable, right?

name: video_0006_0020
chinese: 哎，讲什么理吧，规矩是我定的。
english: Hey, what's the point of talking about principles? I set the rules.

name: video_0006_0021
chinese: 我不一直是你的二货小跟班嘛？
english: Am I not always your silly little sidekick?

name: video_0006_0022
chinese: 你为什么这么对我
english: Why are you treating me like this?

name: video_0007_0001
chinese: 这么重要的时候，我怎么能不来啊？
english: How can I not come at such an important time?

name: video_0007_0002
chinese: 还记得今天是什么日子吗？
english: Do you remember what day it is today?

name: video_0007_0003
chinese: 你有病吧你。
english: You are sick, aren't you?

name: video_0007_0004
chinese: 别在这占着茅坑不拉屎
english: Don't occupy the toilet without defecating.

name: video_0007_0005
chinese: 今天是姐人生中最倒霉的一天。
english: Today is the unluckiest day of my sister's life.

name: video_0007_0006
chinese: 要是你能多来看我几次，可能会好一点。
english: If you could come to see me more often, it might be better.

name: video_0007_0007
chinese: 根本不是你们想的那样。
english: It's not at all what you think.

name: video_0007_0008
chinese: 都能让你开心的不得了。
english: It can make you extremely happy.

name: video_0007_0009
chinese: 你吃面能不能小点声啊
english: Can you eat noodles more quietly?

name: video_0007_0010
chinese: 我是你女儿的朋友，她生病了。
english: I am a friend of your daughter, she is sick.

name: video_0007_0011
chinese: 穿衣服的时候别为了臭美老是穿那么少。
english: Don't always wear so little just to show off when dressing up.

name: video_0007_0012
chinese: 就算拼，也不拼给你这种既无耻又混蛋的老板。
english: Even if I work hard, I won't work for a shameless and bastard boss like you.

name: video_0008_0001
chinese: 你的小金鱼有那么重要吗
english: Is your goldfish so important?

name: video_0008_0002
chinese: 100多里，你赶个屁。
english: Over 100 miles, you're rushing for nothing.

name: video_0008_0003
chinese: 大夫说了，要不做手术，她一年都活不过
english: The doctor said that if she doesn't have surgery, she won't live for a year.

name: video_0008_0004
chinese: 今天我想当面跟你说。
english: Today I want to talk to you face to face.

name: video_0008_0005
chinese: 我想看看你今天晚上有没有安排？
english: I want to see if you have any plans tonight.

name: video_0008_0006
chinese: 要不这样吧，让给我们家做年夜饭的酒店给你们送。
english: How about this, let the hotel that prepares our New Year's Eve dinner deliver it to you.

name: video_0008_0007
chinese: 回家看电视去了。
english: Went home to watch TV.

name: video_0008_0008
chinese: 照顾我生意啊
english: Take care of my business.

name: video_0008_0009
chinese: 生意生意，你就知道生意。
english: Business, business, you only know business.

name: video_0008_0010
chinese: 我也不会跟你说下不为例。
english: I won't tell you this as an exception either.

name: video_0008_0011
chinese: 花多少钱我都可以的啦。
english: I can afford any amount of money.

name: video_0008_0012
chinese: 该问的也都问了，我们家已经通知监狱了。
english: We have asked all the questions we needed to ask, and we have already informed the prison.

name: video_0009_0001
chinese: 姐姐这靴子真是好看。
english: My sister, these boots are really beautiful.

name: video_0009_0002
chinese: 妹妹不敢有任何非分之想。
english: My sister dare not have any improper thoughts.

name: video_0009_0003
chinese: 以后好好相处便是。
english: We should get along well in the future.

name: video_0009_0004
chinese: 我怀疑有眼线，不安全。
english: I suspect there is a mole, it's not safe.

name: video_0009_0005
chinese: 已经安排他进了高家的赌场。
english: He has been arranged to enter the Gao family's casino.

name: video_0009_0006
chinese: 我今天赢回了这么多金瓜子，你怎么不高兴啊？
english: I won so many gold melon seeds today, why aren't you happy?

name: video_0009_0007
chinese: 恐怕赵良娣未必与太子妃同心。
english: I'm afraid Zhao Liangdi may not be in sync with the Crown Princess.

name: video_0009_0008
chinese: 你也觉得奇怪啊，我刚才也觉得奇怪。
english: It's strange, isn't it? I also thought it was strange just now.

name: video_0009_0009
chinese: 赵良娣之前因为旭娘的事情与太子殿下狠狠地闹了一场。
english: Zhao Liangdi had a big fight with the Crown Prince before because of Xuniang's matter. :

name: video_0009_0010
chinese: 是赵良娣去了承恩殿，待了有小半日。
english: Zhao Liangdi went to Cheng'en Hall and stayed for nearly half a day.

name: video_0009_0011
chinese: 别跟永娘说，我问了话，下去吧。
english: Please don't tell Yongniang, I asked a question, go down.

name: video_0009_0012
chinese: 但是他手脚不利索，偷听了两次就被我的人发现了。
english: However, he is not dexterous, and he was caught by my people after eavesdropping twice.

name: video_0009_0013
chinese: 不论发现什么，我们都要装作不知道。
english: No matter what we discover, we must pretend not to know.

name: video_0009_0014
chinese: 我意已决，你不用再劝我。
english: I have made up my mind, you don't need to persuade me anymore.

name: video_0009_0015
chinese: 只有活着才有机会去弥补一切。
english: Only by being alive can we have the opportunity to make up for everything.

name: video_0009_0016
chinese: 我不是担心你嘛，就过来看看。
english: I'm not worried about you, just come and take a look.

name: video_0009_0017
chinese: 他是一个神仙一般的人。
english: He is a fairy-like person.

name: video_0009_0018
chinese: 我要看看这个神仙一样的人，是不是真的配得上我的明月姐姐
english: I want to see if this god-like person is really worthy of my sister, Mingyue.

name: video_0009_0019
chinese: 来什么来，老子偏不信这个邪
english: What's coming, I don't believe in this evil.

name: video_0009_0020
chinese: 今日天气好，瑟瑟就想到姐姐这里来坐。
english: Today's weather is good, so I thought of coming to my sister's place.

name: video_0009_0021
chinese: 没有，我就穿上这身衣服试试。
english: No, I'll just put on this outfit and give it a try.

name: video_0009_0022
chinese: 是我自小随身携带的香，啊，太子殿下，也喜欢这个味道呢。
english: It is a fragrance that I have carried with me since I was a child. Ah, Your Highness, you also like this scent.

name: video_0009_0023
chinese: 你好端端的来这干嘛？他有没有为难你啊
english: Why did you come here all of a sudden? Did he give you a hard time?

name: video_0009_0024
chinese: 你这话什么意思啊，我为什么要为难她
english: What do you mean by that? Why should I make things difficult for her?

name: video_0009_0025
chinese: 所以我就成了横在他和赵良娣之间最讨厌的人
english: So I became the most hated person standing between him and Zhao Liangdi.

name: video_0009_0026
chinese: 可是我越想西洲，就越讨厌冷冷清清的东宫
english: But the more I think about Xizhou, the more I dislike the desolate Donggong.

name: video_0009_0027
chinese: 该用张参来离间高相和皇后
english: It is necessary to use Zhang Can to sow discord between Gao Xiang and the queen.

name: video_0009_0028
chinese: 你们等着，给我等着
english: You guys wait, wait for me.

name: video_0009_0029
chinese: 哪个王八蛋，敢动老子地盘？
english: Which bastard dares to touch my territory?

name: video_0009_0030
chinese: 那妾身现在就召人准备茶
english: I will now summon someone to prepare tea.

name: video_0009_0031
chinese: 你怎么能在陛下面前如此失礼？
english: How can you be so rude in front of His Majesty?

name: video_0009_0032
chinese: 衙门却草草掩尸结案，衙门不肯秉公办理啊
english: The yamen hastily covered up the body and closed the case, refusing to handle it impartially.

name: video_0009_0033
chinese: 儿臣理应为朝政、为父皇分忧。
english: The child should assist in the affairs of the court and share the worries of the emperor.

name: video_0009_0034
chinese: 我也是没有办法才把他带到这里来的。
english: I had no choice but to bring him here.

name: video_0009_0035
chinese: 到底是谁给朕唱的这一出好戏？
english: Who on earth sang this good show for us?

name: video_0009_0036
chinese: 确实很可疑，那此事更要继续查。
english: It is indeed very suspicious, so this matter needs to be further investigated.

name: video_0009_0037
chinese: 我到现在都没找到一个合适的人选。
english: I still haven't found a suitable candidate.

name: video_0009_0038
chinese: 赵士玄是你娘家人，让他协理也是理所应当的
english: Zhao Shixuan is your relative from your mother's side, so it is only natural to ask him for assistance.

name: video_0009_0039
chinese: 高震如此行事，必有猫腻
english: Gao Zhen must have ulterior motives for acting like this.

name: video_0009_0040
chinese: 高震这个混账王八蛋就一定大事化小，小事化了了。
english: Gao Zhen, this bastard, always tries to make a big deal out of nothing and trivialize important matters.

name: video_0009_0041
chinese: 你让我唱就唱啊。
english: You want me to sing, so I'll sing.

name: video_0009_0042
chinese: 我只会唱这一首。
english: I can only sing this one song.

name: video_0010_0001
chinese: 我爸你还不知道，他就那样，对不对
english: My dad, you still don't know, he's just like that, right?

name: video_0010_0002
chinese: 他比较自私，你知道吧，我妈，我妈不是以为你走了吗？
english: He is quite selfish, you know. My mom, my mom thought you had left, didn't she?

name: video_0010_0003
chinese: 我是说磊儿县城来的，对北京不了解啊，我怕他在学校闹什么笑话你们同学到时候笑他
english: I am from Leier County, and I am not familiar with Beijing. I am afraid that he will cause some jokes at school and your classmates will laugh at him.

name: video_0010_0004
chinese: 才好了一天又不回家了，也不跟他们说一声，让咱们在家里干着急，你看。
english: Just when things got better for a day, you didn't come home again, and you didn't even tell them, leaving us worried at home. Look at you.

name: video_0010_0005
chinese: 方一凡俩人还聊的欢声笑语的，行，哥儿俩处的不错，挺好。
english: Fang Yifan and the other person were chatting happily, okay, the two brothers get along well, it's pretty good.

name: video_0010_0006
chinese: 我怕磊儿自卑，又到了一个陌生的环境，还要看别人脸色。
english: I'm afraid that Leier is feeling inferior, and now he is in a unfamiliar environment, and he has to constantly worry about others' opinions.

name: video_0010_0007
chinese: 这个混小子，让他别回来了，就住他舅舅的车场里，这个家呀容不下他。
english: This troublemaker, tell him not to come back, just stay in his uncle's car park. This family can't accommodate him.

name: video_0010_0008
chinese: 我一定不辜负你的期望，好好学习，好好努力，要考一个好的大学。
english: I will definitely not let you down, study hard, work hard, and strive to get into a good university.

name: video_0010_0009
chinese: 妈妈，其实我，我,我想你了。
english: Mom, actually, I, I, I miss you.

name: video_0010_0010
chinese: 这不是早上起来头脑清楚嘛，我就跑了个步，再做个听力。
english: Isn't it clear-headed when waking up in the morning? I just went for a run and then did some listening exercises.

name: video_0010_0011
chinese: 年轻的时候，我就是想先把业立起来，踏踏实实地为老百姓做点事。
english: When I was young, I just wanted to establish my career first and do something practical for the ordinary people.

name: video_0010_0012
chinese: 哎，我跟你说那就是陈奇怪太弱了。
english: Hey, let me tell you, Chen is just too weak.

name: video_0010_0013
chinese: 林磊儿，我表弟，学霸一枚
english: Lin Lei, my cousin, a straight-A student.

name: video_0010_0014
chinese: 我希望你们都提起精神来给我好好考。
english: I hope all of you can raise your spirits and give me a good exam.

name: video_0010_0015
chinese: 50分一下就没了，你好歹写俩字啊
english: If it's less than 50 points, it's gone. At least write two words.

name: video_0010_0016
chinese: 我们想接触接触洋洋的兴趣爱好，以后也好跟他沟通。
english: We want to get in touch with Yangyang's interests, so that we can communicate with him in the future.

name: video_0010_0017
chinese: 我觉得这个想法不错，提议也不赖。
english: I think this idea is good, and the proposal is not bad either.

name: video_0010_0018
chinese: 我哪点搞不定了？她胡说什么呢？
english: What can't I figure out? What is she talking nonsense about?

name: video_0010_0019
chinese: 没本事的人才这么干呢。
english: People without abilities can only do this.

name: video_0010_0020
chinese: 无不无聊啊，你先保护好你自己吧。
english: Is it boring? You should protect yourself first.

name: video_0010_0021
chinese: 你们这里有一大半的人都考不上一本。
english: Half of the people here cannot pass the national college entrance examination.

name: video_0010_0022
chinese: 同学们在这，有同学们陪我，我肯定不走。
english: The students are here, there are students accompanying me, I definitely won't leave.

name: video_0010_0023
chinese: 我吧，以前也是这个春风中学的老师。
english: I used to be a teacher at this Chunfeng Middle School.

name: video_0010_0024
chinese: 真的，你看你这个流氓样子。
english: Seriously, look at yourself, you look like a hooligan.

name: video_0010_0025
chinese: 能有毒吗，我能害我自己闺女吗
english: Can it be poisonous? Can I harm my own daughter?

name: video_0010_0026
chinese: 脸都不要了，还要什么面子
english: I don't even want my face, what face do you still want?

name: video_0010_0027
chinese: 你俩是没决裂哈，还挺亲密，像两口子似的
english: You two haven't broken up, you are quite close, like a married couple.

name: video_0010_0028
chinese: 周末有时间再来细说，成不成，我们明天还要考英语和理综呢
english: We can talk about it in detail when we have time on the weekend. But, tomorrow we still have to take English and comprehensive science exams.

name: video_0010_0029
chinese: 亲爱的，怎么跟外星人似的
english: Dear, why do you look like an alien?

name: video_0010_0030
chinese: 你也是闲的，还老跟人提问题，你说这女的不神经病吗？
english: Are you also idle, always asking people questions? Do you think this woman is not mentally ill?

name: video_0010_0031
chinese: 你以后别再给他买这些了，他都高三了，多耽误学习。
english: Don't buy these for him anymore in the future. He's already in his third year of high school, it will affect his studies.

name: video_0010_0032
chinese: 而且姐夫今天特意给我打一电话呢，说想了解一下杨杨的兴趣爱好。
english: And my brother-in-law specially called me today to ask about Yang Yang's interests and hobbies.

name: video_0010_0033
chinese: 晚上要加一个晚自习，答答疑，明天还有一天呢。
english: In the evening, I have to attend an evening self-study session, answer questions, and tomorrow is another day.

name: video_0010_0034
chinese: 感情您这是带着筹码跟我谈判呢。
english: Are you negotiating with me with emotions and chips?

name: video_0010_0035
chinese: 季胜利的儿子绝不允许进慢班。
english: Ji Shengli's son is absolutely not allowed to enter the slow class.

name: video_0010_0036
chinese: 你看他发挥多稳定啊，说明他心理素质特别好。
english: You see how stable he performs, which indicates that he has excellent mental resilience.

name: video_0010_0037
chinese: 你们家磊儿真是学霸呀。
english: Your son Leier is really a top student.

name: video_0010_0038
chinese: 你妈说来磊儿来了影响方一凡学习。
english: Your mother said that Leier's arrival has affected Fang Yifan's studying.

name: video_0011_0001
chinese: 不全是因为她身孕的缘故，她是难得的稳重。
english: It's not just because of her pregnancy, she is rarely steady.

name: video_0011_0002
chinese: 是吗？那可太好了。
english: Is that so? That's great.

name: video_0011_0003
chinese: 是正事，华妃失势难免不会东山再起。
english: It is a serious matter. It is inevitable that Huifei will make a comeback.

name: video_0011_0004
chinese: 皇上怕是也没心情见二位小主了。
english: The emperor may not be in the mood to see the two young masters.

name: video_0011_0005
chinese: 儿臣与莞娘娘有缘。
english: The child minister and the Lady Guan have a connection.

name: video_0011_0006
chinese: 从前小看了那个病歪歪的甄嬛，以后走着瞧吧
english: In the past, I underestimated the sickly Zhen Huan, but from now on, let's wait and see.

name: video_0011_0007
chinese: 与其心生敬佩，不如自己便是那样的人。
english: Rather than admiring others, it is better to be that kind of person oneself.

name: video_0011_0008
chinese: 会疼人的才是男子汉呢
english: A man who can be considerate is a real man.

name: video_0011_0009
chinese: 我倒盼着是个公主，和温宜一样的可爱呢
english: I really hope to be a princess, as lovely as Wen Yi.

name: video_0011_0010
chinese: 怎能送她这么贵重的东西。
english: How can I give her such a valuable gift?

name: video_0011_0011
chinese: 今日之事一个人都不许说起，否则，我死无葬身之地
english: No one is allowed to mention today's events, otherwise, I will have no place to be buried.

name: video_0011_0012
chinese: 娘娘盛情，嫔妾自当从命
english: Your Majesty's kindness is overwhelming, and I, as a concubine, shall obey your command.

name: video_0011_0013
chinese: 那日竟然难产而死，只留下四阿哥
english: That day, she unexpectedly died in childbirth, leaving only the Fourth Prince.

name: video_0011_0014
chinese: 你随便一舞即可
english: You can dance casually.

name: video_0011_0015
chinese: 不能得见故皇后之舞姿是臣妾之憾。
english: I regret not being able to witness the dance of the former queen.

name: video_0011_0016
chinese: 梅妃含情所著的楼东赋没有能使她再度得幸于唐玄宗，倒是华妃娘娘感动了皇上。
english: Mei Fei's emotionally written Lou Dong Fu couldn't win her favor with Emperor Tang Xuanzong again, but it was Consort Hua who moved the emperor.

name: video_0011_0017
chinese: 我是怕这日子又要难过了。
english: I'm afraid these days will be difficult again.

name: video_0011_0018
chinese: 叫我怎么甘心呢
english: How can I be willing to accept it?

name: video_0011_0019
chinese: 端亲王有倨傲的本钱。
english: The prince has the capital of arrogance and pride.

name: video_0011_0020
chinese: 身为皇后，永远都不能有说厌烦的时候。
english: As a queen, one can never have a moment of being tired of speaking.

name: video_0011_0021
chinese: 娘娘正当盛时，肯定还能再添一位阿哥
english: The empress is in her prime, she will definitely be able to have another prince.

name: video_0011_0022
chinese: 弘晖死的时候，外面也是这样的雨天
english: When Honghui died, it was also raining outside.

name: video_0011_0023
chinese: 孩子长得快，一会就长大了。
english: Children grow up quickly, they will be grown up in no time.

name: video_0011_0024
chinese: 我父亲下狱了
english: My father was imprisoned.

name: video_0011_0025
chinese: 好端端的，怎么会出这样的事呢？
english: How could such a thing happen out of the blue?

name: video_0011_0026
chinese: 怎么，贵人您是为了安答应的父亲求情来了。
english: How come, esteemed person, you have come here to plead on behalf of An Da's father?

name: video_0011_0027
chinese: 您没看见皇上方才为这事发多大的脾气呢
english: Didn't you see how angry the emperor was just now because of this matter?

name: video_0011_0028
chinese: 一去不知何时才能回来，要不先到偏殿等候吧。
english: I don't know when I can come back, so why not wait in the side hall first?

name: video_0011_0029
chinese: 娘娘如此关怀，臣妾感同身受。
english: Your Majesty cares so much, and I deeply feel it as well.

name: video_0011_0030
chinese: 想必是与皇后反其道而行之，想让皇上从严处置安比槐吧
english: I suppose it is to go against the queen and make the emperor punish Anbihuai strictly.

name: video_0011_0031
chinese: 再亲自去向娘娘道谢吧
english: Please go and personally thank the Queen.

name: video_0011_0032
chinese: 小主，浣碧不是有意的。
english: Master, Huanbi did not mean it.

name: video_0011_0033
chinese: 天气炎热，公主吃不下，难免瘦了些。
english: The weather is hot, the princess can't eat much, so she inevitably lost some weight.

name: video_0011_0034
chinese: 这法子真是巧，皇上真真是有心了。
english: This method is really clever, the emperor is really thoughtful.

name: video_0011_0035
chinese: 不小心说与了旁人听，而说者无心，听者有意。
english: Accidentally said it in front of others, but the speaker didn't mean it and the listener did.

name: video_0012_0001
chinese: 馆陶真棒
english: Guantao is awesome.

name: video_0012_0002
chinese: 娘娘，你要的药熬好了
english: Madam, the medicine you requested has been prepared.

name: video_0012_0003
chinese: 带弟弟去午睡，母后要做事了
english: Taking my younger brother to take a nap, mother has things to do.

name: video_0012_0004
chinese: 本宫也算死得其所，求仁得仁
english: I also consider myself dead, seeking benevolence and receiving it.

name: video_0012_0005
chinese: 娘娘，不要
english: Your Majesty, please don't.

name: video_0012_0006
chinese: 为什么没有人禀报
english: Why hasn't anyone reported?

name: video_0012_0007
chinese: 赶巧了，这大事就发生了
english: As luck would have it, this major event just happened.

name: video_0012_0008
chinese: 你敢说跟你没关系。
english: You dare to say it has nothing to do with you.

name: video_0012_0009
chinese: 此时此刻最重要的是世子的安危啊！
english: The most important thing at this moment is the safety of the crown prince!

name: video_0012_0010
chinese: 子冉，孤王对不起你
english: Ziran, I'm sorry for being a lonely king.

name: video_0012_0011
chinese: 是你杀死了我的尊儿，你心里高兴，所以你哭不出来是不是
english: You killed my beloved son, are you happy in your heart, so you can't cry, right?

name: video_0012_0012
chinese: 宫中一连发生两件丧事，臣妾哀伤至极
english: There have been two funerals in the palace in succession, and the officials and concubines are extremely saddened.

name: video_0012_0013
chinese: 吕雉啊吕雉，你也不过如此，哈哈哈哈哈哈
english: Lv Zhi, oh Lv Zhi, you are just like this, hahahahahaha

name: video_0012_0014
chinese: 王后娘娘一人之下，还缺什么呢
english: Under the queen, who else is missing?

name: video_0012_0015
chinese: 哀家如果饿死了不正好遂了你的意吗？
english: If I starve to death, wouldn't it just fulfill your wish?

name: video_0012_0016
chinese: 你别难过，馆陶会一直陪着你的
english: Don't be sad, Guantao will always be with you.

name: video_0012_0017
chinese: 今天在紫苏那里，本王差点就保不住你了。
english: Today, at Zisu's place, I almost couldn't protect you, my king.

name: video_0012_0018
chinese: 她不见我，还不让我进去。
english: She doesn't see me and doesn't let me in.

name: video_0012_0019
chinese: 到时候代王的伤痛也许就过去了。
english: The pain of being a substitute king may have passed by then.

name: video_0012_0020
chinese: 吕路他们弄的那个小皇帝进宫了吗
english: Did Lv Lu and his friends bring the little emperor into the palace?:

name: video_0012_0021
chinese: 盯着就不出岔子了，一群蠢货。
english: Staring will prevent any mistakes, a group of idiots.

name: video_0012_0022
chinese: 这不可能
english: This is impossible.

name: video_0012_0023
chinese: 想造哀家的反，你还差了点。
english: You still lack a bit to make me feel sorry for you.

name: video_0012_0024
chinese: 恭喜侯爷，凯旋归来。
english: Congratulations, Lord Hou, for your triumphant return.

name: video_0012_0025
chinese: 你没有想到，本侯爷也有今天吧
english: You didn't expect that, did you, my lord?

name: video_0012_0026
chinese: 你说我怎么就生了你这样一个笨女儿呢我。
english: Why did I give birth to such a stupid daughter like you?

name: video_0012_0027
chinese: 我要做爹了。
english: I'm going to be a dad.

name: video_0012_0028
chinese: 我们现在有孩子了，不能再像以前那样得过且过。
english: We have children now, we can't just live carelessly like before.

name: video_0012_0029
chinese: 太皇太后没有杀我们，说明她老了心软了。
english: The Empress Dowager did not kill us, which means she has grown old and softened her heart.

name: video_0012_0030
chinese: 我求你，我求你给我们吕家的子孙留一条活路
english: I beg you, I beg you to leave a way out for the future generations of the Lv family.

name: video_0012_0031
chinese: 转眼间，我已经变成太后娘娘了
english: In the blink of an eye, I have become the Empress Dowager.

name: video_0012_0032
chinese: 我真希望可以停在看你跳舞的那天晚上。
english: I really wish I could stop on the night I watched you dance.

name: video_0012_0033
chinese: 也不知道这一走我们什么时候还能再见面
english: I don't know when we can meet again after this departure.

name: video_0012_0034

chinese: 好，只要你现在告诉我你讨厌我，我就永远在你面。
english: Okay, as long as you tell me right now that you hate me, I will always be in front of you.

name: video_0016_0024
chinese: 看不出来呀，小伙子啊，挺会聊天啊！
english: I can't tell, young man, you're quite good at chatting!

name: video_0016_0025
chinese: 差钱的话，你告诉我个数，我回去凑还不行吗？
english: If you need money, can you tell me the amount? Can't I go back and gather it for you?

name: video_0016_0026
chinese: 唉，你能不能就我现在这身儿行头记性？即兴赋诗一首。
english: Ah, can you just remember me in my current outfit? Improvise and write a poem.

name: video_0016_0027
chinese: 早就不练了，有一年比赛，我把标枪扎，裁判身上了，后来就被终身禁赛了。
english: I haven't been practicing for a long time. In a competition one year, I accidentally stabbed the referee with a javelin, and as a result, I was banned for life.

name: video_0016_0028
chinese: 怎么，吃不惯啊
english: How come, can't get used to eating?

name: video_0016_0029
chinese: 哎呀，你慢点吃，又没人跟你抢
english: Oh, take your time eating. No one is competing with you.

name: video_0016_0030
chinese: 曾经做过一个梦，梦见咱俩结婚了
english: I once had a dream, dreaming that we got married.

name: video_0016_0031
chinese: 你为了让我戒烟，把家里所有的打火机都藏在暖气片后面
english: In order to make me quit smoking, you hid all the lighters behind the radiator in the house.

name: video_0016_0032
chinese: 也是茴香的味道，能让我在将来厌倦你的时候多去回想你的好。
english: The taste of fennel also reminds me of your goodness, which will help me remember the good times when I become tired of you in the future.

name: video_0016_0033
chinese: 夏洛夏洛，我赢了，夏洛你知道吗，我为了打败你这套连招我练了多少年啊？
english: Charlotte, Charlotte, I won! Charlotte, do you know how many years I have practiced to defeat your combo?

name: video_0016_0034
chinese: 大春我真嫉妒你，能像个傻逼似的。
english: Da Chun, I'm really jealous of you, being like a fool.

name: video_0016_0035
chinese: 谁那么不识相？敢抢夏洛的女人。
english: Who is so unreasonable? Dare to snatch Charlotte's woman.

name: video_0016_0036
chinese: 夏洛你个王八蛋，你怎么可以这样？
english: Xiaoluo, you bastard, how can you do this?

name: video_0016_0037
chinese: 快带我去检查
english: Take me to the examination.

name: video_0016_0038
chinese: 给我也查查吧
english: Give me a search as well.

name: video_0016_0039
chinese: 洛儿，你看你现在活成什么样子了
english: Luo'er, look at what you have become now.

name: video_0016_0040
chinese: 张扬，谢谢你
english: Zhang Yang, thank you

name: video_0016_0041
chinese: 打今儿起，咱俩各论各的，我管你叫哥
english: Starting from today, let's each mind our own business. You can call me "brother", I don't care.

name: video_0016_0042
chinese: 不许这样对你张叔叔
english: Don't treat your Uncle Zhang like this.

name: video_0016_0043
chinese: 那麻烦您能告诉我他现在情况怎么样了吗？
english: Can you please tell me how he is doing now?

name: video_0016_0044
chinese: 病人很不配合治疗，不太乐观。
english: The patient is very uncooperative with treatment and not very optimistic.

name: video_0016_0045
chinese: 夏洛，我跟大春来看你来了
english: Charlotte, Da Chun and I have come to see you.

name: video_0016_0046
chinese: 小的时候吧，我就喜欢赖着你，跟你玩过家家，我当爸爸。
english: When I was little, I liked to cling to you and play house with you. I played the role of the father.

name: video_0016_0047
chinese: 再后来呢，你就成了大明星了，我也就不敢再喜欢你了。
english: Later on, you became a big star, and I dared not like you anymore.

name: video_0017_0001
chinese: B超超出来说是四胞胎，县城的医院说只能来北京生，我们那儿生不了，没这技术。
english: The B-ultrasound shows that it is quadruplets, but the hospital in the county says that we can only give birth in Beijing. We cannot give birth there because they don't have this technology.

name: video_0017_0002
chinese: 我们不建议你们再以安全性作为一家商品主要的卖点
english: We do not recommend you to continue using security as the main selling point of your product.

name: video_0017_0003
chinese: 怎么样？考虑好了吗？
english: How about it? Have you considered it?

name: video_0017_0004
chinese: 校长，我有人要照顾。
english: Principal, I have someone to take care of.

name: video_0017_0005
chinese: 你打死我吧，打死我，你每个月少三十斤粮票
english: You can kill me, go ahead and kill me. You will have thirty kilograms less of food ration every month.

name: video_0017_0006
chinese: 你以为我供你上大学，嫁给你，把饭留给你吃，是贪图你挣的30斤粮票
english: You think that I support you to go to college, marry you, and leave the food for you to eat, just for the sake of your 30 pounds of food ration coupons.

name: video_0017_0007
chinese: 校长，我自己的事情了了，我现在可以去九所工作了。
english: Principal, I have finished my own affairs. I can now go to Jiushuo to work.

name: video_0017_0008
chinese: 胡说，哪有学生不走，老师走的道理。
english: Nonsense, there is no reason for students not to leave when the teacher leaves.

name: video_0017_0009
chinese: 我对David已经忍无可忍了
english: I can't stand David anymore.

name: video_0017_0010
chinese: 我一定会努力的，不辜负您的希望。
english: I will definitely work hard and not let down your expectations.

name: video_0017_0011
chinese: 许博超是我的中学语文老师，刘淑芬是他妻子。
english: Xu Bochao is my middle school Chinese teacher, and Liu Shufen is his wife.

name: video_0017_0012
chinese: 我拿了同事们的看护报告，把信纸蒙在上面拓的字
english: I took my colleagues' caretaker report and traced the words on top with a piece of letter paper.

name: video_0017_0013
chinese: 我没有，她们胡说，我给谁写呀？
english: I don't have anyone to write to, they are just talking nonsense.

name: video_0017_0014
chinese: 我接到任务以后太紧张了，就生病了
english: I got too nervous after receiving the task, so I got sick.

name: video_0017_0015
chinese: 我我丈夫，她勾引我丈夫
english: My husband, she seduced my husband.

name: video_0017_0016
chinese: 我怕我承认了，他们就不让我去支边了。
english: I'm afraid that if I admit it, they won't let me go to the border area.

name: video_0017_0017
chinese: 伯母，不是华北之大，容不下一张平静的课桌，是整个国家危亡，所以我们都要去当兵
english: Aunt, it's not just the vastness of North China that cannot accommodate a peaceful desk, it is the entire country's crisis, so we all need to join the army.

name: video_0017_0018
chinese: 我看以后就别再清明这一天去扫墓了
english: I think we shouldn't go to sweep the tomb on Qingming Festival in the future.

name: video_0017_0019
chinese: 说什么呢你，再苦也要去，没有你李叔叔，我和你妈早死了边疆。
english: What are you talking about? Even if it's tough, we have to go. Without you, Uncle Li, both my mom and I would have died on the border long ago.

name: video_0018_0001
chinese: 给我弄死他
english: Kill him for me.

name: video_0018_0002
chinese: 这些衣服不干净，他们报案等于自首
english: These clothes are dirty, reporting the case is equivalent to confessing.

name: video_0018_0003
chinese: 到了补给站，你自己回吧
english: When you get to the supply station, go back by yourself.

name: video_0018_0004
chinese: 闭嘴，不是来抓你的。
english: Shut up, I'm not here to catch you.

name: video_0018_0005
chinese: 你有什么资格替我做决定
english: What qualifications do you have to make decisions for me?

name: video_0018_0006
chinese: 我说错什么了
english: What did I say wrong?

name: video_0018_0007
chinese: 所有车辆全体人员，戴头盔
english: All vehicle personnel, wear helmets.

name: video_0018_0008
chinese: 熟练的安装火石最起码要经过13个月的专业训练
english: Proficient installation of fire stones requires at least 13 months of professional training.

name: video_0018_0009
chinese: 我们只能靠自己了。
english: We can only rely on ourselves.

name: video_0018_0010
chinese: 今天是中国新年的第一天。
english: Today is the first day of Chinese New Year.

name: video_0018_0011
chinese: 儿子，对不起。
english: Son, I'm sorry.

name: video_0018_0012
chinese: 可是现在你已经长大成人了
english: But now you have grown up into an adult.

name: video_0019_0001
chinese: 我想沈小姐可能收到我的信了，我的司机前两天送来了。
english: I think Miss Shen may have received my letter. My driver delivered it two days ago.

name: video_0019_0002
chinese: 无所谓，乱世。
english: It doesn't matter, chaotic world.

name: video_0019_0003
chinese: 那么过两天我还可以再来吗？
english: Can I come again in a couple of days?

name: video_0019_0004
chinese: 我记事以来，从没见过我妈笑过，她30多岁就去世了，我爸一滴眼泪都没流。
english: Since I can remember, I have never seen my mother smile. She passed away when she was in her thirties, and my father didn't shed a single tear.

name: video_0019_0005
chinese: 披肩很漂亮。
english: The shawl is very beautiful.

name: video_0019_0006
chinese: 最近我也很怕听这种音乐，一听鼻子就酸。
english: Recently, I'm also afraid to listen to this kind of music. As soon as I hear it, my nose feels sour.

name: video_0019_0007
chinese: 不是，我们分手了，没有孩子，不算太痛苦
english: No, we broke up, we don't have children, it's not too painful.

name: video_0019_0008
chinese: 要我自己动手，我还怕痛呢
english: I'm afraid of pain even if I have to do it myself.

name: video_0019_0009
chinese: 春望，我被老爷侮辱，也怀过他的孩子，你还要我吗？
english: Spring View, I have been insulted by the master, and I have also conceived his child. Do you still want me?

name: video_0019_0010
chinese: 不过呢，男人可以常常换，所以我一直把你的照片挂在我的心里。
english: However, men can change frequently, so I always keep your photo hanging in my heart.

name: video_0019_0011
chinese: 哼，放下你的鞭子。
english: Hmph, put down your whip.

name: video_0019_0012
chinese: 我笑你打他两巴掌。
english: I laughed and you slapped him twice.

name: video_0019_0013
chinese: 不过只要你喜欢呢，人家就是拼了命也值得
english: But as long as you like it, even if I have to give my all, it's worth it.

name: video_0019_0014
chinese: 沈小姐，章能才躲在哪儿？我让他替我偿命
english: Miss Shen, where is Mr. Zhang Nengcai hiding? I want him to take my place and pay with his life.

name: video_0019_0015
chinese: 我们三个啊，今生今世都要在一起吃饭。
english: The three of us, we will eat together for this lifetime and beyond.

name: video_0019_0016
chinese: 是我们自愿的，他把他的心交给他的梦，我把我的心交给他。
english: It is voluntary for us. He gives his heart to his dream, and I give my heart to him.

name: video_0020_0001
chinese: 红色的也好看呀，但是要是买了红的，我肯定也会后悔，对吧？
english: The red one looks good too, but if I buy the red one, I will definitely regret it, right?

name: video_0020_0002
chinese: 如果存在平行宇宙，这样的问题就好解决了
english: If parallel universes exist, such problems would be easily solved.

name: video_0020_0003
chinese: 所以呢，如果选了物理小组也会想回去改的。
english: So, if I choose the physics group, I will also want to go back and make changes.

name: video_0020_0004
chinese: 还有物理老头也不喜欢我。
english: The physics old man doesn't like me either.

name: video_0020_0005
chinese: 而且天文组好像没有我们班同学。
english: And it seems that the astronomy group does not have any students from our class.

name: video_0020_0006
chinese: 没有选物理小组也可以参加物理竞赛嘛
english: Can I participate in the physics competition even if I didn't choose the physics group?

name: video_0020_0007
chinese: 正好市里的口语比赛，还有两个直升高中的名额
english: There is a spoken language competition in the city, and there are two spots available for direct admission to high school.

name: video_0020_0008
chinese: 我们走吧，你让我妹妹坐前面吧，她个子比较小。
english: Let's go, you let my sister sit in the front, she is shorter in height.

name: video_0020_0009
chinese: 你们根本没有找过，对不对？
english: You haven't even looked, right?

name: video_0020_0010
chinese: 这不是爱因斯坦。
english: This is not Einstein.

name: video_0020_0011
chinese: 这样想，心里就会好受一些了
english: Thinking like this will make you feel better.

name: video_0020_0012
chinese: 我们去哪儿啊
english: Where are we going?

name: video_0020_0013
chinese: 反正我觉得挺好听的。
english: Anyway, I think it sounds pretty good.

name: video_0021_0001
chinese: 杨瑞，我们还剩十分钟就要撤离
english: Yang Rui, we only have ten minutes left to evacuate.

name: video_0021_0002
chinese: 全体注意，为保证人质安全，各位置必须同步攻击，等我命令
english: Attention all, in order to ensure the safety of the hostages, all positions must attack simultaneously, wait for my command.

name: video_0021_0003
chinese: 看看能不能延缓一下他们的行动
english: See if you can delay their actions.

name: video_0021_0004
chinese: 你能跟着罗星，说明你有两下
english: You can follow Luo Xing to show that you have some skills.

name: video_0021_0005
chinese: 那也让我见识下你的本事。
english: Let me see your skills then.

name: video_0021_0006
chinese: 她那边情况到底怎么样？
english: How is the situation over there?

name: video_0021_0007
chinese: 人救了，可是家没了
english: Saved the person, but lost the home.

name: video_0021_0008
chinese: 他是我见过最好的狙击手。
english: He is the best sniper I have ever seen.

name: video_0021_0009
chinese: 我其实一直在追查黑市核原料黄饼的买卖，被恐怖分子抓走的那个威廉是其中最大的卖家。
english: I have actually been investigating the trade of black market nuclear materials, and William, who was kidnapped by terrorists, is the biggest seller among them.

name: video_0021_0010
chinese: 如果我不跟你说，我没有办法拿到我要的东西
english: If I don't tell you, I won't be able to get what I want.

name: video_0021_0011
chinese: 如果要救那么多人走的话，就不可能原路返回了。
english: If you want to save so many people, it is impossible to go back the same way.

name: video_0022_0001
chinese: 我没什么可以坚持的，也没什么要放弃的
english: I have nothing to persist in, nor anything to give up.

name: video_0022_0002
chinese: 回？回个屁呀。
english: What? What the hell are you talking about?:

name: video_0022_0003
chinese: 信上不是写了吗？我考虑几天才给你回的信。
english: Didn't I write in the letter? I took a few days to reply to your letter.

name: video_0022_0004
chinese: 人家把信寄了，我想回复信
english: The letter has been sent, I want to reply to the letter.

name: video_0022_0005
chinese: 我就知道你们俩离开我一会儿都不行。
english: I knew that the two of you couldn't leave me alone for a while.

name: video_0022_0006
chinese: 小题大做，我能有什么事？
english: Making a big fuss, what can I do?

name: video_0022_0007
chinese: 谁混日子了，苏韵哪有你们想的那么简单
english: Who is slacking off? Su Yun is not as simple as you think.

name: video_0022_0008
chinese: 我们是不懂，可我知道你说的比唱的好听
english: We don't understand, but I know that what you say sounds better than singing.

name: video_0022_0009
chinese: 就算失败，也不许回头。
english: Even if you fail, you are not allowed to turn back.

name: video_0022_0010
chinese: 我们这儿大的帮小的先来了帮后到的
english: The older ones among us came first to help the younger ones who arrived later.

name: video_0022_0011
chinese: 我这几年四处演出，不知道为什么来到这里感觉特别温暖。
english: I have been performing everywhere these past few years, and I don't know why, but coming here feels particularly warm.

name: video_0022_0012
chinese: 我才要感谢你们，让我有机会唱歌给小朋友们听，谢谢。
english: I just want to thank you all for giving me the opportunity to sing for the children. Thank you.

name: video_0022_0013
chinese: 如果这次我们还还不上，你说怎么着就怎么着？我们也认了
english: If we still can't pay back this time, what do you say we do? We'll just have to accept it.

name: video_0022_0014
chinese: 你们凭什么不经过我的同意就卖我的东西
english: Why did you sell my things without my consent?

name: video_0022_0015
chinese: 不是跟你说过吗？一直给你留着间卧室。
english: Didn't I tell you before? I have been keeping a spare bedroom for you.

name: video_0022_0016
chinese: 你不会是身体不舒服吧？
english: Are you feeling unwell?

name: video_0022_0017
chinese: 一家人不说两家话啊，你就当我事儿
english: A family doesn't speak two languages, just treat me as if I don't exist.

name: video_0022_0018
chinese: 可能很多人啊，都会认为孤儿一定是一段非常悲惨的经历。
english: Many people may think that being an orphan is definitely a very tragic experience.

name: video_0022_0019
chinese: 在我的记忆当中，反而都是温暖的，我也把这些带入到我的作品当中了。
english: In my memory, on the contrary, it is all warm, and I also incorporate these into my works.

name: video_0022_0020
chinese: 大家都忙着捡瓶子卖钱，只要你成天就是画画
english: Everyone is busy picking up bottles to sell for money, as long as you are painting all day.

name: video_0022_0021
chinese: 疯了吗你？
english: Are you crazy?

name: video_0022_0022
chinese: 你说你想怎么样？我们俩都陪你，行吗？你说。
english: What do you want? Both of us will accompany you, okay? You tell me.

name: video_0023_0001
chinese: 就你这脸型得多笑，不然就更长了
english: You should smile more with your face shape, otherwise it will look even longer.

name: video_0023_0002
chinese: 越难啃的骨头骨头你更要有耐心啊，你得好好啃我我。
english: The harder the bone is to chew, the more patience you need. You have to chew me well.

name: video_0023_0003
chinese: 我发现古小姐你说话的方式还是挺逗的
english: I found that Miss Gu's way of speaking is quite amusing.

name: video_0023_0004
chinese: 50平的菜园子，100平方的大草坪。
english: A vegetable garden of 50 square meters and a large lawn of 100 square meters.

name: video_0023_0005
chinese: 开窗可见绿，开门可踏青，依山傍水，绝对楼王！
english: Open the window to see the green, open the door to step on the green, surrounded by mountains and water, absolutely the king of buildings!

name: video_0023_0006
chinese: 我老婆有病，走了，孩子在美国也成家了。
english: My wife is sick and has left. Our child has also settled down in the United States.

name: video_0023_0007
chinese: 你看我行吗？
english: Can you see if I can do it?

name: video_0023_0008
chinese: 不是我们俩刚认识，你确定吗？
english: We just met, are you sure?

name: video_0023_0009
chinese: 这不用确定吧，就像俺卖土豆一样，谈好条件，相中就定
english: There's no need to confirm, just like selling potatoes, once the conditions are agreed upon, it's settled.

name: video_0023_0010
chinese: 慢慢培养呗！
english: Take your time and cultivate it!

name: video_0023_0011
chinese: 这个房子现在买了，那可是婚前财产啊，不好意思啊，我得把房子写到我的名下。
english: The house has been bought now, but it is pre-marital property, sorry, I have to transfer the house under my name.

name: video_0023_0012
chinese: 你的项目不是缺投资吗，我给你投
english: Isn't your project lacking investment? I will invest in it.

name: video_0023_0013
chinese: 你的被骗经历，我们大致已经了解了，现在登记一下你的基本资料
english: We have a general understanding of your experience of being deceived. Now, please register your basic information.

name: video_0023_0014
chinese: 你是2018年人。
english: You are a person in 2018.

name: video_0023_0015
chinese: 那我们要同时开门，我属啥呀？
english: So we need to open the door at the same time, what am I?

name: video_0023_0016
chinese: 我的东西就无所谓是吗？
english: Does it matter if it's my stuff?

name: video_0023_0017
chinese: 要不然你可以到我们99年那边啊，然后我带你去那院子摘一些花种上不就完了吗
english: Otherwise, you can come to our place in '99 and then I can take you to that yard to pick some flowers and plant them, isn't that perfect?

name: video_0023_0018
chinese: 哎，那个你开门带我去躺18年看看呗！
english: Hey, could you open the door and take me to lie down for 18 years to have a look?

name: video_0023_0019
chinese: 那时候没准我都是地产大亨了。
english: At that time, maybe I would have become a real estate tycoon.

name: video_0023_0020
chinese: 你搬走了，也许这就恢复原样了
english: You moved away, maybe things will go back to normal.

name: video_0023_0021
chinese: 那我是女生，你不得让着我呀。
english: So I am a girl, you have to accommodate me.

name: video_0023_0022
chinese: 我先来的，我比你早20年就住这了。
english: I came first, I have been living here for 20 years longer than you.

name: video_0023_0023
chinese: 我搬走了，房东也会找一个人住进来，万一是变态呢，我不变态。
english: I moved out, and the landlord will find someone else to move in. What if they are a pervert? I am not a pervert.

name: video_0023_0024
chinese: 你们现在用什么听歌
english: What are you using to listen to music now?

name: video_0023_0025
chinese: 我是捞海底最会扯的员工啦，不好意思，我可不可以借你们的卫生间用一下
english: I am the most talkative employee at the bottom of the sea. Sorry, can I borrow your restroom for a moment?

name: video_0023_0026
chinese: 酒驾车祸，烧的什么都没有了。
english: Drunk driving accident, everything was burned.

name: video_0023_0027
chinese: 你不怕我揭发你吗？
english: Aren't you afraid that I will expose you?

name: video_0023_0028
chinese: 我跟他20多年了，公司从没到有，我立了多少功，最后我得到什么了
english: I have been with him for over 20 years, from the establishment of the company to its current state. How much effort have I put in, and what have I gained in the end?

name: video_0023_0029
chinese: 你这样会让老板破产的，你这是犯法，会坐牢的。
english: You will bankrupt the boss like this, what you are doing is illegal, and you will go to jail.

name: video_0023_0030
chinese: 我的事不用你管，你就替自己想想吧啊，这么好的一笔投资你不要，你还要什么，小陆
english: It's none of your business, just think about yourself. You don't want such a good investment, what else do you want, Xiaolu.

name: video_0023_0031
chinese: 够不着什么呀，不就在这儿呢嘛
english: What can't you reach? It's right here.

name: video_0023_0032
chinese: 这六家店呀，就你们最不让人人省心了。
english: These six stores, you guys are the least reassuring.

name: video_0023_0033
chinese: 脑子是木头吗，不知道该干什么呀
english: Is your brain made of wood? I don't know what to do.

name: video_0023_0034
chinese: 那您看我们这还需要调整什么呀？
english: So, what do you think we still need to adjust here?

name: video_0023_0035
chinese: 焦糖拿铁对吧？
english: Caramel latte, right?

name: video_0023_0036
chinese: 亲爱的，真的是你呀。
english: Dear, it's really you.

name: video_0023_0037
chinese: 听说你嫁个富豪啊！
english: I heard you married a wealthy man!!

name: video_0023_0038
chinese: 嘘什么呀，这是大好事啊，恭喜你，恭喜你。
english: What are you shushing for? This is a great thing, congratulations, congratulations.

name: video_0023_0039
chinese: 就这么定了啊，我现在就去安排一下，晚一点能让我司机来接你。
english: It's settled then. I will arrange it now. Can my driver pick you up later?

name: video_0023_0040
chinese: 陆先生你好，我跟小江呢大学最好的闺蜜，你叫我小雅就好了
english: Hello, Mr. Lu. I am Xiaoya, Xiaojiang's best friend from college. You can call me Xiaoya.

name: video_0023_0041
chinese: 老公，你真好，应该早点出现嘛
english: Husband, you are so good. You should have appeared earlier.

name: video_0023_0042
chinese: 你是怕你同学觉得担心你，所以你就表现的稍微那么浮夸一点
english: You are afraid that your classmates will worry about you, so you just behave a little bit exaggerated.

name: video_0023_0043
chinese: 你试试啊
english: You try it.

name: video_0023_0044
chinese: 女士，你看我有没有点重影啊？
english: Madam, do you see any double image of me?

name: video_0023_0045
chinese: 我是不是化不化妆都美。
english: Whether I wear makeup or not, I am beautiful.

name: video_0023_0046
chinese: 你想吃小馒头吗？
english: Do you want to eat steamed buns?

name: video_0023_0047
chinese: 我没有没有，我这原则性的问题，我绝对就是，谁有谁不要脸。
english: I have no principles, I absolutely am the one who has no shame.

name: video_0023_0048
chinese: 你笑得多好，那些有钱人眼里绝对没有你这样的纯粹。
english: You smile so beautifully, those rich people definitely don't have someone as pure as you in their eyes.

name: video_0023_0049
chinese: 其实也没什么的，生活还能继续嘛
english: Actually, it's nothing. Life can still go on.

name: video_0023_0050
chinese: 别做梦了好吗，就那破图能成楼吗
english: Stop dreaming, can that crappy picture become a building?

name: video_0023_0051
chinese: 我都不存在吗？你跟着我干嘛呀？老斑鸠。
english: Am I non-existent? Why are you following me? Old turtle dove.

name: video_0023_0052
chinese: 为什么我手上多了条疤？同时多了记忆，为什么？
english: Why do I have a scar on my hand? And why does it come with a memory?

name: video_0023_0053
chinese: 你对我好一点儿啊，要不然未来的我根本看不上你，现在都不想要你了。
english: Please treat me better, otherwise the future me won't even be interested in you. I don't want you anymore.

name: video_0023_0054
chinese: 而且每天以后我都默念远离姓谷的女人，给未来的我心理暗示
english: And every day afterwards, I silently chant to stay away from women with the surname Gu, giving myself a psychological suggestion for the future.

name: video_0023_0055
chinese: 哎，反正投资确定了，我就不算业务垫底了，你也没有权利让我离开公司。
english: Well, since the investment is confirmed, I won't be considered as the bottom of the business anymore, and you don't have the right to make me leave the company.

name: video_0023_0056
chinese: 反正你这笔钱我是不需要了，我也劝你好自为之。
english: Anyway, I don't need this money from you. I also advise you to take care of yourself.

name: video_0023_0057
chinese: 满意满意，非常满意。
english: Satisfied, very satisfied.

name: video_0023_0058
chinese: 回到正规上来，这才是重要的。
english: Get back on track, that's what matters.

name: video_0023_0059
chinese: 你真的挺了解我的啊，带我吃高级餐厅，还有洋气的小提琴乐队，连巧克力蛋糕都记着呢。
english: You really understand me well, taking me to fancy restaurants, and even arranging a classy violin band. You even remember to get me a chocolate cake.

name: video_0023_0060
chinese: 你穿西装的样子真的很帅。
english: You look really handsome in a suit.

name: video_0023_0061
chinese: 陆石屹让我告诉你，接受赵俊以，他当年就是这么做的。
english: Lushi Yi asked me to tell you that he accepted Zhao Junyi, and that's how he did it back then.

name: video_0023_0062
chinese: 当然是你了，陆石屹给我的就是我想要的生活。
english: Of course it's you, the life that Lu Shiyi gave me is the life I want.

name: video_0023_0063
chinese: 我这么忙，肯定不像从前那样对你那么关照，你懂点事儿。
english: I'm so busy, I definitely can't take care of you as much as before, you should understand.

name: video_0023_0064
chinese: 你后来都近视了你知道吗。我不喜欢看你戴眼镜
english: Did you know that you became nearsighted later? I don't like seeing you wearing glasses.

name: video_0024_0001
chinese: 亲自为儿子做的生日礼物
english: Birthday gift made personally for my son.

name: video_0024_0002
chinese: 用足球改的地球仪，怎么样
english: How about a globe made from a soccer ball?

name: video_0024_0003
chinese: 老师再给你讲最后一次啊！
english: Teacher, I will explain it to you one last time!

name: video_0024_0004
chinese: 这位火炬手，就是我们东配大桥的设计师。
english: This torchbearer is the designer of our Dongpei Bridge.

name: video_0024_0005
chinese: 跑步之后，本市最大的峰会大桥，将会正式投入使用
english: After running, the largest summit bridge in this city will be officially put into use.

name: video_0024_0006
chinese: 那要你爸爸，那就是我祖宗。
english: That's your father, that's my ancestor.

name: video_0024_0007
chinese: 因为他们很喜欢爸爸的工作啊
english: Because they really like dad's job.

name: video_0024_0008
chinese: 要过这个河啊，要走很远很远的路。
english: We need to cross this river, and we have to walk a long, long way.

name: video_0024_0009
chinese: 等你长大以后一定要做自己最喜欢的事情。
english: In the future, you must do what you love the most when you grow up.

name: video_0024_0010
chinese: 是万恶的太空碎片，打碎了返回舱的隔热瓦
english: It is the evil space debris that shattered the heat shield of the return capsule.

name: video_0024_0011
chinese: 这一切都发生在飞船刚刚开始制动的返回阶段。
english: This all happened during the return phase when the spaceship had just started braking.

name: video_0024_0012
chinese: 无论我们选择自主返回，或者手动返回
english: Whether we choose to return autonomously or manually return.

name: video_0024_0013
chinese: 我们是碰上了亿万分之一的概率。
english: We encountered a one in a billion chance.

name: video_0024_0014
chinese: 永远就都是你的问题，然后就没了。
english: It's always your problem, and then it's gone.

name: video_0024_0015
chinese: 咱俩也走到这了。
english: We have also come this far.

name: video_0024_0016
chinese: 地球仪摔坏了，你要替我修
english: The globe is broken, can you fix it for me?

name: video_0024_0017
chinese: 我不会，王老师说我缺根弦
english: I don't know, Teacher Wang said I'm missing a string.

name: video_0024_0018
chinese: 你是这个地球上最聪明的孩子。
english: You are the smartest kid on earth.

name: video_0024_0019
chinese: 你是什么洗脑组织吗？
english: Are you a brainwashing organization?:

name: video_0024_0020
chinese: 干什么
english: What are you doing?

name: video_0024_0021
chinese: 还我地球仪
english: Give me back the globe.

name: video_0024_0022
chinese: 那是我爸爸给我的
english: That was given to me by my father.

name: video_0024_0023
chinese: 妈妈跟孟叔叔带你去个新地方。
english: Mom and Uncle Meng take you to a new place.

name: video_0024_0024
chinese: 什么地方？
english: What place?

name: video_0024_0025
chinese: 一个能让你脱胎换骨的地方
english: A place that can transform you completely.

name: video_0024_0026
chinese: 就得指着天上随便有一个星星来忽悠她。
english: We have to rely on a random star in the sky to deceive her.

name: video_0024_0027
chinese: 不好意思，我就是来找我儿子的。
english: Sorry, I'm just here to find my son.

name: video_0024_0028
chinese: 你是提前了，还是越狱了
english: Did you arrive early or escape?

name: video_0024_0029
chinese: 哦，我是昨晚跑出来的
english: Oh, I ran out last night.

name: video_0024_0030
chinese: 来了，怎么没喝点东西呢？
english: "You're here, why haven't you had anything to drink?"

name: video_0024_0031
chinese: 老马，平时在里边儿都爱喝啥啊
english: Lao Ma, what do you usually like to drink inside?

name: video_0024_0032
chinese: 管教会奖励喝一袋板蓝根。
english: The teacher will reward you with a packet of Banlangen to drink.

name: video_0024_0033
chinese: 进云，说了每三个月带儿子看了一下，一次没去过。
english: Jin Yun said that he took his son to see it every three months, but he has never been there once.

name: video_0024_0034
chinese: 寄宿学校怎么了？我觉得寄宿学校非常好。
english: What's wrong with boarding schools? I think boarding schools are very good.

name: video_0024_0035
chinese: 不管多忙，我都坚持两头跑，我容易吗，我为谁呀？
english: No matter how busy I am, I insist on running in both directions. Is it easy for me? Who am I doing it for?

name: video_0024_0036
chinese: 都笑傲江湖了，怎么还这么没种啊？
english: Everyone is laughing arrogantly, why are they still so cowardly?

name: video_0024_0037
chinese: 又是你。
english: It's you again.

name: video_0024_0038
chinese: 孔夫子尚且说有教无类。
english: Confucius even said that there is education without distinction of class.

name: video_0024_0039
chinese: 而你们只在乎升学率，那些落后的孩子呢？
english: And what about those disadvantaged children? You only care about the enrollment rate.

name: video_0024_0040
chinese: 而是快速地抛弃他们，为人师的有何博喻可谈
english: Instead of quickly abandoning them, what metaphors can be used to teach others?

name: video_0024_0041
chinese: 说的太好了。
english: You said it very well

name: video_0024_0042
chinese: 你搅和什么呀，马皓文
english: What are you messing with, Ma Haowen?

name: video_0024_0043
chinese: 我这都差点给人跪下了，你要干嘛呀？
english: I almost kneeled down because of this. What do you want?

name: video_0024_0044
chinese: 学校处罚学生不用经过班主任同意，呵呵
english: Schools punish students without the consent of the class teacher, haha.

name: video_0024_0045
chinese: 从今天起，他从寄宿改成走读。
english: Starting from today, he changed from boarding to day school.

name: video_0024_0046
chinese: 初一结束，马飞的名次考到多少？学校不会开除他
english: After the first year of junior high school, what place did Ma Fei rank? The school will not expel him.

name: video_0024_0047
chinese: 好，就按你说的，班级前十名。
english: Okay, as you said, the top ten students in the class.

name: video_0024_0048
chinese: 他会是这个学校最出色的孩子。
english: He will be the best kid in this school.

name: video_0024_0049
chinese: 总有一天你会把它挂在墙上。
english: One day you will hang it on the wall.

name: video_0024_0050
chinese: 年纪前十应该什么来着
english: What should be done before the age of ten?

name: video_0024_0051
chinese: 我是她妈，我为她好。
english: I am her mother, I am doing this for her own good.

name: video_0024_0052
chinese: 再没有比我是为她好，更恐怖的借口
english: There is no more terrifying excuse than "I am doing it for her"

name: video_0024_0053
chinese: 出事了，出大事。
english: Something happened, something big happened.

name: video_0024_0054
chinese: 倒是也行，你是法人，你看着办。
english: It's fine, you are the legal person, you handle it.

name: video_0024_0055
chinese: 你看你的酸萝卜样
english: Look at your pickled radish sample.

name: video_0024_0056
chinese: 没事没事儿，我没事儿，你走你的。
english: It's okay, I'm fine, you go your way.

name: video_0024_0057
chinese: 以前不都五毛一碗吗？
english: Wasn't it only 50 cents for a bowl before?

name: video_0024_0058
chinese: 那得多以前啊
english: That was a long time ago.

name: video_0024_0059
chinese: 换成那个橘子汽水。
english: Change it to that orange soda.

name: video_0024_0060
chinese: 多放香菜，多放辣椒，多放蒜苗
english: Add more cilantro, add more chili peppers, add more garlic sprouts.

name: video_0024_0061
chinese: 可不可以直接来四碗
english: Can you directly come for four bowls?

name: video_0024_0062
chinese: 我给你重新打印的，您看我的简历行吗？
english: I have reprinted it for you. Can you take a look at my resume?

name: video_0024_0063
chinese: 我特别崇拜你。
english: I admire you very much.

name: video_0024_0064
chinese: 我毕业那年去设计院，您亲自面试的我。
english: The year I graduated, I went to the design institute and you personally interviewed me.

name: video_0024_0065
chinese: 然后那个我成绩不好，您没看上我
english: Then, because my grades were not good, you didn't choose me.

name: video_0024_0066
chinese: 叫我总算出了这口恶气。
english: Finally, I let out this bad breath.

name: video_0024_0067
chinese: 你到底收了多少黑心钱
english: How much dirty money did you actually take?

name: video_0024_0068
chinese: 但爸爸相信你不是
english: But dad believes you are not.

name: video_0024_0069
chinese: 他爸爸这个人不会塌，儿子，相信爸爸。
english: His father is a reliable person, son, trust your father.

name: video_0024_0070
chinese: 给我500块，两分钟帮你搞定。
english: Give me 500 yuan, and I will get it done for you in two minutes.

name: video_0024_0071
chinese: 你两分钟就能搞定啊，赶紧给我滚蛋。
english: You can finish it in two minutes, hurry up and get out of here.

name: video_0024_0072
chinese: 最好咱们还是别让邻居们发现。
english: It's better if we don't let the neighbors find out.

name: video_0024_0073
chinese: 要不是闫主任给我打电话我都不知道，你干嘛呢在？
english: If Director Yan hadn't called me, I wouldn't have known. What are you doing?

name: video_0024_0074
chinese: 你就非得把你脑子那些东西弄给他，你弄给他干嘛呢？
english: Why do you have to give him those things in your mind? What's the point of giving them to him?

name: video_0024_0075
chinese: 你不知道我在外边哼哧哼哧干活挣钱遭多少罪吧。
english: You have no idea how much hardship I have endured while working and earning money outside.

name: video_0024_0076
chinese: 马皓文他将来被社会淘汰了，咱怎么办呀？
english: Ma Haowen will be eliminated by society in the future, what should we do?

name: video_0024_0077
chinese: 你是人吗，怎么办呀，你告诉我，你不是会说吗，你回答我呀。
english: Are you a human? What should I do? Can you tell me? You can speak, right? Please answer me.

name: video_0024_0078
chinese: 你居然让他在家玩电脑。
english: You actually let him play computer at home.

name: video_0024_0079
chinese: 他们眼中那种厌倦，我们真的看不见吗？
english: Can't we really see the weariness in their eyes?

name: video_0024_0080
chinese: 如果你不介意，以后我可以帮马飞改善伙食。
english: If you don't mind, I can help Ma Fei improve the food in the future.

name: video_0024_0081
chinese: 知识的营养重要，可身体的营养更重要。
english: The nutrition of knowledge is important, but the nutrition of the body is even more important.

name: video_0024_0082
chinese: 我觉得最重要的是这孩子眼里有光了
english: I think the most important thing is that there is light in this child's eyes.

name: video_0024_0083
chinese: 小高老师，我必须要提醒你注意自己的立场
english: Teacher Xiaogao, I must remind you to pay attention to your own position.

name: video_0024_0084
chinese: 你不相信爸爸吗，别回头，走，走
english: Don't you believe in dad? Don't look back, let's go, go.

name: video_0024_0085
chinese: 小高老师被记过处分了。
english: Teacher Xiaogao has been given a disciplinary warning.

name: video_0024_0086
chinese: 如果差一分，我也会被开除的。
english: If I am one point short, I will also be expelled.

name: video_0024_0087
chinese: 爸爸，我不是不努力，可我真的不想上学了。
english: Dad, it's not that I'm not trying, but I really don't want to go to school anymore.

name: video_0024_0088
chinese: 太难了，爸爸，我还是去卖煎饼吧，太难了
english: It's too difficult, Dad. I'll just go sell pancakes. It's too difficult.

name: video_0024_0089
chinese: 我不会认输的。
english: I will not admit defeat.

name: video_0024_0090
chinese: 爸，只让带一样东西，我带上了它。
english: Dad, I was only allowed to bring one thing, and I brought it with me.

name: video_0024_0091
chinese: 就像那次考试前我做的一切一样，我尽力了
english: Just like everything I did before that exam, I tried my best.

name: video_0024_0092
chinese: 我真的跑了几十趟了。
english: I have really run dozens of times.

name: video_0024_0093
chinese: 你把我当球踢呢
english: You treat me like a ball to kick.

name: video_0024_0094
chinese: 什么乱七八糟的。
english: What a mess.

name: video_0024_0095
chinese: 对不起儿子。
english: I'm sorry, son.

name: video_0024_0096
chinese: 所以爸爸也会犯错误
english: So fathers can also make mistakes.

name: video_0024_0097
chinese: 马上就要期末考试了，你不是还跟阎主任打赌要年级前十吗
english: The final exams are coming soon. Didn't you make a bet with Director Yan that you would be in the top ten of the grade?

name: video_0024_0098
chinese: 这不是他一生中最重要的时刻，绝对。
english: This is not the most important moment of his life, absolutely.

name: video_0024_0099
chinese: 他一生中最重要的时刻应该是均匀的散布在他的每一天，每一分每一秒。
english: His most important moments in life should be evenly distributed throughout every day, every minute, and every second.

name: video_0024_0100
chinese: 请相信一个爸爸对儿子的爱。
english: Please believe in a father's love for his son.

name: video_0024_0101
chinese: 谁能告诉我马飞去哪儿了？
english: Who can tell me where did Ma Fei go?

name: video_0024_0102
chinese: 就是在我们路过的时候，旁边的农田已经全部被冲垮掉了
english: When we passed by, all the farmland next to us had been washed away.

name: video_0024_0103
chinese: 马飞
english: Ma Fei

name: video_0024_0104
chinese: 隔热瓦损坏的前提下，我们唯一的办法就是采取升力式返回
english: Given the premise that the heat insulation tile is damaged, our only solution is to adopt a lift-off return.

name: video_0024_0105
chinese: 马飞同学确实是进步巨大
english: Ma Fei has indeed made great progress.

name: video_0024_0106
chinese: 念下这篇作文，可以吗？
english: Can you read this essay for me?

name: video_0024_0107
chinese: 孩儿想申请科研经费，率先打造宇宙飞船。
english: The child wants to apply for research funding and build a spaceship first.

name: video_0024_0108
chinese: 63年考的师范，我是光着脚走进学校的
english: In 1963, I took the teacher qualification examination and walked into the school barefoot.

name: video_0024_0109
chinese: 您说的我完全理解。
english: I completely understand what you said.

name: video_0024_0110
chinese: 但是，在他们未来一生当中碰到哪个问题的时候会自动地跳出这四个选项？
english: However, when they encounter any problem in their future lives, will they automatically jump out of these four options?

name: video_0024_0111
chinese: 这篇作文打零分，那是毫无问题的。
english: This essay deserves a zero score, there is no doubt about it.

name: video_0024_0112
chinese: 这些参与者都是刚刚参加完高考，考了高分的学生吗
english: Are these participants students who have just finished the college entrance examination and achieved high scores?

name: video_0024_0113
chinese: 你可不可以放弃报考飞行员？
english: Can you give up on applying to be a pilot?

name: video_0024_0114
chinese: 只要他肯配合的话，爸爸这个案子就可以翻过了。
english: As long as he is willing to cooperate, this case can be resolved by Dad.

name: video_0024_0115
chinese: 把自己的桥修好，在我看来，是世界上最大的事。
english: Fixing one's own bridge is, in my opinion, the biggest thing in the world.

name: video_0024_0116
chinese: 爸，对不起。
english: Dad, I'm sorry.

name: video_0025_0001
chinese: 很多人在上面上传真实案件供大家探讨，许多国家地区的破案率，因为这软件大大提升。
english: Many people upload real cases for everyone to discuss on it, and the clearance rate in many countries and regions has greatly improved because of this software.

name: video_0025_0002
chinese: 你居然排第二，全河南？
english: You actually ranked second, all of Henan?

name: video_0025_0003
chinese: 那我可以第几呢
english: How many can I be ranked?

name: video_0025_0004
chinese: 没有我加入这比赛
english: Without me joining this competition:

name: video_0025_0005
chinese: 居然还敢称之为排行榜
english: How dare you call it a ranking list.

name: video_0025_0006
chinese: 你怀疑我的智商。
english: You doubt my intelligence.

name: video_0025_0007
chinese: 变态，玩这种游戏的全是变态。
english: Abnormal, all the people who play this game are abnormal.

name: video_0025_0008
chinese: 那个人是谁
english: Who is that person?:

name: video_0025_0009
chinese: 这根本就没有结婚的氛围。
english: There is no atmosphere of marriage at all.

name: video_0025_0010
chinese: 我们在这里一个打十个。
english: We are here to play a game of ten against one.

name: video_0025_0011
chinese: 那个应该就是一直和我争夺第二的日本侦探
english: That should be the Japanese detective who has been constantly competing with me for second place.

name: video_0025_0012
chinese: 我就知道骗不了你了。
english: I knew I couldn't deceive you.

name: video_0025_0013
chinese: 我最讨厌别人骗我
english: I hate it when people lie to me.

name: video_0025_0014
chinese: 没我帅，没我瘦，没我有气质，一脸的花心样，穿的又那么土，可他就是比我有钱。
english: I'm not handsome, I'm not thin, I don't have the temperament, I have a flirtatious face, and I dress so poorly, but he is just richer than me.

name: video_0025_0015
chinese: 跟我有什么关系啊？
english: What does it have to do with me?

name: video_0025_0016
chinese: 五百万美刀啊，七叔的心愿了了，案子一破，你250我250了。
english: Five million US dollars, Uncle Qi's wish is fulfilled. Once the case is solved, you get 250 and I get 250.

name: video_0025_0017
chinese: 我愿意奉上我毕生精血
english: I am willing to offer my life's essence.

name: video_0025_0018
chinese: 你不要瞧不起他们哦，为了把各路大神聚集，我是费了大力气的。
english: Don't underestimate them, I put in a lot of effort to gather all the great talents from various fields.

name: video_0025_0019
chinese: 你会说中文。
english: You speak Chinese.

name: video_0025_0020
chinese: 哈哈，我就说他是个串儿吧
english: Haha, I told you he's a troublemaker.

name: video_0025_0021
chinese: 所以最后见到死者的时候
english: 所以最后见到死者的时候

name: video_0025_0022
chinese: 那么久，他就接着睡了一觉吗
english: Did he just go back to sleep for so long?

name: video_0025_0023
chinese: 独身，有稳定收入来源，受过一定教育，正当职业，外表不一定具备强大的攻击性。
english: Single, with a stable source of income, educated to a certain extent, in a legitimate profession, may not necessarily possess a strong aggressive appearance.

name: video_0025_0024
chinese: 如果不马上抓到凶手，他很快会再次犯案
english: If the murderer is not caught immediately, he will soon commit another crime.

name: video_0025_0025
chinese: 老秦加油。
english: Come on, Lao Qin.

name: video_0025_0026
chinese: 我包你三日之内必有血光之灾。
english: I guarantee that within three days, there will be a disaster with bloodshed.

name: video_0025_0027
chinese: 你还给我看面相，我给人家算命的时候你还没来大姨妈呢
english: You showed me your face, but you hadn't even started menstruating when I was telling fortunes for others.

name: video_0025_0028
chinese: 我只关心他为什么杀人？
english: Why did he kill someone?

name: video_0025_0029
chinese: 我感觉他就是个坏人
english: I feel like he is a bad person.

name: video_0025_0030
chinese: 然后追上去弄死他
english: Then catch up with him and kill him.

name: video_0025_0031
chinese: 这个小脑壳还是很聪明的嘛。
english: This little brain is still very clever, isn't it?

name: video_0025_0032
chinese: 哈哈哈哈，我这么一笑是不是有点像坏人呢
english: Hahaha, do I look a bit like a bad person when I laugh like this?

name: video_0025_0033
chinese: 对对对大哥，你不笑的时候更像
english: Big brother, you look even more serious when you don't smile.

name: video_0025_0034
chinese: 确定是为了正义。
english: Make sure it's for justice.

name: video_0025_0035
chinese: 给老子打死他。
english: Beat him to death for me.

name: video_0025_0036
chinese: 你们还有没有人性了，我们都已经这样了，你们还抢劫
english: Have you lost all humanity? We are already in this state, and you are still robbing us.

name: video_0025_0037
chinese: 我警告你不要抢我台词哦。
english: I warn you not to steal my lines, okay?

name: video_0025_0038
chinese: 资料说这里不是第一现场，应该是河水把尸体冲到这儿了。
english: The information says that this is not the primary scene, but rather the river water washed the body here.

name: video_0025_0039
chinese: 快通知你的神警团，别让他们落后太多。
english: Please inform your divine police force quickly, don't let them fall too far behind.

name: video_0025_0040
chinese: 哎呀，好清秀的姑娘，你叫什么名字？
english: Ah, what a beautiful girl. What is your name?

name: video_0025_0041
chinese: 那大师，您能帮我看看这个图，它是什么意思吗？
english: Master, can you help me take a look at this picture? What does it mean?

name: video_0025_0042
chinese: 也许这一页就是整个案件的核心
english: Maybe this page is the core of the whole case.

name: video_0025_0043
chinese: 我们也被通缉了
english: We are also wanted by the police.

name: video_0025_0044
chinese: 你现在还有时间谈恋爱
english: You still have time to fall in love.

name: video_0025_0045
chinese: 你们抓错人了，他不是凶手
english: You have caught the wrong person, he is not the murderer.

name: video_0025_0046
chinese: 如果我能把他引出来，500万你能分我多少啊？
english: If I can lure him out, how much of the 5 million can you give me?

name: video_0025_0047
chinese: 这个杀手思维缜密，现场没有任何多余痕迹，绝不会是随机杀人。
english: This killer is meticulous in thinking, there are no extra traces at the scene, it is definitely not a random murder.

name: video_0025_0048
chinese: 凶手是把纽约市当成了自己的法坛
english: The murderer treated New York City as his own court of law.

name: video_0025_0049
chinese: 你们还是想想怎么保住这个人吧？光靠你们聊着俩的证词不足以为他开罪
english: You should think about how to protect this person. Relying solely on your two testimonies is not enough to incriminate him.

name: video_0025_0050
chinese: 我总觉得有什么重要的细节被我给忽略了。
english: I always feel like I have overlooked some important details.

name: video_0025_0051
chinese: 福尔摩斯说过，世上没有真正完美的犯罪，其实真相一直就在我们眼前只不过还没有被发现
english: Sherlock Holmes once said, "There is no such thing as a perfect crime. In fact, the truth has always been right in front of us, just waiting to be discovered."

name: video_0025_0052
chinese: 我们一直都在受中国祭祀影响，可谁说杀人者一定是中国人
english: We have always been influenced by Chinese rituals, but who says that the killer must be Chinese?

name: video_0025_0053
chinese: 唐仁遇到麻烦了。
english: Tang Ren is in trouble.

name: video_0025_0054
chinese: 不是做神就是做兽，却忘了怎么做个人
english: Either be a god or be a beast, but forget how to be a human.

name: video_0025_0055
chinese: 先听好消息啦
english: First, listen to good news.

name: video_0026_0001
chinese: 我告诉你，我是程小鹏亲爹，你别想把他带到国外去
english: I'm telling you, I am Cheng Xiaopeng's real father. Don't even think about taking him abroad.

name: video_0026_0002
chinese: 亲爹，你算什么亲爹啊。你尽过当爹的责任吗？
english: Dear father, what kind of father are you? Have you fulfilled your responsibilities as a father?

name: video_0026_0003
chinese: 在中国有很多病人，他们根本就吃不起正版药，他们就等着我把药带回去救他们的命
english: In China, there are many patients who simply cannot afford genuine medication. They are waiting for me to bring the medicine back and save their lives.

name: video_0026_0004
chinese: 你自己也是病人，你知道正版要什么价钱，你光让他们信上帝，他们能有药吃吗？
english: You are also a patient, you know the price of genuine products, just believing in God alone, can they have medicine to take?

name: video_0026_0005
chinese: 不是说你们讹人，我们的药确实没出过问题。
english: It's not that we are cheating people, our medicine has indeed never had any problems.

name: video_0026_0006
chinese: 我都不知道你在说些什么，你走不走，不走我报警了。
english: I don't know what you're saying. Are you leaving or not? If you don't leave, I will call the police.

name: video_0026_0007
chinese: 推给他又怎么样？药又没断，就价钱贵一点啊，那比四万块钱便宜啊！
english: What's the big deal about pushing it to him? The medicine hasn't run out, it's just a little more expensive. It's still cheaper than 40,000 yuan!

name: video_0026_0008
chinese: 我是个卖神油的，我管得了那么多人吗？
english: I am a seller of miracle oil, can I manage so many people?

name: video_0026_0009
chinese: 我上有老下有小，我被抓进去他们怎么办？
english: I have an elderly person above me and a young child below me. What will they do if I am caught?

name: video_0026_0010
chinese: 滚
english: Roll.

name: video_0026_0011
chinese: 他不太好，勇哥，你还能搞到印度药吗？
english: He is not doing well, Yongge. Can you still get Indian medicine?

name: video_0026_0012
chinese: 就是硬上骨髓移植，但是成功率很低。
english: The input: It is a bone marrow transplant, but the success rate is very low.

name: video_0026_0013
chinese: 但是我只能保证以前的病人有药吃，大家不要声张，体谅一下，我不想坐牢。
