english: But I can only guarantee that previous patients have medicine to take. Please don't make a fuss, understand a little, I don't want to go to jail.

name: video_0026_0014
chinese: 房子吃没了，家人被我吃垮了
english: The house is eaten up, and my family is overwhelmed by me.

name: video_0026_0015
chinese: 你就能保证你这一辈子不生病吗
english: Can you guarantee that you will never get sick in your entire life?

name: video_0026_0016
chinese: 我们作为执法者，就应该站在法律这一边
english: As law enforcers, we should stand on the side of the law.

name: video_0026_0017
chinese: 我这两年救的白血病人没有1000有500吧，这也算积德行善了吧？
english: In the past two years, I have saved not 1000 but 500 leukemia patients. Does this count as accumulating virtue and doing good deeds?

name: video_0026_0018
chinese: 你怀疑我卖假药啊，开玩笑吧，警官
english: You suspect that I am selling fake medicine, kidding, officer.

name: video_0026_0019
chinese: 你看我这厂子办得好好的，每个月光纯利就几十万，我碰那玩意干嘛
english: You see, my factory is doing very well. We make hundreds of thousands of pure profit every month. Why would I bother with that thing?

name: video_0026_0020
chinese: 是吗？挺好，为民除害。
english: Is that so? Very good, to rid the people of harm.

name: video_0026_0021
chinese: 你说话啊，他有什么罪
english: You speak, what crime does he have?

name: video_0026_0022
chinese: 所有的处分我都能接受，这案子我真的办不了了
english: I can accept all the punishments, I really can't handle this case anymore.

name: video_0026_0023
chinese: 不许哭，男子汉
english: No crying, be a man.

name: video_0026_0024
chinese: 他们吃不起进口的天价药，他们就只能等死啊
english: They cannot afford the expensive imported medicine, so they can only wait to die.

name: video_0026_0025
chinese: 跟小澍说，他爸爸不是坏人。
english: Tell Xiaoshu that his dad is not a bad person.

name: video_0027_0001
chinese: 要不福贵少爷你给露两声，让他们开开眼
english: How about you, Master Fugui, give them a shout and let them open their eyes.

name: video_0027_0002
chinese: 爹，爷爷又来骂你了。
english: Dad, grandpa is scolding you again.

name: video_0027_0003
chinese: 你能不能听我一次，别再去赌了
english: Can you listen to me once, and stop gambling again?

name: video_0027_0004
chinese: 我什么都不图，就图跟你过个安生日子
english: I don't want anything, I just want to live a peaceful life with you.

name: video_0027_0005
chinese: 我是刚，来来来来
english: I am Gang, come come come come.

name: video_0027_0006
chinese: 你也改不了，我也不想跟你过了
english: You can't change either, and I don't want to be with you anymore.

name: video_0027_0007
chinese: 这回我要能生了儿子，长大了不能像你这样。
english: This time I want to have a son, and when he grows up, he cannot be like you.

name: video_0027_0008
chinese: 要不你先搬着啊，老太太我给你照顾两天，等你安顿好了再接过去。
english: How about you move first, old lady? I will take care of you for two days, and then you can take over once you have settled down.

name: video_0027_0009
chinese: 我跟富贵说笑话呢，叫个有庆。
english: I'm telling a joke to Fu Gui, call someone to celebrate.

name: video_0027_0010
chinese: 想来借点钱在镇上开个小铺。
english: I want to borrow some money to open a small shop in town.

name: video_0027_0011
chinese: 别说你们想跑，我要是不为找我兄弟啊，早就不穿这身装皮了我？
english: Don't say you want to run away, if I didn't have to find my brother, I wouldn't still be wearing this leather outfit, would I?

name: video_0027_0012
chinese: 要水的人多，多送几趟能多挣点钱
english: There are many people who want water, so send more and earn more money.

name: video_0027_0013
chinese: 唉，还不是因为你家那样房啊，给龙二定了个地主。
english: Well, it's all because of your family's house. They assigned Long Er as the landlord.

name: video_0027_0014
chinese: 珍珍啊，这炼钢工地上，唱不唱戏啊？
english: Zhenzhen, on this steelmaking construction site, do you sing or not?

name: video_0027_0015
chinese: 我见人家钢铁阵地上都是学生队洋鼓洋号的，咱们就用唱皮影给大家鼓劲，别拆了，给他们留着吧
english: I see that all the students on the steel fortress are playing drums and trumpets. Let's cheer everyone up by singing shadow puppets. Don't dismantle it, let's leave it for them.

name: video_0027_0016
chinese: 嗯，孩子打架别把大人扯进去，我跟家珍都不知道。
english: Hmm, don't involve adults when children fight. Both Jiazhen and I have no idea.

name: video_0027_0017
chinese: 谁知道你们知道不知道啊
english: Who knows if you know or not?

name: video_0027_0018
chinese: 他说破坏就破坏了，它是政府啊，你看你，拉都拉不住。
english: He said if he wants to destroy, he will destroy. It's the government, you see, you can't even control it.

name: video_0027_0019
chinese: 我让他去道歉，我为什么不去，我就打他这不听话给我惹事。
english: I asked him to apologize, why didn't I go? I just hit him because he didn't listen to me and caused trouble for me.

name: video_0027_0020
chinese: 打，他再给我惹事我还打
english: If he causes trouble for me again, I will hit him.

name: video_0027_0021
chinese: 日子过的是好是坏，我说过什么没有
english: Whether the days are good or bad, I haven't said anything.

name: video_0027_0022
chinese: 可怜凤霞给人欺负了都说不出来
english: Poor Fengxia is being bullied and can't speak up.

name: video_0027_0023
chinese: 这回娘也给你煮了新的饺子，还是20个。
english: This time, Mom cooked new dumplings for you, still 20 of them.

name: video_0027_0024
chinese: 怎么会是你的儿子呢
english: How could he be your son?

name: video_0027_0025
chinese: 你知道我就一个儿子，还让你给撞死了。
english: You know I only have one son, and you let him get hit and killed.

name: video_0027_0026
chinese: 你看还能为有庆做点什么吗
english: What else can I do for you, Youqing?

name: video_0027_0027
chinese: 你记住，你欠我们家一条命，有庆是你害死的，你欠我们家一条命你记着
english: Remember, you owe our family a life. It was you who killed Youqing. Remember, you owe our family a life.

name: video_0027_0028
chinese: 他爷爷他爹和他，三代都是工人
english: His grandfather, his father, and he himself, three generations are all workers.

name: video_0027_0029
chinese: 我带厂里几位同志把屋里屋外都收拾了一下
english: I took a few comrades from the factory to tidy up both inside and outside the house.

name: video_0027_0030
chinese: 今天是万二喜同志和席凤霞同志结婚大喜的幸福日子
english: Today is a happy day for Comrade Wan Erxi and Comrade Xi Fengxia's wedding.

name: video_0027_0031
chinese: 我把凤霞家走了，我会好好带她一辈子
english: I left Fengxia's house, I will take good care of her for the rest of my life.

name: video_0027_0032
chinese: 福贵，嫂子，凤霞今天结婚，我来祝贺祝贺。
english: Fugui, sister-in-law, Fengxia is getting married today. I came to congratulate her.

name: video_0027_0033
chinese: 你待会儿也过去坐坐啊，别像前几回那样儿不理人家。
english: Would you come over and sit for a while later? Don't ignore me like you did last time.

name: video_0027_0034
chinese: 这事儿总得过去吧
english: This matter has to be resolved.

name: video_0027_0035
chinese: 爹娘，凤霞有了。
english: Parents, Fengxia is pregnant.

name: video_0027_0036
chinese: 今天刚刚到医院检查了，大夫说秋天生。
english: I just went to the hospital for a check-up today, and the doctor said I will give birth in autumn.

name: video_0027_0037
chinese: 等凤霞的孩子长大了时代就更好了
english: When Fengxia's child grows up, the era will be better.

name: video_0027_0038
chinese: 二喜啊，等孩子生下来，每年都给他照一回。
english: Erxi, when the child is born, take a photo of him every year.

name: video_0027_0039
chinese: 镇长，您把心放宽，多保重。
english: Mayor, please relax and take care of yourself.

name: video_0027_0040
chinese: 回头凤翔出院了，一块来看你啊！
english: Huixing Fengxiang has been discharged from the hospital. Let's meet up!

name: video_0027_0041
chinese: 今天我们把他揪来，就是要用铁的事实来教育他
english: Today we brought him here to educate him with the ironclad facts.

name: video_0027_0042
chinese: 你甭在乎行不行，把他给叫来
english: You don't need to care if it works or not, just call him over.

name: video_0027_0043
chinese: 大夫求求你大夫，坚持一会就好了凤霞
english: Doctor, please, doctor, just hold on for a while, it will be fine, Fengxia.

name: video_0027_0044
chinese: 大夫求求你，我就这一个女儿了
english: Doctor, please, I only have this one daughter.

name: video_0027_0045
chinese: 姥爷，你又把车放歪了
english: Grandpa, you parked the car crooked again.

name: video_0027_0046
chinese: 今天我都送了十壶水了
english: Today I have already delivered ten pots of water.

name: video_0027_0047
chinese: 哎呦，馒头越来越能干了，都能送十壶水了。
english: Aiyo, Mantou is becoming more and more capable. He can even deliver ten pots of water now.

name: video_0027_0048
chinese: 这么一大堆你说他能不出事吗
english: Can he not have any trouble with such a big mess, as you said?

name: video_0027_0049
chinese: 姥爷，小弟什么时候长大呀？
english: Grandpa, when will little brother grow up?

name: video_0028_0001
chinese: 你找了谁来负责调查组？
english: Who did you find to be in charge of the investigation team?

name: video_0028_0002
chinese: 我想找高刚。
english: I want to find Gao Gang.

name: video_0028_0003
chinese: 破这个案子就要他那股子倔劲。
english: To crack this case, we need his stubbornness.

name: video_0028_0004
chinese: 这次的血雨腥风，手段如此残忍。
english: This bloodshed is so brutal.

name: video_0028_0005
chinese: 但是要记住，不管成不成功，行动时间只有15分钟。
english: But remember, whether successful or not, the action time is only 15 minutes.

name: video_0028_0006
chinese: 你都得给我出来，你来这里就得配合我。
english: You have to come out for me, and when you come here, you have to cooperate with me.

name: video_0028_0007
chinese: 救岩多帕就只有这一次机会，我必须这么做。
english: This is the only chance to save Yandopa, I must do it.

name: video_0028_0008
chinese: 你是提供情报的，具体实施的是我。
english: You provide the intelligence, and I am the one who carries out the specific implementation.

name: video_0028_0009
chinese: 如果你跟我还要在继续合作下去，你就是按照我的方法。
english: If you want to continue working with me, you have to follow my method.

name: video_0028_0010
chinese: 过来保护他，其他我会搞定。
english: Come over and protect him, I will handle the rest.

name: video_0028_0011
chinese: 跟块木头一样，我们给他起一外号叫木星。
english: Just like a block of wood, we gave him a nickname called "Wooden Jupiter".

name: video_0028_0012
chinese: 谢文峰，大家都叫我哪吒
english: Xie Wenfeng, everyone calls me Nezha.

name: video_0028_0013
chinese: 交代了接头的中介人是谁吗？
english: Who is the intermediary who arranged the meeting?

name: video_0028_0014
chinese: 在金三角，诺卡只有两个代理人
english: In the Golden Triangle, Noka only has two agents.

name: video_0028_0015
chinese: 我当然是嗅到钱老大你的钱味了。
english: Of course, I smelled the scent of your money, Boss Qian.

name: video_0028_0016
chinese: 当初你选择来这里当情报员，我不是没有担心
english: When you chose to become an intelligence officer here, I wasn't without worries.

name: video_0028_0017
chinese: 你刚到这工作的时候也不太适应吧
english: You were not very adapted when you first started working here.

name: video_0028_0018
chinese: 没有什么比直接打击毒贩更让我兴奋。
english: There is nothing more exciting to me than directly targeting drug dealers.

name: video_0028_0019
chinese: 我上一次见到你我就觉得你很眼熟。
english: The last time I saw you, I felt like I had seen you before.

name: video_0028_0020
chinese: 你做我独家代理没问题，但是你想入股我的生意，你有这个能力吗？
english: "You have no problem being my exclusive agent, but do you have the ability to invest in my business?"

name: video_0028_0021
chinese: 好吧好吧，说说吧，你们打算怎么干
english: Okay, okay, tell me, what are you planning to do?

name: video_0028_0022
chinese: 现在要继续追查下去的方法，只有拿突了
english: The only way to continue investigating further is to catch the suspect.

name: video_0028_0023
chinese: 要趁他还在拘留病房抓他出来。
english: We need to catch him while he is still in the detention ward.

name: video_0029_0001
chinese: 说你目前最好的选择是退役
english: Say your best choice right now is to retire

name: video_0029_0002
chinese: 我问你的时候你为什么不说？
english: Why didn't you say when I asked you?

name: video_0029_0003
chinese: 究竟发生什么了
english: What exactly happened?

name: video_0029_0004
chinese: 今天晚上都将是最严峻的考验。
english: Tonight will be the most severe test.

name: video_0029_0005
chinese: 我们应该在A01主战阵地。
english: We should be at the A01 main battlefield.

name: video_0029_0006
chinese: 没事干是不是，火场一日游呢
english: Are you free? How about a day trip to the fire scene?

name: video_0029_0007
chinese: 以后我再也没有机会干这种事了，这牛我得吹一辈子
english: I will never have the chance to do this again in the future. I have to brag about this for the rest of my life.

name: video_0029_0008
chinese: 火已经逼近化学罐区了
english: The fire is approaching the chemical tank area.

name: video_0029_0009
chinese: 特勤一中队，咱们就在这，打他个攻坚战
english: Special Operations Team One, we are right here, let's launch an assault on him.

name: video_0029_0010
chinese: 听得见吗，只要我活着，我就会记住你
english: Can you hear me? As long as I am alive, I will remember you.

name: video_0029_0011
chinese: 油压这么高，又有这么多的油，我看是顶不了多长时间了。
english: The oil pressure is so high, and there is so much oil. I don't think it can last much longer.

name: video_0029_0012
chinese: 集合各队指挥员
english: Commanders of each team in the set.

name: video_0029_0013
chinese: 坦白的说，就是敢死队。
english: To be honest, it's a suicide squad.

name: video_0029_0014
chinese: 但是我们可以想办法重新打开一条。
english: But we can find a way to reopen it.

name: video_0029_0015
chinese: 你再带上一个人，攻坚组送你们进去。
english: Bring one more person with you, and the assault team will escort you inside.

name: video_0029_0016
chinese: 哎，有烟吗
english: Hey, do you have any cigarettes?

name: video_0029_0017
chinese: 这是罐区，你找死呢
english: This is the restricted area. Are you looking for trouble?

name: video_0029_0018
chinese: 江立伟，我等你回来喝酒。
english: Jiang Liwei, I'm waiting for you to come back and have a drink.

name: video_0029_0019
chinese: 我只知道转80圈为一扣，一个阀门100克扣
english: I only know that 80 laps is one buckle, and one valve weighs 100 grams.

name: video_0029_0020
chinese: 你太不了解消防员了。
english: You don't understand firefighters well enough.

name: video_0029_0021
chinese: 你好你好，你见过这个小孩吗？带个红色帽子，穿一个深蓝色马甲，这么高，他是我儿子，叫姜淼。
english: Hello, hello. Have you seen this child? He is wearing a red hat and a dark blue vest. He is this tall. He is my son, named Jiang Miao.

name: video_0029_0022
chinese: 我想回家了妈妈
english: I want to go home, Mom.

name: video_0029_0023
chinese: 长大了成为一个顶天立地的男子汉
english: Grown up to become a strong and upright man.

name: video_0029_0024
chinese: 爸，对不起。
english: Dad, I'm sorry.

name: video_0029_0025
chinese: 呜呜呜呜呜呜呜
english: Woooooooooooooo

name: video_0029_0026
chinese: 我就想活着出去见我老婆孩子。
english: I just want to stay alive and go out to see my wife and children.

name: video_0030_0001
chinese: 起烟了，人肯定在家呢。
english: There's smoke, the person must be at home.

name: video_0030_0002
chinese: 我不想吹唢呐
english: I don't want to play the suona.

name: video_0030_0003
chinese: 你再敢说这话，看老子撕破你的嘴。
english: If you dare say that again, I'll tear your mouth apart.

name: video_0030_0004
chinese: 磕头，磕啥头
english: Kowtow, kowtow to what?

name: video_0030_0005
chinese: 你个狗日的，这半瓢水你都吸不干净
english: You dog's day, you can't even suck up this half scoop of water.

name: video_0030_0006
chinese: 使劲喊哪娃，使劲喊
english: Shout as hard as you can, Shout as hard as you can.

name: video_0030_0007
chinese: 娃儿，哪个徒弟不是从娃过来的，老子当年学徒的时候三天都没饭吃。
english: Child, which disciple didn't come from a child? When I was an apprentice, I didn't have any food for three days.

name: video_0030_0008
chinese: 你咋会不知道，你不是都来两个月了吗？
english: How could you not know? Haven't you been here for two months?

name: video_0030_0009
chinese: 啥好好的，好好的师傅能让你回来？
english: What's good, can a good master make you come back?

name: video_0030_0010
chinese: 你说你呀，真给我丢脸。
english: You said you, really embarrassing me.

name: video_0030_0011
chinese: 师娘跟我说让我在家呆两天。
english: The teacher told me to stay at home for two days.

name: video_0030_0012
chinese: 师傅说让我早去早回
english: The master said for me to go early and come back early.

name: video_0030_0013
chinese: 妈，这唢呐吹到顶啊，就是领奏，你知道这曲子叫啥不。
english: Mom, this suona is played to the top, it's the lead instrument. Do you know what this piece is called?

name: video_0030_0014
chinese: 诶，爸，你咋知道嘞
english: Hey, Dad, how did you know?

name: video_0030_0015
chinese: 你知道我为啥要让你去学吹唢呐的吗？
english: Do you know why I want you to learn how to play the suona?

name: video_0030_0016
chinese: 爸，你放心，我一定学会吹百鸟朝凤
english: Dad, don't worry, I will definitely learn how to play "Blowing the Birds Towards the Phoenix".

name: video_0030_0017
chinese: 没那么容易，我听说你师傅前几年收了七八个
english: It's not that easy. I heard that your master took in seven or eight apprentices in the past few years.

name: video_0030_0018
chinese: 那可不是，这首曲子是唢呐匠的看家本事
english: That's right, this piece of music is the specialty of the suona craftsman.

name: video_0030_0019
chinese: 大叔，师傅给我们俩放假了
english: Uncle, the master has given us both a vacation.

name: video_0030_0020
chinese: 是我师父的太爷传下来的，有几百年了，咱这800里秦川，恐怕是找不出第二支
english: It was passed down by my master's great-grandfather and has been around for hundreds of years. In this 800-mile Qin River Valley, I'm afraid we won't be able to find a second one.

name: video_0030_0021
chinese: 听见没有，你也来一段
english: Can you hear me? Would you like to give it a try too?

name: video_0030_0022
chinese: 学鸟叫
english: Learn how to imitate bird calls.

name: video_0030_0023
chinese: 可咱们这黄河岸上不能没有唢呐
english: We cannot be without suona on the banks of the Yellow River.

name: video_0030_0024
chinese: 所以啊，在咱们这块地盘上，唢呐不能断了种。
english: So, in our territory, the suona must not be discontinued.

name: video_0030_0025
chinese: 既然是匠活，就得有人担起责任
english: Since it is craftsmanship, someone has to take responsibility.

name: video_0030_0026
chinese: 他才能拼着命把这活保住，传下去
english: He can only fight for his life to keep this job and pass it on.

name: video_0030_0027
chinese: 师傅，是我吹得不够好吗？
english: Master, is it because I didn't blow well enough?

name: video_0030_0028
chinese: 那你为啥要赶我走？
english: Then why did you drive me away?

name: video_0030_0029
chinese: 咱爷俩的缘分就到这儿了。
english: Our fate ends here.

name: video_0030_0030
chinese: 典平吹的不如我好，为啥他就能学百鸟朝凤，我不能学
english: Dianping's performance is not as good as mine. Why can he learn "The Song of the Phoenix" while I can't learn it?

name: video_0030_0031
chinese: 师娘，我走了。
english: Master, I'm leaving.

name: video_0030_0032
chinese: 天明说天明说，他游家班出活，跟我屁相干啊！
english: Tianming said Tianming said, he is busy with his own work, what does it have to do with me!

name: video_0030_0033
chinese: 也就是长生，他是我小学同学。
english: Also known as Changsheng, he is my elementary school classmate.

name: video_0030_0034
chinese: 这是我师爷的师爷的师爷传给我的，二三百年了
english: This was passed down to me by my master's master's master, it's been two or three hundred years.

name: video_0030_0035
chinese: 要是师傅让我接班，那唢呐班子早没了。
english: If the master asks me to take over, then the suona band would have been disbanded long ago.

name: video_0030_0036
chinese: 就关我的事儿，你想干啥
english: It's none of my business, what do you want to do?

name: video_0030_0037
chinese: 尤天明，你个小狗日的，给老子出来。
english: You, Youtianming, you little dog, come out for me.

name: video_0030_0038
chinese: 你别叫师傅，我没你这个徒弟。
english: Don't call me master, I'm not your disciple.

name: video_0030_0039
chinese: 他的所作所为火庄人都看在眼里
english: His actions and behavior are all seen by the people in Huozhuang.

name: video_0030_0040
chinese: 游家班的班主病了，没有力气吹百鸟朝凤
english: The leader of the You Family Troupe is sick and doesn't have the strength to play "Blowing the Birds to the Phoenix".

name: video_0030_0041
chinese: 就是民俗文化，简单点说，就是想请你们游家班吹一场唢呐
english: It's folk culture, to put it simply, I want to invite you to perform a suona solo for us.

name: video_0030_0042
chinese: 这活要是成了，了不得啊
english: If this activity succeeds, it will be amazing.

name: video_0031_0001
chinese: 他们都是我嘴里的羊，我喜欢怎么吃就怎么吃？
english: They are all sheep in my mouth, I can eat them however I want?

name: video_0031_0002
chinese: 门图，你不要再杀战俘了
english: Mentu, don't kill prisoners of war anymore.

name: video_0031_0003
chinese: 有一天你发现天上多了一颗星星，那就是我找你娘去了
english: One day you find an extra star in the sky, that's because I went to find your mother.

name: video_0031_0004
chinese: 只跟马说话，不跟人说话啊！
english: Only talk to horses, don't talk to people!

name: video_0031_0005
chinese: 那你就当我视频吗就好了，我叫文泰，这个叫朱月，你这匹叫什么？
english: Then you can just consider me as a video, my name is Wen Tai, this one is called Zhu Yue, what is your name?

name: video_0031_0006
chinese: 你要打，就在战场上打
english: If you want to fight, then fight on the battlefield.

name: video_0031_0007
chinese: 我求你了，求你保守住我的秘密不要让别人知道
english: I beg you, please keep my secret and don't let anyone else know.

name: video_0031_0008
chinese: 但是我现在明白，他是在磨练我
english: But now I understand that he is testing me.

name: video_0031_0009
chinese: 恳请单于，别再分散兵力了
english: Please, Khan, stop dispersing your troops.

name: video_0031_0010
chinese: 女儿想做魏国的皇后。
english: My daughter wants to become the queen of Wei Kingdom.

name: video_0031_0011
chinese: 如果我做了皇后，我们就可以和中原人结成友邦了
english: If I become the queen, we can form an alliance with the people of the Central Plains.

name: video_0031_0012
chinese: 我已经失去了很多兄弟，我不能再失去你
english: I have already lost many brothers, I can't lose you anymore.

name: video_0031_0013
chinese: 在战场上绝不能有感情
english: There must be no emotions on the battlefield.

name: video_0031_0014
chinese: 大家正等着将军出战呢
english: Everyone is waiting for the general to go to battle.

name: video_0031_0015
chinese: 谁想打仗？我也不想再打仗了。
english: Who wants to go to war? I also don't want to go to war anymore.

name: video_0031_0016
chinese: 如果可以用我的生命去停止这场战争的话，我早就做了。
english: If I could use my life to stop this war, I would have done it long ago.

name: video_0031_0017
chinese: 穿上了将军的战甲，就不再属于你
english: Wearing the general's armor, it no longer belongs to you.

name: video_0031_0018
chinese: 这就是战争。
english: This is war.

name: video_0031_0019
chinese: 此次接近你们，不是为了抢掠
english: This time approaching you, it is not for plundering.

name: video_0031_0020
chinese: 我知道你心里委屈，在草原上奔波多年，聚集了那么多的部族
english: I know you feel aggrieved in your heart, running around on the grassland for many years, gathering so many tribes.

name: video_0031_0021
chinese: 士气低落，不堪再战
english: Low morale, unable to fight again.

name: video_0031_0022
chinese: 那也不一定赢啊，我们退吧
english: That doesn't necessarily mean we will win, let's withdraw.

name: video_0031_0023
chinese: 只要取下魏国国土，我就会实现我的抱负
english: As long as I take down the territory of the Wei Kingdom, I will fulfill my ambitions.

name: video_0031_0024
chinese: 从今天起，我门图就是你们的新单于
english: From today on, our tribe will be your new Khan.

name: video_0031_0025
chinese: 兵贵神速，我想今夜就动身。
english: Soldiers are valuable and quick. I want to leave tonight.

name: video_0031_0026
chinese: 我是大卫平北将军花木兰。
english: I am General David Pingbei Hua Mulan.

name: video_0031_0027
chinese: 我们的队伍里，有汉人，士人
english: In our team, there are Han people and scholars.

name: video_0031_0028
chinese: 我，大维皇第七皇子，拓跋宏
english: I, the seventh prince of the Da Wei Huang, Tuoba Hong

name: video_0031_0029
chinese: 在你的眼里我是吧，所以我们柔然人来说，我是个千古不遇的英雄。
english: In your eyes, I am, so for us Rouran people, I am an unparalleled hero throughout the ages.

name: video_0031_0030
chinese: 公主请放心，我是北魏的将军花木兰。
english: Princess, please rest assured. I am General Hua Mulan from the Northern Wei Dynasty.

name: video_0031_0031
chinese: 我知道你，你是想用我来救你们的皇子吗？
english: I know you, are you trying to use me to save your prince?

name: video_0031_0032
chinese: 我替父从军只为尽孝
english: I join the army on behalf of my father just to fulfill my filial duty.

name: video_0031_0033
chinese: 惟有解决引起战争的祸首，才能停止这场战争。
english: Only by resolving the root cause of the war can we stop this war.

name: video_0031_0034
chinese: 我们一起走吧，不管去哪里
english: Let's go together, no matter where we go.

name: video_0031_0035
chinese: 能用自己的生命去换取这个国家的安宁
english: Willing to sacrifice my own life for the peace of this country.

name: video_0032_0001
chinese: 如果有什么不一样的呢，你给我这版为准。
english: If there is anything different, you should refer to this version I gave you.

name: video_0032_0002
chinese: 让不让着你，就你干点事儿，该不该打，自己说
english: Let me do something, should I hit you or not, you decide.

name: video_0032_0003
chinese: 你们是怎么抓住我的
english: How did you catch me?

name: video_0032_0004
chinese: 既然在这儿了，咱聊点有诚意的好吧，你手下那几个人要等到几点告诉我
english: Since we're here, let's have a sincere conversation. What time should your subordinates wait to inform me?

name: video_0032_0005
chinese: 就是这么想的，要活一起活，要死大家一起。
english: That's what I think, we should live together and die together.

name: video_0032_0006
chinese: 那天你们抓人的时候，他路上闹了吗。
english: Did he cause any trouble on the way when you guys were arresting people that day?

name: video_0032_0007
chinese: 吴先生，你就认倒霉吧
english: Mr. Wu, just accept your bad luck.

name: video_0032_0008
chinese: 开了大约..,你别套我了。
english: It's been about..., don't trick me.

name: video_0032_0009
chinese: 你枪不错呀，哪儿弄的？给我指个道呗。
english: Your gun is pretty good, where did you get it? Can you show me the way?

name: video_0032_0010
chinese: 别找抽了你，接着说。
english: Don't provoke me, go on talking.

name: video_0032_0011
chinese: 你手上还有其他人吗？
english: Do you have anyone else with you?

name: video_0032_0012
chinese: 你要不想说，我也不跟你废话。
english: If you don't want to talk, I won't waste my words with you.

name: video_0032_0013
chinese: 住的地方还有一张卡，里面有300万。
english: The place where I live also has a card with 3 million inside.

name: video_0032_0014
chinese: 洪先生，我是你的粉丝，特别喜欢你的戏，但是我在网上搜过你，你已经结婚了
english: Mr. Hong, I am your fan and I particularly enjoy your performances. However, I have searched for you online and found out that you are already married.

name: video_0032_0015
chinese: 我妈也是你的一个大粉丝，他也特别喜欢你的戏。
english: My mom is also a big fan of yours, she also really likes your performances.

name: video_0032_0016
chinese: 来吧两位，冰镇的井水
english: Come on, two of you, ice-cold well water.

name: video_0032_0017
chinese: 现场情况不能开枪，沿途设的路障也没能堵着他。
english: The situation on site does not allow for shooting, and the roadblocks set along the way were also unable to stop him.

name: video_0032_0018
chinese: 图个平安
english: Seek peace.

name: video_0032_0019
chinese: 你不是演过赌神的吗？你这样合适吗？
english: Haven't you played the role of the God of Gamblers before? Is it suitable for you to act like this?

name: video_0032_0020
chinese: 华子，你想单聊的，别绕弯子，人质呢
english: Huazi, do you want to have a private chat? Don't beat around the bush, where are the hostages?

name: video_0032_0021
chinese: 如果我要死了，最难受的就是我妈了
english: If I were to die, the one who would suffer the most is my mom.

name: video_0032_0022
chinese: 怕，因为看到你真的想做给你看一下
english: Afraid, because I really want to show you something

name: video_0032_0023
chinese: 你值得吗，这是绑架
english: Are you worth it? This is kidnapping.

name: video_0033_0001
chinese: 啊，小姐，请问你喜欢吃凤梨吗？
english: Ah, miss, do you like to eat pineapple?

name: video_0033_0002
chinese: 我台湾来的嘛，你呢
english: I am from Taiwan, what about you?

name: video_0033_0003
chinese: 你不用说，没关系啊，我可以住在这边吗？
english: You don't have to say, it's okay, can I stay here?

name: video_0033_0004
chinese: 我以前交的那个女朋友，我们在一起五年，可是之后呢，她跟我分手，因为她说我根本就不了解他。
english: My ex-girlfriend, we were together for five years, but afterwards, she broke up with me because she said I didn't understand her at all.

name: video_0033_0005
chinese: 大男人一天到晚去跑步，这可不是办法
english: The man runs all day long, this is not a solution.

name: video_0033_0006
chinese: 老板，一份厨师沙拉
english: Boss, one chef salad.

name: video_0033_0007
chinese: 又是厨师沙拉，每天晚上吃不烦呐
english: Another chef salad, I never get tired of eating it every night.

name: video_0033_0008
chinese: 炸鱼薯条很好吃
english: The fish and chips are delicious.

name: video_0033_0009
chinese: 是不是有个警察每天晚上来这里买厨师沙拉
english: Is there a police officer who comes here every night to buy chef salad?

name: video_0033_0010
chinese: 等了你很长时间，留下一封信说要交给你。
english: I have been waiting for you for a long time and left a letter to be given to you.

name: video_0033_0011
chinese: 唉，不要了，这家人太多，你换别的。
english: Oh, forget it. This family has too many people. You should find another one.

name: video_0033_0012
chinese: 我怕丢了，我帮你收起来了，我没看过。
english: I'm afraid it's lost. I put it away for you. I haven't seen it.

name: video_0033_0013
chinese: 你表哥真会做生意啊，刚刚开始介绍我买炸鱼薯条，现在连店都让给我了。
english: Your cousin is really good at doing business. He just started by introducing me to buy fish and chips, and now he even gave me the whole shop.

name: video_0034_0001
chinese: 手机没信号。
english: No signal on the phone.

name: video_0034_0002
chinese: 这里的海水平均深度在三千米
english: The average depth of the sea here is three thousand meters.

name: video_0034_0003
chinese: 会有人来救我们吧
english: Will someone come to save us?

name: video_0034_0004
chinese: 我们已经偏离航线很远了，没有人会知道我们的位置。
english: We have deviated from the flight path for a long distance, and no one will know our location.

name: video_0034_0005
chinese: 你别再说这话了行吗，这是哪儿啊，南极。你爬再高，也没有信号。
english: Can you please stop saying this? Where is this? Antarctica. No matter how high you climb, there is no signal.

name: video_0034_0006
chinese: 那这也不行那也不行，怎么办呀，就在这等死啊！
english: Then this won't work, and that won't work either. What should I do? Just wait here to die!

name: video_0034_0007
chinese: 今天本来不应该起飞的，如果不是你包机赶时间，谁也不会死
english: Today was not supposed to take off, if it weren't for your chartered flight rushing, no one would have died.

name: video_0034_0008
chinese: 接骨，这我哪行，开玩笑呗
english: Orthopedics, this is not my field, just kidding.

name: video_0034_0009
chinese: 会引发大量的肌肉坏死，我的内脏功能会衰竭，我会死的。
english: It will cause a large amount of muscle necrosis, my visceral functions will fail, and I will die.

name: video_0034_0010
chinese: 那个废弃的小站就是这里。
english: The abandoned small station is right here.

name: video_0034_0011
chinese: 没有柴油取暖，我们就会被冻死。
english: Without diesel heating, we will freeze to death.

name: video_0034_0012
chinese: 这不是奇葩，这是奇迹。等我们南极婚礼业务展开，到时候一批批新郎官戴着领带来南极呢。
english: This is not weird, this is a miracle. When we expand our wedding business in Antarctica, batches of grooms will come to Antarctica wearing ties.

name: video_0034_0013
chinese: 在这鬼地方，太阳就是从南边升起的，对吧，我记得，行。
english: In this godforsaken place, the sun rises from the south, right? I remember, okay.

name: video_0034_0014
chinese: 算命的说今年我大利北方，所以呢，我打算赌一赌北方。
english: The fortune teller said that I will have great luck in the north this year, so I plan to take a gamble in the north.

name: video_0034_0015
chinese: 这气势咣一下就砸过来，我提着裤子就跑。
english: This momentum came crashing down, and I ran with my pants pulled up.

name: video_0034_0016
chinese: 冰山只会在大海上所以北边是海。
english: Icebergs only exist on the sea, so the north side is the sea.

name: video_0034_0017
chinese: 明天你休息一下吧
english: Take a break tomorrow.

name: video_0034_0018
chinese: 如果你死了，我也活不了
english: If you die, I won't be able to live either.

name: video_0034_0019
chinese: 算命的还跟我说，我会大富大贵子孙满堂的寿终正寝。
english: The fortune teller told me that I will become rich and prosperous, with my children and grandchildren living a long and fulfilling life.

name: video_0034_0020
chinese: 至少把柴油给用尽，把罐头吃完你再死
english: Use up the diesel at least, eat all the canned food before you die.

name: video_0034_0021
chinese: 胸有多大，舞台就有多大。
english: The bigger the chest, the bigger the stage.

name: video_0034_0022
chinese: 如意，跟我过吧
english: Ruyi, come with me.

name: video_0034_0023
chinese: 无论环境是好是坏
english: Regardless of whether the environment is good or bad.

name: video_0034_0024
chinese: 我喜欢这里，但是我身边没有你的位置
english: I like it here, but there is no place for you by my side.

name: video_0035_0001
chinese: 陛下这个样子有多久了
english: How long has Your Majesty been like this?

name: video_0035_0002
chinese: 法师跨出这扇门，就当从未入过唐宫
english: The mage steps out of this door, as if he has never entered the Tang Palace.

name: video_0035_0003
chinese: 你刚才怎么不说话
english: Why didn't you speak just now?

name: video_0035_0004
chinese: 这只猫不但进了宫，还靠近了皇帝的卧榻
english: This cat not only entered the palace, but also approached the emperor's bed.

name: video_0035_0005
chinese: 你的意思是说，皇帝的死跟一只猫有关
english: Are you saying that the death of the emperor is related to a cat?

name: video_0035_0006
chinese: 哪来的动静
english: Where is the noise coming from?

name: video_0035_0007
chinese: 你说得对，宫里确实有猫
english: You're right, there really is a cat in the palace.

name: video_0035_0008
chinese: 这件事已经跟我没关系
english: This matter has nothing to do with me.

name: video_0035_0009
chinese: 我不干了，辞官了
english: I quit, I resign from my position.

name: video_0035_0010
chinese: 我市两榜进士出身，可以当大官的
english: I am a scholar who passed the imperial examination and can become a high-ranking official in my city.

name: video_0035_0011
chinese: 白居易，他可狂得很
english: Bai Juyi, he can be very crazy.

name: video_0035_0012
chinese: 当家的惠果大师当年从狮子国取回了秘法，座下有上千僧人
english: The head of the Hui Guo Master brought back secret techniques from the Lion Country years ago, and there are thousands of monks under his command.

name: video_0035_0013
chinese: 我看你才像这儿的常客呢
english: I see that you are a regular here.

name: video_0035_0014
chinese: 前所未有，何人可破
english: Unprecedented, who can break it.

name: video_0035_0015
chinese: 降服妖猫还有谁比他更合适呢
english: Who else is more suitable than him to subdue the demon cat?

name: video_0035_0016
chinese: 那只猫说了一句，欠债总是要还的
english: The cat said, "Debts always have to be repaid."

name: video_0035_0017
chinese: 那猫真的会来吗
english: Will the cat really come?:

name: video_0035_0018
chinese: 整个花萼楼外，牡丹种了十万株
english: There are one hundred thousand peony plants planted outside the entire Sepal Building.

name: video_0035_0019
chinese: 宣宗皇帝命诗人李白为贵妃写一首诗
english: Emperor Xuanzong ordered the poet Li Bai to write a poem for the noble concubine.

name: video_0035_0020
chinese: 玄宗皇帝和杨玉环的爱情故事，我说的对吗
english: The love story of Emperor Xuanzong and Yang Yuhuan, am I right?

name: video_0035_0021
chinese: 不是给过你一个了吗
english: Haven't I given you one before?:

name: video_0035_0022
chinese: 猫和有瓜什么关系
english: What is the relationship between cats and melons?:

name: video_0035_0023
chinese: 幻术里也有真相
english: In illusion, there is also truth.

name: video_0035_0024
chinese: 我也认识你啊，白居易
english: I also know you, Bai Juyi.

name: video_0035_0025
chinese: 你竟敢说李白的诗也是假的
english: You dare to say that Li Bai's poems are also fake.

name: video_0035_0026
chinese: 他竟然抛下我一个人逃命去了
english: He actually left me alone and ran away to save himself.

name: video_0035_0027
chinese: 下令埋我的是大唐天子，我就和大唐没完没了
english: The one who ordered to bury me is the Emperor of the Tang Dynasty, so I will have an endless feud with the Tang Dynasty.

name: video_0035_0028
chinese: 他们怎么敢演奏禁曲
english: How dare they perform a banned piece of music.

name: video_0035_0029
chinese: 别埋我，地下冷
english: Don't bury me, it's cold underground.

name: video_0035_0030
chinese: 你也爱上了她，你也为它疯狂
english: You have also fallen in love with her, you have also gone crazy for her.

name: video_0035_0031
chinese: 大唐陨落不是她的错
english: The fall of the Tang Dynasty is not her fault.

name: video_0035_0032
chinese: 我可以一辈子活在李白的阴影里，但你不能说我的长恨歌是假的
english: I can live in Li Bai's shadow for a lifetime, but you cannot say that my "Song of Everlasting Sorrow" is fake.

name: video_0035_0033
chinese: 是皇上下的令，我亲手绣的白绫
english: It is the emperor's order, I personally embroidered the white silk.

name: video_0035_0034
chinese: 贵妃已经断气了
english: The concubine has already stopped breathing.

name: video_0035_0035
chinese: 陈玄礼是陈云樵的爹，马嵬驿兵变的主谋
english: Chen Xuanli is Chen Yunqiao's father, the mastermind behind the Ma Wei Yi mutiny.

name: video_0036_0001
chinese: 昨天的事你怎么今天才来禀报啊
english: Why did you only report yesterday's matter today?

name: video_0036_0002
chinese: 我拿你当心腹，你不能老放马后炮啊
english: I treat you as my confidant, you can't always act after the event.

name: video_0036_0003
chinese: 臣割发，谢罪于天
english: The minister shaves his hair and apologizes to the heavens.

name: video_0036_0004
chinese: 没有光，没有声音
english: No light, no sound.

name: video_0036_0005
chinese: 所以你就宣战了
english: So you declared war.

name: video_0036_0006
chinese: 如此卑躬屈膝，蒙羞受辱，江山早晚都要断送在你的手中
english: To be so humble and submissive, to be ashamed and humiliated, the country will sooner or later be destroyed in your hands.

name: video_0036_0007
chinese: 两国是联盟，双方主帅一旦动手等于宣战，这点道理你也不懂
english: The two countries are allies, and once the two commanders take action, it is equivalent to declaring war. You don't understand this point of reasoning either.

name: video_0036_0008
chinese: 你到底有几成胜算
english: How likely are you to succeed?

name: video_0036_0009
chinese: 我宁可永不收回靖州，也不愿坏了联盟
english: I would rather never take back Jingzhou than break the alliance.

name: video_0036_0010
chinese: 你是不是还要替我当这个王
english: Do you still want to be the king for me?

name: video_0036_0011
chinese: 王子与庶民同罪
english: The prince and the commoners are equally guilty.

name: video_0036_0012
chinese: 打不过人家，就不要再说打了嘛
english: If you can't beat them, then don't talk about beating them anymore.

name: video_0036_0013
chinese: 谢主公不杀之恩，告退
english: Thank you, Lord, for sparing my life. I take my leave.

name: video_0036_0014
chinese: 败在杨苍刀下是我一生之耻，子虞以此伤提醒自己
english: Being defeated by Yang Cangdao is the shame of my life. Ziyu uses this to remind himself.

name: video_0036_0015
chinese: 我的伤便一日不能痊愈，靖州一日不收
english: My injury will not heal in one day, and Jingzhou will not accept it in one day.

name: video_0036_0016
chinese: 放肆，竟敢公然抗命
english: Being audacious, daring to openly defy orders.

name: video_0036_0017
chinese: 都督不忘战败之耻，令人肃然起敬，哪像你
english: The governor never forgets the shame of defeat, which is awe-inspiring, unlike you

name: video_0036_0018
chinese: 你偷偷摸摸背着我去提亲，当我是什么
english: You secretly went behind my back to propose, what do you take me for?

name: video_0036_0019
chinese: 我不嫁，要去你去
english: I won't marry, I want to go where you go.

name: video_0036_0020
chinese: 田战这是要反啊
english: Tian Zhan, this is rebellion.

name: video_0036_0021
chinese: 竟能让为父往后退两步，变化的好
english: Can make the father take two steps back, a good change.

name: video_0036_0022
chinese: 以前我是你的都督，以后我还是你的都督，如此而已
english: I used to be your commander, and I will still be your commander in the future, that's all.

name: video_0036_0023
chinese: 连天阴雨，水漫则胜，这雨下了四天了吧
english: It has been raining continuously for four days, with dark clouds covering the sky and water flooding everywhere.

name: video_0036_0024
chinese: 那什么是真的，你说什么是真的
english: So what is true, what do you say is true?

name: video_0036_0025
chinese: 其实你有很多机会可以拒绝，可以逃跑
english: Actually, you have many opportunities to refuse and escape.

name: video_0036_0026
chinese: 为什么，你一直都如此服从，愿意做这件事情
english: Why are you always so obedient and willing to do this thing?

name: video_0036_0027
chinese: 今夜，是你在这里的最后一晚了
english: Tonight, it is your last night here.

name: video_0036_0028
chinese: 故弄玄虚，我倒要看看，他是怎样的装神弄鬼
english: Playing mysterious, I want to see how he deceives people with his tricks.

name: video_0036_0029
chinese: 世上很多事情，本无对错，做了就不要后悔
english: In the world, many things have no right or wrong. Once you have done it, don't regret it.

name: video_0036_0030
chinese: 都督答应放我走的
english: The governor agreed to let me go.

name: video_0036_0031
chinese: 你收了杨苍多少金子
english: How much gold did you receive from Yang Cang?:

name: video_0036_0032
chinese: 而子虞，要建功立业青史留名，我也要成全他
english: As for Ziyu, he wants to make great achievements and leave his name in history, and I also want to help him fulfill his ambitions.

name: video_0037_0001
chinese: 我看晚霞时不干任何事
english: I do nothing when I watch the sunset.

name: video_0037_0002
chinese: 这个就是你送的蟠桃
english: This is the peach you gave me.

name: video_0037_0003
chinese: 不准打男人
english: No hitting men.

name: video_0037_0004
chinese: 桃子不能吃的吗，不能吃的话为什么不早说
english: Can't peaches be eaten? If they can't be eaten, why didn't you say so earlier?

name: video_0037_0005
chinese: 不好意思啊，最近耳屎比较多
english: Sorry, I have a lot of earwax recently.

name: video_0037_0006
chinese: 滚开
english: Get lost.

name: video_0037_0007
chinese: 亏你还记得我们一百多年都没见了
english: It's surprising that you still remember us not seeing each other for over a hundred years.

name: video_0037_0008
chinese: 简单来说，你就是个杂种
english: Simply put, you are a bastard.

name: video_0037_0009
chinese: 这个奖不是属于我的，是属于大家的
english: This award does not belong to me, it belongs to everyone.

name: video_0037_0010
chinese: 来，给我
english: Come, give it to me.

name: video_0037_0011
chinese: 我不要当你的手下，你以为这个东西可以控制我啊，太小看我
english: I don't want to be your subordinate. Do you think this thing can control me? You underestimate me.

name: video_0037_0012
chinese: 女人小孩我都不会放过
english: I won't let go of women or children.

name: video_0037_0013
chinese: 为什么要毁掉那么多美丽的地方，我不明白，我不服
english: Why destroy so many beautiful places? I don't understand, I don't accept it.

name: video_0037_0014
chinese: 出身卑微，是我把你从昆仑山提拔上来
english: I come from a humble background, and it is I who promoted you from Kunlun Mountain.

name: video_0037_0015
chinese: 把你也连累了
english: You have also been implicated.

name: video_0037_0016
chinese: 我会毫不犹豫
english: I will not hesitate.

name: video_0037_0017
chinese: 当真以为我打不过你
english: You really thought I couldn't beat you

name: video_0037_0018
chinese: 想要你就说嘛，打晕我干什么啊
english: If you want me, just say it. Why knock me out?

name: video_0037_0019
chinese: 我不会让你活着回去
english: I won't let you go back alive.

name: video_0037_0020
chinese: 凭什么，嗯？
english: Why? Hmm?

name: video_0037_0021
chinese: 就是要毁掉天机仪，人才可以掌握自己的命运
english: The goal is to destroy the Heavenly Machine so that individuals can take control of their own destiny.

name: video_0037_0022
chinese: 我说了你也不明白
english: I said it but you still don't understand.

name: video_0037_0023
chinese: 丰收要做一个顶天立地的好神仙
english: Fengshou wants to become a great immortal who stands tall and firm.

name: video_0037_0024
chinese: 现在你想把二郎哥变得跟你一样吗
english: Do you want to make Erlang Ge become like you now?

name: video_0037_0025
chinese: 你为什么总是要跟我作对
english: Why do you always have to oppose me?

name: video_0038_0001
chinese: 放心吧，你姐在九泉之下会祝福我们的
english: Don't worry, your sister will bless us from the netherworld.

name: video_0038_0002
chinese: 我俩是高中同学，不过我俩没早恋
english: We are high school classmates, but we didn't have an early relationship.

name: video_0038_0003
chinese: 一个小时，神九都快绕地球一周了
english: It's been almost a week since Shenzhou 9 orbited the Earth for an hour.

name: video_0038_0004
chinese: 假设，女主人公在学生时代非常的自卑
english: Assume that the female protagonist was very insecure during her student days.

name: video_0038_0005
chinese: 这么优秀的男人，早就应该结婚生子了
english: This excellent man should have gotten married and had children a long time ago.

name: video_0038_0006
chinese: 我觉得，这个设定有问题
english: I think there is a problem with this setting.

name: video_0038_0007
chinese: 那时候她每天都会帮我带早餐
english: At that time, she would help me bring breakfast every day.

name: video_0038_0008
chinese: 做朋友这方面，乔一真的没话说
english: When it comes to making friends, Qiao Yi really has nothing to say.

name: video_0038_0009
chinese: 宝贝，相信我，他在等你
english: Baby, believe me, he is waiting for you.

name: video_0038_0010
chinese: 过去这么多年的事，谁要在乎啊
english: Who cares about what happened in the past so many years?

name: video_0038_0011

chinese: 这是你第一次骗我的地方

name: video_0038_0038
chinese: 我这个人很记仇的

name: video_0038_0039
chinese: 这你也能认出来

name: video_0038_0040
chinese: 我是真的爱你

chinese: 是不是特别想唱给我听呀

name: video_0038_0042
chinese: 那还那么乱呢，打扫干净再走

name: video_0038_0043

chinese: 我吃过了

chinese: 是一个职业车手，有没有类似的前科，怎么会接受这样的邀请

chinese: 我呢希望你以后可以跟爸爸一样，一直飞驰下去，咱们俩这叫飞驰组合

chinese: 夏军，你放开我老婆

chinese: 那因为什么吊销驾照啊

chinese: 没开几天车，就觉得自己车机已经了不得了

name: video_0039_0008
chinese: 大哥，我不会跳舞

chinese: 虽然辛苦一些，但比起他们洗盘子，这里是天堂
english: Although it's a bit hard, compared to them washing dishes, this place is paradise.

name: video_0040_0002
chinese: 我们私下谈不行吗

chinese: 这艘船上不仅是我们三个人

chinese: 自信是美国文化对个人最基本的要求
english: Self-confidence is the most fundamental requirement of individuals in American culture.

name: video_0040_0007
chinese: 我根本就没有自信，我害怕被拒

chinese: 我暗恋你已经一年多了

name: video_0040_0009
chinese: 我还要再考一次

chinese: 在读书呢，嚷嚷什么啊

name: video_0040_0012
chinese: 关你屁事

chinese: 你要是不答应我，我就拉你一起跳湖

chinese: 听见没有，我叫你滚

name: video_0040_0015
chinese: 你走吧，会传染的

chinese: 等我发了工资
english: Wait until I receive my salary.

chinese: 但恳请各位领导从轻处分

name: video_0040_0018
chinese: 检讨人，成冬青

chinese: 你们可不可以不要在课堂上睡觉

name: video_0040_0020
chinese: 如果你们实在不喜欢听我讲课你们可以走
english: If you really don't like listening to my lectures, you can leave.

name: video_0040_0021
chinese: 它认识我我不认识它

name: video_0040_0022

english: My best friends Meng Xiaojun and Wang Yang are mocking me.

name: video_0040_0024
chinese: 如果只看长相，那叫好色

name: video_0040_0025
chinese: Ditto，同上的，同样的，意思和Me，too一样
english: Ditto, same as above, same, meaning and Me, too are the same.

name: video_0040_0026
chinese: 孟老师刚从美国回来

name: video_0040_0027
chinese: 好，很不错
english: Good, very nice.

chinese: 从今往后我爱也不办什么大型讲座了，我就办一对一签证模拟面试
english: From now on, I won't organize any large-scale lectures anymore. I will only conduct one-on-one visa mock interviews.

chinese: 她伤害了我，到美国才一个月就提出和我分手
english: She hurt me and broke up with me after only one month in the United States.

name: video_0040_0030
chinese: 说明她没骗你啊，他完全可以一年之后再告诉你
english: She didn't deceive you, he can totally tell you after a year.

chinese: 我为什么要移民啊，给我移我也不会

chinese: 你被拒签说明你不了解美国

name: video_0040_0033
chinese: 关你屁事，你以为你也能指导我吗
english: What's your business? Do you think you can also guide me?

name: video_0040_0034
chinese: 什么都不要说转身直接离开，否则它会像对待一件行李一样对待你
english: Don't say anything, just turn around and leave, otherwise it will treat you like a piece of luggage.

chinese: 你一定要把气氛搞得这么淆混吗

name: video_0040_0036
chinese: 我从来就没有什么梦想

name: video_0040_0037
chinese: 说到失败我连草稿都不用打

name: video_0040_0039
chinese: 这就是现实

chinese: 掉在水里你不会淹死，呆在水里你才会淹死
english: You won't drown if you fall into the water, you will only drown if you stay in the water.

chinese: 失败并不可怕

name: video_0040_0044
chinese: 害怕失败才真正可怕

chinese: 这是非常严重的违章行为

chinese: 原来是因为这个

chinese: 我希望告诉他们我不是一个失败者

english: Xiaojun, after we finish eating, let's go conquer the United States.

chinese: 女人啊这个眼泪是最重要的东西，没说话眼泪就下来了，抽泣
english: Women, tears are the most important thing. When there are no words, tears flow and sobbing occurs.

chinese: 男人就怕女人哭

chinese: 我为什么没有对外界说呢，我还是照顾督办的名声

chinese: 德云社真是一个其乐融融的大家庭

name: video_0041_0022
chinese: 师哥从来都不欺负师弟

chinese: 就是关系都特别好，拿德云社来说，真的特别开心在这这么多年
english: The relationship is really good, take DeYunShe for example, I'm really happy to be here for so many years.

english: Zhao Qian Sun Li, Zhou Wu Wang Zheng, Feng Chen Chu Wei, my name is Meng Hetang

name: video_0041_0027
chinese: 你说我身边要没有他，我这心里头啊

chinese: 怎么就那么开心呢我

chinese: 包括封神榜斩妲己的时候也是这样，下不去手

chinese: 我说我啊约他上国民饭店

name: video_0041_0031
chinese: 我假装约他采访约他去

name: video_0041_0032

english: Actually, I want him to teach me how to sing a few operas.

name: video_0042_0001
chinese: 我让你给咱们保安队招新人招的怎么样了

name: video_0042_0002
chinese: 好，那我就放心了，他们人呢

name: video_0042_0004
chinese: 他不还是上次那个人吗，他怎么又来了

name: video_0042_0005

chinese: 我痛定思痛，我去医院把我身上的疼痛神经全部摘除了
english: I was in so much pain that I went to the hospital and had all the pain nerves in my body removed.

name: video_0042_0007
chinese: 谢谢队长

name: video_0042_0008
chinese: 情感神经丰富了

name: video_0042_0010

english: I have studied military strategic deployment for three months.

name: video_0042_0017
chinese: 很久没人问我这个问题了

english: I am strolling alone on the beach, with golden sunlight shining, and a ship sailing in the distance.

chinese: 和水手们亲切地交谈，他看见我，向我亲切的挥了挥手
