name: video_0045_0060
chinese: 至少我觉得米个人都应该真诚都应该认真说话
english: At least I think everyone should be sincere and speak seriously.

name: video_0045_0061
chinese: 不要把自己当成是奥斯卡影帝，刻意的煽情和无病呻吟都是伪装的真诚
english: Don't consider yourself as an Oscar-winning actor, deliberate sentimentality and unnecessary complaints are all disguises of sincerity.

name: video_0045_0062
chinese: 缺的是认真说话的人
english: The missing person is someone who speaks seriously.

name: video_0045_0063
chinese: 黄小山，小山哥就是那个认真说话的人
english: Huang Xiaoshan, Xiaoshan is the person who speaks seriously.

name: video_0045_0064
chinese: 听完之后能够认认真真的做事，认认真真的作人，认认真真的说话
english: After listening, be able to do things seriously, be a serious person, and speak seriously.

name: video_0045_0065
chinese: 你居然会懂得如何让成就他人
english: You actually know how to empower others.

name: video_0045_0066
chinese: 每个人都想成全自己，但是很少有人会想到如何通过成全别人来成全自己
english: Everyone wants to fulfill themselves, but few people think about how to fulfill themselves by fulfilling others.

name: video_0045_0067
chinese: 对于像你这个年龄的阶段而言很难做到，所以我要恭喜你
english: It is difficult for someone at your age to achieve, so I want to congratulate you.

name: video_0045_0068
chinese: 但是通过他改装很厉害的赛车不见得能跑完终点
english: However, even with his impressive modifications, the race car may not necessarily be able to finish the race.

name: video_0045_0069
chinese: 我们是速度与激情的队伍
english: We are a team of speed and passion.

name: video_0045_0070
chinese: 我今天输的一点都没有遗憾，我来这个舞台我已经达到我的目的了
english: I have no regrets about losing today. I have already achieved my goal on this stage.

name: video_0045_0071
chinese: 就是这么一件看上去不那么简单的事情让你的生活却变得简单起来
english: It is such a seemingly complicated thing that makes your life simpler.

name: video_0045_0072
chinese: 我觉得我在超级演说家的舞台的收获是我来的时候远远没有想到的
english: I feel that the gains I have obtained on the stage of Super Speaker are far beyond what I expected when I came.

name: video_0045_0073
chinese: 这是一个表达观点，指引人向前的舞台
english: This is a stage that expresses opinions and guides people forward.

name: video_0045_0074
chinese: 唯有坚持自己的道路，把梦想做到极致获得的成功才是最大的成功
english: Only by sticking to one's own path and achieving dreams to the extreme can one obtain the greatest success.

name: video_0045_0075
chinese: 你比黄小山要难你知道吗，因为你在小山后面讲
english: Do you know that you are more difficult than Huang Xiaoshan because you speak behind Xiaoshan.

name: video_0045_0076
chinese: 从认真也好，从人性也好，都挺有火气的，我说这制止，怎么个制止法呢
english: Whether it's from being serious or from human nature, there is a lot of anger. I'm saying how can we stop this, what kind of method can we use to stop it?

name: video_0045_0077
chinese: 我觉得这个环节真的很要命
english: I think this part is really deadly.

name: video_0045_0078
chinese: 我一开始还在想他拿着手机在做什么，原来山哥是在搜证
english: At first, I was wondering what he was doing with his phone. It turns out that Shange was searching for evidence.

name: video_0045_0079
chinese: 这种劝说的方式，很直接把人打开踢开滚开的这种方式，最后神来一笔，这是我家的橘子
english: This way of persuasion, directly opening, kicking and rolling people away, finally comes a stroke of genius, this is my family's orange.

name: video_0045_0080
chinese: 我只能在我的台上我的表演让大家看，这小子找到感觉了
english: I can only let everyone see my performance on my stage, this kid has found the feeling.

name: video_0045_0081
chinese: 林志颖，你出来给大家示范伏地挺身
english: Lin Zhiying, come out and demonstrate push-ups for everyone.

name: video_0045_0082
chinese: 一是下，二是上，林志颖，出列
english: One is down, two is up, Lin Zhiying, step forward.

name: video_0045_0083
chinese: 但是那一瞬间我被击中了
english: But in that moment, I was struck.

name: video_0045_0084
chinese: 我明白我是像所有人一样是爱这个国家的，只是我很多时候会没有去表达
english: I understand that I love this country just like everyone else, but many times I fail to express it.

name: video_0045_0085
chinese: 我戴耳环戴很久
english: I have been wearing earrings for a long time.

name: video_0045_0086
chinese: 我带耳环给企业做培训，给政府做培训，我做了很多
english: I provide training with earrings to companies and governments. I have done a lot.

name: video_0045_0087
chinese: 我内心深处的想法是
english: My innermost thoughts are

name: video_0045_0088
chinese: 我觉得像我一个培训水平这么好的人，讲的内容这么好的人，你们何必在意我的形象
english: I feel like as someone with such a high level of training and someone who speaks so well, why do you care about my image?

name: video_0045_0089
chinese: 只要我讲的内容对你有帮助就行了
english: As long as the content I speak is helpful to you, it's fine.

name: video_0045_0090
chinese: 因为当我去给那些比较传统的政府官员，或者年龄比较大的企业主，或者这些教育工作者讲课的时候
english: Because when I go to give lectures to those relatively traditional government officials, or older business owners, or these educators.

name: video_0045_0091
chinese: 我发现他们见到我一开始对我形象的抵触，他已经对我讲的内容没有兴趣了
english: I found that they had a resistance towards my image when they first met me, and he has lost interest in what I have been saying.

name: video_0045_0092
chinese: 我说我讲的东西是好的，能够对你有帮助，你为什么不接纳我
english: I said that what I speak is good and can be helpful to you. Why don't you accept me?

name: video_0045_0093
chinese: 我带不带耳环跟你有什么关系
english: What does it have to do with you whether I wear earrings or not?

name: video_0045_0094
chinese: 你为什么不看我的内容
english: Why don't you look at my content?

name: video_0045_0095
chinese: 我不愿意把耳环摘掉，但是我知道如果我不摘掉，我会少影响很多人
english: I don't want to take off my earrings, but I know that if I don't, I will affect many people less.

name: video_0045_0096
chinese: 你快三十多岁的人了
english: You are already in your thirties.

name: video_0045_0097
chinese: 你能不能别老带着我跟你逛童装
english: Can you please stop taking me with you to shop for children's clothing?

name: video_0045_0098
chinese: 很简单，在工作上，老一辈的经验你还没有学完
english: It's simple, in work, you haven't finished learning from the experience of the older generation.

name: video_0045_0099
chinese: 但是只要我坚持自己的道路获得的成功比那样的成功要大得多，快乐也大得多
english: However, as long as I persist in my own path, the success I achieve will be much greater and the happiness will be much greater as well.

name: video_0045_0100
chinese: 因为在我年轻的时候我就已经设想要三十而立
english: Because when I was young, I had already envisioned to be established by the age of thirty.

name: video_0045_0101
chinese: 可是在台湾的三十而立叫什么，五子登科
english: What is the term for "thirty and independent" in Taiwan, and what does "five sons passing the imperial examination" mean?

name: video_0045_0102
chinese: 我还有很多事情都还没有去做，
english: I still have a lot of things that I haven't done yet.

name: video_0045_0103
chinese: 后来发现我这样设定好像也不太对，后来我就不管了
english: Later I found that this setting seems to be not quite right, so later I just ignored it.

name: video_0045_0104
chinese: 我应该努力的朝我自己想要做的事情，朝我希望跟目标不断的前进
english: I should strive towards what I want to do, and keep moving forward towards my goals.

name: video_0045_0105
chinese: 这才是对的
english: This is right.

name: video_0046_0001
chinese: 我希望这一次能够选一些比较温暖的比较能量的
english: I hope this time I can choose some warmer and more energetic ones.

name: video_0046_0002
chinese: 你讲完之后我都不太敢讲了，都总结的那么好我都不知道该怎么讲
english: After you finished speaking, I don't dare to speak anymore. You summarized it so well that I don't know how to speak.

name: video_0046_0003
chinese: 希望选择那些已经是很强的人让他们能够有所突破
english: I hope to choose those who are already strong and enable them to make breakthroughs.

name: video_0046_0004
chinese: 为了给每位导师提供一点小小的难度，这一季使用了一些机关大家看到
english: In order to provide a little challenge for each mentor, this season has incorporated some mechanisms that everyone can see.

name: video_0046_0005
chinese: 那天你昏迷了一天什么都没有做，你能证明我说错了吗
english: That day you were unconscious all day and did nothing, can you prove me wrong?

name: video_0046_0006
chinese: 用自己的表格记录一下这些时间是怎么花的
english: Use your own spreadsheet to record how these times are spent.

name: video_0046_0007
chinese: 12410枚金币，这些金币去哪了我都还记得
english: 12,410 gold coins, I still remember where these coins went.

name: video_0046_0008
chinese: 我希望你是后者
english: I hope you are the latter.

name: video_0046_0009
chinese: 如果身材不重要的话，那就请不要把这个作为选择我的理由
english: If physique is not important, then please do not use it as a reason to choose me.

name: video_0046_0010
chinese: 但是你差那么一点点就会走入歧途
english: But you were just a little bit away from going astray.

name: video_0046_0011
chinese: 所以说今天我就铤而走险我想走一个被大家可能认为是不太受欢迎的演讲方式
english: So today, I took a risk and decided to go for a speech style that may not be very popular among everyone.

name: video_0046_0012
chinese: 我建议你选一个跟你差别最大的人
english: I suggest you choose someone who is the most different from you.

name: video_0046_0013
chinese: 你所有走过的弯路，艾力，我全部都走过
english: I have walked all the detours you have walked, Eli.

name: video_0046_0014
chinese: 因为你跟乐嘉都是属于很能说的，我希望你能选鲁豫姐
english: Because both you and Le Jia are very good at speaking, I hope you can choose Lu Yu sister.

name: video_0046_0015
chinese: 如果你不选择他们，我建议你选择我
english: If you don't choose them, I suggest you choose me.

name: video_0046_0016
chinese: 说不定今天电视看完有几个人会开始反思自己，那我的目的就达到了
english: Maybe after watching TV today, some people will start to reflect on themselves. Then my goal will be achieved.

name: video_0046_0017
chinese: 大家好，我叫杨蕊蕾，我跟其他女孩不一样
english: Hello everyone, my name is Yang Ruilei, and I am different from other girls.

name: video_0046_0018
chinese: 看到我秀色可人沉鱼落雁的外表，你肯定以为我是这样的
english: Seeing my beautiful and enchanting appearance, you must think that I am like this.

name: video_0046_0019
chinese: 根本停不下来啊，朋友们说我这么喜欢说话那只有一个舞台适合我，那就是超级演说家
english: I just can't stop talking. My friends say that there is only one stage suitable for me, and that is being a super speaker.

name: video_0046_0020
chinese: 现在是一名大四的学生，还有半年毕业
english: I am currently a senior student and will graduate in six months.

name: video_0046_0021
chinese: 庙里的和尚都这么说，活该你单身
english: The monks in the temple all say this, it serves you right to be single.

name: video_0046_0022
chinese: 亲爱的，跟他们在一起太无聊了，等会打电话叫我回家，温柔点，我开免提啊
english: Dear, it's so boring being with them. Call me later and ask me to come home. Be gentle, I'll put it on speakerphone.

name: video_0046_0023
chinese: 我当时只有一句话，不带着坑媳妇的吧
english: I only had one sentence at that time, without any intention to deceive my wife.

name: video_0046_0024
chinese: 不不，别跟我提这个，以为内男人和女人像的东西永远都不同，他永远不会明白你在想什么
english: No, don't mention this to me. Men and women will never be the same, he will never understand what you're thinking.

name: video_0046_0025
chinese: 我见着两个观点，重点是想要跟你表达个性好其实是很难的
english: I see two perspectives, and the main point is that it is actually difficult to express one's personality well with you.

name: video_0046_0026
chinese: 他说完她的心都化了我觉得我的心都化了
english: He said that her heart melted, and I feel like my heart melted too.

name: video_0046_0027
chinese: 我想把他找回来
english: I want to find him back.

name: video_0046_0028
chinese: 我说你有孩子你为什么偷我的儿子
english: Why did you steal my son when I said you have children?

name: video_0046_0029
chinese: 又是这个然而，房东说孩子三天前又被送到安康去了
english: Once again, however, the landlord said that the child had been sent to Ankang three days ago.

name: video_0046_0030
chinese: 我儿子不是太可怜了吗
english: Isn't my son pitiful?

name: video_0046_0031
chinese: 算上我加上你一共八个人，不同的年纪不同的性别来自不同的地方做不同的事
english: Including me, there are a total of eight people, with different ages, genders, and origins, doing different things.

name: video_0046_0032
chinese: 我也相信奇迹，也相信那天绝对能到来的
english: I also believe in miracles and believe that day will definitely come.

name: video_0046_0033
chinese: 甚至也答应你可以将你小朋友的照片发到我微博里动员我的粉丝去帮助到他去寻找到他
english: Even agreed to let you send your child's photos to my Weibo and mobilize my fans to help him find him.

name: video_0046_0034
chinese: 因为我一直相信我的儿子会回到我的身边，我就是有这样一个信念让我坚守了二十六年
english: Because I have always believed that my son will come back to me, I have held onto this belief for twenty-six years.

name: video_0046_0035
chinese: 如果没有那些购买者，这些人贩子将会无所遁形
english: If there were no buyers, these traffickers would have nowhere to hide.

name: video_0046_0036
chinese: 我想成为一名像领袖一样伟大的人
english: I want to become a person as great as a leader.

name: video_0046_0037
chinese: 后来我才知道她就是好莱坞蒙娜日克瑞斯公司的总裁，是一位著名的导演
english: Later I learned that she is the president of Hollywood Monna Rikris Company and a famous director.

name: video_0046_0038
chinese: 父母的爱就是我成长中最好的养料
english: The love of parents is the best nourishment in my growth.

name: video_0046_0039
chinese: 但是我觉得你一新的想要帮助别人，或许你可以先改变一种方式
english: But I think if you want to help others in a new way, maybe you can start by changing your approach.

name: video_0046_0040
chinese: 我小时候曾经幻想过自己是超人，可以出现在人们需要我的时候拯救世界
english: When I was a child, I used to fantasize about being Superman, able to appear and save the world when people needed me.

name: video_0046_0041
chinese: 我也幻想过自己是一个球员，可以加入NBA和科比一起打球
english: I have also fantasized about being a basketball player and playing with Kobe in the NBA.

name: video_0046_0042
chinese: 他们开始疯狂的往场内扔垃圾扔零食仍矿泉水
english: They started throwing garbage, snacks, and mineral water into the field crazily.

name: video_0046_0043
chinese: 可是我不断的站起来就不断的摔倒，你们怎么还可以笑我呢
english: But I keep standing up and keep falling down, how can you still laugh at me?

name: video_0046_0044
chinese: 通常要穿多久啊这身衣服
english: How long do I usually have to wear this outfit?

name: video_0046_0045
chinese: 我总是特别容易被有梦想的人打动
english: I am always easily moved by people with dreams.

name: video_0046_0046
chinese: 能够让别人明白命运可以掌握在自己手里面，那我就觉得已经很开心很满足了
english: If I can make others understand that destiny can be controlled in their own hands, then I feel very happy and satisfied.

name: video_0046_0047
chinese: 他总是希望把快乐带给别人
english: 他总是希望把快乐带给别人.

name: video_0046_0048
chinese: 北极熊只是轻轻的和你握个手你的手可能就不见了
english: The polar bear just gently shakes your hand, and your hand may disappear.

name: video_0046_0049
chinese: 北极熊就把我们帐篷给抓破了，把我们的食物抢走了
english: The polar bear tore our tent and took away our food.

name: video_0046_0050
chinese: 北极熊只是轻轻的和你握个手你的手可能就不见了
english: The polar bear just gently shakes your hand, and your hand may disappear.

name: video_0046_0051
chinese: 我的极限，我的痛苦可能已经到达一个临界点
english: My limit, my pain may have reached a critical point.

name: video_0046_0052
chinese: 我们俩是不可能差别更大的了
english: We two couldn't be more different.

name: video_0046_0053
chinese: 你已经知道其实是没有人做过，就是因为没有人做过所以你想去做
english: You already know that actually no one has done it, it's just because no one has done it that you want to do it.

name: video_0046_0054
chinese: 三位导师，三位都在回避着你的演讲怎么样
english: Three mentors, all avoiding your speech. How about that?

name: video_0046_0055
chinese: 因为我以前常常在阳明山跑步，他小时候也常常在阳明山出现
english: Because I used to run in Yangmingshan often before, he also used to appear in Yangmingshan frequently when he was young.

name: video_0046_0056
chinese: 所以今天我讲的故事还是第一人称
english: So today, the story I'm telling is still in the first person.

name: video_0046_0057
chinese: 然后回来就要跟我离婚，我突然发现我嫁了个人渣
english: Then he came back and wanted to divorce me. I suddenly realized that I married a scumbag.

name: video_0046_0058
chinese: 大着肚子还有四个月就要生孩子了，我哭了又哭，哭了又哭,最让我崩溃的是我发现我居然还爱着这个人渣
english: I am four months pregnant with a big belly, and I cried and cried. What makes me even more devastated is that I found out that I still love this scumbag.

name: video_0046_0059
chinese: 我把一生最好的年纪都给了你，然后你告诉我你找到了真爱
english: I gave you the best years of my life, and then you tell me you found true love.

name: video_0046_0060
chinese: 我可以就是不跟他离婚，我甚至可以把我的底线一点一点往下退，我可以求他
english: I can just not divorce him, I can even lower my bottom line little by little, I can beg him.

name: video_0046_0061
chinese: 所谓化腐朽为神奇，化神奇为神圣
english: The so-called turning decay into magic, turning magic into divinity.

name: video_0046_0062
chinese: 可能跟大家接触之后至少有那么一段时间你偶尔会露出一些笑容吧
english: Maybe after contacting everyone, you will occasionally smile at least for a while.

name: video_0046_0063
chinese: 我觉得这个是不容易的，能够从一个吉祥物中去悟出一些道理
english: I think this is not easy, to be able to understand some principles from a mascot.

name: video_0046_0064
chinese: 我们三个人简直吓坏了
english: We three were absolutely terrified.

name: video_0046_0065
chinese: OK，那么你走吧，我不送
english: OK, then you go, I won't send you.

name: video_0047_0001
chinese: 你好你好
english: Hello

name: video_0047_0002
chinese: 我听说您是一个很特别的检控官，所以想来拜访您一下
english: I heard that you are a very special prosecutor, so I wanted to come and visit you.

name: video_0047_0003
chinese: 不就是她出第一张专辑，天使的守候那一年吗
english: Isn't it just her first album, "The Angel's Watch" that year?

name: video_0047_0004
chinese: 对，您的记忆力很好
english: Yes, your memory is very good.

name: video_0047_0005
chinese: 结果分手的时候，她把那张唱片掰成两半，所以我印象很深刻
english: When we broke up, she broke that record in half, so I have a deep impression.

name: video_0047_0006
chinese: 改天我送你一张新的
english: I'll give you a new one another day

name: video_0047_0007
chinese: 能有万文方的亲笔签名吗
english: Can I have a personal handwritten signature from Wan Wenfang?

name: video_0047_0008
chinese: 假如她还能醒过来的话
english: If she can wake up.

name: video_0047_0009
chinese: 案发当晚你在哪里
english: Where were you on the night of the incident?

name: video_0047_0010
chinese: 你跟嫌犯认识吗
english: Do you know the suspect?

name: video_0047_0011
chinese: 无论凶手是谁，我都希望重判
english: No matter who the murderer is, I hope for a heavy sentence.

name: video_0047_0012
chinese: 在我们开始谈话之前，我有必要跟你解释一下香港的法律
english: Before we start the conversation, it is necessary for me to explain Hong Kong's laws to you.

name: video_0047_0013
chinese: 一旦你的蓄意谋杀罪名成立，你就会被判终身监禁
english: Once your charge of premeditated murder is proven, you will be sentenced to life imprisonment.

name: video_0047_0014
chinese: 如果你没有什么意见的话，我会是你的代理人
english: If you have no objections, I will be your agent.

name: video_0047_0015
chinese: 我们之间需要绝对的信任
english: We need absolute trust between us.

name: video_0047_0016
chinese: 我希望你能把你知道的一切诚实地告诉我
english: I hope you can honestly tell me everything you know.

name: video_0047_0017
chinese: 我们现在可以开始谈话了吗
english: Can we start the conversation now?:

name: video_0047_0018
chinese: 万文芳跟你是什么关系
english: What is the relationship between Wan Wenfang and you?

name: video_0047_0019
chinese: 你跟警察也是这么说的吗
english: Do you say the same thing to the police?

name: video_0047_0020
chinese: 我什么都没说
english: I didn't say anything.

name: video_0047_0021
chinese: 万文芳承认了你是他的儿子
english: Wan Wenfang admitted that you are his son.

name: video_0047_0022
chinese: 所以他决定在演唱会结束那一天向媒体公布你和他的关系
english: So he decided to announce to the media about your relationship on the day after the concert ends.

name: video_0047_0023
chinese: 那你为什么要那么做
english: Why did you do that?

name: video_0047_0024
chinese: 我没有
english: I don't

name: video_0047_0025
chinese: 你是说你没有拿刀刺杀万文芳
english: You mean you didn't stab Wan Wenfang with a knife.

name: video_0047_0026
chinese: 没有
english: Nonee

name: video_0047_0027
chinese: 隆重介绍一下，这位是负责本次案子的吴郑伟大律师
english: Introducing with great honor, this is Mr. Wu Zheng, the great lawyer in charge of this case.

name: video_0047_0028
chinese: 你后悔了是吧
english: You regret it, don't you?

name: video_0047_0029
chinese: 你还是不想让别人知道我的存在
english: You still don't want others to know about my existence.

name: video_0047_0030
chinese: 当年你遗弃我，就像是遗弃一条小狗
english: When you abandoned me that year, it felt like abandoning a little dog.

name: video_0047_0031
chinese: 你以为我是什么，一件垃圾箱扔就扔吗
english: What do you think I am, something you can just throw away like a trash bin?

name: video_0047_0032
chinese: 我是人，是你的儿子
english: I am a human, I am your son.

name: video_0047_0033
chinese: 你可以不把我的偶像金曲变成噪音吗
english: Can you not turn my idol's golden songs into noise?

name: video_0047_0034
chinese: 谁叫我的唱片被人掰成两半了
english: Who broke my record in half?

name: video_0047_0035
chinese: 看来有些东西是真的不会变的
english: It seems that some things really won't change.

name: video_0047_0036
chinese: 你今天找我来是叙旧吵架还是交易啊
english: Are you here to catch up, argue, or make a deal with me today?

name: video_0047_0037
chinese: 你就是永远那么直接的一个人
english: You are always such a straightforward person.

name: video_0047_0038
chinese: 为什么不要直接，省着浪费你和我的时间
english: Why not be direct and save both your time and mine?

name: video_0047_0039
chinese: 我们收费都不便宜的
english: Our fees are not cheap.

name: video_0047_0040
chinese: 当初吸引你的不就是我的争强好胜吗
english: Wasn't it my competitiveness that attracted you in the first place?

name: video_0047_0041
chinese: 现在觉得不好玩了
english: Now I don't find it fun anymore.

name: video_0047_0042
chinese: 我结婚的时候告诉你，你有问过什么吗
english: When I got married, did I tell you? Did you ask anything?

name: video_0047_0043
chinese: 你也没有问什么嘛
english: You didn't ask anything either.

name: video_0047_0044
chinese: 你还恭喜我嘛
english: Do you still congratulate me?

name: video_0047_0045
chinese: 我请求行使我当事人的沉默权
english: I request to exercise my right to remain silent as a party involved.

name: video_0047_0046
chinese: 他患有严重的幽闭恐惧症
english: He suffers from severe claustrophobia.

name: video_0047_0047
chinese: 喂，你们有没有看过美国警方给我们当年托马斯夫妇的车祸资料啊
english: Hello, have you seen the information about the car accident of the Thomas couple provided by the American police?

name: video_0047_0048
chinese: 美国警方怀疑当时的车祸也是一个谋杀案，只不过因为证据不足，当年没有起诉
english: The American police suspected that the car accident at the time was also a murder case, but due to insufficient evidence, no charges were filed that year.

name: video_0047_0049
chinese: 我不觉得两件事是一个巧合，所以我一定不会终止起诉
english: I don't think it's a coincidence that these two things happened, so I definitely won't drop the lawsuit.

name: video_0047_0050
chinese: 请问您以前，跟我的当事人交谈过吗
english: Have you ever spoken with the person involved in my case before?

name: video_0047_0051
chinese: 我不认识他
english: I don't know him.

name: video_0047_0052
chinese: 那您怎么能确定，您听到的争吵声就是我当事人的声音呢
english: How can you be sure that the argument you heard is my voice as a party involved?

name: video_0047_0053
chinese: 这把刀是案发现场发现的凶器
english: The knife is the weapon found at the crime scene.

name: video_0047_0054
chinese: 但是因为被告掉进了海里，使衣服血迹很模糊
english: But because the defendant fell into the sea, the bloodstains on the clothes became blurred.

name: video_0047_0055
chinese: 因为罗美慧在案发时有不在场的证据
english: Because there is evidence that Luo Meihui was not present at the time of the incident.

name: video_0047_0056
chinese: 根据腹部刀伤的切入角度和高度，我们判断凶手应该身高一米八左右
english: According to the angle and height of the abdominal knife wound, we determine that the murderer should be about 1.8 meters tall.

name: video_0047_0057
chinese: 逻辑上是有可能的
english: It is logically possible.

name: video_0047_0058
chinese: 那你的工作岗位是在哪里呢
english: Where is your job position?

name: video_0047_0059
chinese: 不可能有第三个人出现对吗
english: Is it impossible for a third person to appear?

name: video_0047_0060
chinese: 是黑色曼陀罗，也叫复仇之花
english: It is a black mandala, also known as the flower of revenge.

name: video_0047_0061
chinese: 被告吉米托马斯，他的网名叫什么
english: The defendant Jimmy Thomas, what is his online alias?

name: video_0047_0062
chinese: 那雪花是你写的吗
english: Did you write that snowflake?:

name: video_0047_0063
chinese: 但是那句话真的不是我写的
english: But that sentence really wasn't written by me.

name: video_0047_0064
chinese: 是要通过我们努力的帮嫌疑人辩护才能促使控方和警方不断地去发掘真相
english: It is through our efforts to defend the suspect that we can constantly urge the prosecution and the police to uncover the truth.

name: video_0047_0065
chinese: 知道现在有十几个警察在帮他们寻找证据
english: There are more than ten police officers currently helping them search for evidence.

name: video_0047_0066
chinese: 那但是，他报什么仇啊
english: But what revenge is he seeking?

name: video_0047_0067
chinese: 你们谁把消息发给媒体了
english: Who among you sent the message to the media?

name: video_0047_0068
chinese: 我有一件事情，一直不知道该不该跟你说
english: I have something that I've been unsure whether I should tell you or not.

name: video_0047_0069
chinese: 为了今天的成就和地位，她已经付出了太多了
english: For today's achievements and status, she has already paid too much.

name: video_0047_0070
chinese: 我是吉米的辩护律师端木兰
english: I am Mulan, Jimmy's defense lawyer.

name: video_0047_0071
chinese: 你想想如果让别人知道你年纪轻轻的就有一个私生子
english: If others knew that you have a child at such a young age.

name: video_0047_0072
chinese: 还哪里有歌迷会去买你的唱片呢
english: Where else can fans go to buy your albums?

name: video_0047_0073
chinese: 那当您知道她被刺的消息您有去了哪里
english: Where did you go when you found out about her being stabbed?

name: video_0047_0074
chinese: 当然是去后台啊，她的化妆间
english: Of course, go to the backstage, her dressing room.

name: video_0047_0075
chinese: 首演那天晚上，万文芳想要公布和吉米的关系
english: On the night of the premiere, Wan Wenfang wanted to announce her relationship with Jimmy.

name: video_0047_0076
chinese: 她现在生不如死，你能说跟你一点关系都没有吗
english: She is now living worse than death. Can you say that you have nothing to do with it?

name: video_0047_0077
chinese: 你从来没有问过我我回到北京发生了什么
english: You have never asked me what happened when I returned to Beijing.

name: video_0047_0078
chinese: 没想到你还挺长情的
english: I didn't expect you to be so loyal.

name: video_0047_0079
chinese: 真相就那么重要吗
english: Is the truth really that important?

name: video_0047_0080
chinese: 为了真相毁掉一个人，这真相值得吗
english: Is it worth destroying a person for the truth?

name: video_0047_0081
chinese: 你怎么回来北京吗，你不是说北京很冷的吗
english: How did you come back to Beijing? Didn't you say Beijing is very cold?

name: video_0047_0082
chinese: 你跑到北京来就是想要告诉我我有多失败吗
english: Are you coming to Beijing just to tell me how much of a failure I am?

name: video_0047_0083
chinese: 我从来没有像今天这样怀疑我自己
english: I have never doubted myself like I do today.

name: video_0047_0084
chinese: 有太多的事情我想要知道答案，如果我今天晚上不去的话我会睡不着觉
english: There are too many things I want to know the answers to. If I don't go tonight, I won't be able to sleep.

name: video_0047_0085
chinese: 原来你跟他们是一伙的
english: 原来你跟他们是一伙的

name: video_0047_0086
chinese: 我跟他们是一伙的你早就在监狱里了
english: I am with them, you have been in prison for a long time.

name: video_0047_0087
chinese: 该补的那天，她会那么问我
english: On the day that needs to be made up, she will ask me like that.

name: video_0047_0088
chinese: 我们来做个游戏
english: Let's play a game.

name: video_0047_0089
chinese: 你出卖我
english: You betrayed me.

name: video_0048_0001
chinese: 我是让你人往右
english: I am asking you to go right.

name: video_0048_0002
chinese: 你挡着呢我哪看得见啊
english: You are blocking, how can I see?

name: video_0048_0003
chinese: 怎么就剩我一个人啦
english: Why am I the only one left?

name: video_0048_0004
chinese: 你们仨刚才在这干嘛呢
english: What were you three doing here just now?

name: video_0048_0005
chinese: 他就在您的身后
english: He is right behind you.

name: video_0048_0006
chinese: 你们说爷爷也真是的，干嘛非得大年三十去旅游啊
english: You guys are really something, why do you have to go on a trip on New Year's Eve?

name: video_0048_0007
chinese: 真是的，他要是不去，咱这年夜饭也改不了中午啊
english: If he doesn't go, we won't be able to change our New Year's Eve dinner to lunch.

name: video_0048_0008
chinese: 哎呀，赶紧想想咱这资金怎么办吧
english: Oh, quickly think about what to do with our funds.

name: video_0048_0009
chinese: 这可是咱们家第一个团圆年，当然得隆重的庆祝一下
english: This is our first reunion year at home, so we must celebrate it grandly.

name: video_0048_0010
chinese: 参观一下我的菜单吗
english: Would you like to take a look at my menu?

name: video_0048_0011
chinese: 这是菜单吗，这分明是满汉全席啊
english: Is this a menu? This is clearly a Manchu Han Imperial Feast.

name: video_0048_0012
chinese: 你还定了个蛋糕，吃得了吗
english: You also ordered a cake, can you eat it?

name: video_0048_0013
chinese: 没准还能减少点资金呢
english: Maybe it can also reduce some funds.

name: video_0048_0014
chinese: 你怎么来了
english: How did you come?

name: video_0048_0015
chinese: 老夏，你倒表个态啊
english: Lao Xia, you should express your opinion.

name: video_0048_0016
chinese: 咱们除了压岁钱就没有别的资金来源吗
english: Do we have any other source of funds besides red envelopes?

name: video_0048_0017
chinese: 夏东海，你别太自私
english: Xia Donghai, don't be too selfish.

name: video_0048_0018
chinese: 刘梅，你也别太自私了
english: Liu Mei, don't be too selfish either.

name: video_0048_0019
chinese: 这，这是我们家第一个团圆年
english: This is the first reunion year for our family.

name: video_0048_0020
chinese: 你没点正经啊你
english: You're not serious, are you?

name: video_0048_0021
chinese: 老了，这耳朵不好使了
english: I'm getting old, my ears don't work well anymore.

name: video_0048_0022
chinese: 你说这什么话，什么叫白娶了，那咱们俩不也得吃饭吗是不是
english: What are you talking about? What do you mean by marrying in vain? Then we both have to eat, right?

name: video_0048_0023
chinese: 吃什么呀吃，要吃你自己吃，我可吃不下
english: What do you want to eat? Eat it yourself, I can't eat anymore.

name: video_0048_0024
chinese: 大过节的你干嘛光想自己啊
english: Why are you only thinking about yourself during the big holiday?

name: video_0048_0025
chinese: 你得赶紧想办法怎么对付他们啊
english: You have to quickly figure out how to deal with them.

name: video_0048_0026
chinese: 是啊，我妈非得哭了不可
english: Yeah, my mom insisted on crying.

name: video_0048_0027
chinese: 合着大过年的仨孩子一个都不在跟前
english: None of the three children are here for the New Year.

name: video_0048_0028
chinese: 你说这年这还怎么过啊
english: How can we still get through this year?

name: video_0048_0029
chinese: 咱们四个人过不也挺好的吗，挺热闹的
english: Isn't it also good for the four of us to have a lively time together?

name: video_0048_0030
chinese: 没咱什么事，咱们就撤了吧
english: It's none of our business, let's just leave.

name: video_0048_0031
chinese: 要不在这留下一块吃饭吧
english: How about leaving a piece of food here?

name: video_0048_0032
chinese: 这才像过个团圆年呢
english: This is what a reunion year should be like.

name: video_0049_0001
chinese: 你看看这俩孩子，多懂事
english: Look at these two children, they are so sensible.

name: video_0049_0002
chinese: 其实我还真没什么事
english: Actually, I don't really have anything to do.

name: video_0049_0003
chinese: 我都和鼠标键盘约好了说今天几个同学一块聚一聚
english: I have made an appointment with the mouse and keyboard to gather together with a few classmates today.

name: video_0049_0004
chinese: 我要不去，他们得多没劲啊，他们那能玩的起来啊
english: I don't want to go, it will be so boring without me. They won't be able to have fun without me.

name: video_0049_0005
chinese: 肯定，他们肯定认为是一借口
english: Definitely, they definitely think it's an excuse.

name: video_0049_0006
chinese: 大过年的，非上人同学家过去
english: Going to a classmate's house during the Chinese New Year.

name: video_0049_0007
chinese: 我不愿意让他去吧就耍脾气，甭理他
english: I don't want to let him go, just throw a tantrum and ignore him.

name: video_0049_0008
chinese: 我不愿意让他去吧就耍脾气，甭理他
english: I don't want to let him go, just throw a tantrum and ignore him.

name: video_0049_0009
chinese: 我找你来是有事，我准备跟你谈一谈
english: I have something to discuss with you, that's why I asked you to come.

name: video_0049_0010
chinese: 没关系，我这人就喜欢被人打
english: It's okay, I just like being hit by people.

name: video_0049_0011
chinese: 我看啊，您和我妈一样，一点都不理解我
english: I see, you and my mom are the same, you don't understand me at all.

name: video_0049_0012
chinese: 我看啊，您和我妈一样，一点都不理解我
english: I see, you and my mom are the same, you don't understand me at all.

name: video_0049_0013
chinese: 你看看，还是人家东海会教育孩子吧
english: You see, it's better for the East China Sea Education to teach children.

name: video_0049_0014
chinese: 我就是有条件的答应了他
english: I just conditionally agreed to him.

name: video_0049_0015
chinese: 这孩子呀，一年比一年懂事
english: This child, year by year, becomes more sensible.

name: video_0049_0016
chinese: 你猜怎么样啊，我已经把你妈说通了
english: How about that? I have already convinced your mother.

name: video_0049_0017
chinese: 您不是都同意了吗
english: Didn't you agree to all of it?

name: video_0049_0018
chinese: 我动不了了，你们谁来帮我一把
english: I can't move, who can help me?

name: video_0049_0019
chinese: 他根本就没去小东他们家，全是骗人的
english: He didn't go to Xiao Dong's house at all. It's all a lie.

name: video_0049_0020
chinese: 你这是检讨的态度吗你
english: Is this your attitude of self-reflection?

name: video_0049_0021
chinese: 我真是恨死那个卖鞭炮的了，别让我再见着他
english: I really hate that guy who sells firecrackers. Don't let me see him again.

name: video_0049_0022
chinese: 这能怪谁啊，要怪也只能怪你自己
english: Who can we blame for this? If we have to blame someone, it can only be yourself.

name: video_0050_0001
chinese: 你都这岁数了不长白毛还长绿毛啊，长绿毛那是女妖
english: You're already at this age and you don't have any white hair, but you still have green hair. Having green hair means you're a witch.

name: video_0050_0002
chinese: 您说你说那话干嘛呀
english: Why did you say that?

name: video_0050_0003
chinese: 正好有机会再给你们展示一下我的拿手好戏
english: I have a great opportunity to show you my specialty again.

name: video_0050_0004
chinese: 您愿意留下可以给您留着，随您啊
english: Would you like to leave it for you to keep, it's up to you.

name: video_0050_0005
chinese: 我得到了一个好消息
english: I received some good news.

name: video_0050_0006
chinese: 我觉得孩子们说的还是挺有道理的
english: I think what the children said makes sense.

name: video_0050_0007
chinese: 我绝对是为你好
english: I absolutely have your best interests at heart.

name: video_0050_0008
chinese: 你是不是今天存心要把我的自尊心彻底刺伤
english: Are you intentionally trying to completely hurt my self-esteem today?

name: video_0050_0009
chinese: 人家照相都不要钱了，用摩斯当然得给钱了
english: People don't charge for taking photos anymore, of course you have to pay for using Morse code.

name: video_0050_0010
chinese: 在我还没有变成老太太之前，留下我一生最美丽的瞬间
english: Before I become an old lady, leave me the most beautiful moment of my life.

name: video_0050_0011
chinese: 谢谢小雨对妈妈的夸奖
english: Thank you, Xiaoyu, for praising my mom.

name: video_0050_0012
chinese: 一会儿当着你妈的面，你们知道该说什么吗
english: In a moment, in front of your mother, do you know what to say?

name: video_0050_0013
chinese: 我跟你说得着吗
english: Can I reach you?

name: video_0051_0001
chinese: 给他们一点具体而微的帮助，那我就不虚此行
english: Give them a little specific and detailed help, then my trip will not be in vain.

name: video_0051_0002
chinese: 一上来就这么高难度
english: Starting off with such a high difficulty level.

name: video_0051_0003
chinese: 一把破梳子
english: A broken comb

name: video_0051_0004
chinese: 别到时候嫁不出去还赖上我了
english: Don't blame me if you can't get married later.

name: video_0051_0005
chinese: 谁说我要回去了
english: Who said I want to go back?

name: video_0051_0006
chinese: 我就和他们拼命
english: I will fight them with all my might.

name: video_0051_0007
chinese: 其实刚才看这段戏的时候我一直在观察你
english: Actually, I was observing you while watching this scene just now.

name: video_0051_0008
chinese: 没有准备好就不要去碰它
english: If you're not ready, don't touch it.

name: video_0051_0009
chinese: 因为孩子也有可能成为山寨大王
english: Because children may also become counterfeit kings.

name: video_0051_0010

english: But don't worry, I have already made him swear.

name: video_0056_0070
chinese: 你知不知道他会被打死的
english: Do you know that he will be beaten to death?

name: video_0056_0071
chinese: 我会去救他
english: I will go to save him.

name: video_0056_0072
chinese: 我宝宝啊，你忘了，咱俩是组合
english: My baby, you forgot, we are a team.

name: video_0056_0073
chinese: 我一直在利用你，你这个傻瓜
english: I have been taking advantage of you, you fool.

name: video_0056_0074
chinese: 奥，我连问一下都不可以是不是
english: Oh, can't I even ask a question?

name: video_0056_0075
chinese: 西游记吗，我要个授权书比西天取经还难
english: Journey to the West, I want an authorization letter, which is even harder than going to the Western Heaven to obtain the scriptures.

name: video_0056_0076
chinese: 你打我
english: You hit me.

name: video_0056_0077
chinese: 你敢打我
english: You dare to hit me?

name: video_0056_0078
chinese: 你可以跟你老婆和好啊
english: You can make up with your wife.

name: video_0056_0079
chinese: 给你老婆打个电话
english: Give your wife a call.

name: video_0056_0080
chinese: 是不是泡水泡多了
english: Have you soaked in water for too long?

name: video_0056_0081
chinese: 你千辛万苦这么跟着我就是为了旅游
english: You have followed me through thick and thin just for traveling.

name: video_0056_0082
chinese: 你到泰国到底是来干嘛的
english: What are you doing in Thailand?

name: video_0056_0083
chinese: 那就是你们全集都有病
english: That means all of you are sick.

name: video_0056_0084
chinese: 你欺人太甚
english: You have gone too far in bullying others.

name: video_0056_0085
chinese: 高博，也许这是一个新的开始
english: Gao Bo, maybe this is a new beginning.

name: video_0056_0086
chinese: 那天我问小迪，如果我们俩真的离婚了他愿意跟谁
english: That day, I asked Xiao Di who he would be willing to be with if we really got divorced.

name: video_0056_0087
chinese: 嗯，我觉得可以
english: Well, I think it's possible.

name: video_0056_0088
chinese: 放弃油坝，后悔吗
english: Give up the oil dam, do you regret it?

name: video_0056_0089
chinese: 就像那颗坏牙，被王宝踢掉以后发现再也不疼了
english: Just like that bad tooth, after being kicked off by Wang Bao, it was found that it no longer hurts.

name: video_0056_0090
chinese: 此时此刻现在我就要去泰国，
english: At this moment, I am about to go to Thailand.

name: video_0056_0091
chinese: 只要老周肯把授权给我，一切一切就都好了
english: As long as Lao Zhou is willing to authorize me, everything will be fine.

name: video_0057_0001
chinese: 在开锁公司干了半个月就离职了，工资都没要。是不是太亏了
english: I only worked at the locksmith company for half a month and then quit, without asking for any salary. Is it too much of a loss?

name: video_0057_0002
chinese: 我都观察了好多天了，白天都没人
english: I have been observing for many days, and there is no one during the day.

name: video_0057_0003
chinese: 还没进门，就给了一百块
english: Before even entering, he gave me one hundred yuan.

name: video_0057_0004
chinese: 你什么事，我们住这的
english: What's the matter? We live here.

name: video_0057_0005
chinese: 那您是赵先生的室友吧
english: So you are Mr. Zhao's roommate, right?

name: video_0057_0006
chinese: 诶，那不行，都预约好了，要不我跟她确认一下
english: Eh, that won't work. We have all made appointments. How about I confirm with her?

name: video_0057_0007
chinese: 打扫好了，一共两百
english: The cleaning is done, a total of two hundred.

name: video_0057_0008
chinese: 你们这房子一百平，一平八毛，一个月八十块钱
english: Your house is 100 square meters, 1.8 yuan per square meter, 80 yuan per month.

name: video_0057_0009
chinese: 不是，我们就租一间卧室
english: No, we will just rent one bedroom.

name: video_0057_0010
chinese: 我管不着，怎么分是你们自己的事情
english: I can't control it, how to divide it is your own business.

name: video_0057_0011
chinese: 你就不走了，那就给钱吧
english: You're not leaving, then give me the money.

name: video_0057_0012
chinese: 今天不买东西，我想跟你商量点事
english: Today I won't buy anything, I want to discuss something with you.

name: video_0057_0013
chinese: 那多不好意思啊
english: I'm really sorry about that.

name: video_0057_0014
chinese: 哎呦，没什么不好意思的，你是一个值得托付的人
english: Aiyo, there's nothing to be embarrassed about. You are a person worth trusting.

name: video_0057_0015
chinese: 放心吧王阿姨，我很有耐心的
english: Don't worry, Aunt Wang, I am very patient.

name: video_0057_0016
chinese: 那老公，现在怎么办呢
english: Then husband, what should we do now?

name: video_0057_0017
chinese: 老公，你那两百万真的处理好了
english: Husband, have you really handled the two million?

name: video_0057_0018
chinese: 憨包，天底下怎么会有那么蠢的人
english: Fool, how can there be such stupid people in the world?

name: video_0057_0019
chinese: 这个车位是我先看见的，你上别的地方停一下啊
english: I saw this parking space first, please park somewhere else for a while.

name: video_0057_0020
chinese: 这车位你家的啊，先来后到，我就要停这儿，怎么啦
english: Is this parking space yours? First come, first served. I want to park here, what's the problem?

name: video_0057_0021
chinese: 你这人真的很奇怪啊，你的车停到这里了吗，凭什么说这个车位是你的
english: You are really strange. Did you park your car here? Why do you say this parking spot is yours?

name: video_0057_0022
chinese: 就你钱多啊
english: You have a lot of money.

name: video_0057_0023
chinese: 昨天赵先生跟我预约了一下让我进来打扫
english: Yesterday, Mr. Zhao made an appointment with me to come in and clean.

name: video_0057_0024
chinese: 他说钥匙放在门垫底下了
english: He said the key is placed under the doormat.

name: video_0057_0025
chinese: 我告诉你们，我今天要是拿不到这个钱，我就不走了
english: If I don't get this money today, I won't leave.

name: video_0058_0001
chinese: 英雄首先得是个帅哥
english: The hero must first be a handsome guy.

name: video_0058_0002
chinese: 你确实还差点意思
english: You really lack a bit of meaning.

name: video_0058_0003
chinese: 爱怎么着怎么着，不管你
english: Love however you want, I don't care.

name: video_0058_0004
chinese: 那么大声音，那么吵那么闹
english: Such a loud sound, so noisy and chaotic.

name: video_0058_0005
chinese: 借你漫画书和CD绝对不是问题
english: Borrowing your comic books and CDs is definitely not a problem.

name: video_0058_0006
chinese: 问题是，你行吗
english: The question is, can you do it?

name: video_0058_0007
chinese: 他能出什么毛病啊，这么大孩子都这样
english: What's wrong with him? He's already such a big child and still behaves like this.

name: video_0058_0008
chinese: 今天好像是我救了您吧
english: It seems like I saved you today.

name: video_0058_0009
chinese: 活该，大半夜的没事在那爬来爬去的，不困才怪呢
english: Serves you right, crawling around like that in the middle of the night for no reason. It's strange if you're not tired.

name: video_0058_0010
chinese: 看来你们俩现在的口令已经完全失效了
english: It seems that the password for both of you is completely invalid now.

name: video_0058_0011
chinese: 说说吧，这书包里装的都是什么啊
english: Tell me, what is in this schoolbag?

name: video_0058_0012
chinese: 对嘛，洗洗更健康嘛
english: Right, washing is healthier.

name: video_0058_0013
chinese: 去去去，别跟我在这捣乱
english: Go away, stop bothering me here.

name: video_0058_0014
chinese: 他保护什么小雪啊他一小孩
english: What does he protect, Xiaoxue? He is a child.

name: video_0058_0015
chinese: 回屋去听见没有
english: Go back to the room and listen, there is nothing.

name: video_0058_0016
chinese: 能让我少操点心不能
english: Can you make me worry less?

name: video_0059_0001
chinese: 说了你俩还不相信，女孩子开车就是没男孩子厉害
english: Even though I said it, you two still don't believe it. Girls are just not as good at driving as boys.

name: video_0059_0002
chinese: 这是谁干的
english: Who did this?

name: video_0059_0003
chinese: 当然漂亮啊，又漂亮又年轻
english: Of course, beautiful, young and beautiful again.

name: video_0059_0004
chinese: 我们都在一起这么多年了，我会因为这种事生气吗，实话都听不了
english: We have been together for so many years, would I get angry because of such things? I can't even hear the truth.

name: video_0059_0005
chinese: 你现在确实长得一般，不如我刚认识你那会长得好看
english: You really look average now, not as good-looking as when I first met you.

name: video_0059_0006
chinese: 你看你那皱纹确实有点多
english: You see, you do have quite a few wrinkles.

name: video_0059_0007
chinese: 老公，对不起
english: Husband, I'm sorry.

name: video_0059_0008
chinese: 这十多年的同学聚会你都能迟到，不走心啊
english: You have been late for class reunions for over ten years, not sincere enough.

name: video_0059_0009
chinese: 这哪是人吃的啊，反正我是不会吃的
english: What kind of food is this? Anyway, I won't eat it.

name: video_0059_0010
chinese: 我今天说的这番话完全是对你好
english: The words I said today were completely for your own good.

name: video_0059_0011
chinese: 不是我说你，为什么找工作非要往大城市跑呢
english: It's not me saying this, but why do you have to go to big cities to find a job?

name: video_0059_0012
chinese: 你们干嘛呀，我就是关心关心嘛，人跟动物之间应该有爱心啊
english: What are you doing? I'm just showing some concern, there should be love between humans and animals.

name: video_0059_0013
chinese: 别想再从我这拿走一分钱
english: Don't even think about taking a penny from me again.

name: video_0059_0014
chinese: 钱我可以给你，但是你要照顾好我儿子
english: I can give you money, but you have to take good care of my son.

name: video_0059_0015
chinese: 这种女的要不得，莫名其妙的
english: This kind of woman is unacceptable, inexplicable.

name: video_0060_0001
chinese: 加油哦
english: Come on

name: video_0060_0002
chinese: 学校没一个正经的
english: The school doesn't have a serious one.

name: video_0060_0003
chinese: 这美女谁啊，老张你去调查一下
english: Who is this beauty? Lao Zhang, go investigate.

name: video_0060_0004
chinese: 这厮谁啊，眼疾手快的呀
english: Who is this guy? He's quick with his eyes and hands.

name: video_0060_0005
chinese: 那边那个是她恩爱的小男友
english: That over there is her loving boyfriend.

name: video_0060_0006
chinese: 是彼此的初恋，现在天各一方
english: It is each other's first love, now we are in different worlds.

name: video_0060_0007
chinese: 咱们宿舍美女如云呀
english: We have many beautiful girls in our dormitory.

name: video_0060_0008
chinese: 每次走过走廊都像经过野兽出没的丛林
english: Every time I walk through the corridor, it feels like passing through a jungle where wild beasts roam.

name: video_0060_0009
chinese: 可你每次都活下来了
english: But you survived every time.

name: video_0060_0010
chinese: 大学生活太令我失望了
english: College life has disappointed me too much.

name: video_0060_0011
chinese: 能不能麻烦老师您来给看看
english: Can you please bother the teacher to come and have a look?

name: video_0060_0012
chinese: 新生学前教育白给你们讲了
english: The new student talked to you about free preschool education.

name: video_0060_0013
chinese: 老师，我们错了，下次不敢了
english: Teacher, we were wrong. We won't dare next time.

name: video_0060_0014
chinese: 怎么样了，宿管科老师派人修了吗
english: How is it going? Did the dormitory management teacher send someone to fix it?

name: video_0060_0015
chinese: 我跟宿管科老师保证以后不会再用了
english: I promise the dormitory management teacher that I will not use it again in the future.

name: video_0060_0016
chinese: 我跟你什么关系啊
english: What is our relationship?

name: video_0060_0017
chinese: 你别得谁跟谁撒气啊
english: Who are you venting your anger on?

name: video_0060_0018
chinese: 出国了，去美国了
english: Going abroad, going to the United States.

name: video_0060_0019
chinese: 他去美国怎么可能不告诉我
english: How is it possible that he went to the United States without telling me?

name: video_0060_0020
chinese: 天地良心，我能有什么居心啊
english: Conscience of heaven and earth, what can I have on my mind?

name: video_0060_0021
chinese: 这回咱俩真拉倒了
english: We're really done this time.

name: video_0060_0022
chinese: 我其实不是讨厌你，我是嫉妒你
english: I actually don't dislike you, I am jealous of you.

name: video_0060_0023
chinese: 说真的，这种时候我也不知道该怎么办
english: To be honest, I don't know what to do in this situation either.

name: video_0060_0024
chinese: 他都没正眼看过我
english: He didn't even look at me.

name: video_0060_0025
chinese: 让天上的雷劈死我吧
english: Let the thunder from the sky strike me dead.

name: video_0060_0026
chinese: 那怎么行啊，既然都来了
english: How can that be possible? Since everyone is already here.

name: video_0060_0027
chinese: 我觉得我特别对不起阮莞
english: I feel really sorry for Ruan Wan.

name: video_0060_0028
chinese: 一定要注意身体啊，不要乱吃零食
english: Be sure to take care of your body and don't eat snacks randomly.

name: video_0060_0029
chinese: 你们换个创意好不好，第一个用这种方法的是天才
english: Can you guys come up with a new idea? The first person to use this method is a genius.

name: video_0060_0030
chinese: 蜜罐里长大的吧，嘴这么甜
english: You must have grown up in a honey pot, your mouth is so sweet.

name: video_0060_0031
chinese: 你敢推我
english: Do you dare to push me?

name: video_0060_0032
chinese: 是因为你不但差点弄坏了我的东西，而且还挡住了我抢救它
english: The reason is that not only did you almost damage my things, but you also blocked me from saving it.

name: video_0060_0033
chinese: 还有你顺便告诉她，不是什么东西都可以随便乱动的
english: Also, please tell her that not everything can be moved around casually.

name: video_0060_0034
chinese: 我要他先道歉
english: I want him to apologize first.

name: video_0060_0035
chinese: 我告诉你，昨天的事还没完呢
english: I tell you, the matter from yesterday is not finished yet.

name: video_0060_0036
chinese: 我跟你没什么好说的，麻烦你把手放开
english: I have nothing to say to you, please let go of my hand.

name: video_0060_0037
chinese: 但是别来烦我
english: But don't bother me.

name: video_0060_0038
chinese: 可是我已经投喜欢的人了
english: But I have already confessed my feelings to someone I like.

name: video_0060_0039
chinese: 看你平常对女生视而不见，没想到不鸣则已一鸣惊人啊
english: I usually see you ignore girls, but unexpectedly you have a surprising performance when you speak up.

name: video_0060_0040
chinese: 连考了三年都没考上
english: I have been taking the exam for three years and still haven't passed.

name: video_0060_0041
chinese: 你怎么来了
english: How did you come?

name: video_0060_0042
chinese: 姐是不是给你丢人了
english: Did my sister embarrass you?

name: video_0060_0043
chinese: 怎么能弥补对你的伤害
english: How can I make up for the harm I caused to you?

name: csbgs2_0001_00000
chinese: 都有病了，哪有那么好的胃口。
english: We are all sick, how can we have such a good appetite.

name: csbgs2_0001_00001
chinese: 有则改之，无则加勉，这条懂不懂啊。
english: If there is, then improve it; if not, then strive harder. Do you understand this?

name: csbgs2_0001_00002
chinese: 不找到了吗，跟咱们班没啥关系。
english: Can't find it anymore, it has nothing to do with our class.

name: csbgs2_0001_00003
chinese: 红军不怕远征难，万水千山只等闲。
english: The Red Army is not afraid of difficult expeditions, and considers crossing thousands of rivers and mountains as mere leisure.

name: csbgs2_0001_00004
chinese: 让我当天班长看看，他们解决不了的问题，我全给他解决了，耶！
english: Let me be the monitor for the day and see, I solved all the problems that they couldn't solve, yay!

name: csbgs2_0001_00005
chinese: 我早就想当班长了，这是人所公知的事实。
english: I have long wanted to be the class monitor, which is a well-known fact.

name: csbgs2_0001_00006
chinese: 同志们，我有办法了！
english: Comrades, I have a solution!

name: csbgs2_0001_00007
chinese: 战士们想吃什么吃什么，想盛什么盛什么，想吃多少盛多少。
english: The soldiers can eat whatever they want, serve whatever they want, and eat as much as they want.

name: csbgs2_0001_00008
chinese: 没有解决的问题，你当了一天班长就解决了。
english: The unresolved problem, you solved it as soon as you became the monitor for a day.

name: csbgs2_0001_00009
chinese: 群众的智慧是无穷的呀。
english: The wisdom of the masses is infinite.

name: csbgs2_0001_00010
chinese: 你别这样，你突然这样我都受不了了。
english: You can't do this, I can't stand it when you suddenly act like this.

name: csbgs2_0001_00011
chinese: 哎，这才是为兵服务的态度嘛。
english: Ah, this is the attitude for serving the soldiers.

name: csbgs2_0001_00012
chinese: 这不是给我当头一棒吗。
english: Isn't this a blow to my head?

name: csbgs2_0001_00013
chinese: 我今儿当班长奥。
english: I am the monitor today.

name: csbgs2_0001_00015
chinese: 你真没有白当这一天班长，你解决了咱们连非常重要的一个问题。
english: You really didn't become the class monitor for nothing. You solved a very important problem for us.

name: csbgs2_0001_00016
chinese: 你做了一件大好事儿啊。
english: You did a great thing.

name: csbgs2_0001_00017
chinese: 为我成功的当了一天的班长，鼓掌。
english: Applaud for me for successfully being the class monitor for a day.

name: csbgs2_0001_00018
chinese: 我是凉菜好好拌，体能好好练，板报争取办得越来越好看。
english: I am Liangcai, I mix well, I exercise well, and I strive to make the blackboard look better and better.

name: csbgs2_0001_00019
chinese: 继续当好班长，请大家鼓掌。
english: Continue to be a good class monitor, please applaud everyone.

name: csbgs2_0001_00020
chinese: 怎么一到我这就不让说呢。
english: Why can't I speak as soon as I arrive here?

name: csbgs2_0001_00021
chinese: 我看咱们这个规定很好，很正确。
english: I think this regulation is very good and correct.

name: csbgs2_0001_00022
chinese: 好好好，非常好，你们整的挺丰盛啊。
english: Good, very good, you guys prepared quite a feast.

name: csbgs2_0001_00023
chinese: 你好不容易来一趟，得给你整个像样点儿啊。
english: It's not easy for you to come all the way here, I have to make it look decent for you.

name: csbgs2_0001_00024
chinese: 诶呀，你们连的伙食搞得不错呀。
english: Wow, you guys have done a great job with the food you made.

name: csbgs2_0001_00025
chinese: 你个鬼机灵还数学不好。
english: You are clever but not good at math.

name: csbgs2_0001_00026
chinese: 谁说我算不出来，好像你比我聪明多少似的。
english: Who said I can't figure it out, as if you are much smarter than me.

name: csbgs2_0001_00027
chinese: 行了谢谢你小江。
english: Okay, thank you Xiaojiang.

name: csbgs2_0001_00028
chinese: 那不是你说我脑瓜不好使吗。
english: So you're saying that I'm not smart, right?

name: csbgs2_0001_00029
chinese: 就你这智商才能干出这种傻事。
english: With your intelligence, only you can do such a stupid thing.

name: csbgs2_0001_00030
chinese: 不跟你说了嘛，我没跟他要，是他硬给的。
english: Didn't I tell you? I didn't ask him for it, he insisted on giving it to me.

name: csbgs2_0001_00031
chinese: 你是给炊事班丢脸，给班长丢脸。
english: You are embarrassing the cooking team and the squad leader.

name: csbgs2_0001_00032
chinese: 那钱我都说了，后悔也来不及了。
english: I've already said that money, it's too late to regret now.

name: csbgs2_0001_00033
chinese: 你可以后千万别跟领导提钱了奥。
english: You must never mention money to the leader again.

name: csbgs2_0001_00034
chinese: 你直接管人家要算了。
english: You just directly ask others to calculate it.

name: csbgs2_0001_00035
chinese: 你看你咋跟洪班长交代吧你。
english: How do you explain to Captain Hong?

name: csbgs2_0001_00036
chinese: 你得给我想个招儿啊，这放我手里算怎么一回事啊。
english: You have to come up with a plan for me. What does it mean to leave it in my hands?

name: csbgs2_0002_00000
chinese: 尽管我们相隔万水千山，你永远是我的。
english: Despite the distance between us, you will always be mine.

name: csbgs2_0002_00001
chinese: 那好，那就先见个面吧。
english: Well, let's meet in person then.

name: csbgs2_0002_00002
chinese: 你简单扼要的介绍一下，主要来看班长来了。
english: Can you briefly introduce yourself? We are mainly here to see the class monitor.

name: csbgs2_0002_00003
chinese: 男儿有泪不轻弹，视金钱如粪土。
english: A man sheds tears without hesitation, regarding money as worthless as dirt.

name: csbgs2_0002_00004
chinese: 这地方不错啊，这下我总算找到我的自由了。
english: This place is nice, now I finally found my freedom.

name: csbgs2_0002_00005
chinese: 我说我在哪儿啊，你猜啊。
english: Where do you think I am?

name: csbgs2_0002_00006
chinese: 全部都是男的，想找个女的还费劲呢。
english: All of them are men, it's difficult to find a woman.

name: csbgs2_0002_00007
chinese: 你每天就说这些话你太没想象力了。
english: You say these words every day, you are so unimaginative.

name: csbgs2_0002_00008
chinese: 我就不能有自己生活自己圈子啊。
english: Can't I have my own life and my own circle?

name: csbgs2_0002_00009
chinese: 我说他怎么念念呼呼的呢。
english: Why does he keep mumbling?.

name: csbgs2_0002_00010
chinese: 同志们，我的小老乡，小吴老师又来了。
english: Comrades, my fellow villagers, Teacher Xiao Wu is here again.

name: csbgs2_0002_00011
chinese: 这萝卜白菜，稀饭馒头的，挺好玩儿的啊。
english: This radish cabbage, rice porridge steamed bun, is quite fun.

name: csbgs2_0002_00012
chinese: 那你就插上想象的翅膀，任意的飞翔一下吧。
english: Then you can put on the wings of imagination and fly freely.

name: csbgs2_0002_00013
chinese: 我觉得我有点受不了了。
english: I feel like I can't take it anymore.

name: csbgs2_0002_00014
chinese: 他们这算得了什么呀，他们好赖还都有对象，我到现在连对象都没有。
english: What does it count for them? They all have someone, but I still don't even have a partner.

name: csbgs2_0002_00015
chinese: 不是人家不喜欢我，就是我不被人家喜欢。
english: It's either that people don't like me, or I'm not liked by people.

name: csbgs2_0002_00016
chinese: 我觉得对不起你。
english: I feel sorry for you.

name: csbgs2_0002_00017
chinese: 通过小吴老师这一启示，想象力飞起来了。
english: Inspired by Teacher Xiao Wu, imagination soared.

name: csbgs2_0002_00018
chinese: 小吴老师稍加点拨，顿开茅塞。
english: With a little guidance from Teacher Xiao Wu, I suddenly see the light.

name: csbgs2_0002_00019
chinese: 你天天给我们上课，我们的创作水平都有提高，谢谢。
english: You teach us every day, and our creative level has improved. Thank you.

name: csbgs2_0002_00020
chinese: 这两天与其说是我给你们上课，不如说是你们给我上了一课。
english: These past two days, it's not so much that I have been teaching you, but rather that you have taught me a lesson.

name: csbgs2_0003_00000
chinese: 能不能不晃来晃去，我头晕。
english: Can you stop shaking? I feel dizzy.

name: csbgs2_0003_00001
chinese: 我只是想体验风驰电掣般的速度。
english: I just want to experience the exhilarating speed of lightning.

name: csbgs2_0003_00002
chinese: 你让我很失望啊。
english: You disappoint me.

name: csbgs2_0003_00003
chinese: 告诉你一件大喜事。
english: I have some great news to tell you.

name: csbgs2_0003_00004
chinese: 太不讲究了，我有点事，你瞎唠叨啥呀。
english: It's so careless. I have something to do, why are you blabbering about?

name: csbgs2_0003_00005
chinese: 混蛋小子，你气死我了你。
english: You little bastard, you make me so angry.

name: csbgs2_0003_00006
chinese: 放心，下期板报我老高亲自写呀。
english: Don't worry, I, Lao Gao, will personally write the next bulletin.

name: csbgs2_0003_00007
chinese: 好好画，画的不错，人才啊。
english: Good job on the painting, talented indeed.

name: csbgs2_0003_00010
chinese: 好好写吧，俺不打扰你了，我相信你一定会写好的。
english: Take your time and write well. I won't disturb you anymore. I believe you will do a good job.

name: csbgs2_0003_00011
chinese: 你整的什么玩意儿。
english: What kind of thing did you make?

name: csbgs2_0003_00012
chinese: 你看那曝光台，你弄那么大干嘛呀。
english: Look at that platform, why are you making it so big?

name: csbgs2_0003_00013
chinese: 咱炊事班有啥麻烦事，也没有乱成一锅粥啊。
english: What troubles does our cooking team have? It's not like everything is a mess.

name: csbgs2_0003_00014
chinese: 你是班里最大的，你怎么能这样做呢。
english: You are the oldest in the class, how could you do this?

name: csbgs2_0003_00015
chinese: 心里别难过了，以后多听领导的话。
english: Don't be sad in your heart anymore, listen to the leader more in the future.

name: csbgs2_0003_00016
chinese: 我们都觉得这幅画画的很好。
english: We all think this painting is very good.

name: csbgs2_0003_00017
chinese: 人家还没明着批准呢，咱就这态度了。
english: People haven't officially approved yet, but we already have this attitude.

name: csbgs2_0003_00018
chinese: 你啥也别说了啊，反正我说啥你们也不信，你爱咋说咋说爱咋想咋想去。
english: Stop saying anything, anyway, whatever I say, you won't believe it. Say whatever you want, think whatever you want.

name: csbgs2_0003_00019
chinese: 你为啥跟小毛走那么近呢，跟他形影不离的你说。
english: Why are you so close to Xiao Mao? You are always inseparable from him.

name: csbgs2_0003_00021
chinese: 你能想象那么复杂的创意吗。
english: Can you imagine such a complex idea?

name: csbgs2_0003_00022
chinese: 你说你智商高，你智商高怎么没考上军校呢？
english: You said you have a high IQ, but how come you didn't get into military academy?

name: csbgs2_0003_00023
chinese: 你也就是个萤火虫的屁股，没多大点儿亮。
english: You are just the butt of a firefly, not very bright.

name: video_xjzw_00001
chinese: 大爷，我也是个演员，你这样演不行啊，碰瓷的关键在于痛感。
english: Sir, I am also an actor. You can't act like this, the key to acting is the sense of pain.

name: video_xjzw_00002
chinese: 我现在痛感不足，哪有说服力呢，你都演不到位观众没法同情你嘛。
english: I don't feel enough pain now, so it's not convincing. You can't even act well, so the audience can't sympathize with you.

name: video_xjzw_00003
chinese: 但你前面表演差的太多了，你现在再怎么用力，也没法补救。
english: But you performed so poorly before, no matter how hard you try now, you can't make up for it.

name: video_xjzw_00004
chinese: 业务交流一下嘛。
english: Can we have a business discussion?

name: video_xjzw_00005
chinese: 先吃菜，要不凉了。
english: Eat the vegetables first, or they will get cold.

name: video_xjzw_00006
chinese: 你真的以为自己是大明星吗。
english: Do you really think you are a big star?

name: video_xjzw_00007
chinese: 小小成就何足挂齿。
english: A small achievement is nothing to boast about.

name: video_xjzw_00008
chinese: 术业有专攻，律师和死尸不分贵贱，我跑龙套也可以自食其力。
english: There are specialties in the profession, and there is no distinction between lawyers and corpses. I can make a living by just doing a side job.

name: video_xjzw_00009
chinese: 现在给你最后一次改过自新的机会。
english: Now I give you one last chance to start anew.

name: video_xjzw_00010
chinese: 你有病就去看病，别在这传染我。
english: If you are sick, go see a doctor instead of infecting me here.

name: video_xjzw_00011
chinese: 你拉我来这干什么，我不去。
english: Why did you drag me here? I'm not going.

name: video_xjzw_00012
chinese: 还给她煲汤，这明显是跟我对着干！
english: Give her soup, this is clearly going against me!

name: video_xjzw_00013
chinese: 关键是想象力，你一定要用心去体会当时的情境。
english: The key is imagination. You must try to understand the situation at that time with your heart.

name: video_xjzw_00014
chinese: 不是不是，真是我男朋友来了。
english: It's not, it's not. It's really my boyfriend coming.

name: video_xjzw_00015
chinese: 你干嘛要一直盯着小米看，你是不是喜欢她呀？
english: Why are you staring at Xiaomi all the time? Do you like her?

name: video_xjzw_00016
chinese: 你这么说我就生气了。
english: You make me angry when you say that.

name: video_xjzw_00017
chinese: 我想带你去见我爸妈，他们要是知道我们在一起，肯定会很放心。
english: I want to take you to meet my parents. If they know we are together, they will definitely feel relieved.

name: video_xjzw_00018
chinese: 最近真的有一套国际大片，在这里招中国演员呢。
english: Recently, there is really a blockbuster international film being shot here, and they are recruiting Chinese actors.

name: video_xjzw_00019
chinese: 能变漂亮一点当然好。
english: It would be great if I could become a little more beautiful.

name: video_xjzw_00020
chinese: 我不怕，你们就打死我吧。
english: I'm not afraid, just go ahead and kill me.

name: video_xjzw_00021
chinese: 啊就你听不到，我说了。
english: Ah, you just can't hear it. I said it.

name: video_xjzw_00022
chinese: 我的演技都爆出来了。
english: My acting skills are all bursting out.

name: video_xjzw_00023
chinese: 什么烂导演拍他妈垃圾电影，这要是搁以前我早都想抽他了。
english: What a terrible director making such garbage movies, if this were in the past, I would have wanted to slap him long ago.

name: video_xjzw_00024
chinese: 你一个跑龙套的想太多了吧。
english: You're just an extra, thinking too much.

name: video_xjzw_00025
chinese: 很多大明星都是跑龙套出身的。
english: Many celebrities started their careers as extras.

name: video_xjzw_00026
chinese: 我比她们还要努力呢，总之，机会就是留给努力的人。
english: I work harder than them, in any case, opportunities are reserved for those who work hard.

name: video_xjzw_00027
chinese: 我什么都不会，选我干嘛呀。
english: I don't know anything, why choose me to do it?

name: video_xjzw_00028
chinese: 现在就是我了，我现在该怎么办啊。
english: Now it's my turn, what should I do now?

name: video_xjzw_00029
chinese: 我现在特别害怕，我不想当演员。
english: I am very scared now, I don't want to be an actor.

name: video_xjzw_00030
chinese: 当朋友来的，他们说死都不要。
english: When friends come, they say they don't want to die.

name: video_xjzw_00031
chinese: 机会不是留给努力的人吗。
english: Isn't opportunity reserved for those who work hard?

name: video_xjzw_00032
chinese: 但是她不努力，机会就成了误会，继续坚持，你的机会一定会出现的。
english: But if she doesn't work hard, opportunities will become misunderstandings. Keep persisting, and your chance will definitely come.

name: video_xjzw_00033
chinese: 对，以后我要更加努力。
english: Yes, I will work harder in the future.

name: video_xjzw_00034
chinese: 我的演技都爆出来了，你说我发病。
english: My acting skills are all bursting out, you say I'm having a fit.

name: video_xjzw_00035
chinese: 我马可在这讲戏你在这睡觉。
english: I, Marco, am performing here while you are sleeping here.

name: video_xjzw_00036
chinese: 一定要记着，在外要虚心的向其他人学习。
english: Always remember to be humble and learn from others when you are outside.

name: video_xjzw_00037
chinese: 你觉得我还不够惨吗，你真的想帮我的话，就给我死远点。
english: Don't you think I'm miserable enough? If you really want to help me, just stay away from me and die.

name: video_xjzw_00038
chinese: 互相给个面子，差不多就得了。
english: Give each other some face, that's about it.

name: video_xjzw_00039
chinese: 那你们就用这丧尽天良的方法，来对付我了吗。
english: So you're going to use this despicable method to deal with me, huh?

name: video_xjzw_00040
chinese: 从来没有受过今天这么大的侮辱。
english: I have never been insulted so much today.

name: video_xjzw_00041
chinese: 我一到这儿，我就想打架。
english: As soon as I arrived here, I wanted to fight.

name: video_xjzw_00042
chinese: 就是看了你的《孤儿寻亲记》才喜欢演戏，你可是她的启蒙老师啊。
english: It was after watching your "Orphan's Quest for Parents" that I started to like acting. You are her mentor, after all.

name: video_xjzw_00043
chinese: 她不是干这行的料儿。
english: She is not cut out for this job.

name: video_xjzw_00044
chinese: 大老板呀，好羡慕你。
english: Boss, I envy you so much.

name: video_xjzw_00045
chinese: 我刚才是客气不想伤害你。
english: I was just being polite and didn't want to hurt you.

name: video_xjzw_00046
chinese: 又不行，又没有自知之明，还不死心，整天出来搞事情。
english: It's not working, and there's no self-awareness. They're still not giving up and causing trouble all the time.

name: video_xjzw_00047
chinese: 随便，不要纠结名字。
english: Whatever, don't worry about the name.

name: video_xjzw_00048
chinese: 我是做服务的，好了吧。
english: I am in the service industry, okay?

name: video_xjzw_00049
chinese: 我会一直替你保管的，你别担心。
english: I will keep it for you all the time, don't worry.

name: video_xjzw_00050
chinese: 你从来不觉得，我做演员会成功的，对吧。
english: You never think that I will be successful as an actor, right?

name: video_xjzw_00051
chinese: 别哭啊，她会怀疑我的。
english: Don't cry, she will suspect me.

name: video_xjzw_00052
chinese: 表姐，都叫你不要吸毒了。
english: Cousin, everyone is telling you not to do drugs.

name: video_xjzw_00053
chinese: 就是说你又爆红了呀。
english: You have become popular again.

name: video_xjzw_00054
chinese: 我就问你什么咸鱼。
english: What kind of salted fish are you?.

name: video_xjzw_00055
chinese: 对不起对不起，我真的没有那个意思。
english: I'm sorry, I really didn't mean it.

name: video_xjzw_00056
chinese: 马克老师的演技真实随时都在爆出来。
english: Mark's acting skills are always bursting out with authenticity.

name: video_xjzw_00057
chinese: 没有她就没有我今天。
english: Without her, there would be no me today.

name: video_xjzw_00058
chinese: 没关系的，我不去了。
english: It's okay, I'm not going anymore.

name: video_xjzw_00059
chinese: 胡说，人家那么年轻。
english: Nonsense, they are so young.

name: video_xjzw_00060
chinese: 你说你还没打，你就投降了。
english: You said you haven't fought yet, but you surrendered.

name: video_xjzw_00061
chinese: 没人想看我演戏，也没人尊重过我一秒钟。
english: No one wants to watch me act, and no one has ever respected me for a second.

name: video_xjzw_00062
chinese: 因为我自己根本就不行，这个世界不是你努力就能成功的。
english: Because I am simply not capable, success in this world is not achieved solely through your efforts.

name: video_xjzw_00063
chinese: 其实，我这次来是专门说声谢谢的。
english: Actually, I came this time specifically to say thank you.

name: video_xjzw_00064
chinese: 只要不投降，就是成功。
english: As long as you don't surrender, it is success.

name: video_xjzw_00065
chinese: 你就是个烂泥扶不上墙啊，我告诉你。
english: You are just like a useless mud that can't even stick to the wall, let me tell you.

name: video_xjzw_00066
chinese: 臭丫头，你永远不要再回来了。
english: Stinky brat, never come back again.

name: video_xjzw_00067
chinese: 我全家都死光了。
english: My whole family has died.

name: video_xjzw_00068
chinese: 随便啊，怎么说都一个意思。
english: Whatever, it means the same thing no matter how you say it.

name: video_xjzw_00069
chinese: 不要老想着吃霸王餐，好不好。
english: Stop thinking about eating for free all the time, okay?

name: video_xjzw_00070
chinese: 你会成功的，你是最棒的。
english: You will succeed, you are the best.

name: video_xjzw_00071
chinese: 你说我什么都可以，请你不要说我是个智障。
english: You can say anything about me, but please don't say I'm mentally challenged.

name: video_xjzw_00072
chinese: 胡说八道，我从小就人见人爱。
english: Nonsense, I have been loved by everyone since I was a child.

name: video_xjzw_00073
chinese: 像你这种人这辈子都不配得到爱。
english: Someone like you doesn't deserve love in this lifetime.

name: video_xjzw_00074
chinese: 我很喜欢看你演的电影。
english: I really enjoy watching the movies you act in.

name: video_xjzw_00075
chinese: 我就是为了表演而生的，我行吗。
english: I was born to perform, is that okay?

name: aqgy3_0001_00000
chinese: 好男人就是我，我就是曾小贤。
english: The input: A good man is me, I am Zeng Xiaoxian.

name: aqgy3_0001_00002
chinese: 大叔你喜欢吃油条吗。
english: Uncle, do you like to eat youtiao?

name: aqgy3_0001_00003
chinese: 二十年后的电台里，就没有一个正常的问题吗？
english: In the radio station twenty years later, is there not a single normal question?

name: aqgy3_0001_00004
chinese: 曾老师，你是俺的粉丝。
english: Teacher Zeng, you are my fan.

name: aqgy3_0001_00005
chinese: 多读书多看报少吃零食。
english: Read more books, read more newspapers, eat fewer snacks.

name: aqgy3_0001_00006
chinese: 别做梦了，好好学习吧。
english: Stop dreaming and study hard.

name: aqgy3_0001_00007
chinese: 真的水土不服，而且这里天干雾燥，容易便秘啊。
english: I really can't adapt to the local environment, and it's also very dry here, which makes it easy to get constipated.

name: aqgy3_0001_00009
chinese: 这，你都信，逗你玩儿呢。
english: Do you believe this? Just kidding with you.

name: aqgy3_0001_00010
chinese: 至少都是会转的。
english: At least they can all rotate.

name: aqgy3_0001_00011
chinese: 牛奶怎么味道怪怪的。
english: The milk tastes strange.

name: aqgy3_0001_00012
chinese: 探亲探亲，探着探着，就亲了。
english: Visiting relatives, while exploring, ended up getting intimate.

name: aqgy3_0001_00013
chinese: 今天是个好日子，阳光明媚老友重逢，而且我最喜欢的电视剧开播了。
english: Today is a good day, the sun is shining, old friends are reunited, and my favorite TV show is premiering.

name: aqgy3_0001_00014
chinese: 张伟和羽墨走了，关谷每天就知道画画，我快郁闷死了。
english: Zhang Wei and Yu Mo left. Guan Gu knows only how to paint every day. I'm so depressed.

name: aqgy3_0001_00015
chinese: 挺好的啊，细腻红润有光泽，有什么问题啊。
english: It's pretty good, delicate, rosy and shiny. Any problems?

name: aqgy3_0001_00016
chinese: 你还关注他，好变态哦。
english: You still pay attention to him, how perverted.

name: aqgy3_0001_00017
chinese: 没有，都是你歪歪出来的。
english: No, it's all nonsense made up by you.

name: aqgy3_0001_00018
chinese: 这里到底有正常人，如果脑残会飞的话，这里简直就是飞机场嘛。
english: Are there any normal people here? If idiots could fly, this place would be an airport.

name: aqgy3_0001_00019
chinese: 你就要去读博士后了。
english: You are going to do a postdoctoral research.

name: aqgy3_0001_00020
chinese: 钱不是一切，反而是痛苦的根源。
english: Money is not everything, but rather the root of pain.

name: aqgy3_0001_00021
chinese: 欢迎收看赢家小贤为您带来精彩的全新栏目，幸运弹弹弹。
english: Welcome to watch Winner Xiaoxian bring you a wonderful new column, Lucky Bounce Bounce Bounce.

name: aqgy3_0002_00000
chinese: 本科毕业读硕士毕业读博士，博士毕业做手模。
english: Bachelor's degree, master's degree, doctoral degree, become a hand model after obtaining a doctoral degree.

name: aqgy3_0002_00001
chinese: 不晚，你现在在哪儿，我马上过来找你。
english: It's not late, where are you now? I'll come find you right away.

name: aqgy3_0002_00002
chinese: 赢了，你全家都赢了。
english: You won, your whole family won.

name: aqgy3_0002_00003
chinese: 信不信我撕烂你的嘴啊。
english: Do you believe that I will tear your mouth apart?

name: aqgy3_0002_00004
chinese: 吕子乔你既然敢调戏我们，我跟你同归于尽。
english: Since you dare to harass us, Lv Ziqiao, I will go down with you.

name: aqgy3_0002_00005
chinese: 好吧，你是不是想问我，当初为什么离开。
english: Okay, do you want to ask me why I left in the first place?

name: aqgy3_0002_00006
chinese: 他们终于在一起了，可是宛瑜有展博疼，一菲有沈公子追，谁喜欢我呢？
english: They finally got together, but Wanyu has Zhanbo who loves her, Yifei has Shen Gongzi chasing after her, who likes me?

name: aqgy3_0002_00007
chinese: 我想，或许我的幸福并不在这儿，所以我就决定去台北散散心。
english: I think, maybe my happiness is not here, so I decided to go to Taipei to relax.

name: aqgy3_0002_00008
chinese: 人家现在又不是没有人追。
english: People are not without suitors now.

name: aqgy3_0002_00009
chinese: 我也凌乱了，我需要支援。
english: I am also confused, I need support.

name: aqgy3_0002_00010
chinese: 我还是不信，除非。。。。。。
english: I still don't believe it, unless.

name: aqgy3_0002_00011
chinese: 这样子也可以啊，难道说现在已经有这样的高科技，可以按照人的需求来定制男朋友。
english: Is it possible to do this? Does it mean that there is already such advanced technology that can customize a boyfriend according to a person's needs?

name: aqgy3_0002_00012
chinese: 美嘉啊，只不过是在自我催眠罢了。
english: Meijia, it's just self-hypnosis.

name: aqgy3_0002_00013
chinese: 哎呀，浪漫的故事，人家想多听几遍嘛。
english: Oh, what a romantic story! People want to hear it again and again.

name: aqgy3_0002_00014
chinese: 他既有子乔的浪漫和幽默，又有关谷的耿直和踏实，他简直就是一个完美情人。
english: He has both the romance and humor of Ziqiao, as well as the straightforwardness and steadfastness of Guangu. He is simply a perfect lover.

name: aqgy3_0002_00015
chinese: 看看那家伙毫无品味的发型，还有多此一举的眼镜，我都替他羞愧。
english: Look at that guy's tasteless hairstyle and unnecessary glasses, I feel embarrassed for him.

name: aqgy3_0002_00016
chinese: 你什么时候到呀，等你很久了。
english: When will you arrive? I have been waiting for you for a long time.

name: aqgy3_0002_00017
chinese: 遇到什么困难了吧，不然不会这么歇斯底里的。
english: You must have encountered some difficulties, otherwise you wouldn't be so hysterical.

name: aqgy3_0002_00018
chinese: 对不起，之前那件事情，我们不要在计较了。
english: Sorry, let's not dwell on that matter anymore.

name: aqgy3_0002_00019
chinese: 恐，恐，恐怖分子。
english: Fear, fear, terrorist.

name: aqgy3_0002_00020
chinese: 既然你已经完全不相信我了，我说什么都没有用了。
english: Since you no longer believe me at all, it is useless for me to say anything.

name: aqgy3_0002_00021
chinese: 我们非要穿成这样吗？比之前更奇怪了。
english: Do we really have to dress like this? It's even stranger than before.

name: aqgy3_0002_00022
chinese: 从现在开始我们就是国际艺术品买家了，来看画展。
english: From now on, we are international art buyers. Let's go to the art exhibition.

name: aqgy3_0002_00023
chinese: 现在，你们是真的不能再见面了。
english: Now, you really can't meet each other anymore.

name: aqgy3_0002_00024
chinese: 两位有什么需要帮助的吗？
english: Is there anything I can help you with?

name: aqgy3_0003_00000
chinese: 关谷和子乔两个人加在一起，的确就是神经病啊。
english: When Guan Yu and Zhang Fei are together, they are indeed crazy.

name: aqgy3_0003_00001
chinese: 你得意什么。
english: What are you proud of?

name: aqgy3_0003_00002
chinese: 更能证明我是正确的。
english: More proof that I'm right.

name: aqgy3_0003_00003
chinese: 我和艾派德的分手了，他真的是个神经病。
english: I broke up with Aipide, he is really crazy.

name: aqgy3_0003_00004
chinese: 啥都甭说了，你已经不用在培训了。
english: Stop talking, you don't need to continue training anymore.

name: aqgy3_0003_00005
chinese: 其实这段时间以来，我都很想念大家。
english: Actually, I have missed everyone a lot during this period of time.

name: aqgy3_0003_00006
chinese: 咱们久别重逢，我有一件礼物要送你。
english: We haven't seen each other for a long time, and I have a gift to give you.

name: aqgy3_0003_00007
chinese: 你对我那么重要我怎么会把你忘了呢。
english: You are so important to me, how could I forget about you?

name: aqgy3_0003_00008
chinese: 看在上帝的面子上，你们两个白痴谁先把电话挂了。
english: In the face of God, which one of you two idiots will hang up the phone first?

name: aqgy3_0003_00009
chinese: 你看看你们，一个个都不在功课，还好有我。
english: Look at all of you, none of you are doing your homework, luckily I am here.

name: aqgy3_0003_00010
chinese: 我找人打听过我的事情绝不是一般的学科，非常深奥。
english: I have asked someone to inquire about my affairs, which is definitely not an ordinary subject and is very profound.

name: aqgy3_0003_00011
chinese: 我特别准备了一份小礼物。
english: I specially prepared a small gift.

name: aqgy3_0003_00012
chinese: 人家会害羞的。
english: People will be shy.

name: aqgy3_0003_00013
chinese: 我喜欢你的幽默，我以前的确是带过跆拳道社。
english: I like your sense of humor. I did indeed bring a taekwondo club before.

name: aqgy3_0003_00014
chinese: 关键是女人味，女人味是个人魅力的关键所在。
english: The key is femininity, femininity is the key to personal charm.

name: aqgy3_0003_00015
chinese: 为了庆祝今天的完美开局，我请客，烧烤牛排。
english: To celebrate today's perfect start, I treat you to barbecue steak.

name: aqgy3_0003_00016
chinese: 多好的一篇帖子，怎么早上就给人删了呢。
english: What a great post, why was it deleted in the morning?

name: aqgy3_0003_00017
chinese: 我在他眼里现在就是一整套杯具，你觉得现在是好时机吗？
english: In his eyes, I am now a complete set of tragedy. Do you think now is a good time?

name: aqgy3_0003_00018
chinese: 人家多直接，傻眼了吧。
english: People are straightforward, are you dumbfounded?

name: aqgy3_0003_00019
chinese: 好吧，我是没玩过，我不会下载。
english: Okay, I haven't played before, I don't know how to download.

name: aqgy3_0004_00000
chinese: 就是这样心理素质，刚才差点吓得尿裤子。
english: That's how strong my mental resilience is. I was so scared just now that I almost wet my pants.

name: aqgy3_0004_00001
chinese: 干嘛呢你啊。
english: What are you doing?

name: aqgy3_0004_00002
chinese: 动动脑子，他在干嘛今天没事儿灌醉自己，你当他是老鼠会自己吃耗子药的吗。
english: Use your brain. What is he doing today? He has nothing to do and is getting drunk by himself. Do you think he is a rat that will eat rat poison by himself?

name: aqgy3_0004_00003
chinese: 我制定的计划实在是太漂亮了。
english: The plan I made is really beautiful.

name: aqgy3_0004_00004
chinese: 你有功劳。
english: You have the credit.

name: aqgy3_0004_00005
chinese: 好久不见。
english: Long time no see.

name: aqgy3_0004_00006
chinese: 我进步的何止是智商，我各方面都有进步的好不好。
english: My progress is not only in intelligence, but also in all aspects, okay?

name: aqgy3_0004_00007
chinese: 这样我也跟着得救了呀。
english: This way, I will also be saved.

name: aqgy3_0004_00008
chinese: 我真的没有想到，你居然会像马里奥一样，陪我通宵打电动。
english: I really didn't expect that you would stay up all night playing video games with me, just like Mario.

name: aqgy3_0004_00009
chinese: 我是你的女朋友，我愿意随时陪你冒险。
english: I am your girlfriend, and I am willing to accompany you on adventures at any time.

name: aqgy3_0004_00011
chinese: 我要自己找一份工作，自力更生。
english: I want to find a job by myself and be self-reliant.

name: aqgy3_0004_00012
chinese: 我觉得你应该找一位有一定社会地位的人当你的就业顾问，名人推荐信很有效果。
english: I think you should find someone with a certain social status to be your career advisor. Celebrity recommendation letters are very effective.

name: aqgy3_0004_00014
chinese: 我毕业之后就没离开过学校，你懂的呀。
english: I have never left school since I graduated, you know.

name: aqgy3_0004_00015
chinese: 薪水不高，不过说出去，也算是半个老师呀。
english: The salary is not high, but if you say it out, it can also be considered as half a teacher.

name: aqgy3_0004_00016
chinese: 作为股东的死党，我为什么一点特权都没有。
english: As a shareholder's close friend, why do I have no privileges at all?

name: aqgy3_0004_00017
chinese: 你这个股东还不如个摆设。
english: You, as a shareholder, are even less useful than a decoration.

name: aqgy3_0004_00018
chinese: 经营策略有问题，比如这个纸巾收费就很不合理。
english: The business strategy has problems, such as the unreasonable charging for these tissues.

name: aqgy3_0004_00019
chinese: 我不正常。
english: I am not normal.

name: aqgy3_0004_00020
chinese: 这是多大的损失啊。
english: How big of a loss is this?

name: aqgy3_0004_00021
chinese: 收你五毛，还是看在贤哥的面子上，不然收你一块。
english: I'll take 0.5 yuan from you, or I can let it go for the sake of Xian Ge's face, otherwise I'll take 1 yuan from you.

name: aqgy3_0004_00022
chinese: 死心吧你，本来每天最多被你消灭一个熟客，延长营业时间一天就要少掉好几个。
english: Give up, you. Originally, I could only lose one loyal customer to you at most every day. If I extend the business hours for one day, I will lose several of them.

name: aqgy3_0004_00023
chinese: 不出一个星期，这还不如改成洗脚呢。
english: In less than a week, it would be better to change it to washing feet.

name: aqgy3_0004_00024
chinese: 原来大制作是这样的。
english: So this is how a big production is made.

name: aqgy3_0004_00025
chinese: 你也可以叫我戏里的名字，小三。
english: You can also call me by my name in the play, Xiaosan.

name: aqgy3_0004_00026
chinese: 小海，这段演的不错嘛，我们来下一段。
english: Xiao Hai, you performed well in this scene. Let's move on to the next one.

name: aqgy3_0004_00027
chinese: 有了自己的办公桌，还有电脑。
english: With my own desk, I also have a computer.

name: aqgy3_0004_00028
chinese: 酒吧十二点打烊的规矩是你们定的，怎么说变就变呢。
english: The rule of closing the bar at twelve o'clock was set by you, so why did it change suddenly?

name: aqgy3_0004_00029
chinese: 你怎么跟老板和股东交代。
english: How do you explain to the boss and shareholders?

name: aqgy3_0004_00030
chinese: 那怎么办。
english: What to do?

name: aqgy3_0004_00031
chinese: 看看那些客人临走时扫兴的眼神，再想想你老婆分娩时痛苦的表情。
english: Look at the disappointed expressions of those guests when they leave, and then think about the painful expression on your wife's face during childbirth.

name: aqgy3_0005_00000
chinese: 不仅没吃到投诉，还吃到了蛋糕。
english: Not only did I not receive any complaints, but I also received a cake.

name: aqgy3_0005_00001
chinese: 原来为学生服务这么容易。
english: It turns out that serving students is so easy.

name: aqgy3_0005_00002
chinese: 乔伊，来一瓶冰锐。
english: Joey, bring me a bottle of Ice Rui.

name: aqgy3_0005_00003
chinese: 我要找他。
english: I want to find him.

name: aqgy3_0005_00004
chinese: 这么伟大的壮举，他一个人完成不了的。
english: This great feat cannot be accomplished by him alone.

name: aqgy3_0005_00005
chinese: 还有同伙。
english: And accomplices.

name: aqgy3_0005_00006
chinese: 我当初怎么会相信他。
english: How could I have believed him back then?

name: aqgy3_0005_00007
chinese: 我也没想到，昨晚的生意会那么好。
english: I didn't expect that the business last night would be so good.

name: aqgy3_0005_00008
chinese: 我说你这个人不要那么死脑筋嘛。
english: Don't be so stubborn, I'm telling you.

name: aqgy3_0005_00009
chinese: 有的时候做一点小小的改变，会有意想不到的收获。
english: Sometimes making small changes can lead to unexpected gains.

name: aqgy3_0005_00010
chinese: 可是为什么收银台一分钱没多出来。
english: But why didn't the cash register have any extra money?

name: aqgy3_0005_00011
chinese: 原来你一点商业头脑都没有。
english: You don't have any business acumen at all.

name: aqgy3_0005_00012
chinese: 问题是伊现在已经禁止你进入酒吧了。
english: The problem is that now Ian has banned you from entering the bar.

name: aqgy3_0005_00013
chinese: 他手里的空酒瓶就算每天砸你一个，也够砸到下个世纪了。
english: Even if he smashes one empty wine bottle at you every day, it would be enough to last until the next century.

name: aqgy3_0005_00014
chinese: 客户和人气才是王道。
english: Customers and popularity are the key.

name: aqgy3_0005_00015
chinese: 其实场地没有约束没有限制才会换来更华丽的场面。
english: In fact, only when there are no constraints or limitations on the venue can a more magnificent scene be achieved.

name: aqgy3_0005_00016
chinese: 启动资金有限，租到这里不错了。
english: The startup capital is limited, so it's good to be able to rent here.

name: aqgy3_0005_00017
chinese: 你要告诉我你的期望。
english: You need to tell me your expectations.

name: aqgy3_0005_00018
chinese: 我的专业课已经重修了五次了，我知道我不是学兽医的料，是我老爸非要逼我。
english: I have retaken my major courses five times already. I know I am not cut out to be a veterinarian, but my dad insists on pushing me into it.

name: aqgy3_0005_00019
chinese: 这次还不及格，我就要被劝退了。
