english: If I fail this time, I will be advised to drop out.

name: aqgy3_0005_00020
chinese: 以后不仅得叫我叫娘娘，还得叫我婷花皇后呢。
english: In the future, you not only have to call me "Niangniang", but also have to call me "Queen Tinghua".

name: aqgy3_0005_00021
chinese: 终于同意让我转系了。
english: Finally agreed to let me transfer to another department.

name: aqgy3_0005_00022
chinese: 太好了。
english: That's great.

name: aqgy3_0005_00023
chinese: 我爸没有打我，这就是个奇迹。
english: My dad didn't hit me, it's a miracle.

name: aqgy3_0005_00024
chinese: 我在戏里面是一个正义勇敢的宫女。
english: I am a righteous and brave palace maid in the play.

name: aqgy3_0005_00025
chinese: 想哭哭不出，想逃逃不了，想死却又舍不得。
english: Want to cry but can't, want to escape but can't, want to die but can't bear to.

name: aqgy3_0005_00026
chinese: 其实也没什么特别的意思，但是如果你愿意嫁给我，我没意见。
english: Actually, it doesn't really mean anything special, but if you are willing to marry me, I have no objections.

name: aqgy3_0005_00027
chinese: 你忘了上次张伟被你吓的脑溢血吗？
english: Do you remember last time when you scared Zhang Wei so much that he had a cerebral hemorrhage?:

name: aqgy3_0005_00028
chinese: 时间紧迫，他们明天就回来了。
english: Time is running out, they will be back tomorrow.

name: aqgy3_0005_00029
chinese: 姐，我们回来了。
english: Sister, we're back.

name: aqgy3_0005_00030
chinese: 那怎么行啊，说好有个隆重的惊喜的。
english: How can that be? We agreed to have a grand surprise.

name: aqgy3_0005_00031
chinese: 否则我言出必行的威信，往搁哪儿搁。
english: Otherwise, I will use my authoritative words to take action, wherever it may be.

name: aqgy3_0005_00032
chinese: 爱搁哪儿搁哪儿，从来没听说过惊喜还带补办的。
english: Love can be placed anywhere, I have never heard of surprises with make-up.

name: aqgy3_0005_00033
chinese: 我要亲自做一个大蛋糕，给他们一个迟到的surprise。
english: I want to personally make a big cake and give them a late surprise.

name: aqgy3_0005_00034
chinese: 快来看看，我给你们准备了什么。
english: Come and have a look, I have prepared something for you.

name: aqgy3_0005_00035
chinese: 你们一定了料不到，接下来会有什么样的惊喜。
english: You must not have expected what kind of surprises will come next.

name: aqgy3_0005_00036
chinese: 你喜欢就行喽。
english: Just do it if you like.

name: aqgy3_0005_00037
chinese: 别说这个了，说说你们环球旅行的事吧，一定特好玩。
english: Stop talking about this, tell me about your global travel, it must be very fun.

name: aqgy3_0005_00038
chinese: 我们在飞机上认识了一对非常有意思的老夫妻。
english: We met a very interesting elderly couple on the plane.

name: aqgy3_0005_00039
chinese: 我们相处的非常融洽，而且还互相留了电话。
english: We get along very well and we also exchanged phone numbers.

name: aqgy3_0005_00040
chinese: 至于贵重嘛，千里送鹅毛，礼轻情意重嘛。
english: As for the value, it's like sending goose feathers a thousand miles, the gift may be light but the sentiment is heavy.

name: aqgy3_0005_00041
chinese: 烦死啦。
english: I'm so annoyed.

name: aqgy3_0005_00042
chinese: 狗急了，长得像不像曾老师。
english: The dog is anxious, does it look like Teacher Zeng?

name: aqgy3_0005_00043
chinese: 如果你喜欢，就拿去吧。
english: If you like it, take it.

name: aqgy3_0005_00044
chinese: 你的这些礼物，大家一定会非常喜欢的。
english: Your gifts, everyone will definitely like them very much.

name: aqgy3_0005_00045
chinese: 旧的不去，新的不来，我又有理由买副新的啦。
english: The old does not go, the new does not come, I have a reason to buy a new one again.

name: aqgy3_0005_00046
chinese: 我超喜欢这只鸭子。
english: I really like this duck.

name: aqgy3_0006_00000
chinese: 我太忙了，一点时间都没有。
english: I'm too busy, I don't have any time.

name: aqgy3_0006_00001
chinese: 这活动内容真有那么糟糕吗？
english: Is the content of this activity really that bad?

name: aqgy3_0006_00002
chinese: 我只觉得浑身不自在，他们好像很奇怪，很紧张。
english: I feel very uncomfortable, they seem strange and nervous.

name: aqgy3_0006_00003
chinese: 说不定他们是看见你们回来太兴奋了。
english: Maybe they were just too excited to see you guys come back.

name: aqgy3_0006_00004
chinese: 我打算给展博宛瑜坐一桌西餐，吓惨他们。
english: I plan to treat Zhan Bo and Wan Yu to a table of Western food, scaring them.

name: aqgy3_0006_00005
chinese: 虽然嘴上没说，但他已经用实际行动证明了。
english: Although he didn't say it, he has already proven it through practical actions.

name: aqgy3_0006_00006
chinese: 好久不见。
english: Long time no see.

name: aqgy3_0006_00007
chinese: 终于结束了环球旅行，欢迎回来。
english: Finally, the global trip is over. Welcome back.

name: aqgy3_0006_00008
chinese: 对于我来说，惊喜才刚刚开始。
english: For me, the surprises have just begun.

name: aqgy3_0007_00000
chinese: 只要形式够浪漫，没有一个女孩会say，no的。
english: As long as the gesture is romantic enough, no girl would say no.

name: aqgy3_0007_00001
chinese: 你太让他失望了。
english: You have disappointed him too much.

name: aqgy3_0007_00002
chinese: 站在我的立场上，你太够意思了。
english: From my perspective, you are very considerate.

name: aqgy3_0007_00003
chinese: 妈咪呀，啊对是我。
english: Mommy, oh yes, it's me.

name: aqgy3_0007_00004
chinese: 我要告诉你一个好消息呀，我们家就要发扬光大了。
english: I want to tell you some good news, our family is about to flourish.

name: aqgy3_0007_00005
chinese: 我下个星期有一个好消息要告诉你。
english: I have some good news to tell you next week.

name: aqgy3_0007_00006
chinese: 外面好像下雨了，借你的伞可以吗？
english: It seems to be raining outside. Can I borrow your umbrella?

name: aqgy3_0007_00007
chinese: 你去哪儿啊，穿那么漂亮。
english: Where are you going? You look so pretty.

name: aqgy3_0007_00008
chinese: 展播和我出去吃饭。
english: Let's go out for a meal and watch a show.

name: aqgy3_0007_00009
chinese: 我想了一套非常完美的求婚方案。
english: I have come up with a perfect proposal plan.

name: aqgy3_0007_00010
chinese: 大家都发挥一下想象力嘛。
english: Let's all use our imagination a little bit.

name: aqgy3_0007_00011
chinese: 有没有别的选择啊。
english: Is there any other option?

name: aqgy3_0007_00012
chinese: 一听名字就很有看头，展博我们就看这部吧。
english: The name sounds very interesting, let's watch this one.

name: aqgy3_0007_00013
chinese: 想跟你分享一下咯。
english: I want to share something with you.

name: aqgy3_0007_00014
chinese: 有您支持我，我就有无限的动力。
english: With your support, I have unlimited motivation.

name: aqgy3_0007_00015
chinese: 我去给您泡杯茶。
english: I will go and make a cup of tea for you.

name: aqgy3_0007_00016
chinese: 成人之美是一种美德啊。
english: The beauty of adulthood is a virtue.

name: aqgy3_0008_00000
chinese: 你没打算要求婚，就当一切都没发生过好嘛。
english: You don't plan to propose, just pretend that nothing happened, okay?

name: aqgy3_0008_00001
chinese: 没回来就对了。
english: If he/she doesn't come back, that's fine.

name: aqgy3_0008_00003
chinese: 不会出什么事儿了吧？
english: Will nothing happen, right?

name: aqgy3_0008_00004
chinese: 凌晨两点半还不回家，准没好事。
english: It's not a good sign if you're still not home at 2:30 in the morning.

name: aqgy3_0008_00008
chinese: 别急，吃饱了再聊。
english: Don't worry, let's talk after eating.

name: aqgy3_0008_00010
chinese: 为什么不把怪怪的事情放掉？
english: Why not let go of weird things?

name: aqgy3_0008_00011
chinese: 明天一定又会有好心情的。
english: Tomorrow will definitely have a good mood again.

name: aqgy3_0008_00012
chinese: 一时半会儿，说不清楚，我和婉玉都没带钱，被扣住了。
english: For a while, it's hard to explain. Neither Wanyu nor I brought money and we were detained.

name: aqgy3_0008_00013
chinese: 我只是不想因为没带钱，而破坏了今晚的气氛。
english: I just don't want to ruin the atmosphere tonight because I didn't bring any money.

name: aqgy3_0008_00014
chinese: 那我们现在还能讨论什么。
english: What else can we discuss now?

name: aqgy3_0008_00015
chinese: 放狠话谁不会啊，关键是有用吗？
english: Who doesn't know how to talk tough? The key is, is it effective?

name: aqgy4_0001_00000
chinese: 一位英俊的王子向他心目中的女神单膝下跪，谱写了一段绝世佳话。
english: A handsome prince knelt on one knee to his goddess in his heart and composed an extraordinary love story.

name: aqgy4_0001_00001
chinese: 但是，在童话的背后却隐藏着一个大乌龙。
english: However, behind the fairy tale lies a big mistake.

name: aqgy4_0001_00004
chinese: 究竟是怎么一回事，现在还不得而知。
english: What exactly happened is still unknown.

name: aqgy4_0001_00005
chinese: 另一边一菲和诺澜网球拉锯战因为诺澜的脚踝扭伤而告终。
english: On the other hand, the tennis match between Yifei and Nuo Lan ended due to Nuo Lan's ankle sprain.

name: aqgy4_0001_00006
chinese: 曾老师怜香惜玉。
english: Teacher Zeng cherishes fragrant and precious jade.

name: aqgy4_0001_00007
chinese: 谁知一菲心事重重，在家里也不小心跌倒了。
english: Who knows, Yifei is burdened with worries and accidentally fell at home.

name: aqgy4_0001_00008
chinese: 子乔通知曾老师，在3602的抽屉里有红花油。
english: Ziqiao informed Teacher Zeng that there is red flower oil in the drawer of Room 3602.

name: aqgy4_0001_00009
chinese: 可是曾老师面对两扇门却不知道何去何从。
english: However, Teacher Zeng faced two doors but didn't know where to go.

name: aqgy4_0001_00010
chinese: 于是他决定听天由命。
english: So he decided to resign himself to his fate.

name: aqgy4_0001_00011
chinese: 没错，曾老师再次陷入了尴尬的选择之中。
english: Yes, Teacher Zeng has once again found himself in an awkward dilemma.

name: aqgy4_0001_00012
chinese: 但是，这和他一生中经历的各种尴尬相比，只是一件小事情。
english: However, compared to the various embarrassments he experienced throughout his life, this is just a small matter.

name: aqgy4_0001_00013
chinese: 不信吗，我们一起来看一下。
english: Don't believe it? Let's take a look together.

name: aqgy4_0001_00014
chinese: 不要激动嘛，这些都是后话了。
english: Don't get excited, these are all afterthoughts.

name: aqgy4_0001_00015
chinese: 我们的故事还是要从求婚后的第二天说起。
english: Our story starts from the second day after the proposal.

name: aqgy4_0001_00016
chinese: 打起精神各位，这一季非常的精彩。
english: Everyone, cheer up! This season is very exciting.

name: aqgy4_0001_00017
chinese: 欢迎回到爱情公寓。
english: Welcome back to iPartment.

name: aqgy4_0001_00018
chinese: 真的我当时在角落我都快看哭了。
english: I was really about to cry in the corner at that time.

name: aqgy4_0001_00019
chinese: 这么宝贵的历史画面居然没有偷拍。
english: It's such a precious historical scene and yet no one took a sneaky photo.

name: aqgy4_0001_00020
chinese: 你的戒指太草率了。
english: Your ring is too hasty.

name: aqgy4_0001_00021
chinese: 悠悠都怀孕了，你总得给点诚意吧。
english: Yoyo is pregnant, you have to show some sincerity.

name: aqgy4_0001_00022
chinese: 这招也太损了吧，栽赃还是嫁祸，没见过这么扣屎盆子啊。
english: This move is too vicious, either framing or shifting blame, I have never seen such a despicable act.

name: aqgy4_0001_00023
chinese: 那也是个美丽的乌龙，要不是我们发验孕棒，关谷会求婚吗？
english: That is also a beautiful oolong tea. If it weren't for us testing the pregnancy test, would Guangua propose?

name: aqgy4_0001_00024
chinese: sorry啊，我不是质疑你们的感情。
english: Sorry, I'm not questioning your relationship.

name: aqgy4_0001_00025
chinese: 如果不是美嘉他们误以为我怀孕了，你还会向我求婚吗？
english: If it wasn't for Meijia and them mistakenly thinking that I'm pregnant, would you still propose to me?

name: aqgy4_0001_00026
chinese: 一菲，你怎么才来啊小姨妈的局都散了。
english: Yifei, why did you just arrive? The game of Auntie's Mahjong has already ended.

name: aqgy4_0001_00027
chinese: 我只是下床的时候扭了一下而已不用你瞎操心。
english: I just twisted a bit when I got out of bed, you don't need to worry about it.

name: aqgy4_0001_00028
chinese: 你给我拿瓶喝的去。
english: Please bring me a bottle to drink.

name: aqgy4_0001_00029
chinese: 他没文化你也文盲啊，喝酒会更肿的。
english: He is uneducated and you are illiterate, drinking alcohol will make it worse.

name: aqgy4_0001_00030
chinese: 现在知道紧张了，昨天让你拿红花油你干嘛去了。
english: Now I know you're nervous. What did you do with the red flower oil I asked you to get yesterday?

name: aqgy4_0001_00031
chinese: 没你想的简单。
english: It's not as simple as you think.

name: aqgy4_0001_00032
chinese: 跟你说不清楚。
english: Can't explain it clearly to you.

name: aqgy4_0001_00033
chinese: 这不重要，重要的是我没买到而且回来的路上发生了一个小意外。
english: This is not important, what is important is that I didn't buy it and there was a small accident on the way back.

name: aqgy4_0001_00035
chinese: 哈哈哈兄弟真识货呀哈哈。
english: Hahaha, brother, you really know your stuff, hahaha.

name: aqgy4_0001_00036
chinese: 难得有缘人，老夫免费帮你算算如何。
english: It's rare to meet someone with such fate. I, the old man, will help you calculate for free how to do it.

name: aqgy4_0001_00037
chinese: 哈哈哈哈哈哈还可以。
english: Hahaha, it's still okay.

name: aqgy4_0001_00038
chinese: 没带钱包就这么多了。
english: I didn't bring my wallet, this is all I have.

name: aqgy4_0001_00039
chinese: 你以为我是江湖骗子啊，我们知识分子有节操啊。
english: Do you think I am a swindler in the martial arts world? We intellectuals have integrity.

name: aqgy4_0001_00040
chinese: 我才不会为了八十块钱相信你的血光之灾呢。
english: I won't believe in your bloodshed disaster for only 80 yuan.

name: aqgy4_0001_00041
chinese: 你别问了，我说了你也不会明白的。
english: Stop asking, even if I told you, you wouldn't understand.

name: aqgy4_0001_00042
chinese: 昨天我是闹着玩儿的。
english: Yesterday I was just kidding.

name: aqgy4_0001_00043
chinese: 你们什么时候办订婚party啊
english: When are you guys going to have the engagement party?

name: aqgy4_0001_00044
chinese: 他最近，脑子好像又抽筋了。
english: Recently, it seems like his brain has gone haywire again.

name: aqgy4_0001_00045
chinese: 啊呜，泡个澡真舒服。
english: Ah, taking a bath feels so comfortable.

name: aqgy4_0001_00046
chinese: 鉴于本姑娘心情大好，我不生你气了。
english: Given that this girl is in a good mood, I won't be mad at you anymore.

name: aqgy4_0001_00047
chinese: 我决定了订婚party，就由你来负责啦。
english: I have decided to have an engagement party, and I want you to be in charge of it.

name: aqgy4_0001_00048
chinese: 但是我在电话里听得真真的，我不相信空穴来风。
english: But I heard it clearly on the phone, I don't believe in rumors.

name: aqgy4_0001_00049
chinese: 有可能真的只是个恶作剧而已啦。
english: It's possible that it's just a prank.

name: aqgy4_0001_00051
chinese: 这里貌似只有你最可疑吧。
english: It seems like you are the most suspicious one here.

name: aqgy4_0001_00052
chinese: 你第一天认识他吗？他会听我的啊？
english: Did you meet him on the first day? Will he listen to me?

name: aqgy4_0001_00053
chinese: 你居然不知道她跟谁过不去。
english: You actually don't know who she can't get along with.

name: aqgy4_0001_00054
chinese: 他脚崴的严重多了，如果韧带错位就麻烦了，如果不及时的话会后遗症的。
english: His sprained foot is much more serious. It would be troublesome if the ligament is dislocated. If not treated in time, there will be sequelae.

name: aqgy4_0001_00055
chinese: 还是那句话说好的红花油呢。
english: Where is the promised red flower oil?

name: aqgy4_0001_00056
chinese: 我们交个朋友嘛。
english: Can we be friends?

name: aqgy4_0001_00057
chinese: 你要什么服务我给你免费这下总相信我不是坏人了吧。
english: What service do you want? I will give it to you for free. Do you believe now that I am not a bad person?

name: aqgy4_0001_00058
chinese: 我可以帮你免费。
english: I can help you for free.

name: aqgy4_0001_00059
chinese: 你要真会按摩正骨的话，我有个活儿想找你帮忙。
english: If you really know how to do massage and bone setting, I have a job that I want to ask for your help.

name: aqgy4_0001_00060
chinese: 既然大家都是朋友你尽管说治不好不要钱哦。
english: Since we are all friends, feel free to say that you can't cure it and don't need money.

name: aqgy4_0001_00061
chinese: 你是哪家快递公司的叫你来你就来啊？
english: Which express delivery company are you from? You come whenever you are called?

name: aqgy4_0001_00062
chinese: 胡说本来是我的东西。
english: Hu Shuo originally belonged to me.

name: aqgy4_0001_00063
chinese: 当时刚组家庭没多久可能还不是特别亲。
english: At that time, we had just started a family, so we might not have been very close yet.

name: aqgy4_0001_00064
chinese: 就像我也很反感她摸我头啊。
english: Just like me, I also dislike it when she touches my head.

name: aqgy4_0001_00065
chinese: 我是现代人自由解放。
english: I am a modern person liberated and free.

name: aqgy4_0001_00066
chinese: 没事儿啊。
english: It's okay.

name: aqgy4_0001_00067
chinese: 我不是故意的。
english: I didn't mean to.

name: aqgy4_0001_00068
chinese: 嗯师傅你继续吧这次我克制一下。
english: Well, master, you continue. This time I will restrain myself a bit.

name: aqgy4_0001_00069
chinese: 是你想象力太丰富了吧。
english: Your imagination is too rich.

name: aqgy4_0001_00070
chinese: 喝水有益身体健康。
english: Drinking water is beneficial for physical health.

name: aqgy4_0001_00071
chinese: 不尴尬，你喜欢我按摩我怎么会生气呢？
english: It's not awkward. How could I be angry if you like me to massage you?

name: aqgy4_0001_00072
chinese: 你真的不介意啦。
english: You really don't mind.

name: aqgy4_0001_00073
chinese: 这是我的荣幸嘛。
english: This is my honor, right?

name: aqgy4_0002_00000
chinese: 路是你自己选，吃点苦头受不了了。
english: The path is your own choice, can't bear a little hardship.

name: aqgy4_0002_00001
chinese: 你听脑残节目，难怪会睡着。
english: You listen to brainless programs, no wonder you fall asleep.

name: aqgy4_0002_00002
chinese: 你应该把心思放在学习上，而不是听那种毫无营养的破广播。
english: You should focus your mind on studying instead of listening to that kind of useless radio broadcast.

name: aqgy4_0002_00003
chinese: 可现在自从诺澜姐姐来了之后，节目可精彩了，一听声音就知道是个美女。
english: Since Sister Nuo Lan came, the program has become more exciting. Just by listening to her voice, you can tell she is a beauty.

name: aqgy4_0002_00004
chinese: 你是在挑战我吗，好接收你的挑战。
english: Are you challenging me? I accept your challenge.

name: aqgy4_0002_00006
chinese: 我也超爱看电影的，太巧了，太神奇了。
english: I also love watching movies, it's too coincidental, too magical.

name: aqgy4_0002_00007
chinese: 那看在诺澜老师的面子上，你们这鱼缸免费帮你们送了。
english: On account of Teacher Nuo Lan's face, we will deliver this fish tank to you for free.

name: aqgy4_0002_00008
chinese: 少废话，搬。
english: Less talk, move.

name: aqgy4_0002_00009
chinese: 我不是诺澜，他也不是，要送就送，不送就不送，看谁的面子啊。
english: I am not Nuo Lan, neither is he. If you want to give, then give; if you don't want to give, then don't give. Let's see whose face matters.

name: aqgy4_0002_00010
chinese: 运个鱼缸你还走后门，你们店也太没原则了吧。
english: You delivered a fish tank and took the back door. Your store has no principles at all.

name: aqgy4_0002_00011
chinese: 司马医生真的挺不错的，硕士毕业，有房有车，关键还是个妇产科医生，以后一条龙服务。
english: Dr. Sima is really good. He has a master's degree, a house, and a car. The key is that he is also an obstetrician and gynecologist, providing comprehensive services in the future.

name: aqgy4_0002_00012
chinese: 这两天我们聊的可好了，我们还约了今天一起看电影。
english: We have been chatting a lot these past two days, and we also made plans to watch a movie together today.

name: aqgy4_0002_00013
chinese: 你有完没完，不就抬个小鱼缸吗。
english: Are you done yet? It's just lifting a small fish tank.

name: aqgy4_0003_00000
chinese: 就是调皮了一下，下次不闹啦。
english: Just being naughty for a moment, won't cause trouble next time.

name: aqgy4_0003_00001
chinese: 这活动有什么意义。
english: What is the significance of this activity?

name: aqgy4_0003_00002
chinese: 我们要成为全球第一家，每一天都举办转椅竞速赛的公司。
english: We want to become the world's first company to hold wheelchair racing competitions every day.

name: aqgy4_0003_00003
chinese: 除非他真的打算做爸爸，否则我不会要求他什么的。
english: Unless he really intends to be a father, I won't ask him for anything.

name: aqgy4_0003_00004
chinese: 太好了。
english: That's great.

name: aqgy4_0003_00005
chinese: 我没有朋友要租你房子，一边玩去。
english: I don't have any friends who want to rent your house, go play by yourself.

name: aqgy4_0003_00006
chinese: 我老婆她抓住了我的把柄，她把我给休了。
english: My wife caught me in a compromising situation and she divorced me.

name: aqgy4_0003_00007
chinese: 所以，我们决定明天举办一个看房会，让大家来竞价，这样才能把利益最大化呀。
english: So, we have decided to hold a house viewing event tomorrow and let everyone bid, so as to maximize our interests.

name: aqgy4_0003_00008
chinese: 你租个房那么麻烦干嘛呀。
english: Why bother renting a house?

name: aqgy4_0003_00009
chinese: 你肯多出百分之二十，就有人多出百分之四十。
english: If you are willing to contribute an additional twenty percent, someone else will contribute an additional forty percent.

name: aqgy4_0003_00010
chinese: 看来我这房子的价值真是不可估量呀。
english: It seems that the value of my house is truly immeasurable.

name: aqgy4_0004_00000
chinese: 赶紧帮我劝劝我老姐吧。
english: Please help me persuade my older sister quickly.

name: aqgy4_0004_00001
chinese: 我想换份工作，可我老姐死活不让我去面试。
english: I want to change jobs, but my older sister absolutely refuses to let me go for an interview.

name: aqgy4_0004_00002
chinese: 让我明天通过面试我就能成为一名保护地球的战士了。
english: If I pass the interview tomorrow, I will become a warrior to protect the Earth.

name: aqgy4_0004_00003
chinese: 明天就同学聚会啊。
english: We have a classmate gathering tomorrow.

name: aqgy4_0004_00004
chinese: 明天我不一定有时间啊。
english: Tomorrow I may not have time.

name: aqgy4_0004_00005
chinese: 这些问题我们都达成一致了。
english: We have reached a consensus on these issues.

name: aqgy4_0004_00006
chinese: 怎么会，从笔试到团队作业我都完美发挥，感觉好极了。
english: How could it be? I performed perfectly from the written test to the team assignment. I feel great.

name: aqgy4_0004_00007
chinese: 而且我面试那么顺利，这说明我完全符合他们的要求。
english: And I had such a smooth interview, which indicates that I fully meet their requirements.

name: aqgy4_0004_00008
chinese: 你帮我看看这几家婚庆公司哪家比较好。
english: Can you help me see which of these wedding planning companies is better?

name: aqgy4_0004_00009
chinese: 听说你结婚了，连孩子都有了，婚礼都不告诉我，你太不够意思了吧！
english: I heard that you got married and even have a child, but you didn't even tell me about the wedding. You are really inconsiderate!

name: aqgy4_0004_00010
chinese: 你太会开玩笑了唉不过还是要祝福你。
english: You are really good at joking, but I still want to wish you well.

name: aqgy4_0004_00011
chinese: 怎么好意思说不收呢，都这么熟了，你太客气了，谢谢啊，撒哟那啦。
english: How can you say no to accepting it? We are so familiar with each other, you are too polite, thank you, sa yo na la.

name: aqgy4_0004_00012
chinese: 你最近怎么样啊，过的好吗？
english: How have you been recently? Are you doing well?

name: aqgy4_0004_00013
chinese: 不好，我老公不要我了。
english: It's not good, my husband doesn't want me anymore.

name: aqgy4_0004_00014
chinese: 我现在一个人活着，一点意思都没有。
english: I am alive now, but I have no meaning at all.

name: aqgy4_0004_00015
chinese: 焰火，绚烂的火光把天空照成了七彩的颜色。
english: Fireworks, the dazzling firelight turns the sky into a colorful display.

name: aqgy4_0004_00016
chinese: 美嘉已经怀上我们爱情的结晶。
english: Meijia is already pregnant with the fruit of our love.

name: aqgy4_0004_00017
chinese: 你根本就没有预判危险的能力。
english: You don't have the ability to anticipate danger at all.

name: aqgy4_0004_00018
chinese: 看，我发现了通往新世界的大门。
english: Look, I found the gateway to a new world.

name: aqgy4_0004_00019
chinese: 你从来就没有真正冒险的勇气。
english: You have never had the courage to truly venture.

name: aqgy4_0004_00021
chinese: 以后我负责内容，你负责烘托，多赚点外快当奶粉钱也不错。
english: In the future, I will be responsible for the content, and you will be responsible for setting the atmosphere. It's not a bad idea to earn some extra money for milk powder.

name: aqgy4_0004_00022
chinese: 你表演的还是很到位的，别谦虚啦。
english: You performed very well, don't be modest.

name: aqgy4_0004_00023
chinese: 等你死了我烧纸告诉你，拜拜，混蛋。
english: I will burn paper to inform you when you die, bye bye, bastard.

name: aqgy4_0005_00000
chinese: 特殊时期，远离酒精。
english: In special times, stay away from alcohol.

name: aqgy4_0005_00001
chinese: 这么点儿时间它还没成形呢。
english: It hasn't taken shape in such a short time.

name: aqgy4_0005_00002
chinese: 昨天买了张贾斯汀比伯的CD。
english: Yesterday I bought a CD of Justin Bieber.

name: aqgy4_0005_00003
chinese: 我是说说的也没错。
english: I mean, that's true.

name: aqgy4_0005_00004
chinese: 我们要营造一个热闹的假象太有必要了。
english: It is necessary for us to create a lively illusion.

name: aqgy4_0005_00005
chinese: 没事啦，都想明白了，单身妈妈一样可以活的很快乐。
english: It's okay, I've figured it out. Single mothers can still live happily.

name: aqgy4_0005_00006
chinese: 岳飞他妈还有女娲都是我的偶像。
english: Yue Fei's mother and Nuwa are all my idols.

name: aqgy4_0005_00007
chinese: 谁都无法阻止我，活出伟大。
english: No one can stop me, live out greatness.

name: aqgy4_0005_00008_0
chinese: 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈，我就猜到了。
english: Hahahahaha, I knew it.

name: aqgy4_0005_00010
chinese: 还有完没完啊？
english: Are you done yet?

name: aqgy4_0005_00011_0
chinese: 你居然会说话。
english: You can actually talk.

name: aqgy4_0005_00011_1
chinese: 最近看你不在状态啊。
english: Lately, I've noticed that you're not in a good state.

name: aqgy4_0005_00012_0
chinese: 我眼里容不下一粒沙，何况美嘉是我们这么好的朋友，怎么能袖手旁观呢。
english: I can't tolerate even a grain of sand in my eyes, let alone the fact that Meijia is such a good friend of ours. How can I stand by and do nothing?

name: aqgy4_0005_00015
chinese: 心理学上说，一件事百思不得其解，来回琢磨，这是强迫症的前兆。
english: In psychology, it is said that when one cannot figure out something and keeps pondering over it, it is a precursor to obsessive-compulsive disorder.

name: aqgy4_0005_00017
chinese: 我就认识一个挺不错的。
english: I know someone who is pretty good.

name: aqgy4_0005_00019
chinese: 只要你一句话，我可以立刻让我爹爹给你出资。
english: As long as you say a word, I can immediately get my dad to provide funding for you.

name: aqgy4_0005_00020_1
chinese: 你没事吧脸色好差。
english: Are you okay? Your complexion looks really bad.

name: aqgy4_0005_00021
chinese: 真的吗？真是太贴心了。
english: Really? That's so thoughtful.

name: aqgy4_0005_00024
chinese: 上次我从罗布泊探险回来我就一直想要一双新的登山鞋。
english: Last time I came back from exploring the Lop Nur, I have been wanting a new pair of hiking shoes.

name: aqgy4_0005_00025
chinese: 我们真是心有灵犀呀。
english: We really have a telepathic connection.

name: aqgy4_0005_00026
chinese: 大家也是朋友嘛。
english: We are all friends, right?

name: aqgy4_0005_00027
chinese: 有人故意整我，否则为什么我之前的相好一个个都来跟我道别。
english: Someone is deliberately trying to mess with me, otherwise why would all my previous lovers come to say goodbye to me one by one.

name: aqgy4_0005_00028
chinese: 谁这么低级趣味。
english: Who has such low-level interests.

name: aqgy4_0005_00029
chinese: 就是个恶作剧，你就别吓唬自己了。
english: It's just a prank, don't scare yourself.

name: aqgy4_0005_00030
chinese: 派对不错嘛。
english: The party is great.

name: aqgy4_0005_00032
chinese: 南丁格尔小姐，你很特别。
english: Miss Nightingale, you are very special.

name: aqgy4_0005_00033
chinese: 刚才只是呛到了。
english: Just choked a moment ago.

name: aqgy4_0005_00034
chinese: 妈妈来了没，我可以跟她谈谈。
english: Did mom come? I want to talk to her.

name: aqgy4_0005_00036
chinese: 一定是哪儿错了。
english: Where did I go wrong for sure.

name: aqgy4_0005_00037
chinese: 难道是我制服不对。
english: Is it because I didn't dress properly?

name: aqgy4_0005_00040
chinese: 这么贴心。
english: So thoughtful.

name: aqgy4_0005_00042
chinese: 这不是一个制服派对，其实这是一个惊喜派对。
english: This is not a uniform party, it is actually a surprise party.

name: aqgy4_0005_00043
chinese: 那你是怎么想通的呀？
english: How did you come to that conclusion?

name: aqgy4_0005_00045
chinese: 如果真是这样的话，那我会幸福死的。
english: If it's really like this, then I will be happy to death.

name: aqgy4_0005_00046
chinese: 这不正是你所希望的嘛。
english: Isn't this exactly what you hoped for?

name: aqgy4_0005_00047
chinese: 没有负担，从此以后可以继续策马奔腾。
english: No burden, from now on, I can continue to gallop freely.

name: aqgy4_0005_00048
chinese: 可以把钱借给自己最好的朋友是无上的荣耀啊。
english: It is the greatest honor to lend money to your best friend.

name: aqgy4_0005_00049
chinese: 从今往后我会尽快的找一份稳定的工作让我的家人更有安全感。
english: From now on, I will try my best to find a stable job to provide a sense of security for my family.

name: aqgy4_0005_00051
chinese: 别听这个死猴子妖言惑众。
english: Don't listen to the nonsense of this deceitful monkey.

name: aqgy4_0005_00052
chinese: 恭喜，满分，你的签字有效可以进去了。
english: Congratulations, full marks, your signature is valid and you can go in.

name: aqgy4_0006_00000
chinese: 做了个噩梦，虽然醒了但依旧感觉被一股恶兆笼罩着。
english: I had a nightmare, and even though I woke up, I still feel shrouded by a sense of bad omen.

name: aqgy4_0006_00001
chinese: 我刚买的奢华版手抓饼，手艺没得说，要不要来一口。
english: I just bought the luxury version of scallion pancakes, the craftsmanship is impeccable, would you like to have a bite?

name: aqgy4_0006_00002
chinese: 领导让我问问台里送你去美国培训的事儿准备的怎么样。
english: The leader asked me to ask how the preparations for sending you to the United States for training are going.

name: aqgy4_0006_00003
chinese: 现在怎么犹豫了机会难得。
english: Now why hesitate when the opportunity is rare.

name: aqgy4_0006_00004
chinese: 你是怕自己创立的品牌节目又回到这个垫底王手里。
english: You are afraid that the brand program you created will fall back into the hands of this bottom-ranked king.

name: aqgy4_0006_00005
chinese: 等你回来说不定我要靠你罩着我呢。
english: When you come back, maybe I will rely on you to protect me.

name: aqgy4_0006_00006
chinese: 喂我刚从人生的双重打击中走出来。
english: Hey, I just came out of a double blow in life.

name: aqgy4_0006_00007
chinese: 子乔，今天恢复的不错嘛。
english: Ziqiao, you recovered quite well today.

name: aqgy4_0006_00008
chinese: 现在噩梦没了睡眠好了，晚上怎么动也不怕。
english: Now that the nightmare is gone, I can sleep well. I am not afraid of anything at night.

name: aqgy4_0006_00009
chinese: 从现在起我将正式成为豪大大集团的首席律师帮他们处理一系列法务工作。
english: From now on, I will officially become the chief lawyer of Hao Dada Group and help them handle a series of legal affairs.

name: aqgy4_0006_00011
chinese: 比如一起逛街看电影，一起吃饭旅游一起过圣诞节。
english: For example, shopping and watching movies together, eating and traveling together, celebrating Christmas together.

name: aqgy4_0006_00012
chinese: 没脑子的，手机又落隔壁，响了一晚上吵死了。
english: Brainless, my phone fell next door and rang all night, it was so noisy.

name: aqgy4_0006_00013
chinese: 我是小孩子小孩子能有什么坏心眼呢？
english: I am a child. What bad intentions can a child have?

name: aqgy4_0006_00014
chinese: 只要你陪我玩儿我是不会打搅阿姨和黑脸叔叔搭讪的。
english: As long as you accompany me to play, I won't bother Auntie and the grumpy uncle to strike up a conversation.

name: aqgy4_0006_00015
chinese: 我是小孩子，又不是外国人，再说了搭讪这两个字好像也不是外国人发明的吧。
english: I am a child, not a foreigner. Besides, the word "dazhan" doesn't seem to be invented by foreigners either.

name: aqgy4_0006_00016
chinese: 那是为了保持童年的天真。
english: That is to maintain the innocence of childhood.

name: aqgy4_0006_00018
chinese: 叔叔陪你画画吧叔叔最喜欢有想象力的孩子了。
english: Uncle will accompany you to draw. Uncle loves children with imagination the most.

name: aqgy4_0006_00019
chinese: 我努力工作就是为了得到赏识。
english: I work hard in order to gain recognition.

name: aqgy4_0006_00020
chinese: 你的经历让我想到了非常感人的童话故事。
english: Your experience reminds me of a very touching fairy tale story.

name: aqgy4_0006_00021
chinese: 只要你发奋图强考了第一名我就告诉你。
english: As long as you work hard and achieve first place in the exam, I will tell you.

name: aqgy4_0006_00022
chinese: 这个故事告诉我们只要你努力争取第一一定会实现的梦想。
english: This story tells us that as long as you work hard to strive for the first place, your dreams will definitely come true.

name: aqgy4_0007_00000
chinese: 不错嘛光厕所就这么豪华。
english: Not bad, the toilet is so luxurious.

name: aqgy4_0007_00001
chinese: 你才闲杂人等呢，我是直系亲属。
english: Who do you think you are? I am a close relative.

name: aqgy4_0007_00002
chinese: 这是我们的风俗，大和文化博大精深。
english: This is our custom, the Yamato culture is vast and profound.

name: aqgy4_0007_00003
chinese: 我们终于决定在一起了。
english: We finally decided to be together.

name: aqgy4_0007_00004
chinese: 下周有空吗，我想请大家吃饭。
english: Can you all make time next week? I would like to treat everyone to a meal.

name: aqgy4_0007_00006
chinese: 啊我的意思是，我的地盘怎么好意思让你请客呢，我来买单。
english: Ah, what I mean is, how can I let you treat me on my territory? I'll pay the bill.

name: aqgy4_0007_00007
chinese: 我本来要白天打，可是一想人家在上班啊。
english: I was originally going to play during the day, but then I thought people are working.

name: aqgy4_0007_00008
chinese: 这样我就可以掌控一切了。
english: This way, I can have control over everything.

name: aqgy4_0007_00009
chinese: 我可以配合他嘛，我也可以去关注那些东西。
english: Can I cooperate with him? I can also pay attention to those things.

name: aqgy4_0007_00010
chinese: 躲在微博后面偷窥没有出路，只会暴露你猥琐的原型。
english: Hiding behind Weibo to peep has no way out, it only exposes your creepy nature.

name: aqgy4_0007_00011
chinese: 孙子教导我们说，知己知彼百战百胜。
english: Sun Tzu taught us that knowing oneself and knowing the enemy leads to victory in every battle.

name: aqgy4_0007_00012
chinese: 我和我爸的关系不好，我们之间已经很多年不说话了。
english: My relationship with my dad is not good. We haven't spoken to each other for many years.

name: aqgy4_0007_00013
chinese: 我一定会想念蛋炒饭的，一菲给我这样践行，很有心啊。
english: I will definitely miss the egg fried rice. Yifei, you are practicing it for me, very thoughtful.

name: aqgy4_0007_00014
chinese: 开个玩笑啦。
english: Just kidding.

name: aqgy4_0007_00015
chinese: 好别致的礼物啊，我喜欢。
english: What a unique gift, I like it.

name: aqgy4_0007_00016
chinese: 刚才你爸给我说了好多你穿开裆裤时候的囧事。
english: Just now your dad told me a lot of embarrassing stories about you wearing open-crotch pants.

name: aqgy4_0007_00017
chinese: 我的生活里根本就不想看到你。
english: I don't want to see you in my life at all.

name: aqgy4_0007_00018
chinese: 没错我就是喜欢曾小贤，你咬我啊。
english: Yes, I do like Zeng Xiaoxian. Do you want to bite me?

name: aqgy4_0007_00020
chinese: 就你这倔脾气，估计以后我们有孩子了，也能被你气到国外。
english: With your stubborn temper, I guess even if we have children in the future, you can still make them angry enough to go abroad.

name: aqgy4_0007_00021
chinese: 你这么做也是为了他，关心他，爱他。
english: You do this for him, caring for him, loving him.

name: aqgy4_0007_00022
chinese: 我承认这一点你比你爸强。
english: I admit that you are stronger than your dad.

name: aqgy4_0007_00023
chinese: 那是肯定的，他儿子。
english: That's for sure, his son.

name: aqgy4_0007_00024
chinese: 但是我真心希望可以得到你的祝福。
english: But I sincerely hope to receive your blessings.

name: aqgy4_0007_00025
chinese: 谢微博，我看了她的介绍，原来微微也是一名律师。
english: Thank you Weibo, I read her introduction and it turns out that Weiwei is also a lawyer.

name: aqgy4_0008_00001
chinese: 有没有感觉到，一丝温暖啊。
english: Can you feel a hint of warmth?

name: aqgy4_0008_00002
chinese: 我怎么觉得，有一丝猥琐呢。
english: Why do I feel a bit creepy?

name: aqgy4_0008_00003
chinese: 挺顺利的，一菲你呢，心情有没有好一点啊。
english: It's going smoothly. How about you, Yifei? Is your mood a little better?

name: aqgy4_0008_00004
chinese: 超级无敌好，最近我收到了很多的应征简历，把我乐坏了。
english: Super awesome! Recently, I have received a lot of job applications, which made me extremely happy.

name: aqgy4_0008_00005
chinese: 我答应帮一菲找男朋友啊。
english: I promise to help Yifei find a boyfriend.

name: aqgy4_0008_00009
chinese: 是你聪明。
english: You are smart.

name: aqgy4_0008_00010
chinese: 关谷君，我们给它起个名字好不好。
english: Guanya, let's give it a name, okay?

name: aqgy4_0008_00011
chinese: 我怎么没有想到，你真是个小天才。
english: How did I not think of that? You are truly a little genius.

name: aqgy4_0008_00012
chinese: 关谷君，你嘴真甜。
english: Guanyu, you have such a sweet mouth.

name: aqgy4_0008_00013
chinese: 你侬我侬变成了你死我活，我们很同情你。
english: We used to be affectionate, but now it has turned into a life and death struggle. We feel sorry for you.

name: aqgy4_0008_00014
chinese: 那就赶紧上法场去，在这一惊一乍干吗呢？
english: Then hurry up and go to the court, why are you making a fuss here?

name: aqgy4_0008_00015
chinese: 不是你想的那样的。
english: It's not what you think.

name: aqgy4_0008_00016
chinese: 关你什么事啊。
english: What's your business?

name: aqgy4_0008_00017
chinese: 我是律师，从蛛丝马迹中找出事情的真相，这是我的职业素养。
english: I am a lawyer, finding out the truth from the clues is my professional quality.

name: aqgy4_0008_00018
chinese: 你们男人怎么一个个都那么自以为是。
english: Why do all you men think so highly of yourselves?

name: aqgy4_0008_00019
chinese: 我也不知道应该怎么办了。
english: I don't know what to do either.

name: aqgy4_0008_00020
chinese: 你可以先找一份兼职，一来不耽误创作，二来有收入，多好。
english: You can find a part-time job first, which won't delay your creation and will also provide income. How great is that!

name: aqgy4_0008_00021
chinese: 我叫比利，今天是特意来请胡小姐吃饭的。
english: My name is Billy, and I came here today specifically to invite Miss Hu to have a meal.

name: aqgy4_0008_00022
chinese: 只要我出马，没有改不了的差评，没有冲不到的皇冠。
english: As long as I take action, there are no negative reviews that cannot be changed, and no crown that cannot be reached.

name: aqgy4_0008_00023
chinese: 有没有不伤害身体，也不用出卖灵魂的兼职，关谷只是一般人。
english: Is there a part-time job that doesn't harm the body and doesn't require selling one's soul? Guan Gu is just an ordinary person.

name: aqgy4_0008_00024
chinese: 关谷前途堪忧，奈何婚期将至，它不辞辛劳也是为了这个家啊。
english: Guan Yu's future is worrying, but he has no choice as the wedding date is approaching. He works hard for the sake of this family.

name: aqgy4_0008_00025
chinese: 不行，这是私事，我不能掺和的。
english: No, this is a private matter, I cannot interfere.

name: aqgy4_0008_00026
chinese: 万一我的意见影响了你们的恩爱生活，我罪过就大了我。
english: If my opinion affects your loving life, then I would be greatly at fault.

name: aqgy4_0008_00027
chinese: 我们约她吃饭好几次了，她都不肯赏脸。
english: We have invited her to dinner several times, but she refuses to show her face.

name: aqgy4_0008_00028
chinese: 我是一个情感节目的主持人，女孩子的心思我最懂了。
english: I am a host of an emotional program, I understand girls' thoughts the most.

name: aqgy4_0008_00029
chinese: 真骚包啊，随身带着啊！
english: Really sassy, carry it with you.

name: aqgy4_0008_00030
chinese: 我就随口胡说了两句，谁知道这帮缺货还真当真了。
english: I just casually said a few words, who knew these idiots would actually take it seriously.

name: aqgy4_0008_00031
chinese: 你的开场白，讲的太好了。
english: Your opening remarks were excellent.

name: aqgy4_0008_00032
chinese: 这是讽刺的嘲笑，通常会伴着尖刺的拖长音，并且用鼻孔对着你。
english: This is a sarcastic mockery, usually accompanied by a prolonged tone with a nasal snort directed at you.

name: aqgy4_0008_00033
chinese: 课堂纪律。
english: Classroom discipline.

name: aqgy4_0008_00034
chinese: 你梦到我啦。
english: You dreamt about me.

name: aqgy4_0008_00035
chinese: 你套在一个龙虾壳子里，还脸红呢，没吓白就不错了。
english: You are hiding in a lobster shell and still blushing. It's not bad if you haven't turned pale from fright.

name: aqgy4_0008_00036
chinese: 你答应过我的，说梦到你就可以了，没说其他条件。
english: You promised me that dreaming of you would be enough, without any other conditions.

name: aqgy4_0008_00037
chinese: 哼，你就不怕关谷悠悠知道。
english: Huh, aren't you afraid of Guan Yu knowing?

name: aqgy4_0008_00038
chinese: 你要是让他们知道，你就死定了。
english: If you let them know, you're done for.

name: aqgy4_0008_00039
chinese: 你给我回来。
english: You come back to me.

name: aqgy4_0008_00040
chinese: 呦，你看的挺开的呀，最近心情不错啊。
english: Hey, you seem pretty open-minded. Your mood has been good recently, huh?

name: aqgy4_0008_00041
chinese: 昂，风和日丽，阳光明媚，一切都很和谐啊。
english: Oh, it's a beautiful day with clear skies and bright sunshine. Everything is so harmonious.

name: aqgy4_0008_00042
chinese: 那些追我的男生，好像突然开窍了。
english: Those boys who were chasing after me seem to have suddenly become enlightened.

name: aqgy4_0008_00043
chinese: 他们仿佛一夜之间懂了我的心思，话题也不干了，约会也不闷了。
english: They seemed to understand my thoughts overnight, the topics became irrelevant, and the dates became more enjoyable.

name: aqgy4_0009_00000
chinese: 我的项目已经顺利的经过了试用阶段，马上就要进入大面积推广了。
english: My project has successfully passed the trial phase and is about to enter a large-scale promotion.

name: aqgy4_0009_00001_0
chinese: 我是维护女性心理健康的使者。
english: I am an advocate for maintaining women's mental health.

name: aqgy4_0009_00002_0
chinese: 龌龊，想到哪儿去了，我的目标客户是女性。
english: Dirty, where did you think of, my target customers are women.

name: aqgy4_0009_00005
chinese: 我是你们的天使小步老师，从今天起我将和你一起面对人生。
english: I am your angel teacher, Xiao Bu. From today on, I will face life together with you.

name: aqgy4_0009_00006
chinese: 你以为客户都是白痴啊。
english: Do you think all customers are idiots?

name: aqgy4_0009_00009
chinese: 让我赐予你力量，去捍卫你的权利。
english: Let me empower you to defend your rights.

name: aqgy4_0009_00010
chinese: 天使与你同在。
english: Angels are with you.

name: aqgy4_0009_00011
chinese: 滨江大道的皇家会所，哇塞，我要去我要去。
english: The Royal Club on Binjiang Avenue, wow, I want to go, I want to go.

name: aqgy4_0009_00012
chinese: 听说好多人都在那儿办婚宴，据说风水好，我得去见识见识。
english: I heard that many people are having their wedding banquets there. It is said that the feng shui is good. I have to go and see for myself.

name: aqgy4_0009_00013
chinese: 有晚风有江水，风水都有了。
english: There is evening breeze and river water, both wind and water are present.

name: aqgy4_0009_00014
chinese: 机会难得啊，多一份祝福谁不乐意啊。
english: Opportunities are rare, who wouldn't be happy to receive an extra blessing.

name: aqgy4_0009_00015
chinese: 我要办得风风光光的她才有面子嘛。
english: I want to make her look good so that she can save face.

name: aqgy4_0009_00017
chinese: 其实这也不能怪他们，是我们通知的太晚了。
english: Actually, we can't blame them. It's because we notified them too late.

name: aqgy4_0009_00019
chinese: 听关谷说你要大婚了，恭喜啊。
english: I heard Guangua say that you are getting married, congratulations!

name: aqgy4_0009_00024
chinese: 我知道你对我有感觉，但我不适合你。
english: I know you have feelings for me, but I'm not right for you.

name: aqgy4_0009_00025
chinese: 这就是你们新新人类的爱情观。
english: This is the love concept of your new generation of humans.

name: aqgy4_0009_00026_0
chinese: 虽然我一个字都没听懂，不过还是恭喜你啊。
english: Although I didn't understand a word, congratulations to you.

name: aqgy4_0009_00033
chinese: 你就知道在家里写写画画，你还好意思说。
english: You just know how to stay at home and doodle, and you still have the nerve to say it.

name: aqgy4_0009_00034
chinese: 我会忍到现在吗。
english: Can I endure until now?

name: aqgy4_0009_00035
chinese: 特殊时期，犯贱才是这家伙的常态。
english: In special times, being a jerk is this guy's normal state.

name: aqgy4_0009_00036
chinese: 日子是人过的吗，谁要是娶了她非被她逼疯不可。
english: Is life something that people live? If someone marries her, they will be driven crazy by her.

name: aqgy4_0009_00037
chinese: 谁爱下谁下，我跟他半毛钱关系都没有。
english: Whoever loves who goes down, I have no relationship with him at all.

name: aqgy4_0010_00000
chinese: 呵呵呵既然你吩咐了我一定会办好的。
english: Since you have given me the order, I will definitely handle it well.

name: aqgy4_0010_00001
chinese: 杜晓涛是家族企业未来的掌门人。
english: Du Xiaotao is the future successor of the family business.

name: aqgy4_0010_00002
chinese: 谁让你玩儿了，关键是陪客户。
english: Who let you play? The key is to accompany the customer.

name: aqgy4_0010_00003
chinese: 别告诉我你不知道什么是高尔夫社交啊。
english: Don't tell me you don't know what golf socializing is.

name: aqgy4_0010_00004
chinese: 这是我最近刚设计的新签名啦。
english: This is my newly designed signature.

name: aqgy4_0010_00005
chinese: 你们问起来就告诉你们吧，我可能马上要红啦。
english: You can ask and I'll tell you, I might become famous soon.

name: aqgy4_0010_00006
chinese: 我要签约经纪公司啦。
english: I want to sign with a brokerage company.

name: aqgy4_0010_00007
chinese: 这可不一样，是一家国际知名的娱乐公司要签我。
english: This is different. An internationally renowned entertainment company wants to sign me.

name: aqgy4_0010_00008
chinese: 怎么说我也是高端人士。
english: How do I say that I am also a high-end person?

name: aqgy4_0010_00011
chinese: 我全身上下的每一个器官都在说着我喜欢你。
english: Every organ in my body is saying I love you.

name: aqgy4_0010_00012
chinese: 接待杜老板的欢迎会，台长都到了，你居然敢不参加。
english: Welcome party for Mr. Du, the department head has arrived, and you dare not attend.

name: aqgy4_0010_00013
chinese: 你忙什么呢呀。
english: What are you busy with?

name: aqgy4_0010_00014
chinese: 明天我有事儿就让他替我陪您消遣消遣。
english: If I have something to do tomorrow, I will let him accompany you to have some fun.

name: aqgy4_0010_00015
chinese: 好难听的名字。
english: A name that sounds terrible.

name: aqgy4_0010_00016
chinese: 果然是高手啊呵呵。
english: Wow, you're really skilled, haha.

name: aqgy4_0010_00017
chinese: 我爸爸从小就不让我碰任何其他项目。
english: My father has never allowed me to touch any other projects since I was young.

name: aqgy4_0010_00018
chinese: 喝个烤串，吃个小酒，再谈谈生意，多么高贵的生活方式啊。
english: Have some grilled skewers, have a glass of wine, and then talk about business. What a noble way of life.

name: aqgy4_0010_00019
chinese: 曾先生特地为您约了我们这里最好的教练。
english: Mr. Zeng specially booked our best coach for you.

name: aqgy4_0010_00020
chinese: 你好杜老板，竭诚为你服务。
english: Hello Boss Du, I am dedicated to serving you.

name: aqgy4_0010_00022
chinese: 那是，也不算什么档次，哈哈。
english: That's not really high-class, haha.

name: aqgy4_0010_00023
chinese: 唱的真不错，哈哈哈。
english: You sing really well, hahaha.

name: aqgy4_0010_00024
chinese: 这就是你说的神秘演员啊。
english: This is the mysterious actor you were talking about.

name: aqgy4_0010_00025
chinese: 我最擅长演感情戏了。
english: I am best at acting emotional scenes.

name: aqgy4_0010_00026
chinese: 你外形帅能力强你的温柔和自信向由内而外散发出来的。
english: Your appearance is handsome, your abilities are strong, and your gentleness and confidence radiate from within to the outside.

name: aqgy4_0010_00028
chinese: 我好激动，我激动的好想哭。
english: I'm so excited, I'm so excited that I want to cry.

name: aqgy4_0010_00030
chinese: 想不到这个桌球这么好玩。
english: I didn't expect this billiards to be so fun.

name: aqgy4_0010_00031
chinese: 这么累了不如抽根雪茄休息一下，聊聊赞助的事儿。
english: I'm so tired, why not take a break and have a cigar to relax, and talk about sponsorship matters.

name: aqgy4_0010_00032
chinese: 你对我这么好，我还不相信你吗？
english: You treat me so well, and I still can't believe you?

name: aqgy4_0010_00033
chinese: 我天天在这打球，就没听说过，有外人敢包我的场。
english: I play basketball here every day, and I have never heard of any outsider daring to take over my court.

name: aqgy4_0010_00034
chinese: 老子打球你包场，老子不跟你计较。
english: I book the court for playing basketball, I won't argue with you.

name: aqgy4_0011_00000
chinese: 我新认识了一个女孩，他答应嫁给我了。
english: I have met a new girl, and she has agreed to marry me.

name: aqgy4_0011_00001
chinese: 我只不过是在对的时间遇见了对的人罢了。
english: I just happened to meet the right person at the right time.

name: aqgy4_0011_00002
chinese: 默默不是坏人，遇见她是我这辈子最大的幸运。
english: Mo Mo is not a bad person. Meeting her is the luckiest thing in my life.

name: aqgy4_0011_00003
chinese: 陌陌最大的缺点是她总是能让我回想起初恋的感觉。
english: The biggest drawback of Momo is that it always reminds me of the feeling of first love.

name: aqgy4_0011_00004
chinese: 缘分来了就是要快刀斩乱麻，这次我不会错过了。
english: When fate comes, we must quickly cut through the mess. This time, I won't miss it.

name: aqgy4_0011_00005
chinese: 谢谢你们的支持。
english: Thank you for your support.

name: aqgy4_0011_00006
chinese: 我们初次相遇，张伟就带我去吃饭。
english: We first met, Zhang Wei took me out for a meal.

name: aqgy4_0011_00007
chinese: 从来没有见过这么会心疼人的男人。
english: I have never seen a man who cares so much about others.

name: aqgy4_0011_00008
chinese: 既要守住爱情，也要留住友情。
english: We need to hold onto love and also keep friendship.

name: aqgy4_0011_00009
chinese: 像默默这么优秀的女孩儿，是个男人都忍不住动心。
english: A girl as outstanding as Momo, even a man can't help but be moved.

name: aqgy4_0011_00010
chinese: 你的表演太赞了我们想邀请你来参加我们的婚礼。
english: Your performance was amazing, and we would like to invite you to participate in our wedding.

name: aqgy4_0011_00011
chinese: 那儿有最好的老师，最浓郁的学术氛围。
english: There are the best teachers and the most vibrant academic atmosphere.

name: aqgy4_0011_00012
chinese: 瓜田李下怎么能说别人坏话呢。
english: How can one speak ill of others when they are in a melon field or under a plum tree?

name: aqgy4_0011_00013
chinese: 你口才这么好，前面怎么不看你帮我说话呢？
english: Your eloquence is so good, why didn't you speak up for me earlier?

name: aqgy4_0011_00014
chinese: 我以一个兄弟的名义警告你。
english: I warn you in the name of a brother.

name: aqgy4_0011_00015
chinese: 这件外套帅爆了。
english: This jacket is super cool.

name: aqgy4_0011_00016
chinese: 我们的感情自然而然水到渠成。
english: Our relationship naturally developed and fell into place.

name: aqgy4_0011_00017
chinese: 你除了喝酒就是说怪话，你到底想表达什么。
english: Besides drinking alcohol, all you do is talk nonsense. What exactly are you trying to express?

name: aqgy4_0011_00018
chinese: 不管你怎么推理，赌注已经下了，婚礼上的模特秀我要定了。
english: No matter how you reason, the bet has been placed, and I have booked the fashion show at the wedding.

name: aqgy4_0011_00020
chinese: 我们结婚之前有个约定，婚前保留一点神秘感。
english: We had an agreement before getting married to keep a little mystery before marriage.

name: aqgy4_0011_00021
chinese: 太草率了吧。
english: Too hasty, right?

name: aqgy4_0011_00022
chinese: 我上次的结婚经验告诉我，一切排场都是浮云。
english: My previous marriage experience tells me that all the grandeur is just a passing cloud.

name: aqgy4_0011_00023
chinese: 喜烟喜酒喜糖，你不会都没准备吧？
english: Do you not have any cigarettes, alcohol, or candy prepared?

name: aqgy4_0011_00024
chinese: 前几天几急哄哄的搬走了，我还以为她惹上什么麻烦了呢。
english: A few days ago, she hurriedly moved away, and I thought she had gotten into some trouble.

name: aqgy4_0011_00025
chinese: 张伟也太可怜了，一会儿怎么跟她讲。
english: Zhang Wei is so pitiful, how should I talk to her later.

name: aqgy4_0011_00026
chinese: 居然第二次结婚被人放鸽。
english: Surprisingly, I was stood up at my second wedding.

name: aqgy4_0011_00027
chinese: 天呐，太阴暗了吧。
english: Oh my god, it's so gloomy.

name: aqgy4_0012_00000
chinese: 从现在开始，我将和微微一样只代表正义替弱势群体打官司。
english: From now on, I will be like Weiwei, representing only justice and fighting lawsuits for the disadvantaged groups.

name: aqgy4_0012_00001
chinese: 弱势群体可都交不起律师费啊，你可别后悔。
english: Vulnerable groups cannot afford legal fees, don't regret it.

name: aqgy4_0012_00002
chinese: 我是你的粉丝小罗啊，微博上面你和我说话的。
english: I am your fan Xiaoluo, you talked to me on Weibo.

name: aqgy4_0012_00003
chinese: 奥，我认得你你就是小罗呀哈哈。
english: Oh, I recognize you! You are Xiaoluo, haha.

name: aqgy4_0012_00004
chinese: 你的每部戏我都看，每条微博我都转的。
english: I watch every one of your plays and I share every one of your Weibo posts.

name: aqgy4_0012_00005
chinese: 这个，一点心意。
english: This, a little token of affection.

name: aqgy4_0012_00006
chinese: 您太客气了，我以为我只有僵尸粉，没想到还有您这样高质量活跃粉。
english: You are too polite. I thought I only had zombie fans, but I didn't expect to have high-quality active fans like you.

name: aqgy4_0012_00007
chinese: 可以和你拍张照吗？
english: Can I take a photo with you?:

name: aqgy4_0012_00008
chinese: 您专门给我送甜品来，我还不知道该怎么感谢你呢。
english: You specially brought me desserts, and I don't know how to thank you yet.

name: aqgy4_0012_00009
chinese: 我可以搂着你吗？
english: Can I hug you?

name: aqgy4_0012_00010
chinese: 这个是本店的vip卡，以后要吃甜品随叫随到。
english: This is our store's VIP card, you can order desserts anytime you want in the future.

name: aqgy4_0012_00011
chinese: 你在银幕上是个演员，可是你在生活中是关谷的未婚妻啊，你怎么就堕落了呢？
english: You are an actor on the screen, but in real life, you are Guan Yu's fiancée. How did you become so corrupted?

name: aqgy4_0012_00012
chinese: 别误会，不是你想的那样。
english: Don't misunderstand, it's not what you think.

name: aqgy4_0012_00013
chinese: 我只相信我自己的眼睛。
english: I only believe in my own eyes.

name: aqgy4_0012_00014
chinese: 而且人家还专程从昆山给我带了甜品。
english: And they even specially brought desserts for me from Kunshan.

name: aqgy4_0012_00015
chinese: 你被娱乐圈的浮华蒙蔽了双眼，你还浑然不觉。
english: You have been blinded by the glamour of the entertainment industry, and you are still unaware.

name: aqgy4_0012_00016
chinese: 贤哥也红过，我什么时候那么随便过。
english: Xian Ge has also been popular before, when did I become so casual.

name: aqgy4_0012_00017
chinese: 我专程为你准备的。
english: I specially prepared it for you.

name: aqgy4_0012_00018
chinese: 我像是吃独食的人吗，当然是第一时间和你分享。
english: Am I someone who eats alone? Of course, I will share with you at the first opportunity.

name: aqgy4_0012_00019
chinese: 谁稀罕，我也有一个，肯定比你的强。
english: Who cares, I also have one, definitely better than yours.

name: aqgy4_0012_00020
chinese: 八卦就像幸福，分享就能乘二。
english: Gossip is like happiness, sharing doubles it.

name: aqgy4_0012_00021
chinese: 一切尽在掌握之中。
english: Everything is within grasp.

name: aqgy4_0012_00022
chinese: 我答应人家保密呢，就这么告诉你，不太好吧。
english: I promised to keep it a secret, so it's not really appropriate to tell you like this.

name: aqgy4_0012_00024
chinese: 还有，他居然在法庭上抽烟。
english: Also, he actually smoked in the courtroom.

name: aqgy4_0012_00025
chinese: 你个律师怎么当的，你也不拦着点。
english: How did you become a lawyer? Can't you stop a little?

name: aqgy4_0012_00026
chinese: 行了，算我自作多情。
english: Alright, consider me being overly sentimental.

name: aqgy4_0012_00027
chinese: 我不忙，我有空，你让我陪你玩什么呀？
english: I'm not busy, I have free time, what do you want me to play with you?

name: aqgy4_0012_00028
chinese: 太无聊了有什么可玩的。
english: It's so boring, is there anything fun to play with?

name: aqgy4_0012_00029
chinese: 你让我陪你玩儿，我玩儿这个，你玩儿什么呀？
english: You want me to play with you, I'll play this, what are you playing?

name: aqgy4_0012_00030
chinese: 不早了，早点睡吧。
english: It's getting late, go to bed early.

name: aqgy4_0012_00031
chinese: 你考虑一下别人的感受行不行，这是床上。
english: Can you consider other people's feelings, this is a bed.

name: aqgy4_0012_00032
chinese: 大家都累了，尤其像您这样的年龄。
english: Everyone is tired, especially someone of your age.

name: aqgy4_0012_00033
chinese: 人家是客人，你怎么能这么说话呢。
english: People are guests, how can you speak like this?

name: aqgy4_0012_00034
chinese: 你看人家七爷，高风亮节。
english: Look at Qiyeye, he is upright and honorable.

name: aqgy4_0012_00035
chinese: 我怕你无聊，特地打电话来帮你解解闷儿。
english: I'm afraid you're bored, so I called to help you pass the time.

name: aqgy4_0012_00036
chinese: 不是吧，我已经够困的了。
english: No way, I'm already tired enough.

name: aqgy4_0012_00037
chinese: 昨天有听众打电话来跟我聊心事，我居然把她给说哭，我突然发现我好有魅力啊。
english: Yesterday, a listener called me to talk about her troubles, and I actually made her cry. I suddenly realized that I am quite charming.

name: aqgy4_0012_00038
chinese: 你耍我呢吧。
english: Are you kidding me?

name: aqgy4_0012_00039
chinese: 他还挺健谈的嘛。
english: He is quite talkative.

name: aqgy4_0012_00040
chinese: 他根本就是，哎呀不说了。
english: He is just, oh forget it.

name: aqgy4_0012_00041
chinese: 可人家精神挺好的呀，一大早还打太极了呢。
english: She is in good spirits. She even practiced Tai Chi early in the morning.

name: aqgy4_0012_00042
chinese: 你说过不会丢下我不管的。
english: You said you wouldn't abandon me.

name: aqgy4_0012_00043
chinese: 别以为人家是弱势群体你就可以毫无顾忌。
english: Don't think that just because someone is a vulnerable group, you can act without any scruples.

name: aqgy4_0012_00044
chinese: 还能够强筋健骨，固本培元。
english: Still able to strengthen muscles and bones, consolidate the foundation and cultivate the essence.

name: aqgy4_0012_00045
chinese: 这杂交品问世不久，所以鲜为人知。
english: This hybrid variety has recently emerged, so it is relatively unknown.

name: aqgy4_0012_00046
chinese: 好吃吗，有没有焕然一新的感觉。
english: Is it delicious? Do you feel refreshed?

name: aqgy4_0012_00047
chinese: 今天晚上的约会，我一定要好好把握。
english: I must make the most of tonight's date.

name: aqgy4_0012_00048
chinese: 这种精神打动了我，这是为什么我这么崇拜他的原因。
english: This spirit moved me, that's why I admire him so much.

name: aqgy4_0012_00049
chinese: 我们可以出去吃饭啊。
english: We can go out for a meal.

name: aqgy4_0012_00050
chinese: 还以为洪老伯的案子很麻烦呢，没想到你这么快就办妥了。
english: I thought Mr. Hong's case would be very troublesome, but I didn't expect you to handle it so quickly.

name: aqgy4_0012_00051
chinese: 那必须速战速决呀，后面还有一大堆案子等着我处理呢。
english: We must quickly resolve this, there are still a bunch of cases waiting for me to handle.

name: aqgy4_0012_00052
chinese: 为什么不早点告诉我呢？
english: Why didn't you tell me earlier?

name: aqgy4_0012_00053
chinese: 我不知道原来你条件这么艰苦。
english: I didn't know that your conditions were so difficult.

name: aqgy4_0012_00054
chinese: 我好心帮你，你却三番两次破坏我的生活。
english: I helped you with good intentions, but you repeatedly ruined my life.

name: aqgy4_0012_00055
chinese: 你走啊，有种就别回来。
english: You go, if you have the guts, don't come back.

name: aqgy4_0012_00056
chinese: 我也不知道怪谁，我自己一肚子火都没地方发泄。
english: I don't know who to blame either. I have so much anger inside me and nowhere to vent it.

name: aqgy4_0012_00058
chinese: 他早就知道这件事情，而且他违反了你们的兄弟守则。
english: He has known about this matter for a long time, and he has violated your brotherhood rules.

name: aqgy4_0012_00059
chinese: 胡说，这都是兄弟之间的帮忙而已。
english: Nonsense, it's just helping each other between brothers.

name: aqgy4_0012_00060
chinese: 我早就不该相信他。
english: I shouldn't have trusted him a long time ago.

name: aqgy4_0012_00061
chinese: 你昨天晚上去哪儿了，急死我了。
english: Where did you go last night? I was so worried.

name: aqgy4_0012_00062
chinese: 您这样，再给我一次机会，这次您住多久我都不会介意的。
english: If you do this, give me another chance, I won't mind how long you stay this time.

name: aqgy4_0012_00063
chinese: 我的儿子有你的一半孝心，我就满足了。
english: My son has half of your filial piety, and I am satisfied.

name: aqgy4_0014_00000
chinese: 向大家宣布一个好消息，由我主演的新话剧明天下午就要正式公   演了。
english: I am pleased to announce some good news to everyone. The new play that I am starring in will have its official performance tomorrow afternoon.

name: aqgy4_0014_00002
chinese: 不用，演员有赠票。
english: No need, actors have complimentary tickets.

name: aqgy4_0014_00003
chinese: 那就谢谢你啦。
english: Thank you then.

name: aqgy4_0014_00004
chinese: 还以为买不到票看不成了，还好有你在。
english: I thought I couldn't buy tickets and couldn't watch the show, luckily you were there.

name: aqgy4_0014_00005
chinese: 啊，谢谢关关。
english: Ah, thank you, Guan Guan.

name: aqgy4_0014_00006
chinese: 你来了给我打电话，我把票子给他，让他给你送出来呗。
english: Give me a call when you arrive, and I will give the tickets to him so that he can deliver them to you.

name: aqgy4_0014_00007
chinese: 哦我是说，你内秀而不张扬，我最喜欢专访你这样的未来之星。
english: Oh, I mean, you are introverted and not flashy. I love interviewing future stars like you the most.

name: aqgy4_0014_00008
chinese: 可是从来都没有人专访过我。
english: But no one has ever interviewed me.

name: aqgy4_0014_00009
chinese: 那么久以来，你是第一个临幸我的记者。
english: For so long, you are the first fortunate journalist to interview me.

name: aqgy4_0014_00010
chinese: 你想说的是欣赏吧。
english: What you want to say is appreciation.

name: aqgy4_0014_00011
chinese: 真的很谢谢你，你又给我做专访又给我送花的，都不知道要怎么报答你了。
english: Thank you so much for interviewing me and sending me flowers again. I don't know how to repay you.

name: aqgy4_0014_00012
chinese: 那你上我家去吧，我给你看看以前我演出的照片。
english: Then come to my house, I'll show you the photos of my previous performances.

name: aqgy4_0014_00013
chinese: 这身衣服好美呀，谢谢你大仙。
english: This outfit is so beautiful, thank you, great immortal.

name: aqgy4_0014_00015
chinese: 我老婆可在里面演宫女啊。
english: My wife can play a palace maid in it.

name: aqgy4_0014_00016
chinese: 我们可是这个话剧圈里面有名的神雕侠侣呀。
english: We are famous in the drama circle as the Divine Eagle and the Condor Heroes.

name: aqgy4_0014_00017
chinese: 若真是如此，倒也是极好。
english: If that's the case, it would be great.

name: aqgy4_0014_00019
chinese: 我今天怎么老是遇到不公平的事儿。
english: Why do I always encounter unfair things today?

name: aqgy4_0014_00020
chinese: 这才配得上本王的身份嘛，哈哈哈哈哈哈。
english: This is worthy of my identity as the king, hahahaha.

name: aqgy4_0014_00021
chinese: 还说什么我很特别，你会关注我，都是忽悠人的。
english: Saying that I'm special and you'll pay attention to me, it's all just deceiving people.

name: aqgy4_0015_00000
chinese: 媒体圈的朋友，都是兄弟嘛。
english: Friends in the media circle, are they all brothers?

name: aqgy4_0015_00001
chinese: 但让观众看出这是事故，就太没有专业精神了。
english: But if the audience can tell that it is an accident, it shows a lack of professionalism.

name: aqgy4_0015_00002
chinese: 还是买车比较靠谱，车再贵也贵不过一间厕所呀，而且不用装修，不用折腾，不像房子那么麻烦。
english: It is more reliable to buy a car. Even if the car is expensive, it is still cheaper than a toilet. Moreover, there is no need for decoration or hassle like a house.

name: aqgy4_0015_00003
chinese: 我们要是有了车，我给你们免费当司机。
english: If we have a car, I will be your driver for free.

name: aqgy4_0015_00004
chinese: 太震撼了，没想到世界上已经做出这么霸气的机器人。
english: It's so shocking, I didn't expect such a powerful robot to be created in the world.

name: aqgy4_0015_00005
chinese: 你不觉得这和我们的主题很吻合吗？
english: Don't you think this aligns well with our theme?

name: aqgy4_0015_00006
chinese: 我已经做过功课了，这个小区真的很好。
english: I have done my homework, this community is really good.

name: aqgy4_0016_00000
chinese: 这次的对手不是台吸尘器，简直就是个大杀器啊。
english: This opponent is not just a vacuum cleaner, it's a real killer.

name: aqgy4_0016_00001
chinese: 凭这个就可以去逞英雄了，这是典型的自我意识短路。
english: With this, you can go show off as a hero. This is a typical self-conscious short circuit.

name: aqgy4_0016_00002
chinese: 我说你要瞒我们到什么时候啊？
english: Until when do you plan to hide things from us?

name: aqgy4_0016_00004
chinese: 这点小事我能搞定，不麻烦您。
english: I can handle this small matter, it won't trouble you.

name: aqgy4_0016_00005
chinese: 你说他什么毛病啊，好心全当驴肝肺，我借给他钱都不要。
english: What's wrong with him? I kindly treated him as a close friend, but he doesn't even want to borrow money from me.

name: aqgy4_0016_00006
chinese: 我听一菲姐说过这个是和那个学生的约定，一菲姐要给她做个榜样，激励他要做个不到最后绝不放弃。
english: I heard Yifei sister say that this is a promise with that student. Yifei sister wants to set an example for her and inspire him to never give up until the end.

name: aqgy4_0016_00007
chinese: 你第一天认识她啊？这就是传说中的英雄气概。
english: Did you meet her on the first day? This is the legendary heroism.

name: aqgy4_0016_00008
chinese: 我是给英雄端茶送药加油助威的小妹啊。
english: I am a little sister who serves tea, delivers medicine, and cheers for the hero.

name: aqgy4_0016_00009
chinese: 没带钱包，幸亏子乔找到了一个免费的好去处。
english: I didn't bring my wallet, luckily Ziqiao found a free and good place to go.

name: aqgy4_0016_00010
chinese: 我们店里正在搞一个支持年轻人创业的拍卖活动，有兴趣的话你可以支持一下。
english: We are organizing an auction event in our store to support young entrepreneurs. If you are interested, you can show your support.

name: aqgy4_0016_00011
chinese: 这个小姐，想吃点什么，可以吩咐我或者去吧台自助。
english: Miss, what would you like to eat? You can tell me or go to the self-service counter.

name: aqgy4_0016_00012
chinese: 这可以根据自己的创意尽情发挥，设计出自己喜欢的汽车。
english: This can be freely expressed according to one's own creativity, designing one's favorite car.

name: aqgy4_0016_00013
chinese: 来嘛，我给你看我的设计。
english: Come on, let me show you my design.

name: aqgy4_0016_00015
chinese: 我随便填个数字就猜中了，我真是天才。
english: I randomly guessed a number and got it right. I am truly a genius.

name: aqgy4_0016_00016
chinese: 有什么能为您效劳的？
english: How can I assist you?

name: aqgy4_0016_00017
chinese: 我是销售经理小布，看得出来您对我们新车非常感兴趣。
english: I am sales manager Xiao Bu. I can tell that you are very interested in our new car.

name: aqgy4_0016_00018
chinese: 我老公要过生日了，我想给她买个礼物。
english: My husband's birthday is coming up, and I want to buy him a gift.

name: aqgy4_0016_00019
chinese: 非常有眼光，相信你老公也会喜欢我们的新车的。
english: You have a great taste, I believe your husband will also like our new car.

name: aqgy4_0016_00020
chinese: 自从买了这车啊，他每天都在车里抱着反向盘，片刻都舍不得离开。
english: Since buying this car, he holds the reverse steering wheel in the car every day and is reluctant to leave for a moment.

name: aqgy4_0016_00021
chinese: 有哪些乐趣呢？
english: What are the pleasures?

name: aqgy4_0016_00022
chinese: 我想帮他，可是我的钱都在理财产品里动不了。
english: I want to help him, but I can't touch my money in the financial products.

name: aqgy4_0016_00023
chinese: 哈哈哈哈哈哈呵呵，隐藏了这么多年还是被你发现了。
english: Hahaha, hehe, I've been hiding for so many years and you still found me.

name: aqgy4_0016_00024
chinese: 亲爱的客户，欢迎光临张益达借贷。
english: Dear customer, welcome to Zhang Yida's lending.

name: aqgy4_0016_00025
chinese: 定金我付好了，可我没有驾照，你们谁可以带我试驾一下吗？
english: I have paid the deposit, but I don't have a driver's license. Can anyone of you take me for a test drive?

name: aqgy4_0016_00026
chinese: 你很喜欢演蒙面英雄是吧，哇塞我好崇拜你哦！
english: You really like to perform as a masked hero, wow, I admire you so much!

name: aqgy4_0016_00027
chinese: 我就怕你舔个老脸在外面丢人现眼。
english: I'm afraid you will embarrass yourself by licking your old face in public.

name: aqgy4_0016_00028
chinese: 老公 我给你买了个超赞的生日礼物。
english: Husband, I bought you an awesome birthday gift.

name: aqgy4_0016_00029
chinese: 它会给你自信温暖新奇和自由。
english: It will give you confidence, warmth, novelty, and freedom.

name: aqgy4_0016_00030
chinese: 车就像生活一样，每天都会有新惊喜，这样不好吗？
english: Cars are like life, there are new surprises every day, isn't that good?

name: aqgy4_0016_00031
chinese: 真正的幸福是不用排队的，未来的道路也没有堵车，找到乐趣才能真正找到家的方向。
english: The true happiness is not having to queue, and the future road has no traffic jams. Only by finding joy can one truly find the direction of home.

name: aqgy4_0017_00000
chinese: 为了这次职称考试，我一个星期背了四本书，写了六篇论文，突然我对人生有了新的认识。
english: For this professional title exam, I spent a week memorizing four books and writing six papers. Suddenly, I gained a new understanding of life.

name: aqgy4_0017_00001
chinese: 地球人都知道我是爱情公寓的开心果好不好。
english: Earthlings all know that I am the funny guy in the "Love Apartment", okay?

name: aqgy4_0017_00002
chinese: 这个周末只属于我们男人帮了，而我就是你们唯一的领袖。
english: This weekend belongs only to us men, and I am your only leader.

name: aqgy4_0017_00003
chinese: 三亚多美啊，蓝天白云椰林树影水清沙白，这个单身周末一定很难忘。
english: Sanya is so beautiful, with blue sky, white clouds, coconut trees, shadows of trees, clear water, and white sand. This single weekend will definitely be unforgettable.

name: aqgy4_0017_00005
chinese: 没想到家里突然没女人的感觉是这样。
english: I didn't expect that the feeling of not having a woman at home would be like this.

name: aqgy4_0017_00006
chinese: 要知道即使世界毁灭也会回光返照的时候，黑暗的笼罩更会凸显光明的可贵。
english: Even when the world is destroyed, there will still be a glimmer of light in the darkness, highlighting the value of brightness.

name: aqgy4_0017_00007
chinese: 诶好主意，据说这家酒店的Spa很有特色。
english: Hey, great idea! It is said that the Spa in this hotel is very unique.

name: aqgy4_0017_00008
chinese: 那得等到猴年马月呀，我们能活着排到吗？
english: We would have to wait for a very long time, would we still be alive by then?

name: aqgy4_0017_00009
chinese: 一大群美女观众等着入场呢。
english: A large group of beautiful female audience is waiting to enter.

name: aqgy4_0017_00010
chinese: 我帮你做啊，这样我们就有乐子了。
english: I'll help you do it, so we can have fun.

name: aqgy4_0017_00011
chinese: 怎么说说我也付了钱了，你尊重我一下好不好？
english: How about you show me some respect since I also paid the money?

name: aqgy4_0017_00012
chinese: 美嘉非让我体验一下它的diy服务，然后我就悲剧了。
english: Meijia forced me to experience its DIY service, and then I had a tragedy.

name: aqgy4_0017_00013
chinese: 来来来，给你们介绍一个新朋友，是老朋友，还是新朋友。
english: Come, come, let me introduce a new friend to you. Is it an old friend or a new friend?

name: aqgy4_0017_00014
chinese: 他今天不用表演，我就说一起吃午饭咯。
english: He doesn't need to perform today, I suggest we have lunch together.

name: aqgy4_0017_00015
chinese: 虽然人家长得像曾小贤，但是可比曾小贤能耐多了，不仅草裙舞跳的好还超有男人味。
english: Although he looks like Zeng Xiaoxian, he is much more capable than Zeng Xiaoxian. Not only is he good at hula dancing, but he also has a strong masculine charm.

name: aqgy4_0017_00016
chinese: 热情如火的风土人情嘛，你们也热情一点嘛。
english: The enthusiasm and local customs are like a blazing fire, so why don't you be a little more enthusiastic too?

name: aqgy4_0017_00017
chinese: 接下这顿饭我们发现，这个草裙版的曾老师不仅热情如火而且幽默风趣。
english: We found during this meal that Teacher Zeng, who is wearing a grass skirt, is not only enthusiastic but also humorous and witty.

name: aqgy4_0017_00018
chinese: 多亏你们让我来三亚，要不然我一辈子也不会有意思的开心果。
english: Thanks to you guys for letting me come to Sanya, otherwise I would never have had such a fun time in my whole life.

name: aqgy4_0017_00019
chinese: 我觉得如果配这个颜色应该更好。
english: I think it would be better if it is matched with this color.

name: aqgy4_0018_00000
chinese: 我呀，是要给他介绍一个失散多年的亲兄弟。
english: Well, I am going to introduce him to a long-lost brother.

name: aqgy4_0018_00001
chinese: 今晚是我们单身周末的最后一晚，你有什么打算？
english: Tonight is the last night of our single weekend, what are your plans?

name: aqgy4_0018_00002
chinese: 隆重介绍一下，这位就是我在三亚找到的沧海遗珠。
english: Introducing with great honor, this is the pearl I found in Sanya.

name: aqgy4_0018_00003
chinese: 我下午看阿西摘榴莲的时候，发现了他第三个超凡绝技。
english: When I watched Ashi pick durian in the afternoon, I discovered his third extraordinary skill.

name: aqgy4_0018_00004
chinese: 他说这个榴莲是送给你们的订婚礼物，关谷悠悠祝你们领证愉快，像这个榴莲一样甜甜蜜蜜。
english: He said that this durian is a engagement gift for you. Guan Gu Yu Yu wishes you a happy marriage registration, as sweet as this durian.

name: aqgy4_0018_00005
chinese: 我实在受不了这味儿，所以要把它快速消灭掉。
english: I can't stand this taste anymore, so I want to quickly get rid of it.

name: aqgy4_0018_00006
chinese: 这可是人家的一份心意啊，不像你除了吃就会吐槽。
english: This is someone's heartfelt gesture, unlike you who only knows how to criticize while eating.

name: aqgy4_0018_00007
chinese: 谢谢，礼物无所谓，心意我们收到了。
english: Thank you, the gift doesn't matter, we have received your kindness.

name: aqgy4_0018_00008
chinese: 我知道就算我现在送什么都无法弥补对你们的伤害，所以我想，不如就把打子乔耳光的权利送给你们吧。
english: I know that even if I give you anything now, it cannot make up for the harm I have caused to you. So I thought, why not just give you the right to slap Ziqiao?

name: aqgy4_0018_00009
chinese: 你们简直就是恶魔恶魔啊！
english: You guys are simply demons, demons!

name: aqgy4_0018_00010
chinese: 当然是看看这个撞脸怪有没有打着我的旗号，对一菲有什么非分之举，要是有的话，看我不抽他的熊脸。
english: Of course, I want to see if this look-alike monster is pretending to be me and doing something inappropriate to Yifei. If he does, I will definitely slap his face.

name: aqgy4_0018_00011
chinese: 有什么了不起的，不就是扭扭腰抖抖屁股嘛，换我上台一样可以。
english: What's so great about it? It's just twisting your waist and shaking your butt. I can do the same if I go on stage.

name: aqgy4_0018_00012
chinese: 还没回来啊，我还等着看结婚证呢。
english: Haven't come back yet, I'm still waiting to see the marriage certificate.

name: aqgy4_0018_00013
chinese: 我们可以围坐在自己的圣诞树前，吃着零食，烤着火，讲个笑话唱首歌。
english: We can sit around our own Christmas tree, eating snacks, roasting fire, telling jokes and singing a song.

name: aqgy4_0018_00014
chinese: 我有关关了，圣诞节的愿望不就是应该爱人帮助去实现的吗？
english: Shouldn't the Christmas wish be about love and helping others to achieve it?

name: aqgy4_0018_00015
chinese: 你们，这不是存心刺激我吗？
english: Are you intentionally trying to provoke me?

name: aqgy4_0018_00016
chinese: 一菲要弄圣诞树你就cos圣诞老人，你们真是天生一对儿。
english: If Yifei wants to set up a Christmas tree, you should dress up as Santa Claus. You two are a perfect match.

name: aqgy4_0018_00017
chinese: 我也没办法，这不是临时有事嘛。
english: I have no way either, it's just a temporary matter.

name: aqgy4_0018_00018
chinese: 哈哈哈哈哈，恭喜你呀悠悠，你被提名为菲律宾铁猴子奖最佳新人。
english: Hahaha, congratulations to you, Yoyo. You have been nominated for the Best Newcomer Award at the Philippine Iron Monkey Awards.

name: aqgy4_0018_00019
chinese: 老板，奖我不要了，新闻我也不要了。
english: Boss, I don't want the reward, and I don't want the news either.

name: aqgy4_0018_00020
chinese: 娱乐圈，你当是呼啦圈儿，好玩儿啊？
english: Entertainment circle, do you think you are a hula hoop? It's fun, isn't it?

name: aqgy4_0018_00021
chinese: 圣诞夜里不去陪他，还和一个大明星出去吃饭，你不怕他吃醋啊。
english: On Christmas night, instead of accompanying him, you went out to have dinner with a big celebrity. Aren't you afraid that he will be jealous?

name: aqgy4_0018_00022
chinese: 当然了，今天我就是专程请你来尝尝我的手艺的。
english: Of course, today I specifically invited you to taste my craftsmanship.

name: aqgy4_0019_00000
chinese: 你们两个就是因为太闲，才有功夫在这打情骂俏，从现在开始找圣诞树的任务也统统交给你们。
english: You two are just idle, that's why you have the time to flirt and tease here. From now on, the task of finding the Christmas tree is also completely handed over to you two.

name: aqgy4_0019_00001
chinese: 终于逮着你了，让你再蹿。
english: Finally caught you, won't let you escape again.

name: aqgy4_0019_00002
chinese: 老兄，懂得挺多的嘛，要不然我考考你。
english: Buddy, you seem to know a lot, otherwise I'll test you.

name: aqgy4_0019_00003
chinese: 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈你演的真像。
english: Hahahahahahahaha, you act so much like him/her.

name: aqgy4_0019_00004
chinese: 你就是个傻子我懒得跟你说。
english: You are just a fool, I don't feel like talking to you.

name: aqgy4_0019_00005
chinese: 你家好大，好漂亮啊。
english: Your house is so big and beautiful.

name: aqgy4_0019_00006
chinese: 要不是凯西告诉我，我还不知道你是富二代呢。
english: If it weren't for Casey telling me, I wouldn't have known that you are a second-generation rich.

name: aqgy4_0019_00007
chinese: 孤儿院的日子的确很苦，没爹疼没娘爱。
english: The days in the orphanage are indeed tough, without a father's love and a mother's care.

name: aqgy4_0019_00008
chinese: 我特别向往围栏外的生活，就和伙伴在半夜偷偷爬出去玩。
english: I long for a life outside the fence, sneaking out with my friends to play in the middle of the night.

name: aqgy4_0019_00009
chinese: 现在想想那时候无忧无虑多快乐啊，要是真能许愿，我就想回到童年，没有压力。
english: Now think about how carefree and happy it was back then. If I could make a wish, I would like to go back to my childhood, without any pressure.

name: aqgy4_0019_00010
chinese: 你现在也不错呀，上进，自律，年纪轻轻就当了律师。
english: You are doing well now, progressive, self-disciplined, and became a lawyer at such a young age.

name: aqgy4_0019_00011
chinese: 哼，老娘上得了厅堂，下得了厨房，绝对是贤妻良母的不二典范。
english: Hmm, I can handle both the hall and the kitchen. I am definitely the epitome of a virtuous wife and loving mother.

name: aqgy4_0019_00012
chinese: 是我不好，我总让他理解包容，现在他都不在乎我了。
english: It's my fault. I always made him understand and tolerate. Now he doesn't care about me anymore.

name: aqgy4_0019_00013
chinese: 你有没有搞错啊，你把我和我男朋友的关系搞得乱七八糟，你现在又放我鸽子。
english: Are you kidding me? You have messed up the relationship between me and my boyfriend, and now you are standing me up again.

name: aqgy4_0019_00014
chinese: 道歉有用吗，要不是你说要追我，他会豁达成那样吗。
english: Is an apology useful? If it weren't for you saying that you wanted to pursue me, would he have become so magnanimous?

name: aqgy4_0019_00015
chinese: 靠两个叛徒，算了走吧走吧，剩我一个拉倒。
english: Relying on two traitors, forget it, let's go, let's go, I'm the only one left.

name: aqgy4_0020_00000
chinese: 桃花泛滥啊。
english: The peach blossoms are in full bloom.

name: aqgy4_0020_00001
chinese: 桃花大顺，我看一菲是求过姻缘啦。
english: Tao Hua Da Shun, I think Yi Fei is seeking a marriage fate.

name: aqgy4_0020_00002
chinese: 我猜老天是在暗示，不对明示你啊，脱单指日可待啦！
english: I guess the heavens are hinting, not explicitly telling you, that you will soon be single and available!

name: aqgy4_0020_00003
chinese: 哦我懂了，这叫友情越位恋人未满。
english: Oh, I understand. This is called "crossing the line of friendship before becoming lovers."

name: aqgy4_0020_00004
chinese: 这关系到家庭的幸福和后代的健康，对提高婚姻质量至关重要。
english: This is crucial for the happiness of the family and the health of future generations, and it is essential for improving the quality of marriage.

name: aqgy4_0020_00005
chinese: 我们马上就要做夫妻了，互相多了解一点有什么不好的。
english: We are about to become husband and wife, what's wrong with getting to know each other a little more?

name: aqgy4_0020_00006
chinese: 你们串通好的吧？
english: Are you colluding together?

name: aqgy4_0020_00007
chinese: 就因为那天参加了这个游戏，我才感受到一种前所未有的乐趣。
english: Just because I participated in this game that day, I experienced a kind of unprecedented joy.

name: aqgy4_0020_00008
chinese: 大不了，我下次再买个小礼物补偿一下嘛。
english: At worst, I will buy a small gift next time to make up for it.

name: aqgy4_0020_00009
chinese: 我特意给你买的，喜欢吗？
english: I specially bought it for you, do you like it?

name: aqgy4_0020_00010
chinese: 啊哈，原来你们是朋友啊！
english: Ah, so you guys are friends!

name: aqgy4_0020_00011
chinese: 侮辱我的智商还是侮辱人格。
english: Insulting my intelligence or insulting my character.

name: aqgy4_0020_00012
chinese: 我真的没有空陪她玩儿了。
english: I really don't have time to play with her anymore.

name: aqgy4_0020_00013
chinese: 又不是你助理，我怎么会有啊？
english: It's not like you're my assistant, why would I have it?

name: aqgy4_0021_00000
chinese: 我真是随便一说，可你找了那么多借口我才开始好奇的。
english: I was just casually saying, but you came up with so many excuses that made me curious.

name: aqgy4_0021_00001
chinese: 我们已经是一体的两个人了，我还会嫌弃你吗？
english: We are already two people who are one, would I still despise you?

name: aqgy4_0021_00002
chinese: 我是怕你看不起我，影响了对未来的信心。
english: I'm afraid you will look down on me and it will affect my confidence in the future.

name: aqgy4_0021_00003
chinese: 如果你紧张，我会更紧张的。
english: If you are nervous, I will be even more nervous.

name: aqgy4_0021_00004
chinese: 你不说，我还从来没感觉出来呢。
english: You didn't say it, so I never felt it.

name: aqgy4_0021_00005
chinese: 我保证，无论你有什么问题，我能把你补好照顾好，我有信心。
english: I promise, no matter what problems you have, I can take care of you and fix you up. I have confidence.

name: aqgy4_0021_00006
chinese: 这一切我可以解释，你给我点时间。
english: I can explain all of this, just give me some time.

name: aqgy4_0021_00007
chinese: 相信我今天是破岁日，诸事不宜，忌吃饭，忌送礼，忌说话。
english: Believe me, today is an inauspicious day. It is not suitable for various matters. Avoid eating, avoid giving gifts, avoid talking.

name: aqgy4_0021_00008
chinese: 我就想还你个人情有什么错吗？
english: Is there anything wrong with me wanting to repay you a favor?

name: aqgy4_0022_00000
chinese: 诺澜要回来了，你想在节目里给她惊喜对不对？
english: Nuolan is coming back, do you want to surprise her on the show?

name: aqgy4_0022_00001
chinese: 哇你怎么什么都知道啊。
english: Wow, how do you know everything?

name: aqgy4_0022_00002
chinese: 现在是眼球经济时代，你知道你的节目原来收视率那么低吗。
english: Now is the era of eyeball economy, do you know that your program's ratings are so low?

name: aqgy4_0022_00003
chinese: 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈原来是这样啊。
english: Hahaha, so that's how it is.

name: aqgy4_0022_00004
chinese: 打了半个小时了怎么还是没人接电话啊。
english: I've been calling for half an hour, why is nobody answering the phone?

name: aqgy4_0022_00005
chinese: 那他倒是说啊，凭什么他躲起来当乌龟，这烂摊子让我一个人收拾。
english: Then he should speak up. Why does he hide like a turtle? I have to clean up this mess all by myself.

name: aqgy4_0022_00006
chinese: 这段时间大家过的怎么样啊。
english: How has everyone been doing during this period of time?

name: aqgy4_0022_00007
chinese: 可好了，曾老师被一菲照顾的可好了。
english: Zeng teacher is being taken care of very well by Yi Fei.

name: aqgy4_0022_00008
chinese: 这也是心里学的一种，对于我们做感情节目很有帮助的。
english: This is also a kind of psychology, which is very helpful for us to do emotional programs.

name: aqgy4_0022_00009
chinese: 诺兰是电台台花，你也不撒泡尿照照，还嫌弃她。
english: Nolan is the radio station's darling, you should also take a look at yourself before criticizing her.

name: aqgy4_0022_00010
chinese: 你真是个天才，回头见了诺澜，就这么说。
english: You are a genius, when you see Nuo Lan, just say that.

name: aqgy4_0022_00011
chinese: 这个故事太励志了，新一期节目的看点有了。
english: This story is so inspiring, and the new episode of the program has its highlights.

name: aqgy4_0023_00000
chinese: 你真的是帅呆了。
english: You are really handsome.

name: aqgy4_0024_00000
chinese: 你们是对的，从今天往后，我要对他刮目相看了。
english: You are right, from today onwards, I will look at him with new eyes.

name: aqgy4_0024_00001
chinese: 这个结局太美好了。
english: This ending is too beautiful.

name: aqgy4_0024_00002
chinese: 我们这么久没见了，还是希望见到你的时候可以开心一点嘛。
english: We haven't seen each other for so long, I still hope that when I see you, we can be happy.

name: aqgy4_0024_00003
chinese: 那一定相当壮观，姑娘们一定很喜欢。
english: That must be quite spectacular, the girls must really like it.

name: aqgy4_0024_00004
chinese: 我们可以去参加达人秀了。
english: We can go to participate in the talent show.

name: aqgy4_0024_00005
chinese: 我们宠物店经常会收养一些流浪狗，然后，我就以你的名义收养了它。
english: We often adopt some stray dogs at our pet store, and then I adopted it in your name.

name: aqgy4_0024_00006
chinese: 这是纯种的中国田园犬，可乖了。
english: This is a purebred Chinese rural dog, it's very obedient.

name: aqgy4_0024_00007
chinese: 所以我想来看是不是能够还给我，我会很感谢你们的。
english: So I want to see if I can get it back, I would be very grateful to you.

name: aqgy4_0024_00008
chinese: 嘟嘟在你们这么有爱心的人家里，我也就放心了，那我后天来领嘟嘟吧。
english: Dodo is in such a caring family like yours, so I can rest assured. I will come to pick up Dodo the day after tomorrow.

name: aqgy4_0024_00009
chinese: 我会好好谢谢你们的，告辞了。
english: I will thank you all very much, goodbye.

name: aqgy4_0024_00010
chinese: 我觉得你们的工作真的特别辛苦，需要进来休息一下。
english: I think your work is really hard, you need to come in and take a break.

name: aqgy4_0024_00011
chinese: 我们每天忍辱负重的工作着，保护着大家的健康，却经常被人们误认为变态恶魔。
english: We work hard every day, enduring humiliation and carrying heavy burdens, to protect everyone's health, but we are often mistaken for perverted demons.

name: aqgy4_0024_00012
chinese: 我一直很理解，我们一直很理解。
english: I have always understood, we have always understood.

name: aqgy4_0024_00013
chinese: 没事没事既然嘟嘟已经自己回来了，我就放心了，但是我还是要好好谢谢两位。
english: Since Dodo has already come back on his own, I feel relieved. But I still want to thank both of you.

name: aqgy4_0024_00014
chinese: 这样，我请你们吃饭吧。
english: In this way, let me treat you to a meal.

name: aqgy4_0024_00016
chinese: 我也明白了，原来你们和那群黑我们抓狗大队的人是一伙的。
english: I also understand now, so you and that group of people who catch dogs are in cahoots with us.

name: aqgy5_0001_00000
chinese: 有这样的好事你带带我呀，我这个人最能吃苦了。
english: It's such a good thing, can you bring me along? I am the most resilient person.

name: aqgy5_0001_00001
chinese: 你在台里上升空间有限，去那边历练一年，回来可就不一样了。
english: Your room for growth here is limited, go there to gain experience for a year, and you will come back a different person.

name: aqgy5_0001_00002
chinese: 看来大家还是舍不得，我也很舍不得大家。
english: It seems that everyone is still reluctant, and I am also very reluctant to leave everyone.

name: aqgy5_0001_00003
chinese: 支援国家建设，提升自我，大好的机会，不要在该奋斗的年纪整天葛优躺。
english: Support national construction, improve oneself, great opportunities, don't spend all day lying around like Ge You at this age when you should be striving.

name: aqgy5_0001_00004
chinese: 虽然相隔千里但是我们的心永远都在一起。
english: Although we are thousands of miles apart, our hearts are always together.

name: aqgy5_0001_00005
chinese: 不管是哪个版本，结局还是很浪漫的嘛。
english: No matter which version, the ending is still very romantic.

name: aqgy5_0001_00006
chinese: 我们领证的时候，我也要拍照发朋友圈，我也要霸屏。
english: When we get our marriage certificate, I also want to take photos and post them on my social media, I also want to dominate the screen.

name: aqgy5_0001_00007
chinese: 现在我宣布，张伟大律师工作室招牌揭幕仪式，正式开始。
english: Now I announce that the unveiling ceremony of Zhang Wei Law Firm's signboard is officially beginning.

name: aqgy5_0001_00008
chinese: 接下来就是最激动人心的时刻，招牌揭幕。
english: The most exciting moment is coming next, the unveiling of the signboard.

name: aqgy5_0001_00009
chinese: 拍结婚照，一定要拍的美美的。
