english: When taking wedding photos, they must be taken beautifully.

name: aqgy5_0001_00010
chinese: 这都能强行合理化，我果然是做律师的料。
english: This can be forcibly rationalized. I am indeed cut out to be a lawyer.

name: aqgy5_0001_00011
chinese: 警车一来乌央乌央的的多焦虑啊，没必要刺激她。
english: When the police car arrived, she became very anxious and there is no need to provoke her.

name: aqgy5_0001_00012
chinese: 我是名律师，有什么困难你可以和我说，没准儿我能帮到你。
english: I am a lawyer. You can tell me if you have any difficulties, maybe I can help you.

name: aqgy5_0001_00013
chinese: 你帮不了我的，我欠了很多钱，没地方住。
english: You can't help me, I owe a lot of money and have nowhere to live.

name: aqgy5_0001_00014
chinese: 虽然你现在深陷泥沼，但你更要相信自己，你行你很优秀。
english: Although you are currently stuck in a quagmire, you must believe in yourself even more. You are capable and excellent.

name: aqgy5_0001_00015
chinese: 从今天开始，我们就要一起进入人生的下一关了。
english: Starting from today, we are going to enter the next stage of life together.

name: aqgy5_0001_00016
chinese: 我很自私，我不愿意他们在我的人生里留下痕迹。
english: I am very selfish, I don't want them to leave a trace in my life.

name: aqgy5_0001_00017
chinese: 我不奢求原谅，我只想在这里对所有被我伤害过的人道歉。
english: I don't expect forgiveness, I just want to apologize to everyone I have hurt here.

name: aqgy5_0001_00018
chinese: 我不会回避我的过去，但我也希望我有新的未来。
english: I will not avoid my past, but I also hope that I have a new future.

name: aqgy5_0001_00019
chinese: 我不知道人生的下一关会有多难，但我一定会努力改变自己，给她幸福。
english: I don't know how difficult the next level of life will be, but I will definitely work hard to change myself and bring happiness to her.

name: aqgy5_0002_00000
chinese: 我终于找到你了。
english: I finally found you.

name: aqgy5_0002_00001
chinese: 不用客气，不用客气，我们都是张伟的好朋友。
english: You're welcome, you're welcome, we are all good friends of Zhang Wei.

name: aqgy5_0002_00002
chinese: 什么大叔，我这么青春活力，叫我大叔。
english: What uncle? I'm so youthful and energetic, call me uncle.

name: aqgy5_0002_00003
chinese: 我不爽是因为从产检出来之后。
english: I am unhappy because after the prenatal examination.

name: aqgy5_0002_00004
chinese: 宝宝，爸爸妈妈一定要让你健康成长。
english: Baby, mom and dad must make sure you grow up healthy.

name: aqgy5_0002_00005
chinese: 我可是付了五百块会费了，找不到就退钱。
english: I have already paid a membership fee of 500 yuan. If I can't find it, please refund the money.

name: aqgy5_0002_00006
chinese: 那我不管，我就不信找不到欣赏我老公的伯乐。
english: Then I don't care, I just don't believe that I can't find a patron who appreciates my husband.

name: aqgy5_0002_00007
chinese: 恋爱怎么能随便谈呢，爱情不应该是很神圣的。
english: How can love be talked about casually? Love should not be considered sacred.

name: aqgy5_0002_00008
chinese: 很少遇见像你一样蠢萌又没有经验的小哥哥，我俩等级差不多，你很适合我呀。
english: It's rare to meet a silly and inexperienced little brother like you. Our levels are similar, you are very suitable for me.

name: aqgy5_0002_00009
chinese: 你一定帮我想想办法，我必须冷静下来。
english: You must help me think of a solution, I need to calm down.

name: aqgy5_0002_00010
chinese: 在未来的某一天，我和她肩并着肩，走在夕阳的沙滩上。
english: On a certain day in the future, she and I walk shoulder to shoulder on the beach in the sunset.

name: aqgy5_0002_00011
chinese: 胡老师，你好像不太看好我们俩。
english: Teacher Hu, it seems like you don't have much confidence in the two of us.

name: aqgy5_0002_00012
chinese: 大家冷静啊，有话好好说嘛。
english: Everyone, calm down. Let's talk nicely.

name: aqgy5_0002_00013
chinese: 跳梁小丑，毫无底线。
english: Jumping clown, without any bottom line.

name: aqgy5_0002_00014
chinese: 有孩子有人陪没有工作，居然还勾引我女朋友，简直禽兽不如。
english: There are children and someone to accompany, but no job. He even seduced my girlfriend. He is simply worse than a beast.

name: aqgy5_0002_00015
chinese: 讽刺的就是这种老牛吃嫩草的不当行为。
english: The irony is this inappropriate behavior of an old cow eating tender grass.

name: aqgy5_0002_00016
chinese: 别借题发挥，说过多少次了我们俩不合适。
english: Don't digress, how many times have I said that we are not compatible.

name: aqgy5_0003_00000
chinese: 先吃一顿浪漫的晚餐再看一部浪漫的电影，然后再压一段浪漫的马路。
english: Have a romantic dinner first, then watch a romantic movie, and then take a romantic walk on the road.

name: aqgy5_0003_00001
chinese: 唉你忘了医生嘱咐，咖啡对胎儿有影响。
english: Oops, you forgot the doctor's advice. Coffee has an impact on the fetus.

name: aqgy5_0003_00002
chinese: 啊，这个不能吃那个不能吃，怀孕太没劲了。
english: Ah, I can't eat this and I can't eat that. Being pregnant is so boring.

name: aqgy5_0003_00003
chinese: 张伟有了女朋友，居然可以让我们少奋斗好几年。
english: Zhang Wei has a girlfriend, which can actually save us several years of struggle.

name: aqgy5_0003_00004
chinese: 你要是有他这个脑子，就不愁找不到工作了。
english: If you had his brain, you wouldn't worry about not finding a job.

name: aqgy5_0003_00005
chinese: 你放心，我一定找到工作养你。
english: Don't worry, I will definitely find a job to support you.

name: aqgy5_0003_00006
chinese: 换我我也赶你，大家都是发小广告的，何必互相伤害。
english: If I were you, I would also chase after you. We are all posting small advertisements, why hurt each other?

name: aqgy5_0003_00007
chinese: 我想带你去个浪漫的地方，那里有酒有花有好吃的，还有音乐，很嗨的呦。
english: I want to take you to a romantic place, where there is wine, flowers, delicious food, and music. It's very exciting!

name: aqgy5_0003_00009
chinese: 下次我给你写在小卡片上，忘了你就看一眼。
english: Next time, I will write it on a small card for you. If you forget, just take a look.

name: aqgy5_0003_00010
chinese: 诶，讨厌，竟说大实话。
english: Eh, hate it, unexpectedly telling the truth.

name: aqgy5_0003_00011
chinese: 听起来是个派对啊。
english: It sounds like a party.

name: aqgy5_0003_00012
chinese: 哪有派对，能不能带我们一起去？
english: Where is the party? Can you take us with you?

name: aqgy5_0003_00013
chinese: 最近都没有什么顺心的事，好想找个派对逃避一下。
english: Recently, there hasn't been anything that has gone well. I really want to find a party to escape for a while.

name: aqgy5_0003_00014
chinese: 你能不能描述的再详细一点，让我听听。
english: Can you describe it in more detail, let me hear it.

name: aqgy5_0003_00015
chinese: 这天气还真是女人心啊，又可以玩儿了。
english: This weather is really unpredictable, we can play again.

name: aqgy5_0003_00016
chinese: 嘿嘿，有酒有故事有意思。
english: Hey, there's wine, there are stories, it's interesting.

name: aqgy5_0003_00017
chinese: 其实这是我第一次和男朋友约会，不管做什么我都觉得挺高兴的。
english: Actually, this is my first time going on a date with my boyfriend, and no matter what we do, I feel quite happy.

name: aqgy5_0003_00018
chinese: 得了吧，你别安慰我了，肯定扣了不少分吧。
english: Give it up, stop comforting me. I'm sure I lost a lot of points.

name: aqgy5_0003_00019
chinese: 我现在没法回答你。
english: I can't answer you right now.

name: aqgy5_0003_00020
chinese: 他对我女朋友动手动脚，这种变态我见一次打一次。
english: He laid hands on my girlfriend, I will hit him every time I see this pervert.

name: aqgy5_0004_00000
chinese: 说好了下次我和他去约会，你要借给我。
english: We agreed that next time I will go on a date with him, and you need to lend me some money.

name: aqgy5_0004_00001
chinese: 自从上次派对英雄救美之后，她对我的印象有了质的飞跃。
english: Since the last time I saved the beauty at the party, her impression of me has made a qualitative leap.

name: aqgy5_0004_00002
chinese: 谁让我才是爱情公寓最有种的男人。
english: Who made me the most courageous man in the Love Apartment?

name: aqgy5_0004_00003
chinese: 老板说这三天收到的投诉比之前三个月还多。
english: The boss said that the number of complaints received in the past three days is even higher than the previous three months.

name: aqgy5_0004_00004
chinese: 老板是个好人，没跟我计较，还可以结了这几天的工钱。
english: The boss is a good person, he didn't argue with me, and I also received my wages for the past few days.

name: aqgy5_0004_00005
chinese: 我已经争取在楼下餐厅打工的机会，很快就会有工资啦。
english: I have been trying to get a job at the restaurant downstairs, and I will soon have a salary.

name: aqgy5_0004_00007
chinese: 店长嫌我笨，扣了半个月工资，还让我回来反省。
english: The store manager thinks I'm stupid, deducted half a month's salary, and asked me to come back for reflection.

name: aqgy5_0004_00008
chinese: 这么多衣服，真的没地儿搁。
english: There are so many clothes, there is really no place to put them.

name: aqgy5_0004_00009
chinese: 因为你是站在人类科技顶峰的男人。
english: Because you are the man standing at the pinnacle of human technology.

name: aqgy5_0004_00010
chinese: 梨花姑娘看我的合同非常满意，明天就会签约搬过来，我的房租有着落了。
english: The pear blossom girl is very satisfied with my contract and will sign it tomorrow and move in. My rent is settled.

name: aqgy5_0004_00011
chinese: 这是你第一次往家里拿工资，也是第一次补贴家用，我能不高兴吗。
english: This is your first time bringing home your salary and also the first time subsidizing the household expenses. Can I not be happy?

name: aqgy5_0004_00012
chinese: 我要去准备今天的节目了，你们慢吃，爱你呦。
english: I'm going to prepare today's program. Take your time eating, love you.

name: aqgy5_0004_00013
chinese: 你们真的好惨啊。
english: You guys are really pitiful.

name: aqgy5_0004_00014
chinese: 对不起嘛，我真的不是故意，你不要这样子了。
english: I'm sorry, I really didn't mean it, please don't be like this.

name: aqgy5_0004_00015
chinese: 你不会是想违约吧，要付三倍的违约金。
english: Are you trying to breach the contract? You will have to pay triple the penalty fee.

name: aqgy5_0004_00016
chinese: 这小子隐瞒身份进入公寓，动机不纯。
english: This guy entered the apartment while concealing his identity, with impure motives.

name: aqgy5_0004_00017
chinese: 现在，我要行使这项权利。
english: Now, I want to exercise this right.

name: aqgy5_0004_00018
chinese: 这么小的字，你坑我。
english: Such small words, you tricked me.

name: aqgy5_0004_00019
chinese: 我因为担心学姐才想搬进来住，没想到让她这么为难，所以我决定离开。
english: I wanted to move in because I was worried about my senior sister, but I didn't expect to make her so uncomfortable, so I have decided to leave.

name: aqgy5_0004_00020
chinese: 谁说我不开心，有个人跟我一起分担房租我可开心了。
english: Who said I'm not happy? I'm so happy to have someone to share the rent with me.

name: aqgy5_0005_00000
chinese: 爱是生命美妙的馈赠，酒是彼此心意的相通。
english: Love is the wonderful gift of life, and wine is the means of understanding each other's hearts.

name: aqgy5_0005_00001
chinese: 这是我为大家点的红酒。
english: This is the red wine I ordered for everyone.

name: aqgy5_0005_00002
chinese: 最近公园没吵架的情侣特别多，一吵架就分手，一分手就退租。
english: Recently, there are many couples in the park who don't argue. Once they argue, they break up, and once they break up, they terminate the lease.

name: aqgy5_0005_00003
chinese: 那还等什么，你放心去吧，这点小事包在我身上。
english: Then what are you waiting for? Don't worry, leave it to me, it's just a small matter.

name: aqgy5_0005_00004
chinese: 太好了大力，我们又能一起学习了。
english: Great, Dali! We can study together again.

name: aqgy5_0005_00005
chinese: 一菲和大力比较聪明，我们找他们帮忙啊。
english: Yifei and Dali are very smart, let's ask them for help.

name: aqgy5_0005_00006
chinese: 新人入住，感谢大家赏脸，这顿我来请。
english: Newcomer check-in, thank you all for coming, let me treat you this time.

name: aqgy5_0005_00007
chinese: 现在我事业有成，有漂亮的女友。
english: Now I have a successful career and a beautiful girlfriend.

name: aqgy5_0005_00008
chinese: 我决定把走廊改造成一条文化长廊。
english: I have decided to transform the corridor into a cultural gallery.

name: aqgy5_0005_00009
chinese: 内容以展现我国的大好河山，我们珍贵的友情，还有我伟大的形象为主。
english: The content showcases the beautiful rivers and mountains of our country, our precious friendship, and my great image as the main focus.

name: aqgy5_0005_00010
chinese: 积极配合的人，我会额外附赠他以后来我家开party的特权。
english: For people who actively cooperate, I will give them the privilege of hosting parties at my house in the future.

name: aqgy5_0005_00011
chinese: 我倒觉得我们应该把握住这个陶冶情操，展现才华的机会。
english: I think we should seize this opportunity to cultivate our sentiments and showcase our talents.

name: aqgy5_0005_00012
chinese: 大家尽情用智慧和爱挥洒笔墨吧！
english: Let's use our wisdom and love to freely express ourselves with our pens!

name: aqgy5_0005_00014
chinese: 这些颜色真好看，要是能涂上脸就好了。
english: These colors look so good, it would be great if I could paint them on my face.

name: aqgy5_0005_00015
chinese: 哇这么多化妆品！
english: Wow, so many cosmetics!

name: aqgy5_0005_00016
chinese: 才买了半个月就因为怀孕不敢用。
english: I dare not use it because I got pregnant just half a month after buying it.

name: aqgy5_0005_00017
chinese: 我发现我吃也吃不好，睡也睡不好，还多个人跟我抢床。
english: I found that I can't eat well, sleep well, and there are also people competing for my bed.

name: aqgy5_0005_00018
chinese: 你居然会主动打扫卫生。
english: You actually take the initiative to clean up.

name: aqgy5_0005_00019
chinese: 养家的焦虑居然把一个男人活生生的逼成了洁癖。
english: The anxiety of supporting a family unexpectedly turned a man into a neat freak.

name: aqgy5_0005_00020
chinese: 焦虑的时候不要做任何判断，先解决情绪问题。
english: When feeling anxious, do not make any judgments, first solve the emotional problem.

name: aqgy5_0005_00021
chinese: 毛茸茸的那种，还可以撒娇卖萌哒。
english: That kind of fluffy, can also act cute and sell cuteness.

name: aqgy5_0005_00022
chinese: 我就说嘛，怀孕太没劲了。
english: I told you, being pregnant is so boring.

name: aqgy5_0005_00023
chinese: 他前两天刚把子乔的西装弄坏。
english: He just ruined Ziqiao's suit a couple of days ago.

name: aqgy5_0005_00024
chinese: 别做梦了，你就是个备胎而已。
english: Stop dreaming, you're just a spare tire.

name: aqgy5_0005_00025
chinese: 没什么可说的，你问问他，他玩过多少男人。
english: There's nothing to say, you ask him how many men he has played with.

name: aqgy5_0005_00027
chinese: 我的女友，不但人美聪明学历高，玩游戏也是六的飞起啊。
english: My girlfriend is not only beautiful, intelligent and highly educated, but also very skilled at playing games.

name: aqgy5_0005_00028
chinese: 他确实比较有钱。
english: He is indeed quite wealthy.

name: aqgy5_0005_00029
chinese: 后来我就真的去找小黑了。
english: Later, I really went to find Xia Hei.

name: aqgy5_0005_00030
chinese: 小黑真的是太厉害了。
english: Xiaohei is really amazing.

name: aqgy5_0005_00031
chinese: 我们在一起都是我让着她，我一直在努力付出。
english: We are together because I always accommodate her, and I have been making efforts to give.

name: aqgy5_0005_00032
chinese: 拿出男人该有的样子来，不要计较得失。
english: Show the demeanor that a man should have, and don't worry about gains and losses.

name: aqgy5_0005_00033
chinese: 听说你成功的解决了两对情侣纠纷，我就知道我没看错人。
english: I heard that you successfully resolved two couples' disputes. I knew I didn't misjudge you.

name: aqgy5_0005_00034
chinese: 在我心里你一直是个有正义感的好律师。
english: In my heart, you have always been a righteous and good lawyer.

name: aqgy5_0005_00035
chinese: 大姐，你能不能找点靠谱的工具啊。
english: Big sister, can you find some reliable tools?

name: aqgy5_0005_00036
chinese: 我和诸葛律师都会帮助你的。
english: Both I and Lawyer Zhuge will help you.

name: aqgy5_0005_00037
chinese: 那我先下去了嘿嘿嘿。
english: Then I'll go down first, hehehe.

name: aqgy5_0005_00038
chinese: 姑奶奶你饶了我吧，我尽力了。
english: Granny, please spare me. I did my best.

name: aqgy5_0005_00039
chinese: 谢谢你们，又让我相信了爱情。
english: Thank you all, for making me believe in love again.

name: aqgy5_0005_00040
chinese: 谢谢你，张律师。
english: Thank you, Lawyer Zhang.

name: aqgy5_0005_00041
chinese: 嗯不错有想法啊，科技与艺术的完美结合，大气。
english: Well, it's good and has ideas. The perfect combination of technology and art, magnificent.

name: aqgy5_0005_00042
chinese: 感谢胡老师给了我这次创作的机会，让我意识到我居然有这么高的绘画天赋。
english: Thank you, Teacher Hu, for giving me the opportunity to create this time, which made me realize that I actually have such a high talent for painting.

name: aqgy5_0005_00043
chinese: 我深深的受到了启发。
english: I am deeply inspired.

name: aqgy5_0005_00044
chinese: 我请大家吃饭，庆祝装修正式启动。
english: I invite everyone to have a meal to celebrate the official start of the renovation.

name: aqgy5_0005_00045
chinese: 这都画的什么啊。
english: What is this drawing?

name: aqgy5_0006_00000
chinese: 说到底，还是因为张伟太抠不肯换椅子，大力才会摔的。
english: In the end, it was because Zhang Wei was too stingy to change the chair, so Da Li fell.

name: aqgy5_0006_00001
chinese: 你哪儿来的迷之自信啊？
english: Where does your mysterious confidence come from?

name: aqgy5_0006_00002
chinese: 测什么姻缘嘛，你一个律师怎么能提倡这种封建迷信呢？
english: Why engage in matchmaking? How can a lawyer like you advocate for such feudal superstitions?

name: aqgy5_0006_00003
chinese: 我也不会当真，我只是想打击一下这个备胎的嚣张气焰。
english: I don't take it seriously either, I just want to strike a blow to the arrogance of this spare tire.

name: aqgy5_0006_00004
chinese: 你哪懂女孩子的心思的。
english: You don't understand a girl's mind.

name: aqgy5_0006_00005
chinese: 不可能，我跟子乔感情好的很，我们天天撒狗粮，别人都眼红的不得了。
english: It's impossible. I have a very good relationship with Ziqiao. We show affection for each other every day, making others extremely jealous.

name: aqgy5_0006_00006
chinese: 多晚了你还没睡。
english: How late is it and you still haven't slept?

name: aqgy5_0006_00007
chinese: 幸福来的也太突然了吧！
english: Happiness comes too suddenly!!

name: aqgy5_0006_00008
chinese: 你不怪我，我已经谢天谢地了，怎么好意思呢。
english: You don't blame me, I'm already grateful, how can I have the audacity.

name: aqgy5_0006_00010
chinese: 人总要走出自己的舒适圈的。
english: People always need to step out of their comfort zone.

name: aqgy5_0006_00011
chinese: 这是我的心意，你要我退掉。
english: This is my intention, you want me to withdraw it.

name: aqgy5_0006_00013
chinese: 张伟你看你，劝劝去啊。
english: Zhang Wei, look at yourself. Advise yourself to go.

name: aqgy5_0006_00014
chinese: 你是真不知道啊，还是装不知道啊。
english: Are you really unaware, or are you pretending to be unaware?

name: aqgy5_0006_00015
chinese: 说着说着就开心了。
english: Speaking, speaking, I became happy.

name: aqgy5_0006_00016
chinese: 我这段日子太累了，我每天起的比鸡早，睡得比狗晚。
english: I have been exhausted these days. I wake up earlier than a chicken and sleep later than a dog every day.

name: aqgy5_0006_00017
chinese: 我真的是生不如死。
english: I really feel like I'd be better off dead.

name: aqgy5_0006_00018
chinese: 你这个大混蛋。
english: You big jerk.

name: aqgy5_0006_00019
chinese: 怎么又做梦了。
english: Why am I dreaming again?

name: aqgy5_0006_00020
chinese: 今天晚上的星星好美。
english: The stars tonight are so beautiful.

name: aqgy5_0006_00021
chinese: 我们多久没有像现在一样一起看星星了。
english: It has been a long time since we watched the stars together like we are now.

name: aqgy5_0006_00022
chinese: 我们有多久没有像现在一样，一起眺望星空了。
english: How long has it been since we last gazed at the stars together, just like now?

name: aqgy5_0006_00023
chinese: 我特别喜欢看星星，因为我曾经看到过流星。
english: I especially like watching stars because I have seen shooting stars before.

name: aqgy5_0006_00024
chinese: 那个时候我就许愿，我说我一定会遇到自己的白马王子。
english: At that time, I made a wish and said that I would definitely meet my Prince Charming.

name: aqgy5_0006_00025
chinese: 我也好想好想能够再看到流星。
english: I really really want to be able to see shooting stars again.

name: aqgy5_0006_00026
chinese: 我希望，我们能永远永远永远永远永远，永永远远都在一起。
english: I hope that we can be together forever, forever, forever, and ever, and ever, and ever.

name: aqgy5_0006_00027
chinese: 产妇有严重的产前抑郁。
english: The pregnant woman has severe antenatal depression.

name: aqgy5_0006_00028
chinese: 千万不要让孕妇不开心。
english: Do not make pregnant women unhappy.

name: aqgy5_0006_00029
chinese: 医生说你跟孩子的状况都挺好的，叫你放宽心回去好好休息。
english: The doctor said that both you and the child are in good condition, and asked you to relax and go back to rest well.

name: aqgy5_0006_00031
chinese: 我们回去的时候能不能去趟大卖场，子乔最喜欢吃里边的麻辣烫了。
english: When we go back, can we go to the big supermarket? Ziqiao likes to eat the spicy hot pot there.

name: aqgy5_0006_00032
chinese: 我做了一样能让我和张伟重归于好的东西。
english: I did something that could reconcile me and Zhang Wei.

name: aqgy5_0006_00033
chinese: 你还生我的气吗？
english: Are you still mad at me?

name: aqgy5_0006_00034
chinese: 你把我们宝宝基金的钱的钱拿去做什么了？
english: What did you do with the money from our baby fund?

name: aqgy5_0006_00035
chinese: 你是去赌博了，还在外面养了别的女人？
english: Did you go gambling and have another woman outside?

name: aqgy5_0007_00000
chinese: 完了，美嘉拿走抽屉里的钱，还把手机留下了。
english: It's over. Meijia took the money from the drawer and left the phone behind.

name: aqgy5_0007_00001
chinese: 从第五次开始，密码输错的锁定时间会越来越长。
english: Starting from the fifth attempt, the lockout time for entering the wrong password will become longer and longer.

name: aqgy5_0007_00002
chinese: 那我只剩下最后五次机会了。
english: Then I only have five chances left.

name: aqgy5_0007_00003
chinese: 还是不对啊。
english: It's still not right.

name: aqgy5_0007_00004
chinese: 你还有最后五次机会，你好好想想，美嘉到底会用什么样的密码。
english: You have five more chances. Think carefully, what kind of password would Meijia use?

name: aqgy5_0007_00005
chinese: 咱们从最近的医院开始找，有任何消息随时联络。
english: Let's start by looking for the nearest hospital, contact me anytime if there is any news.

name: aqgy5_0007_00006
chinese: 看在你今天表现良好的份儿，我可以提前把它接下来。
english: Based on your good performance today, I can take it in advance.

name: aqgy5_0007_00007
chinese: 今天玩的实在是太开心了。
english: I had so much fun today.

name: aqgy5_0007_00008
chinese: 我好像把密码给忘了。
english: I seem to have forgotten the password.

name: aqgy5_0007_00009
chinese: 啊，难不成我要一生一世带着这个东西。
english: Ah, could it be that I have to carry this thing for my whole life?

name: aqgy5_0007_00010
chinese: 我就喜欢你跟着我。
english: I just like you following me.

name: aqgy5_0007_00011
chinese: 你就乖乖带着吧，等我回家就给你解开。
english: You just obediently wear it, I will untie it for you when I get home.

name: aqgy5_0007_00012
chinese: 这是反方向的车，你下来啊。
english: This is the opposite direction car, get off.

name: aqgy5_0007_00013
chinese: 这是好事儿啊，恭喜啊。
english: This is a good thing, congratulations.

name: aqgy5_0007_00014
chinese: 太可疑了，胡一菲这么鬼鬼祟祟一定是不想让曾小贤知道。
english: It's too suspicious. Hu Yifei is acting so sneaky, he must not want Zeng Xiaoxian to know.

name: aqgy5_0007_00015
chinese: 你这么优秀，想必不会让他太担心吧。
english: You are so outstanding, I'm sure he won't worry too much.

name: aqgy5_0007_00016
chinese: 我和小贤感情好着呢，您别操心。
english: Xiaoxian and I have a good relationship, please don't worry.

name: aqgy5_0007_00017
chinese: 我不想再猜了。
english: I don't want to guess anymore.

name: aqgy5_0007_00019
chinese: 你振作一点，你再好好想想。
english: Pull yourself together and think carefully again.

name: aqgy5_0007_00020
chinese: 那肯定是我和心上人第一次相遇的场面，不管过多久，都永远不会忘记的。
english: That must be the scene when my crush and I first met, no matter how long it has been, it will never be forgotten.

name: aqgy5_0007_00021
chinese: 有了钱就可以去还债了。
english: With money, you can repay your debts.

name: aqgy5_0007_00022
chinese: 多谢刚才出手相助。
english: Thanks a lot for lending a helping hand just now.

name: aqgy5_0007_00023
chinese: 要不我帮你数数吧，你想想还有吗？
english: How about I help you count? Do you think there are any more?

name: aqgy5_0007_00024
chinese: 想不起来也没关系，跟我们走，我们帮你回忆。
english: It's okay if you can't remember, come with us and we'll help you recall.

name: aqgy5_0007_00025
chinese: 你谁阿，少管闲事。
english: Who are you? Mind your own business.

name: aqgy5_0007_00026
chinese: 你这个臭婆娘啊，你在外边到底欠了多少钱啊。
english: How much money do you owe outside, you stinky woman?

name: aqgy5_0007_00027
chinese: 老公，我们还完债还可以重新开始的。
english: Husband, we can start over after we pay off the debt.

name: aqgy5_0007_00028
chinese: 追债追出人命啦。
english: Chasing after debts has resulted in loss of life.

name: aqgy5_0007_00029
chinese: 你别胡说，他明明是被你盐汽水喷死的。
english: Don't talk nonsense, he was clearly killed by you spraying salt soda on him.

name: aqgy5_0007_00030
chinese: 我一口盐汽水喷死你！
english: I will spray you to death with a mouthful of salt soda water!

name: aqgy5_0007_00031
chinese: 你记得时间有什么用啊。
english: What is the use of time, do you remember?

name: aqgy5_0007_00032
chinese: 你还不害臊，这么多人呢。
english: You're not ashamed yet, with so many people here.

name: aqgy5_0007_00033
chinese: 子乔都急死了。
english: Ziqiao is very anxious.

name: aqgy5_0007_00034
chinese: 对不起，我昨天晚上确实瞒着你，我给你道歉但是你别胡思乱想。
english: I'm sorry, I did hide something from you last night. I apologize to you, but please don't overthink it.

name: aqgy5_0007_00035
chinese: 现在做代餐小蛋糕，我觉得是个很好的机会。
english: Now making meal replacement cupcakes, I think it's a great opportunity.

name: aqgy5_0007_00036
chinese: 本来就没生气啊，看你紧张的这个怂样。
english: I wasn't angry in the first place. Look at how nervous you are, acting like a coward.

name: aqgy5_0007_00037
chinese: 那你乱跑什么啊？
english: Then why are you running around?

name: aqgy5_0007_00038
chinese: 我早上起床就想通啦。
english: I woke up and figured it out in the morning.

name: aqgy5_0007_00040
chinese: 都是些来钱快，又没人愿意干的活。
english: All of these are quick money-making jobs that no one is willing to do.

name: aqgy5_0008_00000
chinese: 拜托，你们做托儿能不能专业一点。
english: Please, can you be more professional in taking care of children?

name: aqgy5_0008_00001
chinese: 比你们刷的弹幕还水。
english: The barrage you guys are brushing is even more watery.

name: aqgy5_0008_00002
chinese: 能不能有点干货啊？
english: Can we have some practical content?

name: aqgy5_0008_00003
chinese: 我直播有那么烂吗？
english: Is my live streaming so bad?:

name: aqgy5_0008_00004
chinese: 专注工作的男人好帅。
english: The man who focuses on his work is handsome.

name: aqgy5_0008_00005
chinese: 之前的设计方案我不是很满意。
english: I am not very satisfied with the previous design proposal.

name: aqgy5_0008_00006
chinese: 我突然有了灵感，就画了下来。
english: I suddenly had inspiration, so I drew it down.

name: aqgy5_0008_00007
chinese: 我其他的时间都安排好了，这敲不了墙其他工序都得等着。
english: I have already scheduled all my other time, so I can't knock down the wall. The other processes will have to wait.

name: aqgy5_0008_00008
chinese: 我会好好沟通的。
english: I will communicate well.

name: aqgy5_0008_00009
chinese: 那火的也是性感助理，有你什么事啊？
english: That fire is also a sexy assistant, what's your business?

name: aqgy5_0008_00010
chinese: 你的人设就就是一个肉不能停的直爽大帅哥。
english: Your persona is a straightforward and handsome guy who never stops being charming.

name: aqgy5_0008_00011
chinese: 但你就不一样，你狠洒脱。
english: But you are different, you are very free-spirited.

name: aqgy5_0008_00012
chinese: 我觉得她说的有道理啊，你可以试试。
english: I think what she said makes sense, you can give it a try.

name: aqgy5_0008_00013
chinese: 正好我去设计下小蛋糕的新包装，我们俩一起努力。
english: Just when I was about to design a new packaging for the cupcakes, let's work together.

name: aqgy5_0008_00014
chinese: 你们就是老王介绍来的敲墙工人吧。
english: Are you the wall workers introduced by Old Wang?

name: aqgy5_0008_00015
chinese: 欢迎来到肉不能停的直爽小布直播间。
english: Welcome to the straightforward Little Bu's live broadcast room where meat never stops.

name: aqgy5_0008_00016
chinese: 我吃固我在，吃肉最爽快。
english: I eat when I'm hungry, eating meat is the most enjoyable.

name: aqgy5_0008_00017
chinese: 很多朋友很纠结，到底是选身材还是美食，哥从不纠结，我选鸡腿。
english: Many friends are torn between choosing their figure or food, but I am never torn. I choose chicken legs.

name: aqgy5_0008_00018
chinese: 这大猪蹄儿啊，真是太好吃了。
english: This pig's trotter is so delicious.

name: aqgy5_0008_00019
chinese: 糟了，人数下降了。
english: Oops, the number of people has decreased.

name: aqgy5_0008_00020
chinese: 你的这两个工人，何止是普通话不好，他们根本就不懂普通话啊。
english: Your two workers, not only do they have poor Mandarin, but they don't understand Mandarin at all.

name: aqgy5_0008_00021
chinese: 我三叉神经好痛啊。
english: My trigeminal nerve hurts so much.

name: aqgy5_0008_00022
chinese: 都什么年代了，居然还有人听不懂普通话。
english: What era is it? There are still people who can't understand Mandarin.

name: aqgy5_0008_00023
chinese: 呦，张律师这么厉害。
english: Hey, Lawyer Zhang is so awesome.

name: aqgy5_0008_00024
chinese: 到时候要是被告欺诈我都帮不了你。
english: If you are accused of fraud, I won't be able to help you.

name: aqgy5_0008_00025
chinese: 看不出来啊，还真有你的。
english: I didn't expect that, you really have it.

name: aqgy5_0008_00026
chinese: 快为我的沟通能力点赞。
english: Please give a thumbs up for my communication skills.

name: aqgy5_0008_00027
chinese: 他们怎么就能不明白呢。
english: How can they not understand?

name: aqgy5_0008_00028
chinese: 你想什么呢你？
english: What are you thinking?

name: aqgy5_0008_00029
chinese: 小蛋糕的新包装上次那个你们说不好，我就重新设计了一个，这次绝对惊艳。
english: The new packaging of the cupcakes that you said was not good last time, I redesigned it and this time it will definitely be stunning.

name: aqgy5_0008_00030
chinese: 好消息，我已经把五十箱小蛋糕全都卖出去了。
english: Good news, I have sold all fifty boxes of cupcakes.

name: aqgy5_0008_00031
chinese: 太好了，我就说游戏天才这个人设定好吧。
english: Great, I knew the character of a gaming genius was set well.

name: aqgy5_0008_00032
chinese: 当然是靠我喽。
english: Of course, it depends on me.

name: aqgy5_0008_00033
chinese: 没想到啊，吕子乔还有铁杆粉丝呢。
english: I didn't expect it, but Lv Ziqiao still has die-hard fans.

name: aqgy5_0008_00034
chinese: 抱歉啊，我们开直播开了好几天了，还没开张呢，所以他才不肯退你的。
english: Sorry, we have been live streaming for several days, but we haven't officially opened yet, so that's why he refuses to refund you.

name: aqgy5_0008_00035
chinese: 都没有你这个灵魂画师受欢迎，有你的啊。
english: No soul painter is as popular as you, there is you.

name: aqgy5_0008_00036
chinese: 一定可以卖出好多好多箱的。
english: We can definitely sell a lot of boxes.

name: aqgy5_0008_00037
chinese: 名字我都想好了，就叫它嘿凤梨小蛋糕。
english: I have already thought of a name for it, let's call it "Hey Pineapple Cupcake".

name: aqgy5_0008_00038
chinese: 你商业头脑还是很厉害嘛。
english: Your business acumen is still impressive.

name: aqgy5_0009_00000
chinese: 这个饮料瓶子好可爱，买！
english: This drink bottle is so cute, I want to buy it!

name: aqgy5_0009_00001
chinese: 买满十瓶送游乐园门票，来二十瓶。
english: Buy ten bottles and get a free amusement park ticket. I want twenty bottles.

name: aqgy5_0009_00002
chinese: 有人吗，你们谁帮我砍个价呀？
english: Is anyone there? Can one of you help me negotiate a price?

name: aqgy5_0009_00003
chinese: 我以前买东西确实有点冲动，那主要是因为寂寞嘛。
english: I used to be a bit impulsive when buying things, mainly because I was lonely.

name: aqgy5_0009_00004
chinese: 他是那种阳光型欧巴，笑起来特别温暖。
english: He is the kind of sunshine-type oppa, his smile is especially warm.

name: aqgy5_0009_00005
chinese: 你们肯定见过他，就在苏宁小店上班。
english: You must have seen him, he works at Suning convenience store.

name: aqgy5_0009_00006
chinese: 趁热吃，还有这是我送你的。
english: Eat it while it's hot, and this is my gift for you.

name: aqgy5_0009_00007
chinese: 连爱心手牌都做出来了，难道阿杰是认真的。
english: Even the heart-shaped cards are made, is Ajie serious?

name: aqgy5_0009_00008
chinese: 是不是很优秀？
english: Are you excellent?

name: aqgy5_0009_00009
chinese: 想吃什么随便点我请客。
english: Whatever you want to eat, just click on me and I'll treat you.

name: aqgy5_0009_00010
chinese: 母婴水买一送一券，我去小店买两瓶。
english: Buy one get one free coupon for mother and baby water, I will go to the small store to buy two bottles.

name: aqgy5_0009_00011
chinese: 天气预报说，两天之后你那儿就要下雪了。
english: The weather forecast says that it will snow in your area in two days.

name: aqgy5_0009_00012
chinese: 我要买的东西全都躺在这，只要有朝一日我凑齐了所有的优惠券我就会一次性出手，清空购物车。
english: The things I want to buy are all lying here. As long as one day I gather all the coupons, I will make a one-time purchase and empty the shopping cart.

name: aqgy5_0009_00014
chinese: 现在正在外地，上节目推销小蛋糕呢。
english: I am currently out of town, promoting cupcakes on a show.

name: aqgy5_0009_00015
chinese: 大半夜鬼哭狼嚎的，你简直是个杀马特。
english: Crying and howling in the middle of the night, you're simply a "kill-matte" (a derogatory term for someone with a unique and unconventional style).

name: aqgy5_0009_00016
chinese: 你们误会了。
english: You misunderstood.

name: aqgy5_0009_00017
chinese: 除了职业素养，我没有半毛钱私人感情掺杂在里面。
english: Apart from professional ethics, I have no personal emotions mixed in it, not even a penny.

name: aqgy5_0009_00018
chinese: 让她不要再缠着我了。
english: Ask her not to bother me anymore.

name: aqgy5_0009_00019
chinese: 大家都要吃饭呀，万一她不高兴，给我差评会扣我奖金的。
english: Everyone needs to eat. In case she is not happy and gives me a negative review, it will deduct my bonus.

name: aqgy5_0009_00020
chinese: 你是怎么搞定他们的？
english: How did you manage to handle them?

name: aqgy5_0009_00021
chinese: 那我们小蛋糕的销量，会直线上升啊。
english: Our small cakes' sales will increase linearly.

name: aqgy5_0009_00022
chinese: 你要是真的下定决心，我可以帮你啊。
english: If you are really determined, I can help you.

name: aqgy5_0009_00023
chinese: 这个厨房手套好可爱啊。
english: This kitchen glove is so cute.

name: aqgy5_0009_00024
chinese: 你放心，我最自觉了，小时候考试没考好都不用老师说。
english: You can rest assured, I am the most self-disciplined. Even when I didn't do well on exams in my childhood, the teacher didn't need to say anything.

name: aqgy5_0009_00025
chinese: 走开，别妨碍我工作。
english: Go away, don't disturb me while I'm working.

name: aqgy5_0009_00026
chinese: 宾果甜品店服务态度不行啊。
english: The service attitude of Bingo Dessert Shop is not good.

name: aqgy5_0009_00027
chinese: 热心服务好每一个客户，是我们的责任。
english: It is our responsibility to provide enthusiastic and good service to every customer.

name: aqgy5_0009_00028
chinese: 你对我真好。
english: You are really good to me.

name: aqgy5_0009_00029
chinese: 你就像金桔柠檬酸酸甜甜。
english: You are like kumquat lemon, sour and sweet.

name: aqgy5_0009_00030
chinese: 我们在一起就像桃桃红柚，满满的甜蜜与幸福。
english: We are together like peaches and grapefruits, full of sweetness and happiness.

name: aqgy5_0009_00031
chinese: 曾经有个美丽的少女，他很喜欢玩宾果消消消，少女的生活和宾果消消消一样多彩欢乐。
english: Once upon a time, there was a beautiful girl who loved playing Bingo Blast. The girl's life was as colorful and joyful as Bingo Blast.

name: aqgy5_0009_00032
chinese: 我知道了，你是想告诉美嘉姐，只要坚持就一定有好结果对吧。
english: I understand, you want to tell Mia that as long as she persists, there will definitely be good results, right?

name: aqgy5_0009_00033
chinese: 我是不是天下最漂亮的小姐姐。
english: Am I the most beautiful girl in the world?:

name: aqgy5_0009_00034
chinese: 今天再接再厉。
english: Keep up the good work today.

name: aqgy5_0009_00035
chinese: 这是打扮给阿杰看的。
english: This is dressed up for A Jie to see.

name: aqgy5_0009_00036
chinese: 你说阿杰想什么呢，怎么还不和我表白。
english: What is Ajie thinking? Why hasn't he confessed to me yet?

name: aqgy5_0009_00037
chinese: 要是你知道别人心里想什么，早该追到大力了。
english: If you knew what others were thinking, you would have caught up with Dali long ago.

name: aqgy5_0009_00038
chinese: 你真的是太有才了。
english: You are really talented.

name: aqgy5_0009_00039
chinese: 人家只是想多和你说几句话。
english: I just want to talk to you a little more.

name: aqgy5_0009_00040
chinese: 赵海棠你不要太过分。
english: Zhao Haitang, don't go too far.

name: aqgy5_0009_00041
chinese: 你每天占用我的工作时间，我完不成论文一定找你算账。
english: You occupy my working time every day, I will definitely hold you accountable if I can't complete my paper.

name: aqgy5_0009_00042
chinese: 前两天我确实太自私了，不应该一个人缠着你。
english: The past two days, I was indeed too selfish. I shouldn't have been clinging to you alone.

name: aqgy5_0009_00043
chinese: 我请大家喝大梨海糖汁。
english: I invite everyone to drink pear sea sugar juice.

name: aqgy5_0009_00044
chinese: 阿杰刚刚跟我摊牌了，他说我们只是普通朋友。
english: Ajie just had a talk with me, he said we are just ordinary friends.

name: aqgy5_0009_00045
chinese: 以后你还会遇到像彭于晏一样的小哥哥或者赵又廷一样的小哥哥。
english: In the future, you will still meet little brothers like Eddie Peng or little brothers like Mark Chao.

name: aqgy5_0009_00046
chinese: 就像对苏宁小哥，来之前永远心潮澎湃，满怀期待。
english: Just like the Suning delivery guy, always excited and full of anticipation before he arrives.

name: aqgy5_0010_00000
chinese: 你们别为难子乔了，他好不容易才拿到这个赞助。
english: Don't make it difficult for Ziqiao, he finally managed to get this sponsorship.

name: aqgy5_0010_00001
chinese: 这一段我是在网上抄的，写这东西我又不擅长。
english: I copied this paragraph from the internet, and I am not good at writing this stuff.

name: aqgy5_0010_00002
chinese: 你文笔比较好，你帮我们写一个。
english: Your writing skills are good, can you help us write one?

name: aqgy5_0010_00003
chinese: 人生总有背的时候，会过去的。
english: There are always setbacks in life, but they will pass.

name: aqgy5_0010_00004
chinese: 让你调节几个社区纠纷，怎么弄得跟打了群架一样，什么情况。
english: How did you manage to turn a few community disputes into a full-blown brawl? What happened?

name: aqgy5_0010_00005
chinese: 现在这样，严重影响了我的工作。
english: Now like this, it seriously affects my work.

name: aqgy5_0010_00006
chinese: 从法律上来讲，这起事故，三位都有责任。
english: Legally speaking, all three individuals are responsible for this accident.

name: aqgy5_0010_00007
chinese: 你没有把车停在指定的停车位，也是造成这起事故的重要原因。
english: You did not park the car in the designated parking space, which is also a significant factor contributing to this accident.

name: aqgy5_0010_00008
chinese: 患难见真情啊等，等我调节完了好好报答一下各位。
english: In times of trouble, true feelings are revealed. Wait for me to adjust and I will repay everyone properly.

name: aqgy5_0010_00009
chinese: 女士们先生们大家好，很荣幸被邀请来参加这次健身比赛的颁奖。
english: Ladies and gentlemen, hello everyone. It is an honor to be invited to attend the award ceremony of this fitness competition.

name: aqgy5_0010_00010
chinese: 再给我点灵感吧。
english: Give me some inspiration again.

name: aqgy5_0010_00011
chinese: 哎呀你别听他瞎说，你变成什么样我都喜欢。
english: Oh, don't listen to him. I like you no matter how you change.

name: aqgy5_0010_00012
chinese: 太好了，这样调解起来就轻松多了。
english: Great, it will be much easier to mediate like this.

name: aqgy5_0010_00013
chinese: 桌子都拍坏了还是没调解成功。
english: The tables are all broken or the mediation was unsuccessful.

name: aqgy5_0010_00014
chinese: 为了那几个破灭火器，我头都想破了。
english: For those few extinguishers, I'm going crazy.

name: aqgy5_0010_00015
chinese: 我特别换的这张漂亮的桌子，来让大家感受一下大自然，去去戾气。
english: I specially changed this beautiful table to let everyone feel the nature and get rid of negative energy.

name: aqgy5_0010_00016
chinese: 这是本律所的诊所之宝，一定可以让你焦虑的心情平复下来。
english: This is the treasure of our law firm's clinic, it will definitely help calm down your anxious mood.

name: aqgy5_0010_00017
chinese: 可怜我家旺旺又被那坏人给弄伤了。
english: My poor dog Wangwang was hurt by that bad person again.

name: aqgy5_0010_00018
chinese: 我就说嘛，大家都是好邻居，怎么会这么做嘛。
english: I knew it, everyone is a good neighbor, why would they do this?

name: aqgy5_0010_00019
chinese: 果然和我很般配。
english: We are indeed a perfect match.

name: aqgy5_0010_00020
chinese: 大自然赐予我灵感吧。
english: Nature, give me inspiration.

name: aqgy5_0010_00021
chinese: 写不出来直说，没人会看不起你的。
english: If you can't write it, just say it. No one will look down on you.

name: aqgy5_0010_00022
chinese: 谁说我写不出来，子乔呢，我念给他听。
english: Who said I can't write it? Where is Ziqiao? I will read it to him.

name: aqgy5_0010_00023
chinese: 我怎么会写出这么恶心的东西，难道是因为那张桌子太恶心了。
english: How could I write such disgusting stuff? Is it because that table is so disgusting?

name: aqgy5_0010_00024
chinese: 你不会是在找借口吧？
english: Are you trying to make excuses?

name: aqgy5_0010_00025
chinese: 我觉得写得挺好的。
english: I think it's written quite well.

name: aqgy5_0010_00026
chinese: 连张伟都觉得写得好的东西肯定烂透了。
english: Even Zhang Wei thinks that something written well must be terrible.

name: aqgy5_0010_00027
chinese: 感谢你帮我调解案。
english: Thank you for helping me mediate the case.

name: aqgy5_0010_00028
chinese: 喝不下，模型烧惨了，老子现在很不爽。
english: Can't drink it, the model is burnt, I'm very unhappy now.

name: aqgy5_0010_00029
chinese: 是我不好，要是我不把蜡烛乱丢就不会失火了。
english: It's my fault. If I didn't throw the candles around, there wouldn't have been a fire.

name: aqgy5_0010_00030
chinese: 你桌子没了，我演讲词怎么办啊。
english: Your desk is gone, what should I do with my speech?

name: aqgy5_0011_00000
chinese: 这是我第一次负责这个比赛，我们的目标只有一个就是夺冠。
english: This is my first time being in charge of this competition, and our goal is only one, which is to win the championship.

name: aqgy5_0011_00001
chinese: 很高兴有这么多人自愿报名。
english: It's great to have so many people volunteering.

name: aqgy5_0011_00002
chinese: 爱情公寓一定会一雪前耻，重振辉煌。
english: Love Apartment will definitely redeem itself and regain its glory.

name: aqgy5_0011_00003
chinese: 你本来就很优秀。
english: You are already very excellent.

name: aqgy5_0011_00004
chinese: 你们会得到所有人的尊敬。
english: You will earn the respect of everyone.

name: aqgy5_0011_00005
chinese: 餐厅那边打工也不是长久之计。
english: Working in a restaurant is not a long-term plan.

name: aqgy5_0011_00007
chinese: 对于网络小说糟糕的现状，我一直痛心疾首。
english: I have always been deeply saddened by the terrible state of online novels.

name: aqgy5_0011_00008
chinese: 一听就很适合我，说不定还能大神切磋一下。
english: It suits me as soon as I hear it, maybe I can also learn from the experts.

name: aqgy5_0011_00009
chinese: 我要是做了网文编辑的话，就可以穿着职业装，喝着咖啡，和各种有才华的作者沟通。
english: If I become a web content editor, I can wear professional attire, drink coffee, and communicate with various talented authors.

name: aqgy5_0011_00010
chinese: 要是能遇到，有文采又长的帅的，就更好了。
english: If I could meet someone who is both eloquent and handsome, that would be even better.

name: aqgy5_0011_00011
chinese: 可我最近瓶颈了，一点灵感也没有的。
english: But recently I've hit a bottleneck, and I have no inspiration at all.

name: aqgy5_0011_00012
chinese: 码字是网文作者的工作，一天写不出来读者就一天没有东西看。
english: Writing is the job of online writers. If they don't write anything in a day, readers will have nothing to read.

name: aqgy5_0011_00013
chinese: 我的目标是实习结束前敲满一百次。
english: My goal is to complete 100 knocks before the end of the internship.

name: aqgy5_0011_00014
chinese: 好像认识一下大神级的作者。
english: It seems like I want to get to know an author at the god-like level.

name: aqgy5_0011_00015
chinese: 还参加什么两人三足比赛呀，这才叫生活。
english: What kind of two-person three-legged race are you still participating in? This is what life is all about.

name: aqgy5_0011_00016
chinese: 实在是太残暴了，光热身让我们跑个10公里，跑完命都没了。
english: It's really brutal. Just warming up made us run 10 kilometers, and we were completely exhausted after running.

name: aqgy5_0011_00017
chinese: 大白天在这里泡脚喝茶，真当自己是老大爷。
english: Soaking feet and drinking tea here in broad daylight, thinking oneself as a big boss.

name: aqgy5_0011_00018
chinese: 我们受了非人折磨，需要休养生息。
english: We have been tortured inhumanly and need to recuperate.

name: aqgy5_0011_00019
chinese: 遥控器就在这儿，你自己不会换啊。
english: The remote control is right here, can't you change it yourself?

name: aqgy5_0011_00020
chinese: 还好大力有先见之明，早料到你们会逃走。
english: Fortunately, Dalai has foresight and predicted early on that you would escape.

name: aqgy5_0011_00022
chinese: 两人三足，我自己怎么练？
english: Two people, three legs, how do I practice by myself?

name: aqgy5_0011_00023
chinese: 我一定不会辜负你的，我会好好训练。
english: I will definitely not let you down, I will train well.

name: aqgy5_0011_00024
chinese: 我感觉，有股力量在我身后，像一阵风推着我前进。
english: I feel a force behind me, pushing me forward like a gust of wind.

name: aqgy5_0011_00025
chinese: 谁呀真没公德心。
english: Who is so shameless and lacks common decency.

name: aqgy5_0011_00026
chinese: 我都快没信心了。
english: I'm losing confidence.

name: aqgy5_0011_00027
chinese: 给你一次敲锣的机会。
english: Give you a chance to strike the gong.

name: aqgy5_0011_00028
chinese: 这就是你想要的成就感，继续努力吧。
english: This is the sense of achievement you wanted, keep working hard.

name: aqgy5_0011_00029
chinese: 我送给你的礼物。
english: The gift I gave you.

name: aqgy5_0011_00030
chinese: 谢谢，我很喜欢这个。
english: Thank you, I really like this.

name: aqgy5_0011_00031
chinese: 我家猫也最喜欢纸盒了，谢谢你把我的猫救出来。
english: My cat also loves cardboard boxes the most. Thank you for rescuing my cat.

name: aqgy5_0011_00032
chinese: 这代表我和宝宝一起为他们打call。
english: This represents me and the baby cheering for them together.

name: aqgy5_0011_00033
chinese: 只要你听话叔叔给你买糖吃。
english: As long as you behave, uncle will buy you candy to eat.

name: aqgy5_0011_00034
chinese: 你们昨天吃饭的时候到底说什么了？
english: What did you guys say when you were eating yesterday?

name: aqgy5_0011_00035
chinese: 是我搞砸的，我们两个可能不适合这份工作。
english: It's my fault, the two of us may not be suitable for this job.

name: aqgy5_0011_00036
chinese: 没用的，有些事情不是努力就能改变的。
english: It's useless. Some things cannot be changed just by working hard.

name: aqgy5_0011_00037
chinese: 所以，你们想要放弃了？
english: So, do you want to give up?

name: aqgy5_0011_00038
chinese: 你看两个人三足比赛，我老公超厉害的。
english: You see a two-person three-legged race, my husband is super amazing.

name: aqgy5_0011_00039
chinese: 你们怎么来啦。
english: How did you all come here?

name: aqgy5_0011_00040
chinese: 我们这么努力，但凡有点天赋也该有成功的迹象了。
english: We have worked so hard, there should be some signs of success if there is any talent.

name: aqgy5_0011_00041
chinese: 现在一点儿迹象都没有，感觉像是在浪费时间。
english: There are no signs at all now, it feels like a waste of time.

name: aqgy5_0011_00042
chinese: 我们真的不是这块料，一菲都拿我们没办法。
english: We really aren't cut out for this, Yifei can't do anything to us.

name: aqgy5_0011_00043
chinese: 你们真的甘心向生活妥协吗？
english: Are you really willing to compromise with life?

name: aqgy5_0011_00046
chinese: 我认真看了你的小说，很喜欢你笔下的女主角。
english: I carefully read your novel and really like the female protagonist you portrayed.

name: aqgy5_0011_00047
chinese: 少骗人了，你们就是想让我交稿。
english: Stop deceiving people, you just want me to submit my work.

name: aqgy5_0012_00000
chinese: 我爱酒吧，弥漫着帅哥的味道。
english: I love bars, filled with the scent of handsome guys.

name: aqgy5_0012_00001
chinese: 理想很美好，现实很残酷。
english: Ideals are beautiful, reality is cruel.

name: aqgy5_0012_00002
chinese: 好看不能当饭吃，再好看也得有本事。
english: Good looks alone won't feed you, even if you're good-looking, you still need skills.

name: aqgy5_0012_00003
chinese: 虽然好看不能当饭吃，但是多看看小帅哥小鲜肉心情就是愉悦。
english: Although good-looking cannot be eaten as a meal, but looking at handsome boys and fresh meat can bring joy to the mood.

name: aqgy5_0012_00004
chinese: 我不正赶上超市大促销嘛，买的越多越划算。
english: I didn't catch the supermarket's big promotion, the more you buy, the more cost-effective.

name: aqgy5_0012_00005
chinese: 免费试用这种好事从来都不会落在我的头上。
english: I never get the chance to try out these good things for free.

name: aqgy5_0012_00006
chinese: 看来我要时来运转了。
english: It seems that my luck is about to turn around.

name: aqgy5_0012_00007
chinese: 遇人不淑吧，毕竟很多渣男不是一天两天就能认清的。
english: It's not easy to find the right person, after all, it takes time to recognize many scumbags.

name: aqgy5_0012_00008
chinese: 我一看到帅哥就星星眼，控制不住啊。
english: Whenever I see a handsome guy, my eyes sparkle and I can't control myself.

name: aqgy5_0012_00009
chinese: 我可以帮你制定计划提升颜值。
english: I can help you develop a plan to improve your appearance.

name: aqgy5_0012_00010
chinese: 美女能请你喝一杯。
english: Can I invite you to have a drink, beautiful lady?

name: aqgy5_0012_00011
chinese: 你是我见过最美的眼镜女孩。
english: You are the most beautiful glasses girl I have ever seen.

name: aqgy5_0012_00012
chinese: 你和我以前认识的所有男生都不一样，你比他们都好。
english: You are different from all the boys I used to know, you are better than all of them.

name: aqgy5_0012_00013
chinese: 原来约会聊天可以这么开心。
english: I didn't expect that dating and chatting could be so much fun.

name: aqgy5_0012_00014
chinese: 跟你开玩笑的，毕竟你是第一个我不看外貌就好感的朋友。
english: I'm just kidding with you, after all, you are the first friend I have a good impression of without considering appearance.

name: aqgy5_0012_00015
chinese: 我相信，你一定是个好人。
english: I believe you must be a good person.

name: aqgy5_0012_00016
chinese: 我从来没有见过像你一样坦诚的人。
english: I have never met someone as honest as you.

name: aqgy5_0012_00017
chinese: 她温柔体贴真诚幽默。
english: She is gentle, considerate, sincere, and humorous.

name: aqgy5_0012_00018
chinese: 你觉得我怎么样。
english: What do you think of me?

name: aqgy5_0012_00019
chinese: 你好伟大。
english: You are truly admirable.

name: aqgy5_0012_00020
chinese: 你也觉得我是一个只有一张脸的草包。
english: You also think I am a fool with only one face.

name: aqgy5_0012_00021
chinese: 你为什么不喜欢我？
english: Why don't you like me?

name: aqgy5_0012_00022
chinese: 喜欢和爱不是一回事儿。
english: Liking and loving are not the same thing.

name: aqgy5_0012_00023
chinese: 人家看见帅哥开心嘛，我要把前天没吃的都给补回来。
english: When I see a handsome guy, I feel happy. I want to make up for the food I didn't eat the day before yesterday.

name: aqgy5_0012_00024
chinese: 告诉你个好消息，我们打算再也不用颜值平均眼镜了。
english: I have good news for you. We no longer need to use average looks glasses.

name: aqgy5_0012_00025
chinese: 你们说的那些，我都不在意了。
english: I don't care about what you guys said anymore.

name: aqgy5_0012_00026
chinese: 是我和大力迎着日出，肩并着肩，幸福的跑着。
english: It's me and Dalai running towards the sunrise, shoulder to shoulder, happily.

name: aqgy5_0012_00027
chinese: 我相信，总有一天我会跑到大力身边的。
english: I believe that one day I will run to Dalai's side.

name: aqgy5_0012_00028
chinese: 对不起这是个误会这是个善意的谎言。
english: I'm sorry, this is a misunderstanding. It's a well-intentioned lie.

name: aqgy5_0013_00000
chinese: 骂的好，群众眼睛是雪亮的。
english: Well said, the eyes of the masses are sharp.

name: aqgy5_0013_00001
chinese: 这是曾老师给你的惊喜。
english: This is the surprise that Teacher Zeng gave you.

name: aqgy5_0013_00002
chinese: 总要有人负责点头捧场。
english: Someone has to be responsible for nodding and applauding.

name: aqgy5_0013_00004
chinese: 好想去酒吧看终极泳装派对。
english: I really want to go to the bar to watch the ultimate swimsuit party.

name: aqgy5_0013_00005
chinese: 这些弹幕老在旁边唧唧歪歪的，烦死了。
english: These bullet comments are always chattering and annoying next to me, it's driving me crazy.

name: aqgy5_0013_00006
chinese: 以前老是接不上你们的脑筋急转弯，但是现在今非昔比，你们可以试试。
english: Before, I used to always fail to solve your riddles, but now things have changed, you can give it a try.

name: aqgy5_0013_00007
chinese: 我忙着看书呢。
english: I'm busy reading a book.

name: aqgy5_0013_00008
chinese: 是不是我不发糖你们就不消停？
english: If I don't give out candy, will you guys not stop bothering me?

name: aqgy5_0013_00009
chinese: 这么多人围观啊。
english: So many people are watching.

name: aqgy5_0013_00010
chinese: 我们为什么要做这么奇怪的事情呢。
english: Why do we have to do such strange things?

name: aqgy5_0013_00011
chinese: 你以为满足这些无理要求，他们就会见好就收适可而止嘛。
english: Do you think that by meeting these unreasonable demands, they will be satisfied and stop there?

name: aqgy5_0013_00012
chinese: 他只会变本加厉得寸进尺，不正之风不可长。
english: He only knows how to escalate and take advantage, the unhealthy trend cannot be allowed to continue.

name: aqgy5_0013_00013
chinese: 突然发现你生气的样子有一点帅哦。
english: Suddenly realized that you look a little handsome when you're angry.

name: aqgy5_0013_00014
chinese: 要不然，我们就破例给他们发一波糖。
english: Otherwise, let's make an exception and give them some candy.

name: aqgy5_0013_00015
chinese: 我们不会一辈子活在这些评论里。
english: We will not live in these comments forever.

name: aqgy5_0013_00017
chinese: 你这么一个万年单身狗突然被一个这么可爱的女朋友倒追，你觉得合理吗？
english: Do you think it's reasonable for someone like you, who has been single for so long, to suddenly be pursued by such a cute girlfriend?

name: aqgy5_0013_00018
chinese: 玩够了没有，赶紧放曾小贤出去。
english: Have you played enough? Hurry up and let Zeng Xiaoxian out.

name: aqgy5_0013_00019
chinese: 我警告你，别拿我的容忍，当成你们不要脸的资本。
english: I warn you, don't take my tolerance as your shameless capital.

name: aqgy5_0013_00020
chinese: 你们凭什么干涉我们的生活。
english: Why do you have the right to interfere in our lives?

name: aqgy5_0013_00021
chinese: 人生起起落落哪有天天发糖的道理啊。
english: Life has its ups and downs, there is no reason to receive sweetness every day.

name: aqgy5_0013_00022
chinese: 糖吃多了，不怕得高血糖啊。
english: Eating too much sugar, I'm not afraid of getting high blood sugar.

name: aqgy5_0013_00023
chinese: 但是在这里我的人生我做主，你不要告诉我该干什么不该干什么。
english: But here, I am the master of my own life. Don't tell me what I should or shouldn't do.

name: aqgy5_0013_00024
chinese: 从小到大，连我爹妈都没这么骂过我，连张伟都没有这么骂过我。
english: From small to big, even my parents have never scolded me like this, not even Zhang Wei has scolded me like this.

name: aqgy5_0013_00025
chinese: 我和这些高维生物无冤无仇，他们凭什么这么骂我？
english: I have no grudges against these higher-dimensional beings, why do they curse at me like this?

name: aqgy5_0013_00026
chinese: 生活总有艰难的时刻，但是不要气馁，也不要放弃。
english: Life always has difficult moments, but do not be discouraged and do not give up.

name: aqgy5_0013_00027
chinese: 时间是一个有魔力的大筛子，只要你坚持下去，就会把一切不开心的事儿都过滤掉。
english: Time is a magical sieve, as long as you persist, it will filter out all unhappy things.

name: aqgy5_0013_00028
chinese: 真正留下的都是最美好的东西。
english: The things that truly stay are the most beautiful ones.

name: aqgy5_0013_00029
chinese: 如果看着我们能让她们开心，那还挺有意义的。
english: If watching us can make them happy, then it's quite meaningful.

name: aqgy5_0014_00000
chinese: 我喜欢这件婴儿服，可以让宝宝边爬边擦地，从小培养爱劳动的好习惯。
english: I like this baby clothes, it allows the baby to crawl and wipe the floor at the same time, cultivating a good habit of loving labor from an early age.

name: aqgy5_0014_00001
chinese: 嗯，今天的早餐好丰盛啊。
english: Hmm, today's breakfast is so abundant.

name: aqgy5_0014_00002
chinese: 早饭我来了。
english: I'm here for breakfast.

name: aqgy5_0014_00003
chinese: 大力给了我一样东西，彻底改变了我，太爽了。
english: Dali gave me something that completely changed me, it was awesome.

name: aqgy5_0014_00004
chinese: 最近班上有些学生为了追星，上课追剧，把专业课当酱油课了，气死我了。
english: Recently, some students in my class have been so obsessed with chasing after celebrities that they watch TV dramas during class, treating their major courses as if they were just for show. It really annoys me.

name: aqgy5_0014_00005
chinese: 什么男团这么洋气，有中国人还有外国人。
english: What boy band is so stylish, with both Chinese and foreign members.

name: aqgy5_0014_00006
chinese: 都是又帅又厉害的科学家。
english: They are all handsome and talented scientists.

name: aqgy5_0014_00007
chinese: 大叔知道我打算在配音演员方向发展，所以特地给了我这次实践机会。
english: Uncle knows that I plan to develop in the direction of voice acting, so he specially gave me this opportunity for practice.

name: aqgy5_0014_00008
chinese: 一个月上班了两次，每次上班半个月，整天不着家。
english: I have worked twice in a month, each time for half a month, and I am not at home all day.

name: aqgy5_0014_00009
chinese: 我是做艺人助理的，工作时间不规律很正常，交往前我就提醒过你了。
english: I am an artist assistant, and irregular working hours are normal. I reminded you about this before we started dating.

name: aqgy5_0014_00010
chinese: 那时候我只知道你是艺人助理，又不知道你是他的助理。
english: At that time, I only knew that you were an artist's assistant, but I didn't know that you were his assistant.

name: aqgy5_0014_00011
chinese: 分手就分手。
english: If it's a breakup, then let it be a breakup.

name: aqgy5_0014_00012
chinese: 我对我们家艺人没其他想法，纯属工作关系。
english: I have no other thoughts about our family artist, it's purely a working relationship.

name: aqgy5_0014_00013
chinese: 两个人在一起就是缘分，爱就要学会包容对方。
english: When two people are together, it is fate. Love means learning to tolerate each other.

name: aqgy5_0014_00014
chinese: 我以后也尽量多花点时间陪你。
english: I will try to spend more time with you in the future.

name: aqgy5_0014_00015
chinese: 下课生龙活虎，上课倒头就睡，都给我起来。
english: Full of energy after class, but falls asleep as soon as class starts. Wake up, both of you.

name: aqgy5_0014_00016
chinese: 我抓住了一个不好好听讲用手机偷偷看剧的同学，他已经做了深刻的检讨。
english: I caught a classmate who was not paying attention and secretly watching dramas on his phone. He has already deeply reflected on his actions.

name: aqgy5_0014_00018
chinese: 他现在是国民弟弟，品学兼优，酷爱运动，阳光开朗，积极向上。
english: He is now the national younger brother, excelling in both academics and character, loving sports, cheerful and optimistic, and actively striving for progress.

name: aqgy5_0014_00019
chinese: 连我都是她的姐姐粉呢。
english: Even I am a fan of her sister.

name: aqgy5_0014_00020
chinese: 还是我家大力追星有层次。
english: Still, my family's enthusiasm for chasing stars is organized.

name: aqgy5_0014_00021
chinese: 我十二岁那年穿着全部的奖学金自己跑去了柏林，为的是离我偶像待过的地方近一点。
english: When I was twelve years old, I wore all my scholarships and went to Berlin by myself, just to be closer to the place where my idol had stayed.

name: aqgy5_0014_00022
chinese: 一次坦诚会面，一次积极的会面，一次成功的会面。
english: One candid meeting, one positive meeting, one successful meeting.

name: aqgy5_0014_00023
chinese: 坦白从宽，老实交代为什么去洗澡。
english: To be lenient if you confess, honestly explain why you went to take a shower.

name: aqgy5_0014_00024
chinese: 我们在这家餐厅做试调，你来尝尝。
english: We are doing a trial run at this restaurant, come and taste it.

name: aqgy5_0014_00025
chinese: 你需要一位美女助理。
english: You need a beautiful assistant.

name: aqgy5_0014_00027
chinese: 张律师的听力挺不错呀。
english: Zhang's lawyer has good hearing.

name: aqgy5_0014_00028
chinese: 你为什么那么喜欢青青？
english: Why do you like Qingqing so much?

name: aqgy5_0014_00029
chinese: 只要看到青青纯洁善良的笑容，我就充满了力量。
english: Whenever I see Qingqing's pure and kind smile, I am filled with strength.

name: aqgy5_0014_00030
chinese: 我的粉丝们让我很失望。
english: My fans disappoint me.

name: aqgy5_0014_00031
chinese: 我的目标不仅是一个偶像，我还想成为一个好演员。
english: My goal is not only to be an idol, but also to become a good actor.

name: aqgy5_0014_00032
chinese: 在我伤心难过的时候都会陪着我，不厌其烦的听我倾诉陪我聊天。
english: When I am sad and upset, you always accompany me, patiently listening to me and chatting with me without getting tired.

name: aqgy5_0014_00033
chinese: 你不是在故意找茬，在跟杜老板抬杠。
english: You are not deliberately looking for trouble, you are just arguing with Boss Du.

name: aqgy5_0014_00034
chinese: 不如这样到我的办公室去，我那里环境舒适优雅，话也比较说的开。
english: How about coming to my office instead? The environment there is comfortable and elegant, and we can have a more open conversation.

name: aqgy5_0014_00035
chinese: 看来很尊敬青青，我愿意明天再来一次。
english: It seems that Qingqing is highly respected. I am willing to come again tomorrow.

name: aqgy5_0014_00036
chinese: 现在年轻人的恋爱观和我们不太一样啊，我们要学会尊重，不要去逼他们。
english: The younger generation's views on love are different from ours. We need to learn to respect them and not force them.

name: aqgy5_0014_00037
chinese: 两位不要在纠结了，怎么说？
english: Two people, don't dwell on it anymore. How should we say it?

name: aqgy5_0014_00041
chinese: 这次你只猜对了一半。
english: You only guessed half of them correctly this time.

name: aqgy5_0014_00042
chinese: 我打游戏只会遇到骗子。
english: I only encounter scammers when playing games.

name: aqgy5_0014_00043
chinese: 青青再也不回我微信了，游戏里她也不上线了。
english: Qingqing no longer replies to my WeChat messages, and she is also not online in the game anymore.

name: aqgy5_0014_00044
chinese: 他肯定是在生我的气。
english: He must be angry with me.

name: aqgy5_0014_00045
chinese: 照片和小视频里，清清是个长相甜美的长发女孩儿对不对？
english: In the photos and short videos, Qingqing is a sweet-looking girl with long hair, right?

name: aqgy5_0014_00046
chinese: 喜欢他这么久，他喜欢的只是我的钱。
english: I have liked him for so long, but all he likes is my money.

name: aqgy5_0014_00047
chinese: 我的老师胡一菲就是很好的经济学老师，你可以去听听他的课。
english: My teacher Hu Yifei is a very good economics teacher. You can go and listen to his class.

name: aqgy5_0014_00048
chinese: 这样才更符合你积极阳光正能量的形象嘛。
english: This is more in line with your positive, sunny and energetic image, right?

name: aqgy5_0014_00049
chinese: 今天这课上的太有成就感了。
english: Today's class was very fulfilling.

name: aqgy5_0014_00050
chinese: 那帮学生眼镜都听直了，个个都乖乖刷刷刷的记笔记，还说以后再也不开小差了。
english: The group of students all perked up their glasses, obediently brushing and diligently taking notes, and even said they would never slack off again in the future.

name: aqgy5_0014_00051
chinese: 神奇的事情发生在第二节课。
english: Something magical happened during the second class.

name: aqgy5_0014_00052
chinese: 只有好好学习才能离你的偶像更近。
english: Only by studying hard can you get closer to your idol.

name: aqgy5_0014_00053
chinese: 不但之前那些粉丝上课更认真了，连其他同学都抢着听我的课。
english: Not only did those fans become more serious in class, even other classmates are eager to listen to my lectures.

name: aqgy5_0015_00000
chinese: 感谢公司在实习期间的照顾。
english: Thank you for taking care of me during my internship at the company.

name: aqgy5_0015_00001
chinese: 难怪你被坑的那么惨，大力的意思就是跟张伟玩完了。
english: No wonder you were so badly deceived, Da Li means that you are done playing with Zhang Wei.

name: aqgy5_0015_00002
chinese: 你就不要在他伤口撒盐了嘛。
english: Can you please stop rubbing salt in his wound?

name: aqgy5_0015_00003
chinese: 你以后考试的时候，千万别学这种自作聪明的答案。
english: When you take exams in the future, please don't try to be clever with answers like this.

name: aqgy5_0015_00004
chinese: 老师一上课犯困走神那是条件反射啊。
english: When the teacher starts class, feeling sleepy and distracted is a conditioned reflex.

name: aqgy5_0015_00006
chinese: 总比现在强吧，出门一整天，啥都没听到。
english: It's better than now, I went out all day and didn't hear anything.

name: aqgy5_0015_00007
chinese: 我想看仔细点，找找自己的问题在哪。
english: I want to take a closer look and find out where my own problems are.

name: aqgy5_0015_00008
chinese: 完全看不懂啊。
english: I completely don't understand.

name: aqgy5_0015_00009
chinese: 我才不是学渣，我想一个人呆会。
english: I'm not a bad student at all. I just want to be alone for a while.

name: aqgy5_0015_00010
chinese: 这东西不许挂我门口。
english: This thing is not allowed to be hung at my doorstep.

name: aqgy5_0015_00011
chinese: 谁的一百块钱啊。
english: Whose hundred dollars is it?

name: aqgy5_0015_00012
chinese: 你们不要这样，我辛辛苦苦的三个月才六十分，还被分手了，我怎么高兴的起来。
english: You guys don't have to be like this. I worked hard for three months and only got a score of sixty. I also got dumped. How can I be happy?

name: aqgy5_0015_00013
chinese: 运气太好了吧。
english: You're so lucky, aren't you?

name: aqgy5_0015_00014
chinese: 额，我们智力和财力都有限，就准备这么几个。
english: Um, we have limited intelligence and financial resources, so we are just preparing a few.

name: aqgy5_0015_00015
chinese: 每次约会都写在了报告上，满满的都是回忆啊。
english: Every date is written in the report, full of memories.

name: aqgy5_0015_00016
chinese: 你想开点，说不定这六十分还有别的含义。
english: You want to open up, maybe this sixty minutes has another meaning.

name: aqgy5_0015_00017
chinese: 老师看你态度比较端正给你加的感情分。
english: The teacher gave you extra emotional points because they noticed your positive attitude.

name: aqgy5_0015_00018
chinese: 小菲菲谁和你比都是你漂亮，你和谁比都是你漂亮。
english: Xiaofeifei, no matter who compares with you, you are always beautiful. You are beautiful no matter who you compare with.

name: aqgy5_0015_00019
chinese: 曾老师能活到现在多亏他超强的求生欲。
english: Thanks to his strong will to survive, Teacher Zeng is able to live until now.

name: aqgy5_0015_00020
chinese: 亲爱的恭喜你你瘦了。
english: Congratulations, dear, you have lost weight.

name: aqgy5_0015_00021
chinese: 我可是站在表白界金字塔顶端的男人。
english: I am the man standing at the top of the pyramid of confession in the world.

name: aqgy5_0015_00022
chinese: 你这么关心我，我真的好感动。
english: You care about me so much, I am really touched.

name: aqgy5_0015_00023
chinese: 终极求生欲可以来了，既要把戏演完，又不能让大力难堪。
english: The ultimate survival desire has arrived, we must complete the performance without causing embarrassment to Dalai.

name: aqgy5_0015_00024
chinese: 他太优秀太有才华我觉得自己配不上。
english: He is too excellent and talented. I feel unworthy of myself.

name: aqgy5_0015_00025
chinese: 我能像今天这么有魅力全要感谢大力。
english: I can be as charming as today, all thanks to your great efforts.

name: aqgy5_0015_00026
chinese: 如果你觉得后悔的话，我这个人还是比较念旧的。
english: If you feel regretful, I am a person who is quite nostalgic.

name: aqgy5_0015_00027
chinese: 亲爱的你的鞋带开了，我帮你系一下。
english: Dear, your shoelace is untied. Let me help you tie it.

name: aqgy5_0016_00000
chinese: 敬我求生欲超强的男朋友。
english: A boyfriend with an extremely strong will to live, please.

name: aqgy5_0016_00001
chinese: 都是借口，他报价的时候没长脑子吗。
english: It's all excuses. Didn't he use his brain when he made the offer?

name: aqgy5_0016_00002
chinese: 反正我不同意。
english: Anyway, I disagree.

name: aqgy5_0016_00004
chinese: 庆祝，庆祝什么，庆祝我装修那么顺利吗？
english: Celebrate, celebrate what, celebrate that my renovation went so smoothly?

name: aqgy5_0016_00005
chinese: 主要是庆祝我和大力复合。
english: The main purpose is to celebrate my reunion with Dali.

name: aqgy5_0016_00006
chinese: 太寒酸了吧。
english: Too tacky.

name: aqgy5_0016_00007
chinese: 看起来清清淡淡，喝起来甜甜蜜蜜。
english: Looks light and tastes sweet and pleasant.

name: aqgy5_0016_00008
chinese: 我底子多差我心里清楚，这次成人高考我是悬了。
english: My foundation is very poor and I am well aware of it. I am in a precarious situation for this adult college entrance examination.

name: aqgy5_0016_00009
chinese: 你信不信我找你老板投诉你啊。
english: Do you believe that I will complain to your boss about you?

name: aqgy5_0016_00010
chinese: 美嘉一路上都在给宝宝安利这个美好的世界。
english: Mei Jia has been promoting this beautiful world to the baby all the way.

name: aqgy5_0016_00011
chinese: 接下来呢，妈妈就要给你介绍妈妈的老铁们。
english: Next, Mom will introduce you to Mom's buddies.

name: aqgy5_0016_00012
chinese: 这里妈妈曾经参加过很多派对。
english: My mom has attended many parties here before.

name: aqgy5_0016_00013
chinese: 有的教总比没有强吧，我要是接收过胎教，现在就不一样了。
english: It's better to have some education than none at all. If I had received prenatal education, things would be different for me now.

name: aqgy5_0016_00014
chinese: 多做点准备总归是好的，万一考试用的到呢。
english: It's always good to be prepared, just in case it's needed for the exam.

name: aqgy5_0016_00015
chinese: 怎么全是骂人的话。
english: Why are all the words insults?

name: aqgy5_0016_00016
chinese: 大家能不能多说一点礼貌，比如说请您谢谢不客气之类的。
english: Can everyone please be more polite, for example, saying "please" and "thank you"?

name: aqgy5_0016_00017
chinese: 这样宝宝一定会觉得，世界好美好，人和人相处好美妙。
english: This way, the baby will definitely feel that the world is beautiful and that people getting along with each other is wonderful.

name: aqgy5_0016_00018
chinese: 不过你们两个的用词非常文明，我有种如沐春风的感觉。
english: However, both of you have very polite language, and I have a feeling of being bathed in the spring breeze.

name: aqgy5_0016_00019
chinese: 宝宝也会很喜欢哒。
english: Babies will also like it very much.

name: aqgy5_0016_00020
chinese: 这样才对嘛。
english: This is the right way.

name: aqgy5_0016_00022
chinese: 你又忘了，弱智这个词不能说。
english: You forgot again, you can't say the word "retard".

name: aqgy5_0016_00023
chinese: 美嘉，这是不是有点太夸张了。
english: Meijia, isn't this a bit too exaggerated?

name: aqgy5_0016_00024
chinese: 都怪妈妈，不能给你一个良好的成长环境。
english: It's all because of mom, she can't provide you with a good environment for growth.

name: aqgy5_0016_00025
chinese: 听听科学家的故事，好让我和宝宝都能学习到。
english: Listen to the stories of scientists so that both my baby and I can learn.

name: aqgy5_0016_00026
chinese: 我平时说话就是这么温柔的呀，您在打电话来都没有用的哦。
english: I usually speak so gently, but it's useless when you call.

name: aqgy5_0016_00027
chinese: 我没病。
english: I'm not sick.

name: aqgy5_0016_00028
chinese: 大不了老娘自己刷墙。
english: At worst, I'll paint the wall myself.

name: aqgy5_0016_00029
chinese: 一菲姐，你温柔一点呀。
english: Yifei, can you be a little gentler?

name: aqgy5_0016_00030
chinese: 谁温柔你告诉我，我学学。
english: Who is gentle, you tell me, I will learn.

name: aqgy5_0016_00031
chinese: 子乔，你要不要做做美嘉工作，这有点过了，这以后还能不能做朋友了。
english: Ziqiao, do you want to do some work for Meijia? This is a bit too much. Can we still be friends after this?

name: aqgy5_0016_00032
chinese: 最近在家养胎闲得慌，，好不容易找点自己喜欢做的事情，你们就迁就她一下。
english: Recently, I have been idle at home, so I finally found something I like to do. Can you accommodate her a little bit?

name: aqgy5_0016_00033
chinese: 诶，我正找你们呢，你们怎么都在这呀。
english: Hey, I was looking for you guys. Why are you all here?

name: aqgy5_0016_00034
chinese: 你别以为用英语骂人都听不懂。
english: Don't think that people can't understand when you curse at them in English.

name: aqgy5_0016_00035
chinese: 各位朋友，相聚的时光总是很短暂。
english: Dear friends, the time we spend together is always fleeting.

name: aqgy5_0016_00036
chinese: 我答应过曾老师，同一屋檐下我们要守望相助。
english: I promised Teacher Zeng that we should watch out for each other under the same roof.

name: aqgy5_0016_00037
chinese: 一方有难，八方支援。
english: When one is in trouble, help comes from all directions.

name: aqgy5_0016_00038
chinese: 让她和曾老师尽快入住爱巢那是我最大的心愿。
english: Let her and Teacher Zeng move into the love nest as soon as possible. That is my biggest wish.

name: aqgy5_0016_00039
chinese: 欢迎大家光临现场指导工作。
english: 欢迎大家光临现场指导工作。.

name: aqgy5_0016_00040
chinese: 为了让孩子感受到人，世间的美好，我们稍微强化了一下语气，有没有感受到积极的正能量。
english: In order to let children feel the beauty of humanity and the world, we slightly emphasized the tone. Did you feel the positive energy?

name: aqgy5_0016_00041
chinese: 要不然我也去凑个热闹。
english: Otherwise, I will also join in the fun.

name: aqgy5_0016_00042
chinese: 您消消气，都是我不好，我请诸位吃好吃的。
english: Please calm down, it's all my fault. I will treat you all to delicious food.

name: aqgy5_0016_00043
chinese: 现在算是明白了，什么叫做有困难要上，没有困难制造困难也要上。
english: Now I understand what it means to go up when there are difficulties and even create difficulties when there are none.

name: aqgy5_0016_00044
chinese: 故意把墙刷坏了再刷一遍，你们在上面玩挺高兴的吧。
english: Intentionally brush the wall to make it damaged and then brush it again. You must be having a great time playing on it.

name: aqgy5_0016_00045
chinese: 你怎么知道？
english: how do you know?

name: aqgy5_0017_00000
chinese: 这海棠是动了脑子的啊，给你点赞。
english: This crabapple is really smart, giving you a thumbs up.

name: aqgy5_0017_00001
chinese: 这种东西十拿九稳了，你放心去吧，不用担心。
english: This thing is almost certain, you can rest assured and don't worry.

name: aqgy5_0017_00002
chinese: 要不你辛苦一下，上楼帮我盯几天。
english: How about you work hard and go upstairs to watch over for me for a few days?

name: aqgy5_0017_00003
chinese: 通过这次捐书，赵海堂是最认真的，而且品位不错，所以装修的收尾工作交给你我放心。
english: Through this book donation, Zhao Haitang is the most serious and has good taste, so we can rest assured to entrust the finishing work of the decoration to you and me.

name: aqgy5_0017_00004
chinese: 想不到我在你心目中这么靠谱。
english: I can't believe I am so reliable in your eyes.

name: aqgy5_0017_00005
chinese: 加油，我相信你！
english: Come on, I believe in you!

name: aqgy5_0017_00006
chinese: 唉我也是没有办法。
english: Ah, I have no way either.

name: aqgy5_0017_00007
chinese: 直播呢还是老样子，但是我开拓了新的销售场景。
english: The live broadcast is still the same, but I have explored new sales scenarios.

name: aqgy5_0017_00008
chinese: 我从小的梦想可是做室内设计师。
english: My childhood dream is to become an interior designer.

name: aqgy5_0017_00009
chinese: 其实因为我画画太烂，画什么都翻车。
english: Actually, because I am terrible at drawing, everything I draw turns out to be a disaster.

name: aqgy5_0017_00010
chinese: 我一定要给胡老师一个完美的家。
english: I must give Teacher Hu a perfect home.

name: aqgy5_0017_00011
chinese: 幸福的人是相似的，我觉得完美的家也是有共性的。
english: Happy people are similar, and I believe that perfect homes also have common characteristics.

name: aqgy5_0017_00012
chinese: 我梦想中的家一定好玩儿，最好要有个娱乐室。
english: My dream home must be fun, preferably with an entertainment room.

name: aqgy5_0017_00013
chinese: 我梦想的家就像童话里一样，有个萌萌的小木屋。
english: My dream home is like a cute little cottage in a fairy tale.

name: aqgy5_0017_00014
chinese: 如果是一个萌萌的大城堡那就更好了。
english: If it is a cute and big castle, that would be even better.

name: aqgy5_0017_00015
chinese: 只要是女人心里都会有一个童话城堡梦。
english: Every woman has a fairytale castle dream in her heart.

name: aqgy5_0017_00016
chinese: 他非要做的爱心三明治早餐在我面前，挽回颜面。
english: He insisted on making a caring sandwich breakfast in front of me to save face.

name: aqgy5_0017_00017
chinese: 诶呀，这么丰盛啊。
english: Wow, this is so abundant.

name: aqgy5_0017_00018
chinese: 昨天你们提的意见都很有价值，大家对梦想中的家还有什么想法，咱们边吃边聊啊。
english: Yesterday, your suggestions were all very valuable. Does anyone have any other ideas about the dream home? Let's chat while we eat.

name: aqgy5_0017_00019
chinese: 那还不简单，大力长这么可爱，肯定很会撒娇。
english: That's easy, Dalai is so cute, he must be good at acting cute.

name: aqgy5_0017_00020
chinese: 怎么你也说我没耐心。
english: Why do you also say that I am impatient?

name: aqgy5_0017_00021
chinese: 我买了你喜欢的猪肉和牛肉饭。
english: I bought pork and beef rice that you like.

name: aqgy5_0017_00022
chinese: 张律师要是知道你为了她来学撒娇一定感动死了。
english: If Lawyer Zhang knew that you learned to act cute for her, she would definitely be touched.

name: aqgy5_0017_00023
chinese: 好巧啊，我正好下来买点东西。
english: What a coincidence, I just came down to buy something.

name: aqgy5_0017_00024
chinese: 昨天你在过山车上的样子真是啊让我刮目相看。
english: Yesterday, your appearance on the roller coaster really impressed me.

name: aqgy5_0017_00025
chinese: 我觉得你很帅。
english: I think you are handsome.

name: aqgy5_0017_00026
chinese: 装修非常顺利，绝对是真的金字塔泰姬陵兵马俑级别的旷世杰作。
english: The renovation went very smoothly, it is definitely a masterpiece of the same level as the Great Pyramid, the Taj Mahal, and the Terracotta Warriors.

name: aqgy5_0017_00027
chinese: 真不知道张择端当时是以怎样的耐心画出这样的鸿篇巨制。
english: I really don't know how Zhang Zeduan had the patience to paint such a magnificent masterpiece at that time.

name: aqgy5_0017_00028
chinese: 你这才拼了几块啊，哪有什么进度。
english: How many pieces have you finished? There is no progress at all.

name: aqgy5_0017_00029
chinese: 经过我一晚上努力，我终于想明白一件事情。
english: After my efforts throughout the night, I finally figured out something.

name: aqgy5_0017_00030
chinese: 拼图需要新思维，不能按照传统办法来。
english: Jigsaw puzzles require new thinking and cannot be approached in a traditional way.

name: aqgy5_0017_00031
chinese: 真是生在福中不知柠檬。
english: Born in fortune but unaware of lemons.

name: aqgy5_0017_00032
chinese: 这清明上河图实在是太难了，黄哈哈一片，好难分辨啊。
english: This Qingming Riverside Scene is really difficult, it's all yellow haha, so hard to distinguish.

name: aqgy5_0017_00033
chinese: 你为我做的这些我都很感动。
english: I am very touched by everything you have done for me.

name: aqgy5_0017_00034
chinese: 组合拳撒娇也没用啊。
english: It's useless to act coquettish with a combination of punches.

name: aqgy5_0017_00035
chinese: 有一个像你这样，永远给我惊喜的人，我也挺开心的。
english: There is someone like you who always surprises me, and I am quite happy too.

name: aqgy5_0017_00037
chinese: 和普通的大门比起来，多了一份俏皮，多了一份温馨。
english: Compared to ordinary doors, there is a touch of playfulness and warmth.

name: aqgy5_0017_00038
chinese: 让每一个都市夜归人都能感受到家的友善。
english: Let every urban night owl feel the friendliness of home.

name: aqgy5_0017_00039
chinese: 这是点睛之笔，东风里，朱门映柳。
english: This is the finishing touch, in the east wind, the vermilion gate reflects the willow.

name: aqgy5_0017_00040
chinese: 艺术和自然在这里交融，我们身在其中却浑然不觉。
english: Art and nature blend together here, but we are completely unaware of it.

name: aqgy5_0017_00041
chinese: 为了增强走廊尽头的神秘感我特意做了暗门。
english: To enhance the sense of mystery at the end of the corridor, I deliberately made a hidden door.

name: aqgy5_0017_00042
chinese: 也会有人定期补货的，完全不用担心。
english: Some people will also replenish regularly, so there is no need to worry at all.

name: aqgy5_0017_00043
chinese: 这就是我梦想中的卧室，太棒了。
english: This is the bedroom of my dreams, it's amazing.

name: aqgy5_0017_00044
chinese: 终有一天我们会变得更好更强大。
english: One day we will become better and stronger.

name: aqgy5_0017_00045
chinese: 胡老师看重了我的才华，我当然不能让她失望。
english: Teacher Hu values my talent, so of course I cannot disappoint her.

name: aqgy5_0018_00001
chinese: 他昨天据说通宵守在电脑面前抢票，应该没有问题。
english: It is said that he stayed up all night in front of the computer to grab tickets yesterday, so there should be no problem.

name: aqgy5_0018_00002
chinese: 你放心吧，我和咖喱酱在家里吃吃喝喝看春晚，不会孤单的。
english: Don't worry, I will be at home with curry sauce, eating, drinking, and watching the Spring Festival Gala. I won't be lonely.

name: aqgy5_0018_00003
chinese: 那得赶紧通知张伟少订一张票啊。
english: We need to quickly inform Zhang Wei to book a ticket.

name: aqgy5_0018_00004
chinese: 抢了一晚上的票，一张都没抢到，春节抢票实在是比拍车牌还难。
english: I tried to grab tickets all night, but didn't get a single one. It's even harder to grab tickets for the Spring Festival than to get a license plate.

name: aqgy5_0018_00005
chinese: 关键时刻掉链子，还得靠我。
english: At a critical moment, the chain fell off, and I had to rely on myself.

name: aqgy5_0018_00006
chinese: 让你们见识一下，达人是如何分分钟把事情搞定的。
english: Let me show you how experts can get things done in minutes.

name: aqgy5_0018_00007
chinese: 那现在怎么办，游泳去日本。
english: What should we do now? Let's go swimming in Japan.

name: aqgy5_0018_00008
chinese: 想在被窝里睡个懒觉都不行。
english: I can't even sleep in bed lazily.

name: aqgy5_0018_00009
chinese: 别唧唧歪歪的，要睡回家睡去。
english: Stop talking nonsense, go home and sleep.

name: aqgy5_0018_00010
chinese: 去横滨的机票买不到，你还是自己烧壶热水，自己涮涮吧。
english: I can't buy a plane ticket to Yokohama, so you should just boil some hot water and have a hot pot by yourself.

name: aqgy5_0018_00011
chinese: 有了它，一切都是小菜一碟。
english: With it, everything is a piece of cake.

name: aqgy5_0018_00012
chinese: 你家什么来头啊，怎么一言不合就包飞机啊。
english: What is the background of your family? Why do you always take a plane at the drop of a hat?

name: aqgy5_0018_00013
chinese: 拿出点包机的气势啊，我们要去参加悠悠关谷的婚礼了。
english: Bring out the momentum of the private jet, we are going to attend Youyou Guangu's wedding.

name: aqgy5_0018_00014
chinese: 肚子肚子有点疼啊。
english: My stomach hurts a little.

name: aqgy5_0018_00015
chinese: 我都不知道自己说的什么，你居然能听清？
english: I don't even know what I'm saying, and you can actually hear it clearly?

name: aqgy5_0018_00016
chinese: 延迟？七爷什么情况。
english: Delay? What's the situation, Qiyeh?

name: aqgy5_0018_00017
chinese: 嘿，小机场，讲究一专多能。
english: Hey, small airport, pay attention to being specialized and versatile.

name: aqgy5_0018_00018
chinese: 完全OK。
english: Completely OK.

name: aqgy5_0018_00019
chinese: 我们还要在这个破地待多久啊。
english: How much longer do we have to stay in this dump?

name: aqgy5_0018_00020
chinese: 至少还能上网，等着吧。
english: At least you can still go online, just wait.

name: aqgy5_0018_00021
chinese: 只要你够强，就能拿奖拿到手发软。
english: As long as you are strong enough, you can win awards until your hands go soft.

name: aqgy5_0018_00022
chinese: 早知道喝点凉水就能散热，就不折腾你们了。
english: If I had known that drinking some cold water could cool down, I wouldn't have bothered you.

name: aqgy5_0018_00023
chinese: 张伟肚子一叫，WIFI信号马上满格了。
english: Zhang Wei's stomach growled, and the WIFI signal immediately became full bars.

name: aqgy5_0019_00000
chinese: 真来啦，我们能出发了。
english: They're really here; we can set off now.

name: aqgy5_0019_00001
chinese: 赶紧吃药吧，要不关谷他爹又要催了。
english: Hurry up and take your medicine, otherwise Guangu's father will urge you again.

name: aqgy5_0019_00003
chinese: 不过别担心，这药没啥副作用。
english: But don't worry, this medicine has no side effects.

name: aqgy5_0019_00004
chinese: 心情好也会促进肠胃蠕动，要不我给你讲个笑话。
english: When you're in a good mood, it can also promote gastrointestinal motility. How about I tell you a joke?

name: aqgy5_0019_00005
chinese: 好不容易人蛋分离，怎么又出幺蛾子了？
english: It was so difficult to separate the person and the egg, but how did another problem arise?

name: aqgy5_0019_00006
chinese: 赶紧改签吧今天肯定飞不了了。
english: Please reschedule quickly, we definitely won't be able to fly today.

name: aqgy5_0019_00007
chinese: 这是我最好朋友的婚礼啊，怎么连个送祝福的机会都不给。
english: This is my best friend's wedding, how come I don't even have a chance to send my blessings?

name: aqgy5_0019_00008
chinese: 赶紧想想办法啊。
english: Hurry up and think of a solution.

name: aqgy5_0019_00009
chinese: 就算我有黑榴莲卡，我也不能让机场出太阳啊。
english: Even if I have a black durian card, I cannot make the airport have sunshine.

name: aqgy5_0019_00010
chinese: 算了，人去不了，祝福绝对不能少。
english: Forget it, I can't go, but blessings must not be lacking.

name: aqgy5_0019_00011
chinese: 我想跟悠悠做个约定，要是我们都生男孩的话，就做兄弟，要是都生女孩的话，就做姐妹。
english: I want to make an agreement with you, Yoyo. If we both have boys, we will be brothers. If we both have girls, we will be sisters.

name: aqgy5_0019_00012
chinese: 你要送给他们什么祝福。
english: What blessings do you want to give them?

name: aqgy5_0019_00013
chinese: 我的祝福已经放到桌子上了，希望我也能沾到点喜气。
english: My blessings have already been placed on the table, hoping that I can also get some good luck.

name: aqgy5_0019_00014
chinese: 找一个帅帅的男朋友，我要求不高。
english: Find a handsome boyfriend for me, I don't have high demands.

name: aqgy5_0019_00015
chinese: 更要有爱，这是关谷料理能传承至今发扬光大最重要的原因呀。
english: Love is even more important. This is the most crucial reason for the inheritance and development of Guangu cuisine until now.

name: aqgy5_0019_00016
chinese: 爱粉不易，真心为你。
english: Being a fan is not easy, I sincerely support you.

name: aqgy5_0019_00017
chinese: 关谷家的奥义既是菜谱更是浪漫情书啊。
english: The secret of the Guan family is not only a recipe but also a romantic love letter.

name: aqgy5_0020_00000
chinese: 曾小贤录节目回不来，我就打算悄悄地去阿拉善沙漠给他一个大惊喜。
english: Zeng Xiaoxian cannot come back to record the program, so I plan to secretly give him a big surprise in the Alashan Desert.

name: aqgy5_0020_00001
chinese: 曾老师看见你，一定会超开心的，好甜哦。
english: Teacher Zeng will be very happy to see you, so sweet.

name: aqgy5_0020_00002
chinese: 当然啦。
english: Of course.

name: aqgy5_0020_00003
chinese: 大力要送份爱的礼物，那真是开天辟地头一遭。
english: Da Li wants to give a gift of love, which is truly a first-time experience.

name: aqgy5_0020_00004
chinese: 我打算到时给她一个完美的惊喜表情。
english: I plan to give her a perfect surprise expression at that time.

name: aqgy5_0020_00005
chinese: 曾老师知道一定会非常感动的。
english: Teacher Zeng knows that he will be very touched for sure.

name: aqgy5_0020_00006
chinese: 这岁月果然是把杀猪刀啊，浪里小白龙都被磨成了贴心小奶狗啊。
english: These years are indeed a butcher's knife, even the naive dragon in the waves has been ground into a considerate little puppy.

name: aqgy5_0020_00007
chinese: 我们先去四处湖边为情侣们朗诵情书，然后去牵手桥给情侣们唱歌伴舞。
english: We will first go to the lakeside to recite love letters for couples, and then go to the hand-holding bridge to sing and dance for couples.

name: aqgy5_0020_00008
chinese: 多从自身找原因，大部分姑娘没你们说的那么虚荣。
english: Most girls are not as vain as you think, so look for reasons within yourself.

name: aqgy5_0020_00009
chinese: 大叔一把年纪，现在的女孩你能懂？
english: The uncle is of a certain age, can you understand the girls nowadays?

name: aqgy5_0020_00010
chinese: 哥不露两手，当我哈士奇。
english: Don't underestimate me, I'm a Husky.

name: aqgy5_0020_00011
chinese: 妈呀，哪来的大神啊！
english: Oh my god, where did this expert come from!

name: aqgy5_0020_00012
chinese: 好喜欢这种人生开挂的感觉。
