english: I really like the feeling of having a cheat code in life.

name: aqgy5_0020_00013
chinese: 我准备亲手做一顿爱心早餐，伴随着清晨第一缕阳光送到大力的床前。
english: I am ready to make a hearty breakfast with my own hands, accompanied by the first ray of morning sunshine delivered to Da Li's bed.

name: aqgy5_0020_00014
chinese: 我还有创意情书，哼哼。
english: I still have a creative love letter, hmph.

name: aqgy5_0020_00015
chinese: 磁带有多长，我对大力的爱意就有多长。
english: How long is the tape, that's how long my love for you is.

name: aqgy5_0020_00016
chinese: 我曾经想带她去看爱琴海，被拒了。
english: I once wanted to take her to see the Aegean Sea, but was rejected.

name: aqgy5_0020_00017
chinese: 女儿收到什么样的礼物会特别惊喜呀。
english: What kind of gift would make a daughter particularly surprised?

name: aqgy5_0020_00018
chinese: 你真问对人了，要不姐教你两招。
english: You really asked the right person. How about I teach you a couple of moves?

name: aqgy5_0020_00019
chinese: 当我是韭菜啊，割不完的吗。
english: When I am a leek, can I not be cut endlessly?

name: aqgy5_0020_00020
chinese: 要不要请你喝一杯，边喝边聊，咱们散发单身狗的清香。
english: Do you want me to invite you for a drink, while drinking and chatting, we can emit the fragrance of single dogs.

name: aqgy5_0020_00021
chinese: 介绍一下我男朋友赵看海。
english: Introduction of my boyfriend, Zhao Kanhai.

name: aqgy5_0020_00022
chinese: 书呆子一个，肯定没什么情趣。
english: A bookworm, definitely lacks any sense of fun.

name: aqgy5_0020_00023
chinese: 不过光想想他的脸，我就能开心一天了。
english: Just thinking about his face makes me happy for the whole day.

name: aqgy5_0020_00024
chinese: 这是什么，这是你送给我的浪漫小礼物吗？
english: What is this? Is this the romantic little gift you gave me?

name: aqgy5_0020_00025
chinese: 表白被拒绝以后我的心像被掏空了，我只想睁着眼流泪到天亮。
english: After being rejected in my confession, my heart feels empty, and I just want to cry with my eyes open until dawn.

name: aqgy5_0020_00026
chinese: 表现惊喜一向是我的强项。
english: Expressing surprise has always been my strong suit.

name: aqgy5_0020_00027
chinese: 这哪猜的出来啊。
english: It's impossible to guess this.?

name: aqgy5_0020_00028
chinese: 我觉得你体重挺标准的。
english: I think your weight is quite standard.

name: aqgy5_0020_00029
chinese: 从今以后，请叫我代言人。
english: From now on, please call me spokesperson.

name: aqgy5_0020_00030
chinese: 我的礼物呢？
english: Where is my gift?

name: aqgy5_0020_00031
chinese: 我虽然拼的不好，但希望你能喜欢。
english: Although I'm not good at spelling, I hope you will like it.

name: aqgy5_0020_00033
chinese: 我默默的看着你。
english: I silently watch you.

name: aqgy5_0020_00034
chinese: 好浪漫原来他这么喜欢我。
english: It's so romantic. I didn't realize he likes me so much.

name: aqgy5_0021_00000
chinese: 你要相亲？
english: Do you want to go on a blind date?

name: aqgy5_0021_00001
chinese: 自古表白多白表。
english: Confessions have always been mostly white since ancient times.

name: aqgy5_0021_00002
chinese: 孩子快要出生了，开销只会越来越大。
english: The child is about to be born, and expenses will only get bigger.

name: aqgy5_0021_00003
chinese: 这种好事不叫我。
english: This good thing doesn't involve me.

name: aqgy5_0021_00004
chinese: 男主逻辑凭空想象了个梦中情人，结果凭全地球之力真的就找到了，太浪漫。
english: The male protagonist imagined a dream lover out of thin air, and with the power of the whole world, he actually found her. So romantic.

name: aqgy5_0021_00005
chinese: 运气好，还能找到大力升级呢。
english: Good luck! You even managed to find Da Li for an upgrade.

name: aqgy5_0021_00006
chinese: 长发飘飘有仙气。
english: Long hair flowing with a fairy-like aura.

name: aqgy5_0021_00007
chinese: 浪漫到上头。
english: Overwhelmed by romance.

name: aqgy5_0021_00008
chinese: 这么多要求，后台服务器该烧了。
english: With so many demands, the backend server is going to crash.

name: aqgy5_0021_00011
chinese: 我知道你不差钱。
english: I know you're not short of money

name: aqgy5_0021_00012
chinese: 心情是不是立马就好了。
english: Does the mood get better immediately?

name: aqgy5_0021_00013
chinese: 我就喜欢坐这个沙发上，吃我自带的小蛋糕。
english: I just like sitting on this sofa and eating my own little cake.

name: aqgy5_0021_00014
chinese: 那就买一个嘛。
english: Then just buy one.

name: aqgy5_0021_00015
chinese: 逃避可耻，但有用啊。
english: Escaping is shameful, but useful.

name: aqgy5_0021_00016
chinese: 一入豪门深似海，从此父母是路人啊。
english: Once entering the wealthy family, it feels as deep as the sea. From now on, parents are like strangers.

name: aqgy5_0021_00017
chinese: 那我们谈现实的。
english: Let's talk about reality.

name: aqgy5_0021_00018
chinese: 最后不欢而散。
english: Finally part ways without joy.

name: aqgy5_0021_00019
chinese: 那是传统相亲，我知道有个地方有吃有玩有互动不尴尬不冷场，要不要体验一下？。
english: That is a traditional blind date. I know a place where we can eat, have fun, and interact without feeling awkward or uncomfortable. Do you want to give it a try?

name: aqgy5_0021_00020
chinese: 抱歉我迟到了。
english: I'm sorry I'm late.

name: aqgy5_0021_00021
chinese: 你两该不会是在耍我吧。
english: Are you two playing me?

name: aqgy5_0021_00022
chinese: 你家的挖掘机户型实在是太有挑战了。
english: Your home's excavator layout is really challenging.

name: aqgy5_0021_00023
chinese: 不如，我们更进一步。
english: How about we take it a step further?

name: aqgy5_0022_00000
chinese: 来，为咖喱酱进入配音比赛决赛干杯。
english: Come on, let's toast for curry sauce entering the dubbing competition finals.

name: aqgy5_0022_00001
chinese: 不要谦虚啦。
english: Don't be modest.

name: aqgy5_0022_00002
chinese: 孙悟空放开紫霞的时候，我都哭了。
english: When Sun Wukong let go of Zixia, I cried.

name: aqgy5_0022_00003
chinese: 没有啦。
english: No more.

name: aqgy5_0022_00004
chinese: 昨天不是十三个吗你这是。
english: Wasn't it thirteen yesterday? What's wrong with you?

name: aqgy5_0022_00006
chinese: 张伟打律师。
english: Zhang Wei hires a lawyer.

name: aqgy5_0022_00007
chinese: 我确实有个做生意的爸爸，但它只是个卖猪肉的个体户。
english: I do have a dad who does business, but he is just a self-employed individual selling pork.

name: aqgy5_0022_00009
chinese: 那是我自己的声音啊。
english: That is my own voice.

name: aqgy5_0022_00010
chinese: 快要比赛了，我不想把事情闹大。
english: The competition is coming soon, and I don't want to make things worse.

name: aqgy5_0022_00011
chinese: 咖喱酱实在是太倒霉了，遇到这种刷新下限的对手。
english: The curry sauce is really unlucky, encountering opponents that lower the limit like this.

name: aqgy5_0022_00012
chinese: 怎么多了这么多客人啊。
english: Why are there so many more guests?

name: aqgy5_0022_00013
chinese: 很多网友开始质疑比赛的公正。
english: Many netizens have started to question the fairness of the competition.

name: aqgy5_0022_00014
chinese: 也不敢帮你声明。
english: I dare not help you declare.

name: aqgy5_0022_00015
chinese: 事情闹成这样她压力也很大。
english: The situation has become like this and she is under a lot of pressure.

name: aqgy5_0022_00016
chinese: 你脑子冲马桶了啊！
english: Did your brain go down the toilet?!!

name: aqgy5_0022_00017
chinese: 有这么提问的吗，他们怎么不问屎好不好吃啊？
english: Is there anyone who asks if feces are delicious?

name: aqgy5_0022_00018
chinese: 脑子进水了，当然不是我了。
english: My brain is filled with water, of course it's not me.

name: aqgy5_0022_00020
chinese: 多亏你，我们生意变得更好了。
english: Thanks to you, our business has improved.

name: aqgy5_0022_00021
chinese: 群众的眼睛都是雪亮的，不要当我是傻瓜，人在做，天在看。
english: The eyes of the masses are all bright, don't treat me like a fool, what goes around comes around.

name: aqgy5_0022_00022
chinese: 这编得也太没谱了傻瓜才看这种货色。
english: This is so unreliable, only fools would watch such rubbish.

name: aqgy5_0022_00023
chinese: 当初叫你退的时候你不退，非要闹出这么多事才肯退。
english: When I asked you to withdraw at the beginning, you didn't withdraw. You insisted on causing so much trouble before agreeing to withdraw.

name: aqgy5_0022_00024
chinese: 只要我哥给兄弟们发个命令，风向马上能变，放心吧。
english: As long as my brother gives the command to the brothers, the wind direction can change immediately, so don't worry.

name: aqgy5_0023_00000
chinese: 你们太让我失望了。
english: You guys have disappointed me too much.

name: aqgy5_0023_00001
chinese: 今天敷了最贵的面膜，全浪费了。
english: Today I applied the most expensive face mask, but it was all wasted.

name: aqgy5_0023_00002
chinese: 胡老师，以后能不能别这么突然，我都快神经衰弱了。
english: Teacher Hu, can you please not be so sudden in the future? I'm almost having a nervous breakdown.

name: aqgy5_0023_00003
chinese: 你饶了我吧，饶了我吧，救命啊。
english: Please spare me, spare me, help me.

name: aqgy5_0023_00004
chinese: 就还行，像蚊子叮过的感觉，痒痒的。
english: It's okay, like the feeling of being bitten by a mosquito, itchy.

name: aqgy5_0023_00005
chinese: 我现在既开心又有点害怕。
english: I am both happy and a little scared now.

name: aqgy5_0023_00006
chinese: 这段时间啊真的是辛苦你们了。
english: You guys have really worked hard during this period.

name: aqgy5_0023_00007
chinese: 终于有一个像样的礼物了。
english: Finally, there is a decent gift.

name: aqgy5_0023_00008
chinese: 这都什么乱七八糟的啊你们嫌美嘉还不够多灾多难是吧。
english: What a mess, do you think there are not enough disasters and difficulties with Meijia?

name: aqgy5_0023_00009
chinese: 我有这么不靠谱吗？
english: Am I really that unreliable?

name: aqgy5_0023_00010
chinese: 一菲凭什么说我不靠谱。
english: Why does Yifei say that I am unreliable?

name: aqgy5_0023_00011
chinese: 这段时间真的是辛苦的，有你们在我就放心了。
english: It has been tough during this period, but I feel relieved with all of you here.

name: aqgy5_0023_00012
chinese: 辛辛苦苦准备这么久的，就是为了今天。
english: I have worked so hard and prepared for so long, all for today.

name: aqgy5_0023_00013
chinese: 我要当爸爸了，我要当爸爸了
english: I'm going to be a dad, I'm going to be a dad.

name: aqgy5_0024_00000
chinese: 我不管，我就要吃
english: I don't care, I just want to eat.

name: aqgy5_0024_00001
chinese: 一想到能见到项尚，我突然就不疼了
english: Just the thought of seeing Xiang Shang, and suddenly I don't feel any pain anymore.

name: aqgy5_0024_00002
chinese: 大哥，情况紧急，这份恩情我一定铭记在心。
english: Big brother, the situation is urgent, I will definitely remember this favor in my heart.

name: aqgy5_0024_00003
chinese: 求你了。
english: I'm begging you.

name: aqgy5_0024_00004
chinese: 其实，我并不想去找快递，但我知道留下来肯定是个死。
english: Actually, I don't want to go and find the delivery, but I know that staying here is definitely a dead end.

name: aqgy5_0024_00005
chinese: 你们是在拍项尚的一百种死法吗？
english: Are you filming "One Hundred Ways to Die in Xiangshang"?

name: aqgy5_0024_00006
chinese: 不，我要把写论文时候的煎熬绝望崩溃，崩溃都唱出了。
english: No, I want to sing out the agony, despair, and breakdown I experienced while writing the paper.

name: aqgy5_0024_00007
chinese: 人多口杂，让别人知道了，那就不好了。
english: There are many people and it's noisy. It wouldn't be good if others found out.

name: aqgy5_0024_00008
chinese: 我们衡量再三，还是觉得说出来。
english: We have considered it carefully and still feel that it should be said.

name: aqgy5_0024_00009
chinese: 你个没良心的，你不宠我了吗？
english: You heartless person, don't you spoil me anymore?

name: aqgy5_0024_00010
chinese: 我笑的肚子都饿了。
english: My stomach is hungry from laughing.

name: aqgy5_0024_00011
chinese: 我要吃。
english: I want to eat.

name: aqgy5_0024_00012
chinese: 放心，顺利，就快找到啦。
english: Don't worry, smoothly, almost found it.

name: aqgy5_0024_00013
chinese: 你们年轻人口味挺重啊。
english: You young people have quite a strong taste.

name: aqgy5_0024_00014
chinese: 吃起来像，带刺的鼻屎。
english: Tastes like prickly boogers.

name: aqgy5_0024_00015
chinese: 那个时代，需要多大的勇气，才能做到这一切。
english: In that era, it takes great courage to achieve all of this.

name: aqgy5_0024_00016
chinese: 影帝哥哥，我想摸一下你们的光头。
english: Brother, I want to touch your bald head.

name: aqgy5_0025_00000
chinese: 身轻如燕，那酸爽。
english: Light as a swallow, so refreshing.

name: aqgy5_0025_00001
chinese: 生完孩子一个礼拜，孩子名字还没定呢。
english: It's been a week since I gave birth, but we haven't decided on a name for the baby yet.

name: aqgy5_0025_00002
chinese: 是不是为了孩子跟谁，你跟老公婆婆大吵，导致你对未来失去了信心。
english: Is it because of the child's custody, you had a big fight with your husband and mother-in-law, which caused you to lose confidence in the future.

name: aqgy5_0025_00003
chinese: 就是，我老公名字简单点，我希望名字高大上一点。
english: Just that, my husband's name is too simple, I hope the name can be more impressive.

name: aqgy5_0025_00004
chinese: 不好意思，最近食欲比较好，怀孕的时候憋坏了。
english: Sorry, I have had a good appetite recently and it was really bad when I was pregnant.

name: aqgy5_0025_00005
chinese: 孩子出生那刻我是懵的，我浪里小白龙竟然要做爸爸。
english: I was dumbfounded when the child was born. I, a clueless person, am going to be a father.

name: aqgy5_0025_00006
chinese: 哎，医生我和你说，我家宝宝会发光。
english: Doctor, let me tell you, my baby at home can emit light.

name: aqgy5_0025_00007
chinese: 没想到我们一个硕士一个博士都没搞定这个小宝宝。
english: I didn't expect that neither our master's degree nor our doctorate degree could handle this little baby.

name: aqgy5_0025_00008
chinese: 你们还真是真爱啊，这心理问题也能传染。
english: You guys really are true love, this psychological problem can also be contagious.

name: aqgy5_0025_00009
chinese: 我家小天使换尿布，你个大男人看什么看。
english: My little angel at home is changing diapers. What are you, a grown man, looking at?

name: aqgy5_0025_00010
chinese: 难道是公寓卫生情况不够好，让大叔产生焦虑了？
english: Is it because the cleanliness of the apartment is not good enough that the uncle feels anxious?

name: aqgy5_0025_00011
chinese: 所以你们就围绕小小布的便便聊了两个小时，我从来就没有见过像你们这么无聊的人。
english: So you guys talked about Xiao Xiao Bu's poop for two hours, I have never seen such boring people like you.

name: aqgy5_0025_00012
chinese: 太乌龙了，我都不想回忆。
english: It's too ridiculous, I don't even want to recall it.

name: aqgy5_0025_00013
chinese: 其实是我写的小说点击量太低，笔名总出现在最烂作者排行榜里，我只能不停的换马甲。
english: Actually, the click rate of the novel I wrote is too low, and my pen name always appears on the list of the worst authors. I can only keep changing pseudonyms.

name: aqgy5_0025_00014
chinese: 还是名字没有着落，出生证明也没开，怎么办啊！
english: Still no name, no birth certificate, what should I do?

name: aqgy5_0025_00015
chinese: 我们需要酒精激发一下灵感，今天晚上咱们去酒吧喝一杯，就能起个好名字了。
english: We need some alcohol to stimulate inspiration. Let's go to a bar tonight and have a drink, then we can come up with a good name.

name: aqgy5_0025_00016
chinese: 要是大力来偷孩子，一定要帮我打死他。
english: If Dali comes to kidnap the child, be sure to help me kill him.

name: aqgy5_0025_00017
chinese: 就是发朋友圈把别人屏蔽了，换我我也生气了。
english: It's like posting on Moments and blocking others, if it were me, I would also be angry.

name: aqgy5_0025_00018
chinese: 大叔你别当真，这些沙雕小说都是瞎编的。
english: Uncle, don't take it seriously. These sand sculpture novels are all made up.

name: aqgy5_0025_00019
chinese: 我还成天幻想自己有个霸道总裁。
english: I still fantasize about having a domineering CEO all day long.

name: aqgy5_0025_00020
chinese: 故事源于生活，但真正的生活可比故事凶残多。
english: The story originates from life, but real life can be much more brutal than the story.

name: aqgy5_0025_00021
chinese: 完了，耳朵也休克了。
english: It's over, my ears are also in shock.

name: aqgy5_0025_00023
chinese: 你懂的好多啊，我觉得你换了发型后形象变的智慧了很多。
english: You know a lot, I think you have become much wiser after changing your hairstyle.

name: aqgy5_0025_00024
chinese: 我再也不相信你了。
english: I will never believe you again.

name: aqgy5_0025_00025
chinese: 你看他眼神仿佛在说，爸爸，为什么我还没有名字。
english: You see his eyes seem to be saying, "Dad, why don't I have a name yet?"

name: aqgy5_0025_00026
chinese: 你们俩在这儿盯着，我写不出来。
english: The two of you stay here and watch, I can't write.

name: aqgy5_0025_00027
chinese: 我不会昧着良心出卖灵魂改小说了。
english: I will not sell my soul and betray my conscience to modify the novel.

name: aqgy5_0025_00028
chinese: 我以前左手酒杯，右手玫瑰，现在左手尿布，右手奶瓶。
english: I used to hold a wine glass in my left hand and a rose in my right hand, but now I hold a diaper in my left hand and a milk bottle in my right hand.

name: aqgy5_0026_00000
chinese: 生女吕嘉一，笑如小天使。
english: Gave birth to a daughter named Lv Jia Yi, she smiles like a little angel.

name: aqgy5_0026_00001
chinese: 宝宝那么可爱，再累都不辛苦啊。
english: The baby is so cute, it's not tiring even when I'm exhausted.

name: aqgy5_0026_00002
chinese: 虽然我赚钱水平有限，但是我花钱水平很高。
english: Although my income level is limited, my spending level is very high.

name: aqgy5_0026_00003
chinese: 看电影吃牛排，牛排可好吃了，那头牛生前一定每天都在做按摩吧。
english: Watching movies and eating steak. The steak is so delicious. That cow must have been massaged every day before it was alive.

name: aqgy5_0026_00004
chinese: 吃了这道臭豆腐炒猪心，记得死了这条心。
english: After eating this stinky tofu stir-fried pig heart, remember that this heart died.

name: aqgy5_0026_00005
chinese: 是老娘赏你一丈红，，送你上西天。
english: It's my treat to give you a red silk, and send you to the Western Heaven.

name: aqgy5_0026_00006
chinese: 今天的饭我吃定了，这事我也管定了。
english: I have decided what to eat for today's meal, and I have also taken care of this matter.

name: aqgy5_0026_00007
chinese: 再掺和这事儿你的名声就会像这道菜的味道，遭人唾弃。
english: If you get involved in this matter again, your reputation will be despised like the taste of this dish.

name: aqgy5_0026_00008
chinese: 我代表老板告诉你，明天促销明天就会结束。
english: My boss asked me to tell you that the promotion will end tomorrow.

name: aqgy5_0026_00009
chinese: 根本没有什么二人世界。
english: There is simply no such thing as a world for just the two of us.

name: aqgy5_0026_00010
chinese: 大家这么多年朋友嘛，我不想伤了和气，呵呵。
english: We have been friends for so many years, I don't want to ruin the harmony, hehe.

name: aqgy5_0026_00011
chinese: 我奶奶过世的，我爷爷一直一个人过，没有什么朋友。
english: My grandmother passed away, and my grandfather has been living alone without any friends.

name: aqgy5_0026_00012
chinese: 多漂亮的女娃，老赵，你孙子好福气啊。
english: What a beautiful girl, Lao Zhao, your grandson is so lucky.

name: aqgy5_0026_00013
chinese: 有了孩子，出门奶粉尿布，我想想就头疼。
english: With a child, going out means milk powder and diapers. Just thinking about it gives me a headache.

name: aqgy5_0026_00014
chinese: 两位老人家到底有多大的魅力能让你380度转弯。
english: How much charm do the two elderly people have to make you turn 380 degrees?

name: aqgy5_0026_00015
chinese: 哪儿好了，这次我看走眼了，那些大爷大妈确实有影响到别人，赶快停止促销。
english: Where is good? This time I made a mistake, those old folks indeed have an impact on others, quickly stop the promotion.

name: aqgy5_0026_00016
chinese: 小小布，咖喱酱姐姐来陪你了。
english: Little Bu, Curry Sauce Sister is here to accompany you.

name: aqgy5_0026_00017
chinese: 我和马大伯牛阿姨友情就这么断了，我好后悔啊。
english: My friendship with Uncle Ma and Aunt Niu has ended just like that, I regret it so much.

name: aqgy5_0026_00018
chinese: 那个宝宝好可爱。
english: That baby is so cute.

name: aqgy5_0027_00001
chinese: 比我想象中好太多了。
english: Much better than I imagined.

name: aqgy5_0027_00002
chinese: 之前的装修有那么差吗，好歹我也倾注了心血。
english: Was the previous renovation so bad? After all, I also put in a lot of effort.

name: aqgy5_0027_00003
chinese: 光是拆你的心血，我都快吐血了。
english: Just dismantling your hard work, I'm about to vomit blood.

name: aqgy5_0027_00004
chinese: 还好那个万水下捉迷藏的设计师比较靠谱，化腐朽为神奇。
english: Fortunately, that designer who plays hide and seek with the water is more reliable, turning decay into magic.

name: aqgy5_0027_00005
chinese: 等他回来之后，我们办个欢迎派对，都给老娘嗨起来。
english: After he comes back, let's throw a welcome party and have a blast.

name: aqgy5_0027_00006
chinese: 只要有吃的，什么名义都行。
english: As long as there is food, any excuse will do.

name: aqgy5_0027_00007
chinese: 你什么时候搬过来。
english: When did you move here?

name: aqgy5_0027_00009
chinese: 我终于明白你俩的意思了。
english: I finally understand what you two mean.

name: aqgy5_0027_00010
chinese: 那你凑什么热闹？
english: What are you joining in the fun for?

name: aqgy5_0027_00011
chinese: 我住这儿不太方便。
english: It's not very convenient for me to live here.

name: aqgy5_0027_00012
chinese: 你住这么久了，之前怎么没觉得不方便。
english: You have been living here for so long, why didn't you feel inconvenient before?

name: aqgy5_0027_00013
chinese: 一定会优先考虑我的，我搬过去向大力请教问题就更方便了。
english: I will definitely prioritize considering mine. It will be more convenient for me to move over and seek advice from Dali.

name: aqgy5_0027_00014
chinese: 傻子都知道他是为了接近大力。
english: Even fools know that he is trying to get close to Dalai.

name: aqgy5_0027_00016
chinese: 你说我在课件里面添加一些表情包，同学们会不会喜欢。
english: Will the students like it if I add some emojis in the courseware?

name: aqgy5_0027_00017
chinese: 我请你喝最近很红的，网红奶茶。
english: I invite you to drink the recently popular internet-famous milk tea.

name: aqgy5_0027_00018
chinese: 咱们这多年的朋友，我请你喝个奶茶怎么了。
english: We have been friends for many years, what's wrong with me treating you to a milk tea?

name: aqgy5_0027_00019
chinese: 她是矜持，就等你给她个台阶下呢。
english: She is reserved, just waiting for you to give her a way out.

name: aqgy5_0027_00020
chinese: 太不要脸了，你不是说要徒手解决的吗。
english: You are shameless. Didn't you say you would solve it with your bare hands?

name: aqgy5_0027_00021
chinese: 我这桶奶茶不但去了冰，还加了双份奶，口感更佳。
english: My milk tea not only removed the ice, but also added double portions of milk, making the taste even better.

name: aqgy5_0027_00022
chinese: 喝点甜的心情舒畅，心情舒畅才能好好上课。
english: Drinking something sweet can make you feel relaxed and only when you feel relaxed can you concentrate on studying.

name: aqgy5_0027_00024
chinese: 有什么需要帮忙的尽管开口。
english: Feel free to ask for any help you need.

name: aqgy5_0027_00025
chinese: 你们谁帮我搞定茶会，我就优先考虑谁。
english: Whoever helps me organize the tea party, I will consider them as a priority.

name: aqgy5_0027_00026
chinese: 钱太多反而对孩子的三观有不好的。
english: Having too much money can actually have a negative impact on a child's values and beliefs.

name: aqgy5_0027_00027
chinese: 如果我孩子能进勃艮第的话，一定赢在起跑线。
english: If my child can enter Burgundy, he/she will definitely win at the starting line.

name: aqgy5_0027_00028
chinese: 你有什么问题尽管问，我们全力配合。
english: Feel free to ask any questions you have, we will fully cooperate.

name: aqgy5_0027_00029
chinese: 我是想谢谢你，这么多年的照顾。
english: I want to thank you for taking care of me all these years.

name: aqgy5_0027_00030
chinese: 别回忆装修了，我怕我忍不住哭出来，这三个方案我都不喜欢。
english: Don't mention the renovation, I'm afraid I can't help but cry. I don't like any of these three options.

name: aqgy5_0027_00031
chinese: 他是说他很会社交朋友很多。
english: He said he is very good at socializing and has many friends.

name: aqgy5_0027_00032
chinese: 我们拥有一批神通广大的朋友，比如说有个朋友就是赛车手。
english: We have a group of friends with great abilities, for example, one of them is a race car driver.

name: aqgy5_0027_00033
chinese: 那对培养孩子的冒险精神倒是有帮助。
english: It is helpful for cultivating children's adventurous spirit.

name: aqgy5_0027_00034
chinese: 还有个朋友是个钢琴家。
english: I have a friend who is a pianist.

name: aqgy5_0027_00035
chinese: 当然不是，我们关系很好的。
english: Of course not, we have a very good relationship.

name: aqgy5_0027_00036
chinese: 只要胡老师开心，钱不是问题，所有准备工作我来搞定。
english: As long as Teacher Hu is happy, money is not a problem. I will take care of all the preparations.

name: aqgy5_0027_00037
chinese: 哈哈，我们家的学习氛围一直很浓。
english: Haha, the learning atmosphere in our family has always been strong.

name: aqgy5_0027_00039
chinese: 我特地买了早一班的航班想给你个惊喜啊。
english: I specifically bought an earlier flight to give you a surprise.

name: aqgy5_0027_00040
chinese: 但又想把孩子送进我们幼儿园。
english: But I also want to send my child to our kindergarten.

name: aqgy5_0027_00041
chinese: 以后遇到这种事情呢，先别急商量一下是吧。
english: In the future, if you encounter such a situation, don't rush and let's discuss it first, okay?

name: aqgy5_0028_00000
chinese: 孩子还小嘛干嘛这么破费呀。
english: Why do you spend so much money when the child is still young?

name: aqgy5_0028_00001
chinese: 那不行，礼物还是要送的嘛。
english: That won't do, the gift still needs to be given.

name: aqgy5_0028_00002
chinese: 这怎么好意思呢。
english: How can this be justified?

name: aqgy5_0028_00003
chinese: 再穷不能穷孩子嘛，小小布的婴儿车坏了，我特地买了这个。
english: Even if we are poor, we can't let the child suffer. Little Bu's baby stroller is broken, so I specially bought this one.

name: aqgy5_0028_00004
chinese: 这不是张律师的爱车吗。
english: Is this not Lawyer Zhang's car?

name: aqgy5_0028_00005
chinese: 还搭进去了两个月的生活费。
english: I also spent two months' living expenses.

name: aqgy5_0028_00008
chinese: 挺感激你给宝宝买礼物的，我们心意都收到了。
english: I am very grateful for you buying gifts for the baby, we have received your kindness.

name: aqgy5_0028_00009
chinese: 一分钱没花，让他们感受到我的心，这买卖划算啊。
english: I didn't spend a penny, let them feel my heart, this deal is worth it.

name: aqgy5_0028_00010
chinese: 嗯这个小小的模型太可爱。
english: Hmm, this small model is so cute.

name: aqgy5_0028_00011
chinese: 别那么丧气嘛，钱可以再赚，手模一辈子也就做这一回。
english: Don't be so down, money can be earned again, being a hand model is only for this time in my life.

name: aqgy5_0028_00012
chinese: 可爱的手模，还有叔叔阿姨送的礼物。
english: Cute hand model, and gifts from uncles and aunts.

name: aqgy5_0028_00013
chinese: 小小布的这个百日宴一定超完美。
english: Xiaoxiao Bu's hundred-day banquet will definitely be perfect.

name: aqgy5_0028_00015
chinese: 我是没孩子，又不是孩子死了，你遗憾毛线。
english: I don't have children, it's not like a child died, what are you regretting?

name: aqgy5_0028_00016
chinese: 你什么态度啊，我投诉你啊。
english: What's your attitude? I'm going to complain about you.

name: aqgy5_0028_00017
chinese: 你能不能不要化悲愤为食欲啊，给我留一点儿。
english: Can you please not turn your sorrow and anger into appetite, and leave me a little bit?

name: aqgy5_0028_00018
chinese: 遇点事儿就想跑，有没有点男人样子啊。
english: Whenever something happens, you want to run away. Can't you act like a real man?

name: aqgy5_0028_00019
chinese: 不赖我呀，胡老师，光驱是你砸坏的。
english: It's not my fault, Teacher Hu. The CD drive was broken by you.

name: aqgy5_0028_00020
chinese: 一个提供作案工具，一个使用工具，你俩谁都别想甩锅。
english: One provides the tools for the crime, one uses the tools, neither of you can shift the blame.

name: aqgy5_0028_00021
chinese: 我比窦娥还要冤，光驱明明是你们叫我拿来的。
english: I am even more wronged than Dou E. It was clearly you who asked me to bring the optical drive.

name: aqgy5_0028_00022
chinese: 这不公平，觉得胡老师有责任的请举手。
english: This is unfair. Those who think Teacher Hu is responsible, please raise your hand.

name: aqgy5_0028_00023
chinese: 诶呀行了，还是想想该怎么办吧。
english: Oh well, let me think about what to do.

name: aqgy5_0028_00024
chinese: 大哥，拍照是需要预约的，明天就百日宴了，来得及嘛。
english: Big brother, taking photos requires an appointment. Tomorrow is the hundredth-day banquet, can we make it in time?

name: aqgy5_0028_00025
chinese: 这张照片对于美嘉多重要，你又不是不知道，现在跟她说没了。
english: This photo is very important to Meijia, and you know it. Now tell her it's gone.

name: aqgy5_0028_00026
chinese: 育儿书上说宝宝这个时候记忆力最好。
english: The parenting book says that babies have the best memory at this stage.

name: aqgy5_0028_00027
chinese: 我先让她听着，赢在起跑线上。
english: Let me let her listen and win at the starting line.

name: aqgy5_0028_00028
chinese: 你怎么能把孩子一个人放屋里呢，万一有三长两短的。
english: How can you leave the child alone in the room? What if something bad happens?

name: aqgy5_0028_00029
chinese: 准备给宝宝做手模，正在调石膏呢。
english: I'm preparing to make a hand mold for the baby and I'm mixing plaster.

name: aqgy5_0028_00030
chinese: 你说，做什么造型好看。
english: What hairstyle looks good?

name: aqgy5_0028_00031
chinese: 象征小小布是我们爱情的结晶。
english: The little cloth symbolizes the crystallization of our love.

name: aqgy5_0028_00032
chinese: 这个主意不错。
english: This idea is good.

name: aqgy5_0028_00033
chinese: 有点难，不过我可以试试。
english: It's a bit difficult, but I can give it a try.

name: aqgy5_0028_00034
chinese: 冰箱里的蛋挞，是不是你偷吃的。
english: Did you steal the egg tart in the refrigerator?

name: aqgy5_0028_00035
chinese: 刚才还小鸟依人，现在就爱搭不理了。
english: Just now, he/she was still affectionate, but now he/she is ignoring me.

name: aqgy5_0028_00036
chinese: 那家店正在开业酬宾每天限量赠送二十份提拉米苏。
english: The store is opening and offering a limited quantity of twenty servings of Tiramisu as a complimentary gift every day.

name: aqgy5_0028_00037
chinese: 只要提前一天晚上带着咖喱酱去排队就一定能免费吃到。
english: As long as you bring curry sauce and queue up the night before, you will definitely be able to eat for free.

name: aqgy5_0028_00038
chinese: 那可是全城最好吃的提拉米苏。
english: That is the best tiramisu in the whole city.

name: aqgy5_0028_00039
chinese: 只是我没想到，张伟对我们的怨念这么深。
english: I just didn't expect that Zhang Wei would hold such deep grudges against us.

name: aqgy5_0028_00040
chinese: 摊牌吧，我得带孩子回去。
english: Let's lay our cards on the table, I have to take the child back home.

name: aqgy5_0028_00041
chinese: 怕你瞧不起我。
english: Afraid you might look down on me.

name: aqgy5_0028_00042
chinese: 不会的喜欢毛绒玩具男生内心都很温柔。
english: Boys who don't know how to like stuffed toys are all very gentle inside.

name: aqgy5_0028_00043
chinese: 小小布将来肯定是个舞蹈家。
english: Xiaoxiao Bu will definitely become a dancer in the future.

name: aqgy5_0028_00044
chinese: 你怎么搞突然袭击啊，我都没准备好。
english: Why did you suddenly attack? I wasn't ready.

name: aqgy5_0028_00045
chinese: 照片拿回来了是不是，让我来看一看。
english: Did you bring back the photos? Let me have a look.

name: aqgy5_0028_00046
chinese: 太赞了，小小布笑起来好可爱，这跟我小的时候简直一模一样。
english: It's amazing. Xiaoxiao Bu looks so cute when he smiles, just like me when I was little.

name: aqgy5_0028_00047
chinese: 最近是不是压力很大。
english: Is the pressure recently very high?

name: aqgy5_0028_00048
chinese: 日常倒霉呗，生意也不是特别顺利，估计要吃几个月泡面。
english: I'm having bad luck lately, and my business is not going very smoothly. I guess I'll have to eat instant noodles for a few months.

name: aqgy5_0028_00049
chinese: 别担心，会转运的。
english: Don't worry, it will be transported.

name: aqgy5_0029_00000
chinese: 能不能放过我，让我安安静静写会儿论文。
english: Can you please leave me alone and let me peacefully write my paper?

name: aqgy5_0029_00001
chinese: 时光荏苒，这已经是我写的第三百首诗了。
english: Time flies, this is already the three hundredth poem I have written.

name: aqgy5_0029_00002
chinese: 能不能好好说话？
english: Can we speak nicely?

name: aqgy5_0029_00003
chinese: 今天从医院回来，他忽然看到一个配音比赛在报名，只要拿到冠军，就可以见到传说中的配音大神。
english: Today, after returning from the hospital, he suddenly saw a dubbing competition being held for registration. As long as he wins the championship, he can meet the legendary dubbing master.

name: aqgy5_0029_00004
chinese: 医生说少吃辛辣食物，酒也不行，馋的话就吃个水果吧。
english: The doctor said to eat less spicy food and no alcohol. If you're craving, just eat a fruit.

name: aqgy5_0029_00005
chinese: 就是感谢大家的照顾，来，喝。
english: Thank you all for taking care of me, come, let's drink.

name: aqgy5_0029_00006
chinese: 好端端的干嘛咒自己啊，就算不喝这碗酒，小小布遇到困难，我们也会出手帮忙的。
english: Why curse yourself for no reason? Even if you don't drink this glass of wine, we will still lend a hand to help Xiao Bu when he encounters difficulties.

name: aqgy5_0029_00007
chinese: 我说的不是普通困难，而是更极端的情况。
english: What I'm talking about is not ordinary difficulty, but more extreme situations.

name: aqgy5_0029_00008
chinese: 不过放心，只要尽早治疗康复的几率还是很高的。
english: But don't worry, as long as you receive early treatment, the chances of recovery are still very high.

name: aqgy5_0029_00009
chinese: 这是我小学作文比赛的奖状，是我文学道路上的第一个荣誉。
english: This is the certificate I received from the elementary school essay competition, which is the first honor on my literary journey.

name: aqgy5_0029_00010
chinese: 小小布以后再写作道路上的表现一定会让你们瞠目结舌的。
english: Xiaoxiao Bu's future performance on the writing road will definitely leave you all amazed.

name: aqgy5_0029_00012
chinese: 我一口盐汽水喷死你，十八年后这黄瓜早就化成灰了。
english: I will spray you with a mouthful of salt soda, and after eighteen years, this cucumber will have turned into ashes.

name: aqgy5_0029_00013
chinese: 这些叔叔阿姨混的没有我好，他会来找你们求助吗。
english: These uncles and aunts are not as good as me. Will he come to you for help?

name: aqgy5_0029_00014
chinese: 非说我们是什么成功人士，都被他绕进去了。
english: He managed to twist our words and make us seem like successful people.

name: aqgy5_0029_00015
chinese: 毕竟他描述的未来实在是太美好了。
english: After all, the future he described is really too beautiful.

name: aqgy5_0029_00016
chinese: 我肯定是名大律师了。
english: I am definitely a famous lawyer now.

name: aqgy5_0029_00017
chinese: 我维护社会长治久安，对每个人都十二分实诚，简称长安十二实诚。
english: I maintain social stability and security, and I am extremely sincere to everyone. It is abbreviated as "Chang'an Twelve Sincerity".

name: aqgy5_0029_00018
chinese: 我一向崇尚德智体美劳全面。
english: I have always advocated for comprehensive development in morality, intelligence, physical fitness, aesthetics, and labor.

name: aqgy5_0029_00019
chinese: 十几年后我必然是一代文豪，我可以送小小布我的签名。
english: After more than ten years, I will definitely become a literary genius. I can give Xiaoxiao Bu my autograph.

name: aqgy5_0029_00020
chinese: 要不我们帮帮他吧，早点成全了她，世界就清净了。
english: How about we help him? It would be better to fulfill her earlier, and the world would be peaceful.

name: aqgy5_0029_00021
chinese: 我到有个锦囊妙计，明天我雇个专业的拟音团队回来保你赢。
english: I have a brilliant plan. Tomorrow, I will hire a professional phonetic team to ensure your victory.

name: aqgy5_0029_00022
chinese: 你就是个储蓄罐，这算作弊，被查到会失去参赛资格的。
english: You are just a piggy bank, this is considered cheating, and if caught, you will lose your eligibility to participate.

name: aqgy5_0029_00023
chinese: 这是我发明的一道创意料理天下绝无他人知晓。
english: This is a creative dish that I invented, unknown to anyone else in the world.

name: aqgy5_0029_00024
chinese: 怎么样，轻巧，方便携带，独一无二。
english: How about it, lightweight, convenient to carry, unique.

name: aqgy5_0029_00025
chinese: 都怪你呀，我还得再想一些糗事儿。
english: It's all your fault, I have to think of some embarrassing things again.

name: aqgy5_0029_00026
chinese: 我送的信物最好。
english: The token I gave is the best.

name: aqgy5_0029_00027
chinese: 能不能给我个称号，比如小小布首席贵人或者守护者队长之类。
english: Can you give me a title, like Chief Noble of Little Cloth or Captain of the Guardians?

name: aqgy5_0029_00028
chinese: 那我就不客气了啊。
english: Then I won't be polite anymore.

name: aqgy5_0029_00029
chinese: 大家都是守护者，人人平等不分先后，谁在吵，取消他资格。
english: Everyone is a guardian, equal and without distinction. Whoever is causing trouble, their qualification will be revoked.

name: aqgy5_0029_00030
chinese: 感谢我们六个人的帮忙，对我们有必胜的信心，我们一定没问题。
english: Thank you for the help from the six of us. We have confidence in winning and we will definitely be fine.

name: aqgy5_0029_00031
chinese: 可以作为我们所有人的幸福。
english: Can be the happiness for all of us.

name: aqgy5_0029_00032
chinese: 这玩儿意当信物，太草率了吧！
english: This is just a token, isn't it too hasty!

name: aqgy5_0030_00000
chinese: 我被打工超市给辞退了。
english: I was fired by the part-time supermarket.

name: aqgy5_0030_00001
chinese: 别不开心啦再找份工作不就好了。
english: Don't be unhappy, just find another job.

name: aqgy5_0030_00002
chinese: 距离800米工作简单每天只需午夜上班1小时报酬丰厚。
english: The work is simple, only requires one hour of work at midnight every day, and the pay is generous, with a distance of 800 meters.

name: aqgy5_0030_00003
chinese: 这么一听还真有点儿杀马特的小兴奋。
english: This sounds a bit like a "kill the horse" kind of excitement.

name: aqgy5_0030_00004
chinese: 这么说我刚才被调戏了整整五分钟。
english: So you're saying that I was harassed for a full five minutes just now.

name: aqgy5_0030_00005
chinese: 外卖机器人的主人要求赔偿，无人驾驶汽车的车主觉得自己没错，双方僵持不下，扯皮到现在。
english: The owner of the food delivery robot demands compensation, while the owner of the self-driving car believes they are not at fault. Both sides are deadlocked and still arguing.

name: aqgy5_0030_00006
chinese: 你到底对瓦无力做了什么，他现在识别物品都是胡球麻擦的。
english: What did you do to make him unable to recognize objects properly now? He is just randomly touching things.

name: aqgy5_0030_00007
chinese: 你就把他想象成一个天赋异禀的孩子，有多好的老师，他就有多大的可能。
english: Just imagine him as a gifted child, the better the teacher he has, the greater his potential.

name: aqgy5_0030_00008
chinese: 我带你去一个全是异性的地方，你一定能遇到你的夏娃的。
english: I will take you to a place full of the opposite sex, and you will definitely meet your Eve.

name: aqgy5_0030_00009
chinese: 恋爱就是约会，一起吃饭看电影逛街，等时机成熟了还能牵手打个啵。
english: Translation: Love is about dating, eating together, watching movies, and shopping. When the time is right, we can also hold hands and give a kiss.

name: aqgy5_0030_00010
chinese: 不合适吧，我都结婚了。
english: It's not appropriate, I'm already married.

name: aqgy5_0030_00011
chinese: 我有男朋友了。
english: I have a boyfriend now.

name: aqgy5_0030_00012
chinese: 因为你幽默又风趣，而且你是我认识的所有男孩子里脸最方的。
english: Because you are humorous and witty, and you have the squarest face among all the boys I know.

name: aqgy5_0030_00013
chinese: 一下午就把一本书的题都做出来了。
english: I finished all the exercises in a book in the afternoon.

name: aqgy5_0030_00014
chinese: 这绝对是一个里程碑式的夜晚。
english: This is definitely a milestone night.

name: aqgy5_0030_00015
chinese: 如果你真的喜欢她，我们帮你们安排约会，你可以认认真真的追她。
english: If you really like her, we can help arrange a date for you, and you can pursue her sincerely.

name: aqgy5_0030_00017
chinese: 好吧我说实话，瓦无力为了爱情私奔了。
english: Okay, I'll tell the truth. Wa Wuli eloped for love.

name: aqgy5_0031_00001
chinese: 第一次摸我脸的时候，就是这种感觉。
english: When you touched my face for the first time, it was this kind of feeling.

name: aqgy5_0031_00002
chinese: 你这样只会给他担心的，男人不在身边我们要学会好好照顾自己。
english: You will only worry him like this. When a man is not around, we need to learn how to take care of ourselves properly.

name: aqgy5_0031_00003
chinese: 送你们个礼物。
english: I'm giving you a gift.

name: aqgy5_0031_00005
chinese: 袁教授千辛万苦培养出出杂交水稻不是让你们吃饱了撑得，为所欲为的。
english: Professor Yuan has worked hard to develop hybrid rice for you to eat and be satisfied, and not for you to overindulge and do whatever you want.

name: aqgy5_0031_00006
chinese: 觉得我很有潜力，找我约稿写小说呢。
english: I think I have great potential, so they want to invite me to write novels.

name: aqgy5_0031_00007
chinese: 确实是那个母亲不对，她股票投资失败，导致资产缩水，又没及时制定安全的理财计划。
english: It is indeed the mother's fault. Her stock investment failed, causing her assets to shrink, and she did not timely develop a secure financial plan.

name: aqgy5_0031_00008
chinese: 怎么花钱都是人家的自由，我们只是帮忙调解就好，又不是帮人家当会计。
english: How people spend their money is their own freedom. We are just here to help mediate, not to be their accountants.

name: aqgy5_0031_00009
chinese: 火辣辣的我喜欢。
english: I like myself hot and spicy.

name: aqgy5_0031_00010
chinese: 我幸福到想发出土拨鼠的尖叫了。
english: I am so happy that I want to scream like a groundhog.

name: aqgy5_0031_00011
chinese: 下面有请我们爱情的结晶。
english: Please welcome the fruit of our love.

name: aqgy5_0031_00012
chinese: 现在老龄化严重以后的小夫妻不仅要养孩子还要养老。
english: Now, young couples not only have to raise children but also have to support the elderly due to severe aging.

name: aqgy5_0031_00013
chinese: 现在的小夫妻谁还和长辈一起住啊。
english: Who still lives with their elders among young couples nowadays?

name: aqgy5_0031_00014
chinese: 千万不能掀桌，不然大力会不高兴的。
english: Never flip the table, otherwise Dali will be unhappy.

name: aqgy5_0031_00015
chinese: 很好，小伟你入戏了。
english: Very good, Xiaowei, you are immersed in the role.

name: aqgy5_0031_00016
chinese: 你什么时候回来啊？
english: When are you coming back?

name: aqgy5_0031_00017
chinese: 子乔说这个能消毒，洗宝宝餐具最合适不过了，把消毒柜的钱都省了。
english: Ziqiao said this can disinfect, it is the most suitable for washing baby utensils, saving all the money for the disinfection cabinet.

name: aqgy5_0031_00018
chinese: 很多事情我们女生能做就不用靠男人。
english: Many things we girls can do without relying on men.

name: aqgy5_0031_00019
chinese: 你能搞定的事情越多，你就越不想男人，你就越自信。
english: The more things you can handle, the less you want a man, and the more confident you become.

name: aqgy5_0031_00020
chinese: 有没有一种我好厉害的感觉。
english: Is there a feeling that I am very capable?

name: aqgy5_0031_00021
chinese: 我做的饭菜营养更全面。
english: The meals I cook are more nutritious and well-rounded.

name: aqgy5_0031_00022
chinese: 宝贝，在学校过的怎么样，开心吗？
english: Baby, how are you doing at school? Are you happy?

name: aqgy5_0031_00023
chinese: 我最近喜欢上了一个小哥哥。
english: I recently fell in love with a guy.

name: aqgy5_0031_00024
chinese: 别担心，你妈是学霸，补习的事情包在她身上了。
english: Don't worry, your mom is a top student, she will take care of the tutoring.

name: aqgy5_0031_00025
chinese: 关键是你妈被你爸的才华所吸引，我们一见钟情。
english: The key is that your mother was attracted by your father's talent, and we fell in love at first sight.

name: aqgy5_0031_00026
chinese: 我还听说我妈本来和一个律师谈的挺好的，后来你通过给搅黄了人家的好事。
english: I also heard that my mom was originally having a good conversation with a lawyer, but later you ruined it by interfering with their good thing.

name: aqgy5_0031_00027
chinese: 首先我们要感谢爸爸辛苦劳动，为这个家真的足够的家用。
english: First of all, we want to thank Dad for his hard work, which is really enough for the household expenses of this family.

name: aqgy5_0031_00028
chinese: 这一周每天早上我都安排了不同的晨练，这样就能找到性价比最高的锻炼项目了。
english: This week, I have arranged different morning exercises every day so that I can find the exercise project with the highest cost-effectiveness.

name: aqgy5_0031_00029
chinese: 这周每天都起这么早。
english: I wake up early every day this week.

name: aqgy5_0031_00030
chinese: 真的好简单哦。
english: It's really simple.

name: aqgy5_0031_00031
chinese: 爸爸带我去吃好吃的还带我去打卡拍照。
english: Dad took me to eat delicious food and also took me to take photos for check-in.

name: aqgy5_0031_00032
chinese: 对不起爸，我不知道相册这么贵。
english: Sorry dad, I didn't know the photo album was so expensive.

name: aqgy5_0031_00033
chinese: 我看不如承认实验失败，尽早早散了吧。
english: I think it's better to admit the failure of the experiment and disband as soon as possible.

name: aqgy5_0031_00034
chinese: 友情提示，我可是青春期少女，如果家庭不和睦的话，我可能会离家出走的哟！
english: Friendly reminder, I am a teenage girl in puberty. If my family is not harmonious, I may run away from home!

name: aqgy5_0031_00035
chinese: 这香香的味道闻起来就很幸福，我觉得自己好厉害。
english: This fragrant smell makes me feel happy, I think I'm awesome.

name: aqgy5_0031_00036
chinese: 面包管饱，豇豆特意多放了盐，下饭。
english: The bread is filling, and the green beans are intentionally seasoned with extra salt, perfect for pairing with rice.

name: aqgy5_0031_00037
chinese: 都是我不好，花光了家里的钱。
english: It's all my fault, I spent all the money at home.

name: aqgy5_0031_00038
chinese: 我也没想到大力这么认真，简直就是个狼灭。
english: I didn't expect Da Li to be so serious, he's like a wolf exterminator.

name: aqgy5_0031_00039
chinese: 仔细想饭后小点心忘记准备。
english: Forgot to prepare a small snack after dinner when thinking carefully.

name: aqgy5_0031_00040
chinese: 还有小点心。
english: There are also some snacks.

name: aqgy5_0031_00041
chinese: 赵海堂，我对你很失望。
english: Zhao Haitang, I am very disappointed in you.

name: aqgy5_0031_00042
chinese: 你总是强调计划计划又太理想化，而且冷冰冰的没有人情味儿
english: You always emphasize that the plan is too idealistic and lacks warmth.

name: aqgy5_0031_00043
chinese: 要不是你花光了钱，我本来不用执行这么苛刻的计划的。
english: If it weren't for you spending all the money, I wouldn't have to carry out such a harsh plan.

name: aqgy5_0031_00044
chinese: 天底下哪有人去了次游乐场就破产的，这不科学。
english: Who in the world goes to an amusement park and goes bankrupt? This is not logical.

name: aqgy5_0031_00045
chinese: 你，过分了啊！
english: You, that's too much!

name: aqgy5_0031_00046
chinese: 话都说到这份儿上了，实验终止吧。
english: The talk has reached this point, let's terminate the experiment.

name: aqgy5_0031_00047
chinese: 离就离。
english: Leave if you want to leave.

name: aqgy5_0031_00048
chinese: 你是天底下最烂的爸爸。
english: You are the worst dad in the world.

name: aqgy5_0031_00049
chinese: 我不是故意的。
english: I didn't mean to.

name: aqgy5_0031_00050
chinese: 原来一家人可以这么开心。
english: The whole family can be so happy together.

name: aqgy5_0031_00051
chinese: 我们一起吃东西，一起出去玩玩。
english: We eat together and go out to have fun together.

name: aqgy5_0031_00052
chinese: 你会不会觉得我很傻。
english: Do you think I'm stupid?

name: aqgy5_0031_00053
chinese: 我爸妈也是一直做生意不怎么管我，我也是孤零零一个人。
english: My parents have always been busy with their business and don't really take care of me. I am also all alone.

name: aqgy5_0031_00054
chinese: 因为你喜欢写作，你想向你父母证明你自己。
english: Because you enjoy writing, you want to prove yourself to your parents.

name: aqgy5_0031_00055
chinese: 这就是我梦想的生活啊，大力简直和我太合拍了。
english: This is the life I dream of, Dalai is just perfect for me.

name: aqgy5_0031_00056
chinese: 喂老公
english: Hey husbandd

name: aqgy5_0031_00057
chinese: 好好工作，努力赚钱。
english: Work hard and earn money diligently.

name: aqgy5_0031_00058
chinese: 要不是一个人呆着我都不知道我这么棒。
english: If I didn't spend time alone, I wouldn't know how amazing I am.

name: aqgy5_0031_00059
chinese: 男人都是大猪蹄子，再不回来，你老婆可要单飞喽。
english: Men are all big pig's feet. If you don't come back soon, your wife may fly solo.

name: aqgy5_0032_00000
chinese: 我坐的离你们远一点，免得传染给你们
english: I will sit further away from you all to avoid infecting you.

name: aqgy5_0032_00001
chinese: 上天一定是被我感动。
english: The heavens must have been moved by me.

name: aqgy5_0032_00002
chinese: 不许再给医生发信息啦。
english: Stop sending messages to the doctor.

name: aqgy5_0032_00003
chinese: 我要陪着小看着好起来，你要怕传染，你躲远一点。
english: I want to accompany and watch Xiaoxiao get better. You should be afraid of getting infected, so stay away a little.

name: aqgy5_0032_00004
chinese: 我怕传染，想当初你重感冒是谁寸步不离的照顾你。
english: I'm afraid of getting infected. Who was the one who took care of you every step of the way when you had a bad cold?

name: aqgy5_0032_00005
chinese: 结果你把感冒传染给我，自己倒好了你忘啦。
english: You gave me a cold, but you forgot to take care of yourself.

name: aqgy5_0032_00006
chinese: 你最爱的人是小小布，小小布最爱的人也是你。
english: The person you love the most is Xiaoxiao Bu, and Xiaoxiao Bu's favorite person is also you.

name: aqgy5_0032_00007
chinese: 到时候就更难治。
english: It will be even harder to treat then.

name: aqgy5_0032_00008
chinese: 仙女们打造一枚戒指，带上戒指，就能获得幸福。
english: The fairies create a ring, wearing the ring can bring happiness.

name: aqgy5_0032_00009
chinese: 我配那枚戒指啊。
english: I want that ring.

name: aqgy5_0032_00010
chinese: 作孽呀！
english: What a disaster!!

name: aqgy5_0032_00011
chinese: 我一会儿还要给敬老院慰问演出做准备呢，你自己想办法吧，临走前送你一首歌。
english: I still need to prepare for the performance to visit the nursing home later. You figure it out yourself. Before I leave, I'll give you a song.

name: aqgy5_0032_00012
chinese: 人感觉舒服多了，嗯嗯，嗓子好像也通了。
english: I feel much better, hmm, my throat seems to be clear too.

name: aqgy5_0032_00013
chinese: 我怎么突然觉得冷啊。
english: Why do I suddenly feel cold?

name: aqgy5_0032_00014
chinese: 我现在病着，美嘉既要照顾我还要照顾小小布。
english: I am currently sick, Meijia has to take care of me and also take care of Xiaoxiao Bu.

name: aqgy5_0032_00015
chinese: 我真的太感动了谢谢你海棠。
english: I am really touched, thank you Haitang.

name: aqgy5_0032_00016
chinese: 这两天你复习太用功了一定是累了，什么都别想了，好好休息吧。
english: These past few days, you have been studying very hard. You must be tired. Don't think about anything and rest well.

name: aqgy5_0032_00017
chinese: 但至少你可以陪着大力嘛。
english: But at least you can accompany Dali, right?

name: aqgy5_0032_00018
chinese: 朋友之间有爱，亲人之间有爱，情侣之间有爱。
english: Friends have love between them, family members have love between them, and couples have love between them.

name: aqgy5_0032_00019
chinese: 真的会让人更幸福，这种感觉很好。
english: It really makes people happier, this feeling is very good.

name: aqgy5_0033_00000
chinese: 抢生意抢到家门口了，你居然不通知我。
english: You actually didn't notify me when you snatched the business right to our doorstep.

name: aqgy5_0033_00001
chinese: 妈，那我带你去隔壁转转。
english: Mom, let me take you next door for a walk.

name: aqgy5_0033_00002
chinese: 哎呀，听说你胃口很好，好多吃一点。
english: Oh, I heard that you have a good appetite, eat a little more.

name: aqgy5_0033_00003
chinese: 说多少次了，你们家的衣服和网店的图片不一致。
english: I've said it many times, the clothes in your house are not consistent with the pictures on the online store.

name: aqgy5_0033_00004
chinese: 放心，我妈平常还是挺和蔼的。
english: Don't worry, my mom is usually quite amiable.

name: aqgy5_0033_00005
chinese: 很好，我警告你们，不要耍花样。
english: Very well, I warn you, don't play tricks.

name: aqgy5_0033_00006
chinese: 你妈哪里和蔼了，我感觉她浑身散发着杀气。
english: Your mother is so kind, I feel that she exudes a murderous aura.

name: aqgy5_0033_00007
chinese: 阿姨你太有律师风采了，从看到你的第一眼起我就明白了大力如此优秀的原因。
english: Auntie, you are so impressive with your lawyer style. From the moment I saw you, I understood the reason for your excellence.

name: aqgy5_0033_00008
chinese: 现在的年轻人谁不渴望一段倾城之恋，浪漫很重要。
english: Nowadays, who among the young people doesn't long for a passionate love affair? Romance is crucial.

name: aqgy5_0033_00009
chinese: 快夸我心灵手巧。
english: Hurry and compliment my resourcefulness.

name: aqgy5_0033_00010
chinese: 所以我就做了小礼物。
english: So I made a small gift.

name: aqgy5_0033_00011
chinese: 诶一菲，交给我吧办晚会我最拿手了。
english: Hey Yifei, leave it to me to organize the party. I'm the best at it.

name: aqgy5_0033_00012
chinese: 我一定要给你妈一个惊喜。
english: I must give your mother a surprise.

name: aqgy5_0033_00013
chinese: 吹拉弹唱 最强王者。
english: Playing wind instruments, plucking strings, and singing, the strongest king.

name: aqgy5_0033_00014
chinese: 哎呀，哦天呐这不是张律师。
english: Oh my, isn't this Lawyer Zhang?

name: aqgy5_0033_00015
chinese: 中秋佳节，金风送爽，今天我们欢聚一堂，赏良辰美景，度欢乐时光。
english: On the Mid-Autumn Festival, with the cool autumn breeze, today we gather together to appreciate the beautiful scenery and enjoy a joyful time.

name: aqgy5_0033_00016
chinese: 赞助都是我精心挑选。
english: All sponsorships are carefully selected by me.

name: aqgy5_0033_00017
chinese: 我们小区住的都是开明人，百无禁忌。
english: We all live in a community of open-minded people, with no taboos.

name: aqgy5_0033_00018
chinese: 感谢真爱咖啡馆提供的美味月饼咖啡，咖啡要趁热，脱单要趁早。
english: Thank you for the delicious mooncake coffee provided by True Love Cafe. Coffee should be enjoyed while hot, and being single should be resolved as soon as possible.

name: aqgy5_0033_00019
chinese: 快乐的时光过得飞快。
english: Happy times pass by quickly.

name: aqgy5_0033_00020
chinese: 中秋是全家团圆的日子。
english: Mid-Autumn Festival is a day for family reunion.

name: aqgy5_0033_00021
chinese: 我要谢谢我的朋友。
english: I want to thank my friend.

name: aqgy5_0033_00022
chinese: 但是因为第一次见面我太紧张了，就搞砸了。
english: But because I was too nervous during the first meeting, I messed up.

name: aqgy5_0033_00023
chinese: 中秋快乐！
english: Happy Mid-Autumn Festival!!

name: aqgy5_0033_00024
chinese: 但请相信我，再给我些时间我会变得越来越好。
english: But please believe me, give me some more time and I will become better and better.

name: aqgy5_0034_00000
chinese: 我觉得咖喱酱凶多吉少，安慰计划都准备好了吗？
english: I think the curry sauce is more harmful than beneficial. Are the comfort plans ready?

name: aqgy5_0034_00001
chinese: 你说我们会无家可归吗？
english: Will we be homeless, you say?

name: aqgy5_0034_00002
chinese: 可是这里，能回忆的东西太多了，我都舍不得。
english: But here, there are too many things to remember, I can't bear to let go of them.

name: aqgy5_0034_00003
chinese: 我现在终于理解，小破球的心情了。
english: I finally understand the feeling of the little ball now.

name: aqgy5_0034_00004
chinese: 房子都没了，要钱有什么用？
english: We lost our houses, what's the use of money?

name: aqgy5_0034_00005
chinese: 在这住久了，怪舍不得。
english: I have lived here for a long time, I feel reluctant to leave.

name: aqgy5_0034_00006
chinese: 这个橙子呆了这么久，跟我们都有感情了。
english: This orange has been with us for so long, we have developed an emotional attachment to it.

name: aqgy5_0034_00007
chinese: 你很难找到比我更靠谱的卖家了。
english: It's hard to find a more reliable seller than me.

name: aqgy5_0034_00008
chinese: 我总觉得有私房钱藏到角落里了。
english: I always feel like there is hidden money in the corner.

name: aqgy5_0034_00009
chinese: 已经习惯这种哭笑不得的感觉了，以后散了，再也没有了。
english: I have already gotten used to this feeling of being unable to laugh or cry. After we break up, there will never be it again.

name: aqgy5_0034_00010
chinese: 这里的房子很暖，景色很美，失去时才发现它的珍贵。
english: The house here is warm, the scenery is beautiful, and it is only when it is lost that its value is realized.

name: aqgy5_0034_00011
chinese: 没想到离别来的如此措不急防。
english: I didn't expect the parting to come so suddenly and catch me off guard.

name: aqgy5_0034_00012
chinese: 我能通过考试多亏了大家，本来我都想放弃了。
english: Thanks to everyone, I was able to pass the exam. I was about to give up.

name: aqgy5_0034_00013
chinese: 开心嘛，我要买下这一整套沙发。
english: I'm happy, I want to buy this whole set of sofas.

name: aqgy5_0034_00014
chinese: 就算明天是世界末日，我们得披上战袍，去跳，去跑。
english: Even if tomorrow is the end of the world, we have to put on our battle robes, and go dancing, go running.

name: aqgy5_0034_00015
chinese: 开不开心我们自己说了算，你给我振作点，别让我瞧不起你！
english: Whether we are happy or not is up to us to decide. Pull yourself together and don't make me look down on you!

name: aqgy5_0034_00016
chinese: 我和曾小贤决定，在爱情公寓择日举办婚礼。
english: Myself and Zeng Xiaoxian have decided to hold our wedding in the Love Apartment on a chosen date.

name: aqgy5_0036_00000
chinese: 今天我们齐聚一堂，共同见证两位新人的甜蜜时刻。
english: Today we gather together to witness the sweet moment of the two newlyweds.

name: aqgy5_0036_00001
chinese: 等一下。
english: Wait a moment.

name: aqgy5_0036_00002
chinese: 对啊，不光婚礼结束了，我们这剧也结束了。
english: Yeah, not only did the wedding end, but our drama also ended.

name: aqgy5_0036_00003
chinese: 是不是我亲的不够好，我可以改进的。
english: Is it because I am not affectionate enough? I can improve.

name: aqgy5_0036_00004
chinese: 你不会是想逃婚吧？
english: Are you trying to escape marriage?

name: aqgy5_0036_00005
chinese: 我有种不好的预感。
english: I have a bad feeling.

name: aqgy5_0036_00006
chinese: 所谓江湖，一诺千金，落子无悔，六亲不认。
english: In the so-called rivers and lakes, a promise is worth a thousand gold, making a move without regret, and not recognizing any relatives.

name: aqgy5_0036_00007
chinese: 你站那么远干什么啊，过来呀。
english: Why are you standing so far away? Come over here.

name: aqgy5_0036_00008
chinese: 到时候记得帮我做当示范啊。
english: Remember to help me do the demonstration when the time comes.

name: aqgy5_0036_00009
chinese: 你着什么急啊，婚礼一会儿就开始了，你现在要做的就是好好休息养精蓄锐。
english: Why are you in such a hurry? The wedding will start soon. What you need to do now is to rest and recharge.

name: aqgy5_0036_00010
chinese: 今天是大喜的日子，咱们不谈离别。
english: Today is a joyful day, let's not talk about parting.

name: aqgy5_0036_00011
chinese: 你的幸福来了！
english: Your happiness has arrived!

name: aqgy5_0036_00012
chinese: 只要你认错态度够好，就算你什么错都没犯，我还是会原谅你的。
english: As long as you have a good attitude and admit your mistakes, even if you haven't done anything wrong, I will still forgive you.

name: aqgy5_0036_00013
chinese: 婚礼马上就要开始了，内心有点儿小兴奋外加小躁动。
english: The wedding is about to start, and I am a little excited and a little restless.

name: aqgy5_0036_00014
chinese: 有点用啊，第一句我好像记住了。
english: It's a bit useful, I think I remember the first sentence.

name: aqgy5_0036_00015
chinese: 你说我不专业，我说你乱来。
english: You say I'm not professional, I say you're being reckless.

name: aqgy5_0036_00016
chinese: 我们都找到了自己人生的目标。
english: We have all found our life goals.

name: aqgy5_0036_00017
chinese: 子乔只用两场派对就把你变成负资产。
english: Ziqiao turned you into a negative asset with just two parties.

name: aqgy5_0036_00018
chinese: 要不我们去花坛找些花花草草先做个捧花应急。
english: How about we go to the flower bed and find some flowers and plants to make a bouquet for emergency use?

name: aqgy5_0036_00019
chinese: 你还有没有公德心啊，再说谁会拿着绿化带结婚啊？
english: Do you still have no sense of public morality? Besides, who would get married holding a green belt?

name: aqgy5_0036_00020
chinese: 是不是觉得高手在民间？
english: Do you think that experts are among the people?

name: aqgy5_0036_00021
chinese: 要不我们把胡老师的捧花换给美佳姐用，用两次环保低碳。
english: How about we exchange the bouquet for Meijia sister instead of Hu teacher, and use it twice for environmental protection and low carbon.

name: aqgy5_0036_00022
chinese: 江湖规矩，说一是一，就算对方是自己老公也决不能徇私。
english: In the world of rivers and lakes, there are rules. One must be fair and just, even if the other person is one's own husband, one must never show favoritism.

name: aqgy5_0036_00023
chinese: 你们早料到吕子乔会弄坏我的捧花，所以留了个备份的小黑那里。
english: You guys already expected that Lu Ziqiao would ruin my bouquet, so you left a backup with Xiaohei.

name: aqgy5_0036_00024
chinese: 我希望很多年以后回忆起这段日子我可以说，这辈子足够了。
english: I hope that many years later, when I look back on this period, I can say that this lifetime is enough.

name: aqgy5_0036_00025
chinese: 我的期待值可是很高的哟！
english: My expectations are very high, you know!

name: aqgy5_0036_00026
chinese: 再见爱情公寓。
english: Goodbye, Love Apartment

name: test1_00000
chinese: 不知道这些男的为什么这么激动？
english: I don't know why these men are so excited.

name: test1_00001
chinese: 大家看的出来，这个长相很符合这个行业的要求！
english: Everyone can see that this appearance is very suitable for the requirements of this industry!

name: test1_00002
chinese: 无论我在台上干什么，只要我上台都会忍不住地看我几眼。
english: No matter what I do on stage, as long as I go on stage, I can't help but take a few glances at myself.

name: test1_00003
chinese: 大家看的出来，眼睛非常的小，关键眼睛小也就算了，关键是它非常调皮的微微上扬。
english: Everyone can see that the eyes are very small, and the key is not only that the eyes are small, but also that they are very mischievously slightly upturned.

name: test1_00004
chinese: 天啊，古代人口味这么重的吗？
english: Oh my god, did people in ancient times have such strong tastes?

name: test1_00005
chinese: 长相问题带给我最大的困扰是什么，就是在生活中总会有人莫名其妙情不自禁的要安慰我。
english: What is the biggest trouble that my appearance brings to me? It is that there are always people inexplicably wanting to comfort me in life.

name: test1_00006
chinese: 我说领导啊，你现在是人是狗？
english: Leader, are you a human or a dog now?

name: test1_00007
chinese: 我想问一下在座的有山东的老乡吗？
english: I want to ask if there are any fellow Shandong natives present?.

name: test1_00008
chinese: 不好意思我们配不上你们。
english: Sorry, we can't match up to you.

name: test2_00000
chinese: 我感觉我们家可能就是温饱问题，衣食住行什么都不缺。
english: I feel that our family may only have the problem of basic needs, we lack nothing in terms of clothing, food, housing, and transportation.

name: test2_00001
chinese: 然后只是去读了一个研究生，也不是前十、最顶级的那种。
english: Then I just went to pursue a master's degree, but it's not one of the top ten or the highest level.

name: test2_00002
chinese: 但是你说有很多的钱过那种纸醉迷金的生活是不大可能的。
english: But you said it is highly unlikely to live a life of excessive luxury and indulgence with a lot of money.

name: test2_00003
chinese: 我们看到的人太高了太高了，对于我们来说。
english: The people we see are too tall, too tall for us.

name: test2_00004
chinese: 能够达到他们的十分之一，我们就很满足了。
english: If we can achieve one-tenth of what they have, we will be very satisfied.

name: test2_00005
chinese: 你觉得我们已经在罗马了，但那只是你觉得的罗马，我们的罗马可能再更远的地方。
english: You think we are already in Rome, but that is just your perception of Rome. Our Rome may be even further away.

name: test2_00006
chinese: 我感觉要支撑不起你的读书啊。
english: I feel like I can't support your education.

name: test2_00007
chinese: 天呐，不能给爸妈太大的压力，而且我爸妈可能为此卖掉了一套房子。
english: Oh my god, I can't give my parents too much pressure, and my parents may have sold a house for this.

name: test2_00008
chinese: 前几天我们聊天的时候，我爸还说起这件事情，技术说没卖房子现在就怎么怎么样。
english: A few days ago when we were chatting, my dad mentioned this matter. He said that he hasn't sold the house and now it's like this and that.

name: test2_00009
chinese: 我说我们家那个时候是不是真的很困难啊？
english: Was it really difficult for us at that time?

name: test2_00010
chinese: 我爸说不会啊，那个时候不会啊。
english: My dad said he couldn't do it, he couldn't do it at that time.

name: test2_00011
chinese: 我妈可能是想我成绩好学习好。
english: My mom probably wants me to have good grades and study well.

name: test2_00012
chinese: 实际上我想说的是我已经懂事了，我宁可不读书了我也不愿意父母为我做这种牺牲。
english: Actually, what I want to say is that I have grown up and I would rather not study than have my parents make such sacrifices for me.

name: test2_00013
chinese: 然后我就是盖着报纸睡了两天。
english: Then I slept under the newspaper for two days.

name: test2_00014
chinese: 当然我们那边也有条件真的很好的，在市中心住那种最顶级的。
english: Of course, we also have really good conditions over there, living in the top-level ones in the city center.

name: test2_00015
chinese: 这个国家学几年，换一下国家，你未来不知道他们还会去英国还是什么。

chinese: 没有人再会赶我，说房子我不租了，你快走。
english: No one will chase me anymore. I won't rent the house anymore. Please leave quickly.

name: test12_00033
chinese: 我身边朋友都知道我是一个钱串子，她们都叫我钱串子。
english: My friends around me all know that I am a money lover, and they all call me a money lover.

name: test13_00000
chinese: 拢共下来怎么说呢，应该不到几百万吧。
english: How much would it cost in total? It should be less than a few million.

name: test13_00001
chinese: 要多一点，那很正常。
english: It's normal to want more.

name: test13_00002
chinese: 我就不知道该怎么说，认为我家里有钱吗，认为我家里没钱吗？
english: I just don't know what to say. Do you think my family is rich? Do you think my family is poor?

name: test13_00003
chinese: 十万块钱够吗，我心想十万块钱有什么不够的，在国内你横着走都可以。
english: Is 100,000 yuan enough? I thought to myself, what can't be enough with 100,000 yuan? In China, you can walk sideways with that amount.

name: test13_00004
chinese: 你说几十万能干嘛？
english: What can you do with hundreds of thousands?

name: test13_00005
chinese: 但是你有几十万我这这里绝对不会像其实就是卖衣服，几十万买掉那种。
english: But you have hundreds of thousands, I absolutely won't sell clothes like that, hundreds of thousands to buy that kind.

name: test13_00006
chinese: 我这个位置就是属于上边够不着，下边有有点距离那种感觉。
english: The position I am in is just out of reach above, and there is a bit of distance below, giving me that kind of feeling.

name: test13_00008
chinese: 我说故宫长城去不去，这种地方说出来就很没有意义。
english: Should we go to the Forbidden City and the Great Wall? It's meaningless to talk about such places.

name: test13_00009
chinese: 完全找不到自己的定位。
english: Completely unable to find one's own position.

name: test13_00010
chinese: 家里听说还是去哥伦比亚好，那名气多大啊在国内。
english: My family heard that it's better to go to Colombia. How famous is it in China?

name: test13_00011
chinese: 你哥大毕业和其他学校毕业肯定不一样。
english: Your brother's graduation is definitely different from graduations at other schools.

name: test13_00012
chinese: 但是你突然回国找一个六千块的工作，都是算是一个不错的。
english: But suddenly you went back to your home country to find a job that pays six thousand yuan, which is considered pretty good.

name: test13_00013
chinese: 你又不是学电脑的码农，那上来就一万块钱一个月。
english: You are not a computer programmer, so you can't expect to earn 10,000 yuan per month.

name: test14_00000
chinese: 在我以前的职业生涯里面，有一件很有意思的事情。
english: In my previous career, there was something very interesting.

name: test14_00001
chinese: 我明天拍这个摄影师，他们还是会看到这个表情叫好。
english: I will shoot this photographer tomorrow, and they will still see this expression and applaud.

name: test14_00002
chinese: 然后我天天拍这个表情。
english: Then I take this emoji every day.

name: test14_00003
chinese: 摄影师，啊那个设计师他在旁边他突然跟我说，你能不能笑一下？
english: Photographer, that designer over there suddenly said to me, "Can you smile for a moment?"

name: test14_00004
chinese: 18年的时候，一推开KTV的门，那个男生坐在那。
english: In 2018, when I pushed open the door of the KTV, that boy was sitting there.

name: test14_00005
chinese: 不行你今天必须得答应我，你今天不答应我你不能走。
english: You must agree with me today, you can't leave if you don't agree with me today.

name: test14_00006
chinese: 然后你死活就得答应我。
english: And then you absolutely have to promise me

name: test14_00007
chinese: 也就是这句话我觉得自己好像没有做错，我觉得分对了。
english: I feel like I didn't do anything wrong in this sentence, I think I got it right.

name: test14_00008
chinese: 我一朋友他发了他的照片给我，他们两个在一个酒桌上喝酒。
english: My friend sent me his photo. The two of them were drinking at a table in a bar.

name: test14_00009
chinese: 就只是一张照片还不是正脸，是他低头在那玩手机，别人拍了发过来给我。
english: It's just a photo, not a frontal face. He is looking down playing with his phone, someone took it and sent it to me.

name: test14_00010
chinese: 就告诉我一声这样子，然后我当时就。
english: Just let me know like this, and then I will do it immediately.

name: test14_00011
chinese: 然后那天晚上就喝了很多的酒，喝了很多很多的酒。
english: Then that night, I drank a lot of alcohol, drank a lot, a lot of alcohol.

name: test14_00012
chinese: 我真的是非常认真的喜欢和爱过这个男生。
english: I really, truly, and seriously liked and loved this guy.

name: test14_00013
chinese: 然后我也不敢见他，是因为我怕他破灭了我对这段感情的美好幻想。
english: Then I also dare not see him, because I am afraid that he will shatter my beautiful fantasy about this relationship.

name: test14_00014
chinese: 我觉得我一直没有遇到一个那种可以跟我结婚的人。
english: I feel like I have never met someone who I can marry.

name: test15_00000
chinese: 现在在中国人民大学读研究生。
english: Currently studying for a master's degree at Renmin University of China.

name: test15_00001
chinese: 我从小就从跟中国的渊源比较深一些。
english: I have always had a deeper connection with China since I was young.

name: test15_00002
chinese: 我从小就觉得那儿是我第二个家，在东北就特别舒服。
english: I have always felt that place is my second home since I was a child, I feel particularly comfortable in the northeast.

name: test15_00003
chinese: 中国和俄罗斯都是一个包容性非常强的国家。
english: China and Russia are both very inclusive countries.

name: test15_00004
chinese: 经常有朋友问我你们那是不是都养熊，就是这种固定概念有的时候会让我比较烦。
english: Friends often ask me if you guys raise bears there. Sometimes, this fixed concept can be annoying to me.

name: test15_00005
chinese: 我有的时候就不想解释，我说我们还养老虎狮子啥都养。
english: Sometimes I just don't want to explain. I said we even keep tigers and lions.

name: test15_00006
chinese: 他认可我做的事，但是他想让我回俄罗斯。
english: He approves of what I did, but he wants me to go back to Russia.

name: test15_00007
chinese: 所以我必须证明给他看，我可以在靠自己在中国过得很好。
english: So I have to prove to him that I can live very well in China relying on myself.

name: test15_00008
chinese: 我不知道以后会怎么样，因为我父亲只有我一个儿子。
english: I don't know what will happen in the future because I am my father's only son.

name: test15_00009
chinese: 所以早晚还是应该是要回去的。
english: Sooner or later, we should still go back.

name: test15_00010
chinese: 算是吧！
english: Alright, then!

name: test15_00011
chinese: 他只给我掏了第一年的学费，之后都是我自己交的。
english: He only paid for my first year's tuition, and after that, I paid for it myself.

name: test15_00012
chinese: 他就跟我说，你去到中国之后，你自己整吧。
english: He just told me, after you arrive in China, you can figure things out on your own.

name: test15_00013
chinese: 从小他不会给我买很多衣服，他会带我去各种豪华的地方。
english: Since I was young, he wouldn't buy me a lot of clothes, but he would take me to various luxurious places.

name: test15_00014
chinese: 但是他从来不会让我享受，他会一直给我一个感觉这个东西不是你的。
english: But he never lets me enjoy it, he always gives me a feeling that this thing is not yours.

name: test15_00015
chinese: 我也确实是这么想的。
english: I really think so too.

name: test15_00016
chinese: 很多都是表面上，实质性的东西都没有。
english: Many things are superficial, without substance.

name: test15_00017
chinese: 在俄罗斯没哟内卷，因为大家都很佛。
english: There is no internal roll in Russia because everyone is very calm.

name: test15_00018
chinese: 就内卷很严重，我明白你自己心理很不舒服，但是你没办法改变游戏规则。
english: The internal competition is very serious, I understand that you are feeling very uncomfortable, but you cannot change the rules of the game.

name: test15_00019
chinese: 那你就要适应游戏规则，不要觉得这个事情不对。
english: Then you have to adapt to the rules of the game, don't think that this is wrong.

name: test15_00020
chinese: 这个事情是不对，这个事情是浪费时间，但是不要抱怨。
english: This thing is not right, this thing is a waste of time, but don't complain.
